ability.name: Tinder
ability.description: Allows you to produce and control weak flames that are initially about as strong as matchsticks of bonfires.

ability.name: Ember
ability.description: Allows you to produce and control moderate flames that can be shaped into a variety of attacks like fireballs and fire arrows.

ability.name: Blaze
ability.description: Allows you to produce and control flames, allowing you to unleash streams of fire, fire arrows, fire whips, walls of fire etc.

ability.name: Pyrokinesis
ability.description: Allows you to produce and control flames, your own or natural flames. You have fine control over the flames you control, being able to shape them into arrows, blades, walls, projectiles etc.

ability.name: Hellflames
ability.description: MHA - Allows you to emit and control powerful flames on a large scale. You can unleash giant flamethrowers, and compress your flames into narrow points like lasers, in addition, you are extremely resistant towards flame. But you are also prone to overheating with overuse, lowering your maximum energy output in the process.

ability.name: Micro Pyrokinesis
ability.description: You can control heat and flames on a small scale, although your fire and temperatures are weak they are atomically precise.

ability.name: Disaster Flames
ability.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - You embody the fear of humanity against wildfires, eruptions and flames. You have very potent pyrokinetic abilities as well as lava generation and manipulation. Due to your flames being more conceptual in nature they are far less restrained by ordinary limitations.

ability.name: Amaterasu
ability.description: Naruto - The flames of hell, allow you to ignite an object in your line of sight with the flames of Amaterasu that are impossible to extinguish through normal means and can burn anything. The more this ability is used, the more strain is placed on the user's eye to the point where they may bleed or go blind.

ability.name: Frenzied Flame
ability.description: Elden Ring - Allows the user to wield and manipulate the Frenzied Flame. Fire born from the influence of a foreign cosmic entity capable of burning even minds, souls and space yet also causes mental instability in the user the more it is used, making them obsessed with destruction.

ability.name: Ignite
ability.description: Allows the user to instantly set any object they are in contact with aflame, the stronger a target is, the harder it is to set them on fire. With training, you can also ignite adjacent objects.

ability.name: Conflagration
ability.description: Allows the user to instantly set any target or area they are in contact with aflame, the stronger a target is, the harder it is to set them on fire. With a touch you can set entire buildings on fire, and with enough training even entire cities.

ability.name: Mystic Eyes of Flame
ability.description: Allows you to increase the temperature of and spontaneously combust any target in your line of sight. The stronger the target the more energy is expended. While active your eye turns red and has the image of three overlapping triangles

ability.name: Fire Cloak
ability.description: Skyrim - Allows you to cloak your body and your surroundings in flame, whenever a target gets near you they are set aflame unless they are friendly. May not work on stronger opponents. While fire cloak is active, all fire-based abilities are slightly more potent.

ability.name: Fireball
ability.description: Allows you to form and launch balls from your hands or other appendages, the potency and size of the fireballs are dependent on the amount of energy expended.

ability.name: Flame Weaponry
ability.description: Allows you to emit fire that can shape into any variety of cold weaponry such as swords, axes, hammers and even bows and crossbows. The flames mimic the properties of the weapon it forms into, so it will be sharp as a sword, heavy as a hammer etc.

ability.name: Frostflare
ability.description: Calamity Mod - Allows you to emit and control incredibly powerful and potent Frostflare, flames that freeze instead of burning. While using Frostflare you gain incredible ice and cold resistance in exchange for vulnerability to flame.

ability.name: Fire Absorption
ability.description: Allows you to absorb fire into your body, either storing it to release it later as your own flames or converting it into energy for your own use. But strong enough flames might be impossible or painful to absorb. Absorbing too much fire without release can cause internal burning.

ability.name: Pyromaster
ability.description: Allows the user to control flames and ignition on the level of a Level 5 Esper from Toaru. Your precision, range and control over flame and ignition is unmatched.

ability.name: Unholy Flames
ability.description: Flames of Hell, these flames are so incredibly powerful and potent that even the user is not completely immune to them, causing them to suffer burns from overuse. In addition, these flames deal severe damage to any Holy and Light-based being.

ability.name: Profaned Flames
ability.description: Calamity Mod - Allows you to channel and control the flames of Providence the Profaned Goddess, these flames are incomparably hot and turn all to impartial ash. These flames ignore all fire resistance.

ability.name: Profaned Guardian Transformation
ability.description: Calamity Mod - Allows you to accept the influence of Providence, the Profaned Goddess and temporarily take the form of one of her guardians. Massively increasing your physical stats, granting you wings of flame and the ability to manipulate Profaned Flames. But maintaining this transformation heats up your insides and burns you slowly inside out until it is released, this effect is only mitigated by fire resistance.

ability.name: Shadowflames
ability.description: Terraria - Allows the user to emit and control Shadowflame. The unknowable flames, these flames do not make sound, lack an energy signature and burn away light, making them incredibly difficult to perceive. An experienced user can hide Shadowflame from all senses.

ability.name: Fire Fist
ability.description: Allows you to coat your fists in flames, these flames mimic the properties of your fists and enhance the power behind your strikes while also burning the target. You can also release the fire while punching to create a burning fist projectile.

ability.name: Fire Logia
ability.description: One Piece - Allows the user to emit, create, shape, control and turn into fire and flame at will. Turning them into living fire.

ability.name: Coat Flames
ability.description: Allows you to coat any object you are touching in flames that form a layer around the object These flames do not affect the integrity of the object.

ability.name: Enflame
ability.description: Allows you to coat any object you are holding or your own body in flames, these flames mimic the properties of and reinforce the object the object they are coating. If they coat fists they increase blunt force and if they coat flames they enhance cutting ability alongside their flames.

ability.name: Heat Object
ability.description: Allows you to heat up any object by touching it, the more energy you expend the hotter and faster you can get the target object to heat up.

ability.name: Heat Metal
ability.description: DnD - Allows you to increase the temperature of any metal in your sensory range, the more energy you expend the faster and hotter you can increase the target's temperature.

ability.name: Heatwave
ability.description: Allows you to unleash waves of pure heat from your body that you can either control as directed waves or omnidirectional heat.

ability.name: Sunny Day
ability.description: Allows you to change the weather into harsh sunlight, decreasing the power of any water-based ability in the vicinity while boosting the potency of any fire-based ability.

ability.name: Desolate Land
ability.description: Allows you to change the weather and land to the Desolate Land, raising the temperature and getting rid of moisture to create an unlivable desolate environment with burning harsh sunlight, scorched lands and rivers of lava. Largely amplifies the power of Fire and Earth-based abilities while nullifying all Water-based abilities below Epic rank and weakening those above.

ability.name: Kamino
ability.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - By chanting "Kamino" you can manifest a fire arrow with immense power behind it, although the wind-up is slow, its sheer destructive power and heat more than makeup for it.

ability.name: Blazing Courage
ability.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - Coats object in flames that imitate the aspects of the object like sharp flames or blunt flames

ability.name: Dark Flames
ability.description: Allows you to emit and control the Black Flames of humanity, these flames do not burn or exude heat but instead possess mass greater than most metals, shredding whatever they touch instead of burning them.

ability.name: Extinguish Flames
ability.description: Allows you to remotely extinguish any fire or flame in your sensory range, the stronger a flame is, the more energy you need to expend to extinguish it.

ability.name: Godslayer Apostle Flames
ability.description: Elden Ring - Allows you to wield and control the Godslaying Flames of the Godskin Apostles. While these flames are already plenty strong on their own, when against the divine, these flames get significantly hotter and more potent. The more divine the enemy is, the more potent the flames

ability.name: Blood Flames
ability.description: Elden Ring - Allows you to wield and control Bloodflames, conjuring these flames does not expend energy but instead consumes your vitality and health. In addition to being much more potent than regular flames, blood flames also lacerate on contact and are extremely hard to heal from.

ability.name: Bloodflame Talons
ability.description: Elden Ring - Allows you to conjure talons made of blood flame that both burns and lacerates whoever it digs into. These claws do not expend energy but instead health and vitality to manifest, the more vitality expended, the stronger the claws.

ability.name: Heat vision
ability.description: DC - Allows you to emit laser beams of extreme heat from your eyes, the you can concentrate the beams for less area but more power and vice versa. The longer the beam travels the less powerful it gets.

ability.name: Flame Burst
ability.description: Allows you to unleash a concentrated burst of flame like a beam from your hands. You can also unleash a continuous but less powerful beam of fire.

ability.name: Fire Claws
ability.description: Unordinary - Allows you to grow your fingernails into very durable and sharp claws that you can cover in very hot flames. These claws can even carve apart and melt metal.

ability.name: Flamethrower
ability.description: Allows you to unleash a constant stream of fire from anywhere on your body, the more energy you expend, the hotter and more potent the stream of flame is.

ability.name: Combustion
ability.description: Allows you to create explosions of flame from anywhere on your body.

ability.name: Firebreath
ability.description: Allows you to unleash a breath attack of flame like a Dragon, the gout of flame breath you unleash is very powerful and potent, and the power increases the more you charge and the more energy you expend.

ability.name: Explosive Sweat
ability.description: MHA - You can sweat a very explosive compound on demand that you can detonate at any time, allowing you to unleash powerful explosions.

ability.name: Explosion
ability.description: Allows you to create and project explosions of flame at will, you can launch explosions as condensed projectiles that resemble large glowing bullets that explode on contact. Or with enough mastery, you can send streams of explosive energy from your fingers and palms.

ability.name: Detonation
ability.description: Allows you to charge any item you are holding with explosive energy that you can detonate at any time, turning them into what are essentially time bombs. The explosive energy fades over time. The more energy you expend, the stronger the explosion.

ability.name: Explosion!
ability.description: Konosuba - Allows you to call down an incredibly powerful explosion down from the sky like the wrath of a god or a thermonuclear warhead. The longer you charge the explosion and the more energy you expend, the stronger the explosion is.

ability.name: Heat Palm
ability.description: Unordinary - Allows you to heat up your palms to red-hot levels, only your palms.

ability.name: Magma Logia
ability.description: One Piece - Allows you to create, control, and transform into Lava and Magma at will. Turning you into a living eruption.

ability.name: Eruption
ability.description: Allows you to make magma/lava shoot up from the ground like volcanic eruptions by hitting the ground. With training, you can unleash it from any sufficiently large surface.

ability.name: Lava
ability.description: Allows you to create and control Magma/Lava at will such as hurling large volcanic rocks, forming lava whips, lakes of lava, bullets of magma etc.

ability.name: Match
ability.description: Allows you to light a small flame on your fingers, barely qualifies to be a lighter.

ability.name: Droplet
ability.description: Allows you to conjure small streams of water that drip down from your fingers. Barely enough to wash your hands.

ability.name: Spray Water
ability.description: Allows you to unleash a spray of water from your hands like a showerhead or a hose. Useful for putting out fires and dousing people.

ability.name: Sprinkle
ability.description: Allows you to telekinetically control water to a minor degree, while it does not have enough power output to hurt someone, it can still be used to douse someone or remove moisture from inanimate objects etc.

ability.name: Create Water
ability.description: Konosuba - Allows you to create large volumes of fresh water from your hands but does not allow you to control it, the stream of water is strong enough to seriously hurt someone.

ability.name: Flood
ability.description: Allows you to create and release extreme volumes of water from your body, even at a basic level it is enough to flood a building, with training you can flood entire streets and towns. Doesn't grant control over the water created.

ability.name: Geyser
ability.description: Allows the user to create geysers of water that erupt from the ground around them, the more energy you expend, the more powerful the geysers.

ability.name: Mist
ability.description: Allows you to create and control mist, using it to obscure, hinder and even smother flames. With training, you could create ice mist to freeze or condense mist to create physical obstacles and attacks.

ability.name: Lesser Hydrokinesis
ability.description: Allows you to create and control water around yourself telekinetically, it is not particularly powerful but it is still very versatile and precise.

ability.name: Water Manipulation
ability.description: Allows you to control and shape any water you are in physical contact with, you cannot control water you aren't touching. As long as you maintain contact you can freely morph the water and move it as you like, the more energy you expend, the larger quantities of water you can control and the more power you can exert.

ability.name: Micro Hydrokinesis
ability.description: Allows you to control water on a small scale, although the power you can exert over the water and your range is negligible, your control is atomically precise.

ability.name: Hydro Pump
ability.description: Allows you to create and emit streams of high-volume high-pressure water from your body, these canons of water are strong enough to tear through concrete like paper.

ability.name: Sponge
ability.description: Allows you to absorb and store vast quantities of water in your body by touching them, you can unleash this water at any time.

ability.name: Dehydration
ability.description: Allows the user to evaporate the moisture inside of an object or target through physical, you could turn trees into dust, crumble most rocks etc. Using it on a living target is much harder as they can resist the effects.

ability.name: Drought
ability.description: Allows the user to remotely evaporate water in their sensory range by expending energy, the larger the quantity of water the more energy you need to expend. With enough training, you can even evaporate water inside of objects in your sensory range. Magical waters and water inside more powerful objects take more energy to evaporate.

ability.name: Water Manipulation
ability.description: Allows the user to create and control water, the more energy they expend, the larger quantities of water they can create and control and the more force they can apply to the water.

ability.name: Hydrokinesis
ability.description: Allows the user to telekinetically control Water(H2O) allowing them to freely control, move and shape it and other water-based targets to their liking.

ability.name: Razorblade Typhoon
ability.description: Terraria - Allows you to create miniature typhoons that resemble disks of whirling water razor saw blades, you can unleash these typhoons to deal devastating damage. In addition, they can lock in on and hone into your target.

ability.name: Whirlpool
ability.description: Allows you to create and control whirlpools of water, either using them as barriers, projectiles or general hindrances.

ability.name: Rain
ability.description: Allows you to make it rain from the skies, the more energy you expend the larger the scale of the rain. Slightly boosts water-based abilities and slightly weakens fire-based ones.

ability.name: Torrent
ability.description: Allows you to change the weather of the local area to heavy rain, boosting the potency of water-based abilities while weakening fire-based abilities in the area.

ability.name: Primordial Sea
ability.description: Allows you to call down the primordial sea, summoning a torrential downpour and mighty waves that swallow the land you are on. During Primordial Sea, all water-based abilities are greatly boosted while all fire-based abilities below Epic rank are snuffed out and those above are greatly weakened.

ability.name: Dampen
ability.description: Allows you to dampen any object you are touching by making it more moist.

ability.name: Dry
ability.description: Allows you to dry any object you are touching, note that does not evaporate all water particles inside but only gets rid of moisture the object should otherwise not have.

ability.name: Aquamaster
ability.description: Allows you to create and control Water(H2O) on the scale of a level 5 esper from Toaru. Granting you incredible range, power and unmatched precision in controlling water.

ability.name: Holy Water
ability.description: Allows you to create and control holy water, holy water is very effective against unholy beings, you expend more energy to either create more water or create more potent holy water.

ability.name: Hydrofreeze
ability.description: Unordinary - allows the user to create, control and turn into water and ice, allowing them to shift into water to either escape or dodge, create icicles, freeze opponents etc. But assuming water or ice likewise makes you vulnerable to what water is vulnerable to.

ability.name: Water Bubbles
ability.description: Allows you to blow harmless water bubbles from your body.

ability.name: Hydrification
ability.description: Allows the user to turn their body into water at will, allowing them to slip away, be immune to physical attacks and gain increased mobility. But turning into water also makes the user vulnerable to weaknesses water has.

ability.name: Water Breathing
ability.description: Allows the user to breathe underwater as if they were on land.

ability.name: Steam Emission
ability.description: Allows the user to conjure, control and emit blasts of hot steam from their body.

ability.name: Ink Manipulation
ability.description: Allows the user to create and telekinetically control ink. With training, you could even condense ink into hardened constructs under your command.

ability.name: Cool
ability.description: Allows you to decrease the temperature of objects through touch. Does not decrease it particularly fast and it's certainly not enough to freeze then, but it will keep your drink or ice cream cool.

ability.name: Chill
ability.description: Allows you to create and control ice to a minor degree, not very good for skewering people with icicles but good for conjuring things like ice cubes or ice knives.

ability.name: Frostbite
ability.description: Allows you to rapidly freeze targets you are touching, with training you can increase the area of effect to freeze someone's entire body by grabbing their hand, or freeze the floor of an entire street.

ability.name: Ice Spike
ability.description: Allows the user to conjure and launch ice spikes or make the spikes of ice erupt from the ground. The more energy they expend, the stronger and larger the icicles.

ability.name: Ice Creation
ability.description: Allows you to create ice but not control it, you can still conjure walls of ice, shoot out spikes, ice weapons etc but you do not have telekinetic control over the ice you create.

ability.name: Iceberg
ability.description: Allows the user to freeze objects and create massive amounts of ice, allowing them to freeze entire streets, encase buildings in ice and with training, they can even turn entire city blocks into icebergs.

ability.name: Ice Age
ability.description: Allows the user to freeze objects and create incredible volumes of ice at will, freezing entire cities and buildings, launching ice boulders that weigh thousands of tons, impale people with pillars of ice. With enough training, they can turn entire cities into mountains of ice.

ability.name: Frost
ability.description: Allows the user to create and control ice at will, but they cannot control ice they haven't created.

ability.name: Ice Manipulation
ability.description: MHA - Allows the user to sense and exert telekinetic control over all ice in their range, but they themselves cannot create ice. But it is very potent in its control.

ability.name: Half Hot Half Cold
ability.description: MHA - Allows the user to create and emit both ice and fire from either side of their body, also providing elemental resistance to both fire and ice. In addition, with enough training, they can combine both aspects to unleash Frostflare.

ability.name: Frozen Heart
ability.description: Heavily boosts the power of the user's ice abilities and forcefully keeps their minds calm and sharp, making them resistant to any mental influences, in addition, they are immune to all frost effects below Epic rank.

ability.name: Cryokinesis
ability.description: Allows the user to telekinetically create and control ice and cold, allowing them to create ice constructs, remotely freeze objects etc.

ability.name: White Album
ability.description: Jojo Stand - Allows the user to freeze objects with extreme temperatures and form an armour of cold ice around themselves, they can freely dispel the effects of their ability. With enough training, they can plunge objects to near sub-zero temperatures.

ability.name: Horus
ability.description: Jojo - Allows the user to control and create ice constructs and launch them as projectiles, this ability can act independently from the user, attacking hostiles without their input and automatically creating ice barriers around them when in danger.

ability.name: Demons Extract
ability.description: Akame Ga Kill Esdeath - Grants the user extreme cryokinetic abilities as well as the ability to freeze virtually anything as well as create extreme amounts of ice that they can telekinetically control. With enough training the user can briefly freeze even time itself.

ability.name: Cryomaster
ability.description: Toaru - Allows the user to control cold and ice on the same level as a level 5 esper from Toaru. Granting them unmatched range, power and control over Ice and Cold.

ability.name: Snow Warning
ability.description: Allows the user to summon a snowstorm on their location that slightly boosts ice-based abilities.

ability.name: Blizzard
ability.description: Allows the user to summon a fierce blizzard that boosts the power of ice-based abilities.

ability.name: Snow Manipulation
ability.description: Allows the user to create and control snow, the amount of snow and the power behind it is equal to the amount of energy expended.

ability.name: Snow Logia
ability.description: Monet from one piece - Allows the user to create, control and turn into snow. Turning them into a living entity of snow.

ability.name: Ice Logia
ability.description: Aokiji from one piece- Allows the user to create, control and turn into ice. Turning them into a living entity of ice.

ability.name: Freezing Breath
ability.description: Allows you to charge and unleash a breath attack of frigid winds that freeze whatever they hit. The longer you charge and the more energy you expend the more powerful the breath is.

ability.name: Ice Sprout
ability.description: Allows the user to sprout ice constructs from the ground and other surfaces in the form of walls and pillars to serve as barriers, hinder enemies or squish them.

ability.name: Black Ice
ability.description: Allows you to create and control black ice, black ice is a special type of incredibly durable ice that is very resistant against heat and fire.

ability.name: Ice Formation
ability.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - Allows the user to manifest extreme levels of cold and ice at will that they can exert telekinetic control over.,

ability.name: Absolute Zero
ability.description: Allows you to drop temperatures down to absolute zero on either a target you are touching or in an area, the temperature drop is not instant. The more energy you can expend, the faster you can reach Absolute Zero.

ability.name: Divinity Water & Ice
ability.description: You are a god of water and ice who holds domain over both with all that entails

ability.name: Typhoon
ability.description: Allows you to manifest and control Typhoons at will, creating miniature ones as direct attacks or unleashing them on an entire area for massive devastation.

ability.name: Breeze
ability.description: Allows you to conjure a light breeze from your body, not nearly strong enough to blow a grown man off his feet.

ability.name: Gust
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and control winds strong enough to injure and take grown men off their feet.

ability.name: Wind
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and control winds and air with decent power and precision, strong enough to kill people with lashes of wind or throw them in the air with gusts of wind.

ability.name: Gale
ability.description: Allows you to conjure, shape and control powerful gales of wind and air.

ability.name: Hurricane
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and command mighty winds and hurricanes with great power. With enough training, you can devastate several cities with hurricanes and storms.

ability.name: Tempest
ability.description: Upgrade of Hurricane You can create and create mighty storms and hurricanes to create massive devastation. With enough training, you can unleash grand tempests that devastate cities.

ability.name: Aerokinesis
ability.description: Allows you to sense and telekinetically control wind, granting you precise and powerful control of the air around you.

ability.name: Wind Blade
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and launch razor-sharp currents of wind in the shapes of slashes that take the form of crescent slashes.

ability.name: Wind Edge
ability.description: Allows you to cloak any item you are holding with razor-sharp winds to enhance its cutting ability while also allowing you to launch the cloak any time as a projectile to extend the cutting effect.

ability.name: Delta Stream
ability.description: Allows you to call forth winds that turn the surrounding area to become very windy, enhancing the power and efficiency of all wind-based abilities.

ability.name: Floating
ability.description: Allows you to cloak yourself in winds that carry you, allowing you to fly through the air

ability.name: Wind Flight
ability.description: Allows you to push off of the air around you, allowing you to fly with precision and power.

ability.name: Air Jet
ability.description: Allows you to create air jets, streams of powerful air currents

ability.name: Wind Cloak
ability.description: Allows you to cloak yourself in powerful winds, these winds will assist your movements, making you faster, and swifter and allowing you to dash and float with their help.

ability.name: Whirlwind
ability.description: MHA - Allows you to create and control powerful whirlwinds and air currents that you can control but it is not very precise.

ability.name: Vacuum
ability.description: Allows you to create vacuums and control them in your sensory range allowing you to pull things in and cause implosions. The more powerful a vacuum is the more energy it expends.

ability.name: Louden
ability.description: Allows you to increase noises to non-destructive levels that, while obnoxiously loud won't cause damage.

ability.name: Megaphone
ability.description: Allows you to amplify all noises you create, they can get so loud that they disorientate and temporarily deafen opponents.

ability.name: Sonic Blast
ability.description: Allows you to amplify all noises you create, they can get so loud that they can crack objects, rupture eardrums and deafen opponents.

ability.name: View Air
ability.description: Allows you to share your senses with the air around you, allowing you to map the world around you through the wind. The base range is 1km but it can be improved with training and base stats.

ability.name: Boomburst
ability.description: Allows you to amplify all noises you create, to the point where they cause physical destruction, internal damage, and deafness.

ability.name: Airlock
ability.description: Allows you to increase the air resistance in an area to the point where it can feel like wading through mud and make things like flight near impossible, with training you can increase it to the point where even trying to move causes things to burst into flame from friction.

ability.name: Storm Blade
ability.description: Allows you to conjure a blade of compressed air that you can manipulate the size and shape of, this most commonly takes the shape of the sword. You can also release wind slash projectiles from this blade.

ability.name: Wind Barrier
ability.description: Allows you to conjure a barrier made of violent air streams, by default it is a barrier around the user that excels in deflecting projectiles and elements but not so much physical force.

ability.name: Invisible Air
ability.description: From Fate - Barrier of the Wind King, the invisible air is a barrier made of several layers of extremely compressed air that the user can control at will, to either release in destructive bursts, cover an object in to render them invisible or to reinforce an existing weapon in incredibly powerful winds.

ability.name: Weather Manipulation
ability.description: Allows you to manipulate the weather conditions in an area, despite the massive range consumes very little energy but can't be used offensively very well.

ability.name: Wind Alteration
ability.description: Allows you to alter the chemical composition and properties of air, allowing you to increase the oxygen concentration to make it more flammable and poisonous or dense enough that it feels like steel among other things.

ability.name: Oxygen Manipulation
ability.description: Allows you to sense and telekinetically control oxygen and oxygen atoms with extreme precision and power.

ability.name: Aeromaster
ability.description: Toaru - Allows the user to control wind, air and its composition on the same level as a level 5 esper from Toaru. Granting them unmatched range, power and control over wind and air.

ability.name: Atmospheric Pressure Manipulation
ability.description: Allows you to control atmospheric pressure with zones that you can increase and decrease the pressure of.

ability.name: Air Whips
ability.description: Allows the user to create and control whips of compressed air that they can use to lash out or grab things with. The longer and stronger the whip the more energy is expended

ability.name: Spark
ability.description: Allows you to create small sparks of electricity from your body, not even strong enough to function as a proper taser.

ability.name: Taser
ability.description: Allows you to channel electricity through your body and discharge it, strong enough to seriously hurt someone.

ability.name: Arc
ability.description: Allows you to channel electricity through your body and discharge, with training you can channel where your electricity goes to aim it more precisely.

ability.name: Electric Discharge
ability.description: Allows you to channel potent electricity through your body and discharge, with training you can channel where your electricity goes to aim it more precisely.

ability.name: Lightning Channel
ability.description: Allows you to channel lightning through any object you are holding, reinforcing and empowering them, this lightning imitates the object it is channelled through, becoming sharp with a sword and heavy with a hammer.

ability.name: Lightning Absorption
ability.description: Allows you to absorb electricity and lightning and store it inside of your body. You can convert absorbed lightning into energy to refill your reserves or channel it to increase your power or use it as an attack.

ability.name: Call Lightning
ability.description: Allows you to call down lightning that strikes from the sky to strike any location in your sensory range, not very effective indoors.

ability.name: Call Thunder
ability.description: Allows you to call down powerful thunder that strikes from the sky to strike any location in your sensory range, not very effective indoors.

ability.name: Call Greater Thunder
ability.description: Allows you to call down very powerful thunder that strikes from the sky to strike any location in your sensory range, not very effective indoors. With training, you can call down multiple at once or even charge it to send down a concentrated spear of thunder.

ability.name: Storm Call
ability.description: Allows you to freely call thunder and lightning from the skies to strike down on the ground with little energy consumption. You can even charge it to smite the world with concentrated lightning.

ability.name: Lightning Form
ability.description: Allows you to turn into a living bolt and lightning and travel extremely quickly while ignoring most types of conventional attacks. But you are extremely vulnerable to grounding which will eject you from lightning while injuring you.

ability.name: Radio Waves
ability.description: (Tech)MHA - Allows you to emit electromagnetic waves that disable and cripple all technology with an interface. With training, you can even fine-tune the waves you send to instead to activate or control electronics.

ability.name: Impulse
ability.description: Allows you to quicken the electrical signals in your body, increasing your reflexes and speed proportionally. Overusing may cause nerve damage.

ability.name: Godspeed
ability.description: HxH - Overhaul the nervous system with your own lightning, giving near-instant reflexes and granting you extreme speed. But the lightning will cause damage to your body over time so extended use is not recommended.

ability.name: Electrokinesis
ability.description: Allows you to create and control electricity at will, whether that be shooting lightning bolts, pulling a Palpatine, or tweaking your own bioelectricity. But you cannot control electromagnetic waves.

ability.name: Electromagnekinesis
ability.description: Allows you to sense, interact with and control electromagnetism, a fundamental force of the universe, allowing you to control magnetic objects, create railguns, shoot lightning, tweak bioelectricity and much more.

ability.name: Assign
ability.description: Allows you to assign polarity to objects to make them attract or repel each other, needs physical contact to activate. The more energy you expend the stronger a polarity is.

ability.name: Electromaster
ability.description: Toaru - Allows you complete control over Electromagnetism, a fundamental force of the universe, your range, power and precision in manipulating Electromagnetism is unmatched.

ability.name: Stun Shock
ability.description: Allows you to mess up someone's bioelectricity via touch, stunning or paralyzing them, with training you could do advanced manipulation of their bodies. The stronger an opponent is, the harder it is to affect them.

ability.name: Lightning Breath
ability.description: Allows you to charge and unleash a breath of devastating lightning waves, the longer you charge for and the more energy you expend, the stronger the breath is.

ability.name: Railgun
ability.description: Allows you to turn any magnetic object in your grasp into a railgun projectile, the higher the mass higher cost and you also have to aim it.

ability.name: Frozen Lightning
ability.description: Allows you to wield and control frozen lightning, unlike regular lightning which is incredibly hot, Frozen Lightning is instead proportionally colder, freezing whatever object it electrocutes or passes through.

ability.name: Lightning Spear
ability.description: Allows the user to conjure a spear of lightning that they can throw as a projective,(does not travel at lightning speed). This spear possesses penetrative power and deals increased damage against draconic entities.

ability.name: Great Lightning Spear
ability.description: Allows the user to conjure a spear of lightning that they can throw as a projective,(does not travel at lightning speed). This spear possesses penetrative power and deals increased damage against draconic entities that rends their powerful scales and hides, nulling their defence.

ability.name: Sunlight Spear
ability.description: Allows the user to conjure a spear of lightning imbued with the power of the sun that they can throw as a projective. This spear possesses penetrative power and deals increased damage against draconic entities and unholy beings.

ability.name: Thunder Cloak
ability.description: Allows you to cloak your body in thunder, increasing your speed, power and reflexes while also imbuing electricity into your attacks.

ability.name: Chidori
ability.description: Naruto - Allows the user to cloak their hands in violent sharp electricity that also enhances piercing and cutting ability, essentially turning their hands into lightning blades.

ability.name: Lightning Bolt
ability.description: Release a bolt of lightning from your hands to the target that travels at the speed of lightning.

ability.name: Electromagnetic Sight
ability.description: Allows the user to change their vision to be able to see electromagnetism and electricity even through walls as well as being able to instinctively distinguish between and understand them.

ability.name: Electricity
ability.description: Unordinary - Allows the user to create and control electricity(not kinesis) as well as use it to slightly enhance their own stats, they can also sense and see nearby currents even through walls, and they can also ground opponent lightning with their own body.

ability.name: Attention
ability.description: You are able to manifest a very eye catching and distracting aura centered on yourself, making you incredibly noticeable whatever you do.

ability.name: Lightning Claws
ability.description: Create claws of violent lightning on top of your regular hands to sever and electrocute enemies at the same time.

ability.name: Pebble Sling
ability.description: Conjure pebbles and small rocks and sling them toward enemies to minorly inconvenience them or hurt them if they hit their eyes.

ability.name: Rock Throw
ability.description: Conjure rocks and small stones and launch them as projectiles, not very powerful but a rock thrown at your head always hurts.

ability.name: Stone Bullet
ability.description: Conjure rocks and small stones and shoot them like bullets with lethal power, you are basically a living stone gun.

ability.name: Boulder Hurl
ability.description: Conjure a large boulder and hurl it at your enemies, regardless of your existing strength, the weight of the boulder does not affect your throwing ability regardless if it is a person or a house-sized boulder.

ability.name: Rock Shotgun
ability.description: Conjure multiple small rocks and launch them at lethal speeds.

ability.name: Bullet
ability.description: Allows you to conjure lead or other metal bullets ranging from small to high calibre and launch them at supersonic to hypersonic speeds. The more energy you expend the higher the caliber bullet and higher its speed.

ability.name: Move Earth
ability.description: Allows you to telekinetically move earth in your sensory range, does not have much lethal power.

ability.name: Quicksand
ability.description: Allows you to turn ground into quicksand that grabs and pulls anyone who steps on it.

ability.name: Earth Spikes
ability.description: Allows you to create, control and launch spikes made from earth and rock. You can also make these spikes energy from the ground in your sensory range.

ability.name: Meteor Strike
ability.description: Call down meteors from the sky, the size of the meteor and its speed are dependent on the amount of energy you expend.

ability.name: Chain & Shackle
ability.description: Create metal chains and shackles that erupt from the earth to bind your enemies, they are very difficult to dodge as they track opponents and chase them down.

ability.name: Catapult
ability.description: Create and launch giant boulders at your enemies regardless of your existing strength, the weight of the boulder does not affect your throwing ability regardless if it is a person or a house-sized boulder.

ability.name: Stonesprout
ability.description: Allows you to sprout constructs of rock and stones from surfaces such as walls and pillars to act as defense, terrain or to smash your enemies with them.

ability.name: Micro Ferrokinesis
ability.description: Allows you to manipulate metals on a small but extremely precise scale. You cannot hurl cars but you could grab a chunk of gold and turn it into an extremely ornate ring with microscopic carvings.

ability.name: Earth Armor
ability.description: Allows you to create an armour made of earth around your body to absorb blows and attacks. This armour does not impede your mobility or speed.

ability.name: Earthquake
ability.description: Allows the user to create earthquakes, causing massive environmental destruction.

ability.name: Fissure
ability.description: Allows the user to create fissures on objects to shatter them or to split them apart. The harder an object is, the more energy is needed to fissure.

ability.name: Ferrokinesis
ability.description: Allows the user to telekinetically control and shape metal in their sensory range. Ripping them out of buildings to turn them into spears to launch at enemies, flying using some metal bands, controlling blood with iron etc.

ability.name: Terrakinesis
ability.description: Allows the user to telekinetically control earth and rock in their sensory range.

ability.name: Armor
ability.description: Allows you to create very durable and reinforced metal armour on your body that enhances endurance. The stronger you are, the stronger the metal formed is, you can also change the shape of the armour with concentration.

ability.name: Metal Kaiser
ability.description: Worm - Allows you to create metal from any non-organic surface such as giant blades, walls, and pillars. The more energy you expend, the more metal is created.

ability.name: Iron Manipulation
ability.description: Allows you to telekinetically control iron and iron-based objects in your perception. The level of control and strength is based on the level of focus and the amount of mana spent.

ability.name: Extinction Meteors
ability.description: Allows you to bring down giant meteors that can cause massive devastation and damage. The mass, power and speed of these meteors are dependent on the amount of energy expended. This ability is quite expensive to use.

ability.name: Pocket Sand
ability.description: Conjure and launch a handful of sand from your hands. Shouting "pocket sand!" as you do so might make it stronger.

ability.name: Sandshot
ability.description: Conjure and launch sand from your fingers at non-lethal speeds but enough to harm people.

ability.name: Sandstream
ability.description: Launch powerful streams of sand from your body to hinder enemy vision and injure them, equivalent to sandblasting them.

ability.name: Sandblast
ability.description: Allows you to launch blasts of high-velocity sand clouds, capable of rending and shredding metals and especially flesh

ability.name: Death Valley Duster
ability.description: Allows you to conjure violent clouds of sand and dust that you can launch with blasts of immense power like a sandblast to shred targets.

ability.name: Primordial Earth
ability.description: Allows you to control earth, dust and sand in your sensory range, allowing you to unleash giant blasts of sand, launch jagged boulders, and make stalagmites erupt.

ability.name: Primordial Ancient
ability.description: Allows you to control earth, dust and sand to extreme levels, what it lacks in precision it makes up in unbelievable destructive power.

ability.name: Karura's Blessing
ability.description: Karura's blessing is an autonomous sand shield that protects from danger automatically and does not consume mana.

ability.name: Burial
ability.description: Allows you to instantly bury any target touching the ground under the ground, suffocating and crushing them, using burial on a corpse prevents necromancy and revival on them.

ability.name: Conjure Lesser Earth Elemental
ability.description: Allows you to conjure or summon Lesser Water and Ice Elementals out of your energy and command them, such as Mudmen, Stone Golems, Sand, Claymen, etc., that can use a variety of earth-based magic or other similar effects. You can only conjure elementals that are equal to or lesser in power than a Uncommon Familiar. The power, shape and ability of the elemental you can conjure depends on your own expertise and power level. The conjured Elemental will draw power from you to maintain itself and use its abilities. The stronger the Elemental, the more energy they will need from you to sustain themselves. If you stop supplying them with energy, they will vanish. If you spend enough time, energy and have the proper skills, you can create permanent elementals who do not rely on you for energy. Elementals are not counted as Familiars by the system.

ability.name: Conjure Earth Elemental
ability.description: Allows you to conjure or summon Earth Elementals out of your energy and command them, such as Earth Sprites, Iron Golems, Stone Atronachs, etc., that can use a variety of earth-based magic or other similar effects. Who can use a variety of earth-based magic and other similar effects. You can only conjure elementals that are at most equal to or lesser in power than a Rare Familiar. The power, shape and ability of the elemental you can conjure depends on your own expertise and power level. The conjured Elemental will draw power from you to maintain itself and use its abilities. The stronger the Elemental, the more energy they will need from you to sustain themselves. If you stop supplying them with energy, they will vanish. If you spend enough time, energy and have the proper skills, you can create permanent elementals who do not rely on you for energy. Elementals are not counted as Familiars by the system.

ability.name: Conjure Greater Earth Elemental
ability.description: Allows you to conjure powerful Greater Earth Elementals out of your energy and command them, who can use a variety of earth-based magic and other abilities, such as Diamond Golems, Regirocks, Elder Magma Elementals,(DnD), etc. You can only conjure elementals that are equal to or lesser in power than an Elite Familiar. The power, shape and ability of the elemental you can conjure depends on your own expertise and power level. The conjured Elemental will draw power from you to maintain itself and use its abilities. The stronger the Elemental, the more energy they will need from you to sustain themselves. If you stop supplying them with energy, they will vanish. If you spend enough time, energy and have the proper skills, you can create permanent elementals who do not rely on you for energy. Elementals are not counted as Familiars by the system.

ability.name: Golem Creation
ability.description: Allows you to animate and command golems from earth, mud, sand or metal, the more durable and powerful the golem the higher the cost. The golems can be made temporary with less energy cost or permanent with a very high energy cost.

ability.name: Titan Armor
ability.description: Allows you to form a gigantic armour of kaiju proportions around yourself by fusing with the earth and forming it into armour around yourself. The bigger the armor the more energy expended.

ability.name: Golem Armor
ability.description: Allows you to create a golem around yourself that acts as armour and enhances your physical stats constructed from the ground underneath your feet or materials you are touching.

ability.name: Stalagmite Burst
ability.description: Allows you to unleash stalagmite blades that erupt from the ground as spikes to impale your enemies.

ability.name: Thousand Arrows
ability.description: Pokemon - Allows you to create and launch spears or arrows made of the ground around you, either as artillery, traps, or just plain projectile bombardment.

ability.name: Metal Manipulation
ability.description: MHA - Allows you to control the shape and form of all metals you are in contract with.

ability.name: Mud Manipulation
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and control mud, creating swamps underneath your feet or bombarding your opponents with mud.

ability.name: Crystal Shower
ability.description: Allows you to create crystals and shoot them as projectiles at your target, the larger and faster the crystal the more energy you expend.

ability.name: Crystal Spikes
ability.description: Allows you to create durable but brittle crystal spikes that pop out of the ground or any surface you are in contact with to impale your opponents or serve as physical barriers.

ability.name: Diamond Skin
ability.description: One Piece - You can cover your body in a diamond-like texture, massively enhancing your durability and mass against all forms of damage. Even as a base human you can easily take high-calibre bullets and tank shells without feeling much, a car could hit you without knocking you off your feet, and you can walk through fire without feeling a thing. Even a missile cannot kill you even if it would hurt.

ability.name: Crystal Creation
ability.description: Allows you to create crystals on your body or on surfaces you are touching, you can control the shape and size of the crystal while creating but after that, you cannot alter it any further.

ability.name: Crystals
ability.description: Allows you to create and sprout crystals from your body, either making them erupt from your body like spikes, covering your skin with them as armour or just selling them for cash.(AUTHOR NOTE: Crystal refers to a nebulous crystaline structure that is durable, not allowing you to make ANY type of crystaline structure.)

ability.name: Gem Creation
ability.description: Allows you to create precious gems that can hold a lot of energy or mana, the larger and more valuable the gem, the more energy you need to consume to create them.

ability.name: Pure Gem Creation
ability.description: Allows you to create pure precious gems that can hold immense energy and serve as vessels for various things. The purer and more potent the gem, the more energy you need to consume to create it.

ability.name: Sand Veil
ability.description: Create a small localized sandstorm on your location that also makes your presence harder to detect inside of it while allowing you to see through it freely.

ability.name: Fool Sand
ability.description: JoJo - Allows you to conjure autonomous sand that can shapeshift, attack and defend without your input to protect you, eliminate enemies or simply provide utility.

ability.name: Desert Weaponry
ability.description: Allows you to create a variety of weapons and attacks made out of sand and wind to unleash as projectiles such as giant sand blades, spears and hammers.

ability.name: Sandstorm Body
ability.description: Allows the user to turn their body into a living cloud of sand and reform at will, the damage inflicted on the sand reflects on the user.

ability.name: Dig
ability.description: Allows you to dig and move incredibly fast through underground like a mole, you can also breathe underground too. You dig faster than you can sprint.

ability.name: Dowsing
ability.description: Allows you to detect metals around you like a mental radar, the more valuable a metal is, the more distinct its presence in your radar.

ability.name: View Earth
ability.description: Allows you to share your vision with the earth, feeling everything the earth feels and knowing the location everything inside of the earth, the default range is 5km which can be increased with training.

ability.name: Wire
ability.description: Allows you to create and control metal wires, once a wire has separated from your body you no longer have control over it. You can also reinforce your wires with energy to make them more durable.

ability.name: Pika
ability.description: One Piece - Allows you to fuse with the earth, allowing you complete control over the terrain, whether it be shaping, moving and reforming it or turning it into a giant golem around yourself.

ability.name: Desert Logia
ability.description: One Piece. - Allows the user to create, control and turn into sand. In addition, they can also drain moisture from objects to dry them and turn stone into sand.

ability.name: Blackout
ability.description: Allows you to banish all light from an area, making it nigh impossible to see through mundane means. The larger the area the more energy is needed.

ability.name: Shadow Travel
ability.description: Allows you to sink into shadows and travel inside of them like Black Sabbath from JoJo, if you get hit by sunlight while inside of a shadow you take damage as if you were burnt.

ability.name: Shadow Hands
ability.description: Allows you to manifest floating hands made out of shadows that you can control as your own, they can grip, crush, slash and combine to become large and more powerful.

ability.name: Sethan
ability.description: Sethan from JoJo - Allows you to move your shadow like a living creature that can attack, whenever someone steps on your shadow they rapidly de-age, the de-ageing is dispelled when the user is unconscious or the ability is turned off. Stronger opponents de-age slower.

ability.name: Shadow Puppeteer
ability.description: Naruto - Allows you to extend your shadow and when your shadow touches the target's shadow their movement mimics yours until the ability is dispelled.

ability.name: Shadow Tag
ability.description: Allows you to interact with the shadow of people as tangible objects, you can step on or pin their shadow to prevent them from escaping or grab it and pull them toward you.

ability.name: Shadow Dart
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and launch shadow darts made from energy that make no sound.

ability.name: Shadow Cloak
ability.description: Cloak yourself in shadows to make yourself harder to perceive and muffle the sounds you make to enhance your stealth capabilities.

ability.name: Shadow Stalker
ability.description: Worm - Allows you and your equipment to enter a shadow state, allowing you to phase through solid matter. With training, you can also use phasing on equipment to ignore target durability by unphasing bolts inside of them. While in shadow form you are incredibly vulnerable to electricity and aerosols.

ability.name: Shadow Ball
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and launch a fast-moving orb made of shadows that carries destructive power and deals additional damage to spirits.

ability.name: Shadow Blade
ability.description: Allows you to conjure a blade of shadows that you can use as a weapon, you can adjust the size and shape of the weapon, despite being lightweight it is very sharp and can ignore around 10% of the target's durability, always dealing at least some damage.

ability.name: Shadow Scythe
ability.description: Allows you to conjure a scythe made of shadows that you can alter the size and shape of, the scythe can select what it does and doesn't cut according to your will and it can also ignore a portion of the target durability.

ability.name: Reaper's Scythe
ability.description: Allows you to conjure a scythe made of pure darkness that you can alter the size and shape of, the scythe completely ignores the durability of physical objects and barriers while also preventing regeneration and resurrection from the wounds it causes. But the scythe expends energy from you in proportional to the durability of whatever you cut.

ability.name: Death's Instrument
ability.description: Allows you to call forth death's instrument, a pitch-black scythe that completely ignores all durability, magical or physical. Wounds inflicted affect souls as well as bodies, making them impossible to heal by mundane means.

ability.name: Bottomless Swamp
ability.description: Allows you to transform the ground around you into a bottomless swamp that traps any targets that step on it, making them sink further into the swamp, if they fully submerge they are fully incapacitated and enter a stasis-like state.,

ability.name: Dark Spear
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and launch spears made of dark energy that deals additional damage to holy and divine beings.

ability.name: Shadow Storage
ability.description: Your shadow can move and extend across 2d surfaces, allowing you to sink objects into it that are put into a stasis, does not have a weight limit and object inside can be ejected out at any time.

ability.name: Shadow Claws
ability.description: Allows you to conjure sharp and lightweight Shadow Claws on top of your hands that can slash opponents. You can also extend their length and sharpness with training.

ability.name: Shadow Chains
ability.description: Allows you to create and control chains of shadow weaved from your own, once they snare an enemy they quickly start exhausting their energy.

ability.name: Blind
ability.description: Allows you to inflict a curse on your opponents, once applied it blocks off their sense of sight. You can place a curse on someone through touch or throwing a hex, a moderately fast projectile that looks like a rune, duration depends on the target's magic resistance and can be applied permanently on targets who cannot resist.

ability.name: Grue
ability.description: Worm - Allows to create a cloud of darkness that blots out the sense of everyone inside, making it incredibly difficult to perceive anything while inside. The effects can be partially mitigated by strong targets.

ability.name: Deafness
ability.description: Allows you to inflict a curse on your opponents, once applied it blocks off their sense of hearing. You can place a curse on someone through touch or throwing a hex, a moderately fast projectile that looks like a rune, duration depends on the target's magic resistance and can be applied permanently on targets who cannot resist.

ability.name: Numbness
ability.description: Allows you to inflict a curse on your opponents, once applied it blocks off their sense of touch. You can place a curse on someone through touch or throwing a hex, a moderately fast projectile that looks like a rune, duration depends on the target's magic resistance and can be applied permanently on targets who cannot resist.

ability.name: Mute
ability.description: Allows you to inflict a curse on your opponents, once applied it blocks off their ability to speak. You can place a curse on someone through touch or throwing a hex, a moderately fast projectile that looks like a rune, duration depends on the target's magic resistance and can be applied permanently on targets who cannot resist.

ability.name: Conjure Shadowbeast
ability.description: Allows you to conjure a temporary familiar made of shadows that can act autonomously, the power of the familiar depends on the amount of energy used to create them.

ability.name: Gate of Nightmares
ability.description: Allows you to unleash a horde of shadow beasts and darkness monsters under your control by summoning a gigantic 10-meter tall gate made of darkness. The more energy you give to the gate, the more beasts that will be unleashed.

ability.name: Dark Lance
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and unleash lances made of dark energy which are exceptionally lethal against holy beings. In addition, wounds inflicted by dark lances are difficult to heal.

ability.name: Abyss
ability.description: Reality Marbe - Allows you to pull your targets into the Abyss, inside the Abyss all energies and vitality start getting exhausted, rapidly draining your opponents of energy and life. Inside the Abyss, all dark abilities are boosted.

ability.name: Void Tendril
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and control tendrils woven from void, these tendrils can grapple, crush, whip and pierce to your desires. You can also share sensations with the tentacles.

ability.name: Shade Cloak
ability.description: Allows you to temporarily shift your body into a shadow state and phase through attacks and magic, does not have weaknesses other than light and holy magic but you can only turn into a shadow for 1 second at a time before a 3-second cooldown.

ability.name: Cursecraft
ability.description: Allows you to create and apply curses depending on your abilities and abilities. E.g. Light ability becomes blinding, strength ability becomes weakness etc.

ability.name: Darkness Devil
ability.description: Chainsaw Man - You are the fear of darkness incarnate, you have authority over all darkness and shadows, allowing you to control and manipulate them to your will.

ability.name: Black Hole
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and control weaker small-scale virtual black holes. With training, you could even conjure real black holes and make it everyone else's problem.

ability.name: Void Dragon's Breath
ability.description: Allows you to charge and unleash a breath attack of erosive and destructive void energy that exhausts the energy of whatever it touches. The longer you charge for and the more energy you use the stronger the breath is.

ability.name: Void Mirror Image
ability.description: Legendary Mechanic - Allows you to conjure clones of yourself under your control that cannot interact with the world and act as distractions.

ability.name: Void Travel
ability.description: Legendary Mechanic - Allows you to temporarily slip into the void dimension, while in the void dimension, you can freely traverse space but are unable to interact with the real world, time in the void dimension time is slower than normal. The distance you have covered in the void realm is equal to real life, allowing you to teleport short ranges with it, you can stay in the void dimension for 30 seconds but this can be increased with training. 5 Minute cooldown.

ability.name: Chaos Entity Release
ability.description: Legendary Mechanic - Allows you to release your physical form to turn into a Void Observer, a sentient grey cloud of energy that can slip into the void dimension at will, rendering you completely intangible while still allowing you to observe the real world, staying in the void dimensions slightly drains your energy while inside. While in Chaos Observer form you are mostly immune to physical force. Any damage taken in Chaos Observer form is reflected in the real body.

ability.name: Void Path
ability.description: Legendary Mechanic - Allows the user to directly open gates to the Void Dimension, allowing them to traverse the void, throw entities inside and even bring entities out of the void dimension, use with caution.

ability.name: Void Distorter Form
ability.description: Legendary Mechanic - Transforms the user into a Void Distorter, a being native to the Void whose abilities allow it to distort and destroy the natural world by distorting and shaping the void to cause massive destruction like spatial distortions. Also has the ability to use Void Travel.

ability.name: Abyssal Jail
ability.description: Allows the user to manifest Abyss into the natural world, allowing them to trap entities in a localized Abyss, isolating them from the world and exhausting them of their energy and vitality. Breaking out of the Abyss with raw force is possible but incredibly difficult to accomplish.

ability.name: Abyss Skin
ability.description: Cover your skin in Abyss, while providing no offensive benefits it has potent defensive capability, dissipating energy it comes into contact with including kinetic and heat energy but vulnerable to sudden powerful attacks that can bypass its absorption.

ability.name: Yami
ability.description: Yugioh - When used, an ominous darkness with rouge clouds covers the surroundings, boosting the power of dark abilities and infernal beings while weakening all Holy beings and abilities.

ability.name: Darkness Logia
ability.description: One Piece  - Allows the user to create control and turn into Darkness at will. Their darkness can absorb and store anything but also amplifies the user's sensation of pain.

ability.name: Shadow Eyes
ability.description: Allows you to conjure small eye-shaped shadow familiars that can act autonomously and observe targets, they possess no combat ability but have potent hiding abilities. They can also relay the information they observe to their conjurer.

ability.name: Shadow Beast Form
ability.description: Allows the user to turn into a giant amorphous shadow monster like Dark Shadow from MHA, but makes them incredibly vulnerable to holy and light-based effects.

ability.name: Shadow Armor
ability.description: Allows you to create an armour of shadows around themselves that you can freely alter the shape of, the shadows are very durable and lightweight, while the armour is active your physical abilities are boosted and darkness abilities are more potent.

ability.name: Umbrakinesis
ability.description: Allows you to weave shadow and darkness into physical form and exert control over it, like chains made of shadows, spikes erupting from a target's shadow or lances of darkness.

ability.name: Abyss Barrier
ability.description: Allows you to weave the Abyss into a physical barrier, the Abyssal barrier can absorb and dissipate energy, making it a great barrier against any non-holy attack as it is nigh impossible to break without overwhelming force.

ability.name: Shadow Monarch
ability.description: Solo Leveling - Allows you to extract shadows from corpses to turn into minions under your command, the shadows are immortal as long as their bodies are restored by your mana, the level of shadows you can raise and the amount you can store on you at once is dependant on your energy levels.

ability.name: Flashlight
ability.description: You can emit a beam of moderate-intensity light from your hands, a useful replacement for a flashlight but not useful for much else.

ability.name: Flash
ability.description: You can emit a bright blinding light from your hands or use it with less intensity for utility, does not work well outside of close range.

ability.name: Illumination
ability.description: Allows you to conjure bright points of light that you can telekinetically control, you can also consume more energy to make the lights semi-permanent.

ability.name: Exorcists Light
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and emit an exorcising light, while utterly useless against any normal beings it is incredibly useful against any dark or unholy beings.

ability.name: Invisibility
ability.description: Allows the user to bend light around themself or other object they are touching to render them invisible.

ability.name: Flash Grenade
ability.description: Allows you to conjure a ball of light that explodes into a blinding flash and noise, disorientating enemies and hurting dark enemies greatly.

ability.name: Light of Glory
ability.description: The light of victory and glory shines down from the heavens and bolsters your allies. Bright light shines down from above, slightly increasing all physical stats,  increased mental resistance, vigor and courage to everyone touched by its rays.

ability.name: Light Grenade
ability.description: DBZ - Allows you to conjure and launch a grenade of light energy that explodes, it is rather fast and powerful.

ability.name: Beam
ability.description: You can shoot a beam of concentrated light and heat from your fingers that travels almost instantaneously.

ability.name: Lesser Blessing
ability.description: Allows you to grant a minor blessing to a target by suffusing them with Holy Energy, this blessing increases a chosen physical stat out of 5: Vitality, Strength, Resiliance, Agility, Stamina. The chosen attribute is slightly augmented for one hour. Only one blessing may be applied to a target at a time.

ability.name: Blessing
ability.description: Allows you to grant a blessing to a target by suffusing them with Holy Energy. You can apply one of three blessings. Blessing of Augmentation, which augments a chosen stat of a target, such as strength, resiliance, vitality, etc. Blessing of Might, which slightly augments all attributes of a target, or Blessing of Mind, which slightly augments the Energy Regeneration and Output of a target. Blessing can last one to three hours, depending on how much energy you expend, and only one blessing may be applied to a target at a time.

ability.name: Greater Blessing
ability.description: Allows you to grant a greater blessing to a target by suffusing them with Holy Energy. You can apply one of three blessings. Blessing of Augmentation, which significantly augments a chosen stat of a target, such as strength, resiliency, vitality, regeneration, etc. Blessing of Boost, which augments all attributes of a target but costs more energy. Or Blessing of Mind, which slightly augments the Energy Regeneration and Output of a target. Blessing can last one to three hours, depending on how much energy you expend, and only one blessing may be applied to a target at a time.

ability.name: Divine Blessing
ability.description: Allows you to bestow a variety of blessings once an hour, Blessing of Recovery gives a target Rare Rank Regeneration and cures all ailments they have that are not inborn, Blessing of Might increases all attributes, Blessing of Warding cleanses all curses and raises all resistances of a target, blessings can also be style after abilities. For example, using Divine Blessing with Ignite would give fire resistance and affinity. The duration of blessings is one hour.

ability.name: Law of Regression
ability.description: Elden Ring - Allows the user to regress causality, turning something into its original form or what it's meant to be and dispelling all negative status effects and effects in the process. The more a target regresses, the more energy is expended.

ability.name: Disc of Light
ability.description: Elden Ring - Allows the user to conjure and aunche a disc of sharp searing light that returns to its user in an arc.

ability.name: Guidance of Grace
ability.description: Elden Ring - The light of grace guides you, creating a path of light toward your objective or something to help with your objective that only you can see

ability.name: Barrier of Light
ability.description: Allows the user to create a barrier of light magic, while not as sturdy it is easy to deploy and is great for defending against curses, spirits and negative status effects.

ability.name: Hardlight Weaponry
ability.description: Allows you to create weapons out of hard light, hard light weapons are very strong while also being lightweight for their user, they deal increased damage against dark-aligned opponents, but they are not very durable and fade away when damaged.

ability.name: Sky Fracture
ability.description: Terraria - Allows you to rain down weapons made of holy light from the sky ranging from swords and glaives to skyscraper-sized lances depending on the amount of energy you expend.

ability.name: Confessors Light
ability.description: Allows you to create a spotlight that shines down from the sky, anyone caught in the spotlight is compelled to say the truth to whatever questions they are asked, and the user is immune to this effect.

ability.name: Purification
ability.description: Allows you to bathe a target in purifying light, cleansing them of negative effects or foreign substances, the potency of the purification scales with energy spent.

ability.name: Greater Purification
ability.description: Allows you to bathe a target in powerful purifying light, cleansing them of negative effects or foreign substances, the potency of the purification scales with energy spent.

ability.name: Holy Weapon
ability.description: Coats your armament in holy light, enhancing the power and quality of the weapon and making it deal extra damage to dark-aligned beings.

ability.name: Blessing of Arms
ability.description: Bless an armament, the blessed armament will be upgraded by half a stage(+) and the wielder of the weapon will gain a bonus intermediate skill that corresponds to the weapon, Example: when used on an Uncommon sword, it becomes an Uncommon+ Sword and its user gains Intermediate Swordsmanship for as long as they hold the weapon. Only one of these blessings can be applied at a time.

ability.name: Smite
ability.description: Your next attack is suffused with divine power, amplifying its power and dealing severe damage to unholy beings.

ability.name: Golden Fist
ability.description: Allows you to cover your fists in a deadly golden light that amplifies the power of your punches and punishes evil, it also deals severe damage against the unholy and spirit beings.

ability.name: Exorcism
ability.description: Allows you to bathe a target in golden light that exorcises negative effects, curses and possessions, when used on a spirit form or an unholy being it acts as if they have been doused in holy flame.

ability.name: Blade of Light
ability.description: Infuse your blade with light that reinforces and mimics the properties of your armament, swords can send out slashes of light, hammers produce golden shockwaves etc.

ability.name: Resuscitation
ability.description: Allows you to bring someone back from the dead if it has been less than 10 minutes since they have died or bring someone back to fighting condition by restoring their vitality, you can extend this timeframe by training.

ability.name: Swords of Revealing Light
ability.description: Yugioh - Allows you to create and control swords of light that when impaling a target seals their energy. Stronger targets can resist this effect.

ability.name: Minor Healing Light
ability.description: Allows you to bathe a target in healing light, restoring a portion of their health and vigour. Effect scales with your power level. Stronger targets need more energy to heal.

ability.name: Healing Light
ability.description: Allows you to bathe a target in healing light, capable of healing even severe wounds. Effect scales with your power level. Stronger targets need more energy to heal.

ability.name: Greater Healing Light
ability.description: Allows you to bathe a target in healing light, capable of healing even grievous wounds and lethal damage. Effect scales with your power level. Stronger targets need more energy to heal.

ability.name: Divine Healing Light
ability.description: Allows you to bathe a target in healing light, restoring their bodies from even lethal damage, any wound short of death can be healed. Effect scales with your power level. Stronger targets need more energy to heal.

ability.name: Pillar of Light
ability.description: Allows you to call down a pillar of searing light energy down from the skies to anywhere in your sensory range and deals additional damage against unholy beings.

ability.name: Judgement Call
ability.description: EBF - Allows you to summon a fountain of pure, divine magical light that erupts on a target dealing massive damage like a pillar of destruction. Deals lethal damage against Unholy beings and purifies targets. When used, drains most of the user's energy, in terms of pure power it is stronger than even some Epic abilities but its energy cost and charge time hold it back.

ability.name: Genesis
ability.description: EBF - "May there be mercy on man and machine for their sins." The ultimate light ability, calls forth a gigantic crucifix of absolute holy light that brings judgment down on the world, dealing colossal damage enough to wipe a country off the map, no Unholy being can survive against it, and any allies caught in Genesis are healed of all conditions. Spends all of the user's energy and has a 30-day cooldown

ability.name: Light Trick
ability.description: Allows the user to bend light to their will, creating optical illusions that can deceive sight, the light can also be solidified for further disguise but touching it will quickly reveal the trickery.

ability.name: Light Speed
ability.description: Allows the user to briefly turn themselves into a ray of light, allowing them to momentarily travel at the speed of light in a straight line before reforming.

ability.name: Sanctuary
ability.description: Allows you to create a large beam of light that shines from above, all allies under the light get healing, regeneration and cleansing. Maintaining sanctuary requires energy.

ability.name: Light Logia
ability.description: One Piece - Allows the user to create, manipulate and transform into light energy at will.

ability.name: Claws
ability.description: Allows you to create durable and sharp claws on your fingertips.

ability.name: Horns
ability.description: Allows you to grow sturdy and pointy horns on your head.

ability.name: Tail
ability.description: Allows you to grow a strong tail on your body that you can manipulate with dexterity.

ability.name: Jaw
ability.description: Allow you to turn your teeth into very sharp and durable fangs.

ability.name: Natural Weapons
ability.description: Allows you to weaponise any part of your body, nails into claws, teeth into fangs etc. only works on biological parts attached to your body.

ability.name: Razor Claws
ability.description: Allows you to turn your nails into razor-sharp claws that can tear through flesh and metal with ease, these claws do not dull.

ability.name: Carapace
ability.description: Allows you to grow a tough carapace over your flesh like an armour to bolster your defences. It's toughness scales with your physical stats.

ability.name: Exoskeleton
ability.description: Allows you to grow a very sturdy exoskeleton armour over your body to give you enhanced endurance and powerful protective armour. The power and durability of the Exoskeleton scales with your physical stats.

ability.name: Scales
