Whoever said you can't fit a tank and a missile silo inside of a person has not met you. You can fit enough implants into one body to make them be legally considered a military company. Go out and build your own Adam Smashers.

ability.name: Tinker - Augments(V)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to Augments and Implants. Your level of technology allows you to augment regular people into damn near demigods. Small supercomputers in brains? Sure. Time Dilating spines? Why not. Augmented skeleton and muscles strong enough to suplex millions of tons without sweat? That's a given. Superman-lite laser eyes? Only if you are creative enough. Go out and build yourself a Genos or a Raiden.

ability.name: Tinker - Defence(I)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to Defence and Protection. At this level, you are limited to modifying existing stuff to make them more sturdy and durable, and also creating things like basic shields, bulletproof glass,

ability.name: Tinker - Defence(II)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to Defence and Protection. At this level, you are able to create far more resistant and sturdy things as well as constructs specifically for protection. Fireproof(up to a certain level) coating, impact-resistant suit, EMP threading, bulletproof fabric, etc.

ability.name: Tinker - Defence(III)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to Defence and Protection. Creating things such as shield projectors, reinforced chasis', skintight suits that can take bullets without the wearer feeling it, different coatings to provide elemental resistances, and creating incredibly durable machines in general.

ability.name: Tinker - Defence(IV)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to Defence and Protection. Creating things such as giant forcefield projectors that can cover cities, creating regular cloth-like outfits that automatically harden in response to physical trauma to protect the user, Spatial Locks to prevent teleportation, and hyper-advanced paint that protects from elemental attacks. You can gear up a regular bicycle so much that you could ride it in the bottom of the ocean, in deep space and inside a volcano without scratching the paint. If you put some resources, effort and time in, you could probably make a phone that survives nuclear war without cracking the glass.

ability.name: Tinker - Defence(V)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to Defence and Protection. Giant forcefield projectors that bend space, time and energy to be nigh unbreakable? Sure. Alloys and fabrics that can be left in the sun with just a slight singe? That's a given. A gimp suit that can let a normal man survive nuclear war? ...Alright. Given enough time, resources and experience, you can make alloys and shield projectors that even gods cannot put a dent in.

ability.name: Tinker - Ranged Weapon(I)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to ranged weapons. Though at this level, all you are capable of is building mostly mundane weapons like gunpowder weaponry like pistols, snipers, bows, slingshots, etc., at least they are supernaurally well constructed.

ability.name: Tinker - Ranged Weapon(II)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to ranged weapons. Allowing you to build supernaturally efficient weapons and ammunition for the weapons you build. You can build revolvers that can blow through solid steel, and even rudimentary railgun weapons to replace gunpowder.

ability.name: Tinker - Ranged Weapon(III)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to ranged weaponry. Allowing you to build supernaturally powerful weapons and ammunition for the weapons you build. You can make gunpowder, electromagnetic and laser weapons too, with each having its own upsides and downsides. You could make a pistol that has enough power to rival a bolter and give it ammunition that also explodes into thermite. Or a canon that makes a Gustav look like a water gun.

ability.name: Tinker - Ranged Weapon(IV)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to ranged weaponry. Allowing you to build supernaturally powerful weapons and ammunition for the weapons you build. Gunpowder, Laser, Plasma, Electromagnetism, such are yours to design guns with. Ranging from giant machine guns to mow down entire armies, dark energy blasters to wipe out entire city blocks in single shots, and giant city-busting canons to incredibly efficient and even esoteric guns that can turn even a scrap of metal into a bullet that can rip through tanks.

ability.name: Tinker - Ranged Weapon(V)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to ranged weapons. The weapons you build rival the weapons of the gods. Make a sniper rifle that rips a hole through space to instantly land the bullet between an enemy's head. Make a pistol that shoots a compressed nuclear explosion. Make a giant canon that makes the Death Star look like a sad, wet fart. The only limit is the resources you have and the time you are willing to invest into it.

ability.name: Tinker - Fortification
ability.description: (Tech)This Tinker specialisation allows you to build, design, modify and create technology and technology related to fortifications. Never worry about being invaded again, creating technology such as self-repairing walls, hidden turrets, proximity sensors, missile batteries, laser traps, spatial locks, etc. Tech made with this specialisation only works when attached to a sufficiently large building or area.

ability.name: Tinker - Resident Evil
ability.description: (Tech)Resident Evil - This Tinker ability allows you to build technology and constructs from the Resident Evil Universe. More specifically, you can design and cultivate the viruses, such as the Tyrant Virus, the Uroboros Virus, the Progenitor Virus, parasites, etc. This Tinker ability is rather time-intensive due to the amount of time needed to cultivate Viruses. With time, you could even modify the viruses to get rid of side effects, eventually. ...It will take a lot of trial and error.

ability.name: Tinker - Aperture Science
ability.description: (Tech)Portal - This Tinker ability allows you to build technology of the Aperture Science Labs. Including turrets, portal guns, speed and jump gel, anti-fall boots, rudimentary non-combat robots, strong AI and much more. What it lacks in raw power, it makes up for in breadth of utility.

ability.name: Budding
ability.description: You are capable of granting people abilities by giving them buds of your own abilities that manifest as sidegrades. The buds cannot be stronger than Elite rank, and the maximum level of ability a target can hold depends on their own innate talents. The ability you budded is made weaker until they can fully assimilate the ability as their own, at which point you can retrieve the bud from them and restore your strength. You can retrieve buds anytime.

ability.name: Tinker - Taimanin
ability.description: (Tech)(Nsfw) Taimanin - Allows you to learn, research and build technology from the Taimanin universe. Granting you access to technology such as advanced prosthetics, genetic modification, basic cloning, augments, brainwashing, demonization and a whole lot of other... lewd technology in addition to the basic sci-fi package.

ability.name: Tinker - Cosmetics
ability.description: (Tech)Tinker - This Tinker ability allows you to modify, create and design technological constructs related to cosmetics and appearances. Hyper-realistic masks, making an existing machine look good, holograms, beauty cream, perfumes, etc.

ability.name: Tinker - Electricity
ability.description: (Tech)Tinker - This Tinker speciality allows you to build, modify, and design technological constructs relating to electricity. Ultra Tesla coils, harnessing thunder from above, and just about anything that harnesses the power of electricity(separate from magnetism).

ability.name: Tinker - Dungeonmaster
ability.description: (Tech)Tinker - This Tinker speciality allows you to build constructs, magical or technological, relating to the creation of dungeons and dungeon-related contraptions. You are able to create dungeon rooms that are larger on the inside than outside, nigh indescrutable walls, numerous traps that only work inside the dungeon, several utility dungeon rooms, etc. But your Dungeon must have at least one accessible entrance and a plausible way to reach the core for an invader. Tech from this specialisation only works inside the dungeon, and all tech inside the dungeon is boosted.

ability.name: Tinker - Sustenance
ability.description: (Tech)This tinker speciality allows you to build, modify and design constructs related to sustenance. You can create things such as efficient farms, incredibly efficient water purifiers and water condensers, blood alternatives for vampires, hyper-efficient food bars, life force alternatives made specifically for consumption, greater light projectors for plants, etc. The more different kinds of sustenance requirements you encounter, the more varied tech you can make.

ability.name: Mystic Eyes of Depth Perception
ability.description: These mystical eyes allow you to supernaturally gain awareness of the depth of an object or location in relation to something else.

ability.name: Swiftness
ability.description: You are able to amplify your movements with energy, making you move faster, but this does not affect your natural agility or senses. The faster you go, the more the energy cost increases.

ability.name: Impact
ability.description: You are able to amplify the physical impacts of your attacks by expending energy, making your punches and kicks, etc. deal more damage, but this does not amplify your stats, only the impact of your hits.

ability.name: False Data
ability.description: You are able to falsify your statistics and abilities to show scrying and analysing abilities what you want them to see instead of what you actually have.

ability.name: Internal Duplication
ability.description: Allows you to duplicate your limbs and organs. Conjure multiple sets of arms, multiple sets of eyes, or another heart if you can fit another one in there. Adding more limbs and organs to your body will cause strain.

ability.name: Tunnel Effect
ability.description: You are able to temporarily enforce Quantum Tunnelling on yourself. Altering probability on yourself to make the stars align and have attacks appear past you harmlessly, or allowing you to quantum tunnel through objects or obstacles. This ability is quite draining to use. And the longer you use the ability, the more the energy consumption increases exponentially.

ability.name: Unseen Hand
ability.description: Re:Zero - Unseen hand allows you to summon numerous invisible hand-like appendages from your body under your control that you can freely extend and use. The hands are superhumanly strong, even being able to merge with each other to form a slower but stronger and larger hand. The power of the hands and the maximum number of them you can manifest at once is dependant on your maximum energy reserves.

ability.name: Cor Leonis
ability.description: Re:Zero - Cor Leonis allows you to sense your allies as spots of light in your vision. By using Cor Leonis, you are able to take on their physical and mental conditions, such as exhaustion, onto yourself. You can also transfer these conditions to your allies as long as they are willing.

ability.name: Return By Death
ability.description: Re:Zero - "You return by dea-" It allows you to do as the name suggests, every time you die, you return in time to a set spawn point. The spawnpoints are random, but do reset every time you go to sleep for more than 6 hours. Does not activate with soul or existence erasure.

ability.name: Conjure Ice
ability.description: Allows you to create constructs of ice out of your own energy, you do not have control over the ice beyond creating it, and you cannot freeze objects, just create objects out of ice. Such as walls of ice, ice weapons, ice blocks, ice boulders, etc.

ability.name: Conjure Rock
ability.description: Allows you to manifest rock constructs out of your own energy; you do not have control over the rocks beyond creating and shaping them, simply creating constructs made of rocks. Such as rock weapons, boulders, rock walls, stone blocks etc.

ability.name: Wallmaster
ability.description: You can make a wall out of anything, any wall, all walls, walls, walls. Stone walls, ice walls, walls of wind, walls of solified sunlight, walls of raw energy. Anything in your arsenal, you can shape it into a wall, or any object and ground you are touching, you can turn it into a wall. The size of the wall and its durability scale with the amount of energy you use. Walls.

ability.name: Swordmaster
ability.description: You can make a sword out of anything, any sword, swords, swords, good swords. Swords of fire, swords of light, swords of ice, swords of wind, swords of energy, swords of swords, swords. Anything in your arsenal, including your abilities as well as any object in your possession or unoccupied material you are touching, you are able to turn them into a sword, with the power and duration of the sword depending on the amount of energy you expend. Swords.

ability.name: Knighting
ability.description: You can convert an ability of yours into an armament that you can bestow upon someone willing to receive. The abilities of the weapon or piece of equipment they receive are based on the ability you have bestowed. Once they accept your gift and are knighted, they are unable to refuse your orders as your vassal. If you take an armament back from a Knight, they lose their status and can never be knighted again. They must know the burden of the armament you are bestowing for this ability to work. A Knight can be teleported to your location every 24 hours.

ability.name: Burden of Servitude
ability.description: "Servitude at a price" Allows you to collar a target, in exchange for bestowing a portion of your abilities or traits to them. Once they are collared, they are completely unable to disobey your orders, and you can summon them to your location at any time. The stronger a target, the more abilities and traits you need to grant them in exchange for collaring them. The granted traits and abilities can never be taken back and are lost when the target is killed. If a target is too strong in relation to you, this ability cannot be used.

ability.name: Greed's Deal
ability.description: "Everything and everyone has a price." You are able to buy anything from anyone, as long as you pay enough for it. You can pay them to give you an item of theirs, for a night with them, for them to kill their family, for them to devote themselves to you, for anything. The price you need to pay depends on your power level in relation to them and how willing they would be to perform the action otherwise. If they are weak enough, you could buy their soul for a dollar, but for someone strong enough, you might need to pay an epic item just to get them to calm down. Your payment must be in items such as gold or valuable items. Items you use for payment are burnt out of existence.

ability.name: Reaper's Voice
ability.description: "Deal with their baser instincts, not their logic" You are able to command people through fear; the more they fear you, the more you are able to command, scaling with your ability to intimidate someone. If they fear you enough, you could convince them to give up just about anything, their children, their wives, their house, their life, their kingdom. Even if they obey the command out of fear, they will not be able to oppose it when you stop using your ability. Whenever they do, the fear returns to them.

ability.name: Subtitles
ability.description: Who needs dub? Whenever anything makes sound, you will get subtitles for it. If someone is speaking, it will appear as "Good for you to finally join us(Sarcastically)" regardless of the language they are speaking. This also applies to sound effects, also describing the noise like [Assassin's Footsteps], [Grenade Pin Being Pulled], [Fireball Chant] etc. Only applies to relevant sounds and people you are actually paying attention to.

ability.name: Tinker - Robotics(I)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to Robotics. At this level, you can only build simple robots without much greater function, like autonomous claw arms, or butter-passing robots. But you can still build just about any mundane robot.

ability.name: Tinker - Robotics(II)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to Robotics. Allowing you to build a variety of simple robots, such as gun-using robots and robots that are generally as capable as the average man. You could probably get away with building a B-1 Droid, maybe even a B-2 if you train enough.

ability.name: Tinker - Robotics(III)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to Robotics. Allowing you to build complex and capable robots, such as combat bots, maid bots, or autonomous workers of many varieties. You could even build something analogous to Sentry Bots, Executor Droids, or even a GLaDOS if you put your mind to it and have the resources.

ability.name: Tinker - Robotics(IV)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to Robotics. Being able to create powerful and incredibly useful robots and autonomous constructs. You can make giant robots that can lay waste to armies, a moving robot castle, dust-sized repair bots, and many more varieties of robots. Go ahead and build your own variety of Metal Gears.

ability.name: Tinker - Robotics(V)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to Robotics. You can build what type of robots? The types you like. Make your own Metal Gear Army, create a robot ninja clan, create biorobots indistinguishable from humans except 100x stronger, create supreme machines with bodies that can withstand nuclear bombs and processors that make supercomputers look like analogue clocks. You can create just about any mechanical autonomous unit, and when integrating other Tinker branches into their creation, the integrated Tinker technology is significantly boosted.

ability.name: Kudoku
ability.description: Kudoku allows you to expel a very weak poison from your body, either through your pores, your nails or your mouth. While Kudoku is in an active slot, you can ingest and be inflicted with poisons, and as long as you survive those poisons, the potency of Kudoku will be increased proportionally to their potency and gain more effects that you can imbue into your own venom. Cultivate your poison from a mild paralytic to a godslaying Venom. Starting rating is Trash. Kudoku also provides poison resistance scaling with its own potency when slotted in.

ability.name: Cursebed
ability.description: Your soul is a fertile breeding ground for curses. Whenever you get afflicted with a curse, you are able to assimilate that curse over time until it becomes a part of Cursebed. Any curse assimilated into Cursebed can be replicated and regurgitated, allowing you to use the curse for yourself by expending energy. The stronger a curse, the more time you need to assimilate it, and strong enough curses can ignore the effect(Does not affect Gacha Curses).

ability.name: Hive Lord
ability.description: You are the Hive, that is, you are capable of transforming and taking on the traits of any insect from Earth, being able to mix and match transformations on them. Being able to manifest the tail and venom of a scorpion, the wings of a Dragonfly, the resilience of a cockroach and much more.

ability.name: Hell Flame
ability.description: Hell Flame allows you to conjure and shape infernal flames often used by demons. Hell flames are especially strong against living beings, burning their vitality along with their flesh, weakening them while also being hard to heal due to its unholy attribute. But using these flames is rather energy-intensive compared to normal flames unless the user is an Infernal.

ability.name: Greater Hell Flame
ability.description: Greater Hell Flames allows you to conjure and shape potent infernal flames often used by high-ranking demons. These flames are very potent and hot, and also very effective against living beings, sticking to whatever they touch like glue and cursing whatever they burn to make it far harder to heal. But using these flames is rather energy-intensive compared to normal flames unless the user is an Infernal.

ability.name: Holy Light
ability.description: Holy Light allows you to conjure and shape Holy Light, often used by Angels. Allowing you to unleash it as balls of light, energy blasts or blades of light, when used against Infernal, Unholy, or Necrotic targets, the Holy Light will set them alight with holy flames, but against targets outside of that range, it does significantly less damage. (A/N: Holy Light is NOT light speed despite the name)

ability.name: Greater Holy Light
ability.description: Greater Holy Light allows you to conjure and shape searing Holy Light or call it down from the sky on a location, often used by high-ranking Angels.   Greater Holy Light sets any Infernal, Unholy or Necrotic opponent alight with holy flames on contact and has the ability to burn away attacks of the same attribute as well as being able to burn curses, the holy will not sear anything the user does not want to hurt. But when used against opponents outside that category, its potency is significantly reduced. (A/N: Holy Light is NOT light speed despite the name)

ability.name: Star of Change
ability.description: The Star of Change allows you to temporarily change your race to any Race Change trait in the gacha ranked rare or below for as long as it is active. You can only transform into one race at a time.

ability.name: Argonaut
ability.description: Danmachi - Argonaut allows you to charge up any attack, allowing you to temporarily bypass their maximum energy output. The longer you charge the ability, the more power you can unleash. For 10x power, you need 10x the energy to use it. You can only charge one action at a time, and if you get interrupted during charge, you will lose the energy you would have otherwise used on the ability without being able to unleash the effect.

ability.name: Tinker - Vehicles(III)
ability.description: This tinker ability allows you to build, design and build technology and technological constructs related to Vehicles. You can create supernatural vehicles that would normally be impossible, a ship that sails at the speed of sound without shaking, a motorcycle that can ride through the air through hard light technology, a regular looking sports car 10x better armored than a tank and with fuel efficiency to last a year with one tank of gasoline, or just simply build a killdozer in league with the batmobile.

ability.name: Fumofication
ability.description: Allows you to touch a target to turn them into a fumo; the fumo created from this ability is immune to all damage, but the targets still feel everything done to them in this state. Stronger targets can resist this effect, and how long you can keep someone as a fumo depends on the amount of energy you expend and the power difference between you and the target. Grab 'em, soak 'em in milk, slam 'em against the wall or stick 'em in a jar. You cannot Fumo someone for 1 hour after they have awakened from the effect of the ability.

ability.name: Void Shadow
ability.description: Legendary Mechanic - Allows you to conjure a shadow copy of yourself. This copy acts like a shadow, invulnerable to damage and unable to interact with the world, but it can move extremely fast, can be used to disrupt the vision of others or allow you to see through its eyes. This clone lasts for 30 minutes at base, and you can only release one at a time. But this can be increased by training.

ability.name: Void Distortion
ability.description: Legendary Mechanic - Allows you to pull on the Void Dimension and cause spatial disruptions on the material world using it, allowing you to cause massive devastation and damage on targets in exchange for an incredibly taxing energy expenditure.

ability.name: Choices & Choices
ability.description: Whenever you need to make a choice, you can turn this ability on to be able to view up to 3 relevant choices you can make in a given situation and their vague outcomes. For example, [We shouldn't go +reputation with X --Reputation with Y, Z Dies]. The choices are rather vague.

ability.name: Tinker - Resources
ability.description: This tinker speciality allows you to design, modify and build technology and technological constructs related to acquiring materials.

ability.name: Fate Draw
ability.description: Allows you to roll a random number out of 22 and invoke the effect of whichever Major Arcana Tarot Card it landed on. Cooldown: 120 Hours

ability.name: Inanimate Interrogation
ability.description: Allows you to "interrogate' inanimate objects for information, ask a wall how many people it saw enter in the 24 hours, a machine or a weapon how to use it, or ask a building how to infiltrate it. Objects feel compelled to tell the truth to your questions. Their answers are based on their own perception, and they can only give answers based on what they have seen, about themselves, what they have heard and what they have heard. The more information you force an object to recall, the more energy you have to expend.

ability.name: Hustle
ability.description: Yomi Hustle - "It may be your only move" allows you to "Hustle" your opponents by performing a gesture, whether it's snapping your fingers and giving a taunting smile or lying down on a lawn chair mid-fight, your hustle must at least last half a second. When you successfully complete a Hustle, you regain some energy and stamina. The longer your hustle goes on, the more you will recover energy. Effectiveness depends on how stylish and aggravating you were. Can only be used in active combat against an enemy who means you genuine harm.

ability.name: Restraint Levels
ability.description: Hellsing - Allows you to place "Restraint Levels" on targets who are willing or unable to resist, including yourself. The restraint levels you place can forcefully prevent targets from using and activating abilities and forms, sealing them or using certain levels of power. These restraint levels can only be lifted by you or a designated target saying the unlock phrase.

ability.name: Marionette Grasp
ability.description: Allows you to take control of a target's physical body in your line of sight. When you take control of a target you can move their body against their will like forcing them to walk away or grovel. The stronger a target is in relation to you, the harder it is to control them and the more energy you have to expend to maintain your control. You can also choose to share senses with your target. You can also control more targets at once at the cost of taxing your mind and spending more energy. You can narrow your targets to individual body parts like fingers to expend less energy.

ability.name: Edict
ability.description: Edict allows you to put rules on people by touching them and expending energy. Edicts force rules on targets that they must follow, like not being able to drink milk or forcing them to go to a certain location at certain times or making them unable to wear clothes in a certain room. The target will feel an incredible mental compulsion to follow your edicts. The stronger a target is in relation to you, the harder it is to place an edict on them. If an edict goes against a target's self-preservation instincts, it will be exponentially harder to set.

ability.name: Phantom Sensation
ability.description: Allows you to project sensations of what you can do to someone in your line of sight without actually affecting them physically. You can project the sensation of groping, licking, scratching, choking, burning, stabbing, hanging, etc. provided you could actually do those things to your target without the ability.

ability.name: Mind Blast
ability.description: Allows you to send a wave of shimmering psionic energy through your eyes. When hitting a sentient target, it will cause mental damage to them, confusing them and giving them painful headaches. The effectiveness depends on the mental and magical power of the target.

ability.name: Geass - Command
ability.description: Code Geass - Allows you to give an absolute command to anyone you make eye contact with. The target will be forced to obey the command as long as they are physically capable of accomplishing the command. It can only be used once per person, and if a target is comparable to you in power or beyond, they can resist the effects or ignore the effect outright. Does not cost energy to use.

ability.name: Geass - Memory
ability.description: Code Geass - Allows you to rewrite the memories of a target through making direct eye contact. The more memories you rewrite in more detail, the more energy you expend and the more time you need. The energy you expend scales with the power difference between you and the target, as well as their willpower. It is possible to break through the rewritten memories. Through training you can improve the speed at which you rewrite memories and expend less energy, as well being more detailed and accurate.

ability.name: Geass - Suspension
ability.description: Code Geass - This geass allows you to suspend the perception of time of those in range of your effect, freezing them in place, but this effect only affects sentient beings. This effect expands as a dome around you, maintaining this effect greatly drains your vitality and energy. The amount of drain you experience depends on the size of the range you expand, the amount of targets in your area of effect and the power level of the targets you are affecting. You cannot selectively affect targets; all targets in range are affected.

ability.name: Conjure Lesser Water Elemental
ability.description: Allows you to conjure or summon Lesser Water and Ice Elementals out of your energy and command them, such as Nymphs, Water Faries, etc. or summon similar beings from other worlds that can use a variety of water-based magic. You can only conjure elementals that are equal to or lesser in power than a Uncommon Familiar. The power, shape and ability of the elemental you can conjure depends on your own expertise and power level. The conjured Elemental will draw power from you to maintain itself and use its abilities. The stronger the Elemental, the more energy they will need from you to sustain themselves. If you stop supplying them with energy, they will vanish. If you spend enough time, energy and have the proper skills, you can create permanent elementals who do not rely on you for energy. Elementals are not counted as Familiars by the system.

ability.name: Conjure Water Elemental
ability.description: Allows you to conjure or summon Water and Ice Elementals out of your energy and command them, such as Nereids, High Water Faries, Undines, etc or summon similar beings from existing worlds. Who can use a variety of water-based magic and other similar effects. You can only conjure elementals that are equal to or lesser in power than a Rare Familiar. The power, shape and ability of the elemental you can conjure depends on your own expertise and power level. The conjured Elemental will draw power from you to maintain itself and use its abilities. The stronger the Elemental, the more energy they will need from you to sustain themselves. If you stop supplying them with energy, they will vanish. If you spend enough time, energy and have the proper skills, you can create permanent elementals who do not rely on you for energy. Elementals are not counted as Familiars by the system.

ability.name: Conjure Greater Water Elemental
ability.description: Allows you to conjure powerful Greater Water and Ice Elementals out of your energy and command them, who can use a variety of water-based magic and other abilities, such as Sirens, Oceanids, noble water fairies, Regice, etc. You can only conjure elementals that are equal to or lesser in power than an Elite Familiar. The power, shape and ability of the elemental you can conjure depends on your own expertise and power level. The conjured Elemental will draw power from you to maintain itself and use its abilities. The stronger the Elemental, the more energy they will need from you to sustain themselves. If you stop supplying them with energy, they will vanish. If you spend enough time, energy and have the proper skills, you can create permanent elementals who do not rely on you for energy. Elementals are not counted as Familiars by the system.

ability.name: Conjure Lesser Air Elemental
ability.description: Allows you to conjure or summon Lesser Air and Sky Elementals out of your energy and command them, such as Wind Sprites, Living Clouds, Wind Elementals etc., that can use a variety of air and sky-based magic or other similar effects. You can only conjure elementals that are equal to or lesser in power than a Uncommon Familiar. The power, shape and ability of the elemental you can conjure depends on your own expertise and power level. The conjured Elemental will draw power from you to maintain itself and use its abilities. The stronger the Elemental, the more energy they will need from you to sustain themselves. If you stop supplying them with energy, they will vanish. If you spend enough time, energy and have the proper skills, you can create permanent elementals who do not rely on you for energy. Elementals are not counted as Familiars by the system.

ability.name: Conjure Air Elemental
ability.description: Allows you to conjure or summon Air and Sky Elementals out of your energy and command them, such as Storm Elementals, Wind Fairies, Nimbus Clouds, Cloud Elementals, etc. who can use a variety of wind-based magic and other similar effects. You can only conjure elementals that are equal to or lesser in power than a Rare Familiar. The power, shape and ability of the elemental you can conjure depends on your own expertise and power level. The conjured Elemental will draw power from you to maintain itself and use its abilities. The stronger the Elemental, the more energy they will need from you to sustain themselves. If you stop supplying them with energy, they will vanish. If you spend enough time, energy and have the proper skills, you can create permanent elementals who do not rely on you for energy. Elementals are not counted as Familiars by the system.

ability.name: Summon Greater Air Elemental
ability.description: Allows you to conjure powerful Greater Fire Elementals out of your energy and command them, who can use a variety of fire-based magic and other abilities, such as Hurricane Elementals, Greater Wind Spirits, Greater Storm Elementals, Thunderbirds, etc. You can only conjure elementals that are equal to or lesser in power than an Elite Familiar. The power, shape and ability of the elemental you can conjure depends on your own expertise and power level. The conjured Elemental will draw power from you to maintain itself and use its abilities. The stronger the Elemental, the more energy they will need from you to sustain themselves. If you stop supplying them with energy, they will vanish. If you spend enough time, energy and have the proper skills, you can create permanent elementals who do not rely on you for energy. Elementals are not counted as Familiars by the system.

ability.name: Summon Lesser Fire Elemental
ability.description: Allows you to conjure or summon Lesser Fire Elementals out of your energy and command them, such as Fire Spirits, Living Candlelight, Fire Eaters, etc., that can use a variety of fire-based magic or other similar effects. You can only conjure elementals that are equal to or lesser in power than a Uncommon Familiar. The power, shape and ability of the elemental you can conjure depends on your own expertise and power level. The conjured Elemental will draw power from you to maintain itself and use its abilities. The stronger the Elemental, the more energy they will need from you to sustain themselves. If you stop supplying them with energy, they will vanish. If you spend enough time, energy and have the proper skills, you can create permanent elementals who do not rely on you for energy. Elementals are not counted as Familiars by the system.

ability.name: Summon  Fire Elemental
ability.description: Allows you to conjure or summon Fire Elementals out of your energy and command them, such as Fire Faries, Fire Elementals, Fire Atronachs, Efreets, etc or summon similar beings from existing worlds. Who can use a variety of fire-based magic and other similar effects. You can only conjure elementals that are equal to or lesser in power than a Rare Familiar. The power, shape and ability of the elemental you can conjure depends on your own expertise and power level. The conjured Elemental will draw power from you to maintain itself and use its abilities. The stronger the Elemental, the more energy they will need from you to sustain themselves. If you stop supplying them with energy, they will vanish. If you spend enough time, energy and have the proper skills, you can create permanent elementals who do not rely on you for energy. Elementals are not counted as Familiars by the system.

ability.name: Summon Greater Fire Elemental
ability.description: Allows you to conjure powerful Greater Fire Elementals out of your energy and command them, who can use a variety of fire-based magic and other abilities, such as  Firebirds, Greater Efreets, Flame Devourers,  etc. You can only conjure elementals that are equal to or lesser in power than an Elite Familiar. The power, shape and ability of the elemental you can conjure depends on your own expertise and power level. The conjured Elemental will draw power from you to maintain itself and use its abilities. The stronger the Elemental, the more energy they will need from you to sustain themselves. If you stop supplying them with energy, they will vanish. If you spend enough time, energy and have the proper skills, you can create permanent elementals who do not rely on you for energy. Elementals are not counted as Familiars by the system.

ability.name: Summon Lesser Demon
ability.description: Allows you to summon Lesser Demons from the Underworld to serve under you and obey your commands, such as Imps, Capra Demons, Demon Eyes, etc. As long as the Demon Servant you summon is equal to or weaker in power than an Uncommon Familiar. The demon servant you summon is bound to your will for as long as they are manifested in this world. And you need to constantly supply them with your energy to keep them summoned and allow them to use their abilities. If a summoned Demon Servant is killed, you can still choose to resummon the exact same ones, as they will reform back in the Underworld. You can further strengthen your demon servants by supplying them with more Magic. You can also summon them to the material realm permanently by performing a sufficient blood sacrifice according to the demons' tier; for an Uncommon Demon, the sacrifice of an Uncommon Target must be made. Permanent demons no longer need your energy to stay manifested.

ability.name: Summon Demon
ability.description: Allows you to summon Demons from the Underworld to serve under you and obey your commands, such as Demons, Succubi/Incubi, Taurus Demons, etc. As long as the Demon Servant you summon is equal to or weaker in power than an Rare Familiar. The demon servant you summon is bound to your will for as long as they are manifested in this world. And you need to constantly supply them with your energy to keep them summoned and allow them to use their abilities. If a summoned Demon Servant is killed, you can still choose to resummon the exact same ones, as they will reform back in the Underworld. You can further strengthen your demon servants by supplying them with more Magic. You can also summon them to the material realm permanently by performing a sufficient blood sacrifice according to the demons' tier; for an Elite Demon, the sacrifice of an Elite Target must be made. Permanent demons no longer need your energy to stay manifested.

ability.name: Summon Fiend
ability.description: Allows you to summon Fiends from the Underworld, a nobler variant of demons, to serve under you and obey your commands, such as Fiends, Greater Succubi/Incubi, Oni(Fate), Soul Eaters(Overlord), etc. As long as the Demon Servant you summon is equal to or weaker in power than an Elite Familiar. The demon servant you summon is bound to your will for as long as they are manifested in this world. And you need to constantly supply them with your energy to keep them summoned and allow them to use their abilities. If a summoned Demon Servant is killed, you can still choose to resummon the exact same ones, as they will reform back in the Underworld. You can further strengthen your demon servants by supplying them with more Magic. You can also summon them to the material realm permanently by performing a sufficient blood sacrifice according to the demons' tier; for an Elite Demon, the sacrifice of an Elite Target must be made. Permanent demons no longer need your energy to stay manifested.

ability.name: Summon Archfiend
ability.description: Allows you to summon Archfiends from the Underworld, a royal variant of demons, to serve under you and obey your commands, such as Archfiends, Succubi/Incubi Kings/Queens, Oni Rulers(Fate), Arch Devils(Overlord), Devils(Chainsaw Man), etc. As long as the Demon Servant you summon is equal to or weaker in power than an Epic Familiar. The demon servant you summon is bound to your will for as long as they are manifested in this world. And you need to constantly supply them with your energy to keep them summoned and allow them to use their abilities. If a summoned Demon Servant is killed, you can still choose to resummon the exact same ones, as they will reform back in the Underworld. You can further strengthen your demon servants by supplying them with more Magic. You can also summon them to the material realm permanently by performing a sufficient blood sacrifice according to the demons' tier; for an Epic Demon, the sacrifice of an Epic Target must be made. Permanent demons no longer need your energy to stay manifested.

ability.name: The Gates of Hell
ability.description: Allows you to summon all but the strongest of infernals from the Underworld; the armies of hell are at your fingertips, to serve under you and obey your commands, such as True Demons, Devils(Chainsaw Man), Efreet Sultans, Greater Daemons(Warhammer), etc. As long as the Demon Servant you summon is equal to or weaker in power than a Legendary Familiar. The demon servant you summon is bound to your will for as long as they are manifested in this world. And you need to constantly supply them with your energy to keep them summoned and allow them to use their abilities. If a summoned Demon Servant is killed, you can still choose to resummon the exact same ones, as they will reform back in the Underworld. You can further strengthen your demon servants by supplying them with more Magic. You can also summon them to the material realm permanently by performing a sufficient blood sacrifice according to the demons' tier; for a Legendary Demon, the sacrifice of a Legendary Target must be made. Permanent demons no longer need your energy to stay manifested.

ability.name: Roentgenium Manipulation
ability.description: Allows you to sense and telekinetically control Roentgenium in a radius around you. The range and power can be increased by training, scaling with your energy reserves.

ability.name: Charon's Bell
ability.description: Allows you to ring the bell of the Ferryman, calling the souls of the dead to you. By default, you call all souls in a certain range around yourself to your person, but by assuming possession of something relevant to a target, like a part of their corpse, a memento, etc., you can ring the bell specifically for that person, calling their soul to you instantly as long as their soul is in the same dimension as you. Unwilling targets who are powerful may be able to put up resistance to the call of the Bell. Called Spirits are not under your command, but you can interact with them. You can also use this ability to store souls; by default, you can store 100 souls, equal to a grown man; this number increases as your energy reserves do.

ability.name: Call to Arms
ability.description: Upon use, Call to Arms rolls the corresponding Familiar gacha to temporarily grant you a familiar to fight by your side for the duration of 1 hour, after which they will disappear. At 1 Ability Slot, you pull a familiar from the Bronze gacha, 2 slots = Silver, 3 Slots = Gold, 4 Slots = Platinum and caps out at 5 slots = Diamond Gacha. 24 Hour cooldown.

ability.name: Summon Angelic Guardian
ability.description: Allows you to temporarily summon a low-ranking Angel or Holy Spirit from the Heavenly Realm, such as a Lesser Light Fairy, Angel Guardians, Archangel Flames(Overlord), 2 Winged Angels, etc. as long as the summon is equal to or weaker in power than an uncommon familiar. The summon is bound to your will for as long as they remain on this plane. You need to constantly supply your summons with energy to allow them to stay summoned in the world, and for them to be capable of using their magic or abilities. If a summoned angel is slain, they will be restored in the Heavenly Realm, and you can summon the exact same one again. The more energy you supply to your summon, the more power they can exert. You can permanently bind an Angel summon to you by performing a long prayer ceremony and sacrificing an appropriate amount of valuable items and energy.

ability.name: Summon Angel
ability.description: Allows you to temporarily summon a lower-ranking Angel or Holy Spirit from the Heavenly Realm, such as a Light Fairies, Pixies, Unicorns, Principalities, 4 Winged Angels, etc., as long as the summon is equal to or weaker in power than a Rare familiar. The summon is bound to your will for as long as they remain on this plane. You need to constantly supply your summons with energy to allow them to stay summoned in the world, and for them to be capable of using their magic or abilities. If a summoned angel is slain, they will be restored in the Heavenly Realm, and you can summon the exact same one again. The more energy you supply to your summon, the more power they can exert. You can permanently bind an Angel summon to you by performing a long prayer ceremony and sacrificing an appropriate amount of valuable items and energy.

ability.name: Summon Principality
ability.description: Allows you to temporarily summon a middle-ranked Angel or Holy Spirit from the Heavenly Realm, such as a Noble Light Spirits, Principalities, Valkyries, 6 Winged Angels, etc., as long as the summon is equal to or weaker in power than an Elite familiar. The summon is bound to your will for as long as they remain on this plane. You need to constantly supply your summons with energy to allow them to stay summoned in the world, and for them to be capable of using their magic or abilities. If a summoned angel is slain, they will be restored in the Heavenly Realm, and you can summon the exact same one again. The more energy you supply to your summon, the more power they can exert. You can permanently bind an Angel summon to you by performing a long prayer ceremony and sacrificing an appropriate amount of valuable items and energy.

ability.name: Summon Dominion
ability.description: Allows you to temporarily summon a Very High-ranked Angel or Holy Spirit from the Heavenly Realm, such as a Light Spirit Lords, Dominions, 8 Winged Angels, Archangels(Hota), Valkyrie Chiefs, etc., as long as the summon is equal to or weaker in power than an Epic familiar. The summon is bound to your will for as long as they remain on this plane. You need to constantly supply your summons with energy to allow them to stay summoned in the world, and for them to be capable of using their magic or abilities. If a summoned angel is slain, they will be restored in the Heavenly Realm, and you can summon the exact same one again. The more energy you supply to your summon, the more power they can exert. You can permanently bind an Angel summon to you by performing a long prayer ceremony and sacrificing an appropriate amount of valuable items and energy.

ability.name: Heavenly Gate
ability.description: Allows you to temporarily call forth the armies of the Heavenly Realm, swarms of lower-ranked angels, or some of the greatest guardian angels and spirits of light, such as Empresses of Light, Thrones, 10 Winged Angels, etc., as long as the summon is equal to or weaker in power than a Legendary familiar. The summon is bound to your will for as long as they remain on this plane. You need to constantly supply your summons with energy to allow them to stay summoned in the world, and for them to be capable of using their magic or abilities. If a summoned angel is slain, they will be restored in the Heavenly Realm, and you can summon the exact same one again. The more energy you supply to your summon, the more power they can exert. You can permanently bind an Angel summon to you by performing a long prayer ceremony and sacrificing an appropriate amount of valuable items and energy.

ability.name: Familiar Manifestation
ability.description: Allows you to temporarily call upon the limb or a body part of a familiar you own to use them as an attack, when using Familiar manifestation, the familiar itself does not take damage.

ability.name: Kill Process
ability.description: (Tech)"The End of Machine" Allows you to enforce the "Kill Process" onto any piece of technology that eclipses that of Mundane Earth. Forcing the concept of ruin on them, computers will have their chips and wires torn apart, their processors melted, their chassis shredded, their code mangled, and their non-souls sent straight to oblivion. Taken down entire Star Destroyers without even lifting your fingers. The potency of Kill Process depends on how divergent the target is from Mundane Earth technology, and the power difference between you and the target determines how much effect they will take. But even a normal person could take down a spaceship with a glare. Can only affect technology and tech-based targets.

ability.name: Elemental Sight
ability.description: Allows attunement to Elemental Forces and energy. Feel the air, see the heat, hear the lightning, taste the earth. You can see all Fire, Water, Air, Earth and Water in your line of sight by peeking through everything else in the world. Even extends to the electricity in someone's brain, the particles of water flowing through their blood, the electricity in cable etc. magically charged elements appear more vibrant in your vision.

ability.name: Corpus Weapon
ability.description: Allows you to imbue whatever weapon you are holding or your limbs with necrotic energy. This necrotic energy amplifies the power behind your attacks and makes them harder to heal while hurting the vitality of the enemy directly. Against living targets, it deals extra damage by exhausting their vitality. You can also channel the necrotic energy around your weapon or fist and throw it out as a projectile.

ability.name: Necrotic Weapon
ability.description: Allows you to imbue whatever weapon you are holding or your limbs with withering necrotic energy. This necrotic energy amplifies the power behind your attacks, and whenever it inflicts a wound on a living being, it starts affecting them with necrosis and even rigor mortis when stabbed into them long enough. If stabbed into an inanimate target, it will start corroding and decaying it with necrotic energies. You can also channel the necrotic energy around your weapon or fist and throw it out as a projectile or temporarily extend the weapon beyond its usual range.

ability.name: Dread Blade
ability.description: Allows you to suffuse your weapons or your limbs with potent Necrotic and Darkness energies. These energies amplify the destructive power of the target depending on the amount of energy you expend. When inflicting a wound on a living being, the wound left behind is cursed, heavily hindering healing and spreading necrotic energies throughout, slowly worsening the wound, spreading necrosis and weakening the target according to their level of resistance against such effects. When attacking inanimate objects, the necrotic and dark energies in the attack start corroding, withering and degrading the objects, weakening them. You can also channel the necrotic energy around your weapon or fist to send out projectiles like flying slashes or temporarily extend the weapon beyond its usual range.

ability.name: Gravelords Blade
ability.description: You are able to channel the Gravelords' Blade into any weapon under your command or your own body, suffusing them with the essence of Death and Curses. These energies greatly amplify the destructive power of the channelled weapon, depending on the amount of energy you expend. When inflicting a wound on a living target, it inflicts Gravelord's Curse on the wound, making it incredibly difficult to heal and constantly spreading death essence throughout their body, weakening them and dealing them damage over time as it wreaks havoc on their body. On weaker targets, this ability has the chance to instantly kill them. Maintaining the curse costs energy. When attacking inanimate objects, the necrotic and dark energies in the attack start corroding, withering and degrading the objects, weakening them. You can also channel the Death Essence around your weapon or fist to send out projectiles like flying slashes or temporarily extend the weapon beyond its usual range. You can manifest this ability as a weapon by itself made purely out of energy for more energy cost.

ability.name: Ruin Edge
ability.description: Allows you to suffuse any armament you have or your own body in cursed ruinous energies. These energies massively amplify the destructive power of your attacks and has the ability to decay whatever they strike, whether that is magic, physical defences, space, or other nebulous targets. When striking a living target, whatever wound you inflict gets inflicted with Ruin Curse, making it impossible to heal unless the curse is lifted and continuously weakening the target and causing them pain, the user can always track where a Ruin Curse is, on a weaker target the Ruin Curse has a chance to instantly kill the target, the curse needs energy to maintain. Whenever striking an inanimate target they will become ruined, being corroded, disintegrated, turned to dust, only the toughest of materials can resist being turned to ash. You can also channel the Ruinous Energies around your weapon or fist to send out projectiles like flying slashes or temporarily extend the weapon beyond its usual range. You can manifest this ability as a weapon by itself made purely out of energy for more energy cost.

ability.name: Lesser Animate Undead
ability.description: Allows you to imbue a corpse with Necrotic energy to reanimate it as a lesser undead under your command, such as skeletons, zombies, wights, etc., but you can only raise an undead at most as strong as an uncommon familiar. The quality and power of the undead you raise depend on the quality of the corpse, how powerful the corpse is, and how powerful you are. The stronger an undead, the more energy they cost to raise. The amount of undead you can control at once scales with your energy reserves.

ability.name: Animate Undead
ability.description: You are able to animate corpses into a variety of undead such as Death Knights, Death Warriors, Undead Mages, Lesser Vampires, Wraiths, Bone Wyverns or an undead version of the target corpse but the undead you animate can only be equal to or lesser in power than a Rare Familiar. The tier of undead you can create depends on the quality of the corpse you use and your own power level. The stronger an undead the more energy they take to raise. The amount of undead you can have under your command at once scales with your energy levels, but at minimum you can have at least 100 undead at once.

ability.name: Greater Animate Undead
ability.description: You are able to animate corpses into a variety of undead such as Dread Knights, Liches, Vampires, Wraiths, Soul Eaters, Bone Dragons, or an undead version of the target corpse but the undead you animate can only be equal to or lesser in power than an Elite Familiar. The tier of undead you can create depends on the quality of the corpse you use and your own power level. The stronger an undead the more energy they take to raise. The amount of undead you can have under your command at once scales with your energy levels, but at minimum, you can have at least 500 undead at once.

ability.name: True Necromancy
ability.description: You have the ability to enact true necromancy as sanctioned by Death itself. Allowing to raise corpses into a variety of undead such as Gravelords, Night Liches, Vampire Lords, Nightmare Kings, Undead Dragons, Corpse Titans, or an undead version of the target corpse but the undead you animate can only be equal to or lesser in power than an Epic Familiar. The tier of undead you can create depends on the quality of the corpse you use and your own power level. The stronger an undead the more energy they take to raise. The amount of undead you can have under your command at once scales with your energy levels, but at minimum, you can have at least 2500 undead at once.

ability.name: Exalted Necromancy
ability.description: You have the ability to perform Exalted Necromancy, an ability that goes beyond the realm of simply raising the Dead. You can raise corpses into a variety of undead, such as Necro Kaisers, Overlords, Vampire Kings, Undead Dragon Lords, Reapers, etc. or an undead version of the target corpse, but the undead you animate can only be equal to or lesser in power than a Legendary Familiar. The tier of undead you can create depends on the quality of the corpse you use and your own power level. The stronger an undead, the more energy they take to raise. The amount of undead you can have under your command at once scales with your energy levels, but at minimum, you can have at least 10000 undead at once.

ability.name: Divinity Necromancy
ability.description: You posess the divinity, the ability to use the dead as your own army and servants, you can turn the corpse of the even the average man into an Undead Dragon or a Gravelord, you can animate any corpse into a True Undead that keeps all of their abilities and memories from when they were alive and further empower them with your divinity, as long as it is dead, you can command them. Although the power of the undead you can raise and the amount you can control at once scales with your own power levels, even as a base human, you can control up to 100000 undead at once.

ability.name: Authority of Death
ability.description: You wield the Authority of Death, the End. You need only point to a target to claim their life; claiming lives and resurrecting the dead is less difficult than taking a breath. You can even kill targets that cannot be killed by granting the concept of death. The stronger a target is, the more energy you need to expend to affect them.

ability.name: Divinity Earth
ability.description: You are a god of earth, wave your hand to move continents, snap your fingers to bring down life-wiping meteors, raise your arm to bring up mountains, with one glare send out sandstorms that devastate civilisations. As long as it's Earth and you have enough energy, you can do it.

ability.name: Divinity Sky
ability.description: You possess divinity over the Sky; the atmosphere is your bitch. Bring down pillars of lightning kilometers wide, alter the composition of the atmosphere at will, create tornadoes that fling around cities and countries, create an entire atmosphere for a planet at will, and create clouds tougher than adamantite to float on. As long as it is the sky and you have enough energy, you can do it.

ability.name: Tinker - Arcology
ability.description: (Tech) Allows you to design, build, modify and construct technology related to the creation and maintenance of Arcologies, self-sufficient megastructures made to house people that can act as self-contained cities even. Such as construction drones, self-recycling fertile soil, maintenance robots, surveillance systems, farming systems, recyclers, etc., practically everything needed to make an Arcology functional. But technology made with this specialisation only works when creating an Arcology or inside of an Arcology.

ability.name: Summon Lesser Nature Spirit
ability.description: Allows you to summon a lesser spirit of nature. This ability requires a sufficient amount of fertile ground nearby to summon the Nature Spirit, such as Junimo, Lesser Dryads, maneater plants, Ents, etc. You can only manifest Spirits that are equal to or lesser in power than an uncommon familiar. The strength of the spirit you can manage to summon depends on your own level of power. The manifested spirit will draw on your own energy reserve to keep itself manifested and to use its unique abilities. The stronger a spirit, the higher the energy costs to maintain them. If you cannot supply them energy, they will be unsummoned. If you have the proper skills, by spending enough time and energy, you can turn the summoned nature spirits permanent.

ability.name: Summon Nature Spirit
ability.description: Allows you to summon a lesser spirit of nature. This ability requires a sufficient amount of fertile ground nearby to summon the Nature Spirit, such as Nature Spirits, Dryads, Giant Animated Plants, Treants, Dendroid Soldiers, etc. You can only manifest Spirits that are equal to or lesser in power than a rare familiar. The strength of the spirit you can manage to summon depends on your own level of power. The manifested spirit will draw on your own energy reserve to keep itself manifested and to use its unique abilities. The stronger a spirit, the higher the energy costs to maintain them. If you cannot supply them energy, they will be unsummoned. If you have the proper skills, by spending enough time and energy, you can turn the summoned nature spirits permanent.

ability.name: Summon Greater Nature Spirit
ability.description: Allows you to summon a lesser spirit of nature. This ability requires a sufficient amount of fertile ground nearby to summon the Nature Spirit, such as Nature Spirits, Noble Dryads, Haunted Trees, Treant Lords, Dendroid Warriors, etc. You can only manifest Spirits that are equal to or lesser in power than an elite familiar. The strength of the spirit you can manage to summon depends on your own level of power. The manifested spirit will draw on your own energy reserve to keep itself manifested and to use its unique abilities. The stronger a spirit, the higher the energy costs to maintain them. If you cannot supply them energy, they will be unsummoned. If you have the proper skills, by spending enough time and energy, you can turn the summoned nature spirits permanent.

ability.name: Mirror World
ability.description: Allows you to access a Mirror Dimension at will. You can enter the mirror dimension from any sufficiently reflective surface you apply your power to to turn it into a portal. Inside the mirror dimension, there are no living beings, just an empty reflection of the real world. Objects native to the mirror world cannot be taken out, do not possess energy or provide sustenance. You can also throw objects and people into the mirror realm; the only way to get in and out of the realm is through you turning a mirror into a portal.

ability.name: Foxfire
ability.description: Allows you to wield Foxfire, the signature of the Kitsune race. Although Foxfire is lower in power than other flames of the same tier, it is capable of being maintained for long periods of time and is capable of changing its shape and texture to create disguises, illusions, and to deceive targets.

ability.name: Nine Tailed Foxfire
ability.description: Allow you to wield the flames of a Nine-Tailed, these pale blue flames, although not as potent as a flame of the same tier, cost less energy to create and maintain. You can freely shape these flames to your will, changing their shape, texture, color, sound, and such to the point where you can even convincingly mimic a person with your flames.

ability.name: Sunlight
ability.description: Allows you to conjure a ball of pure sunlight that can hover around you and that you can move around at will. The ball perfectly mimics the properties of the regular sun and consumes little energy to stay active. You can create semi-permanent sunlight spheres by loading them up with energy beforehand that they will slowly deplete.

ability.name: Bamboo Sprout
ability.description: Allows you to sprout culms from anywhere in your line of vision. These Bamboo are supernaturally durable due to being imbued with your energy,  and you can choose to sprout with sharpened ends. Using them to create walls, erect bamboo spikes, or making them impale your enemies. Created bamboo is permanent but loses its supernatural durability over time, returning to normal bamboo.

ability.name: Vinelash
ability.description: Allows you to create supernaturally strong vines out of your body under your control. The durability, strength, and size of the vines scale with your own energy levels. You can manipulate these vines like second lips to use as whips, grapples, binds, etc. You can also make them sprout thorns using additional energy. Once you stop supplying energy, the vines vanish.

ability.name: Leaf Blade
ability.description: Allows you to conjure a long leaf blade that has supernatural durability and is incredibly sharp, though even then, its durability is not great. You can also conjure smaller leaves and use them as throwing projectiles, etc. Created leaves are permanent but lose their supernatural properties over time.

ability.name: Razor Leaves
ability.description: Allows you to conjure and telekinetically control supernaturally durable and sharp leaves. Throwing out sweeping waves of them like a storm of knives, using them to pin someone down, conjuring larger leaves to use as weapons, creating whirlwinds of razor-sharp leaves, etc. The more energy you expend, the sharper and more durable the leaves and the larger amount you can control at a time.

ability.name: Stun Spore
ability.description: Allows you to conjure spores that, when breathed in, cause a paralysing and immobilising effect. The stronger an opponent is in relation to you, the less they will be affected by the spores; the effect can range from knocking them out for a day to mild stiffness in limbs. The spores look like pale green clouds. If not ingested, spore clouds dissipate in 5 minutes.

ability.name: Overclock
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to overclock Technology with your own energy, making them perform beyond their limits at the cost of expending their durability faster and potentially damaging them. The more energy you use, the more you push it beyond its limits and the more damage you potentially do.

ability.name: Tinker - Redundancy
ability.description: (Tech) Allows you to make whatever technology you create or modify to have a lot of redundancies. Meaning breaking or making them nonfunctional is going to be very frustrating. You can turn a hyper-sensitive, fragile phone into one that works even with its screen shattered, its wires exposed, dunked underwater, and its chassis half melted without losing any performance.

ability.name: Vanish
ability.description: Allows you to temporarily utterly vanish from reality, effectively temporarily erasing your existence so thoroughly that nothing in reality can interfere. Nothing can track you, nothing can land, nothing can affect, nothing can predict you when you vanish. While vanished, you end up in a plane of white nothingness without a physical body and are only able to think until you decide to end the ability, reappearing on the same spot. This ability consumes energy, and when you run out of energy, it will be automatically dispelled.

ability.name: Thermal Vision
ability.description: Allows you to switch your vision to a perfect accurate thermal vision, allowing you to see heat signatures while not impairing your regular vision.

ability.name: Varied Vision
ability.description: Allows you to switch between Thermal, Infared, Night, vision at will without impairing your regular vision.

ability.name: Bubbling
ability.description: Allows you to encase targets in bubbles that can float into the air slowly or stay midair, the bubbles by are about as durable as 1cm of glass and scale with your power level. When damaged the bubbles pop and disintegrate. If you encase yourself in a bubble, you are able to direct its direction to slowly float to your liking.

ability.name: Lube Dispension
ability.description: Allows you to dispense water-based lube safe for personal use from your body, either making your body slick at will, releasing it from any point in your body like a dispenser or shooting it out like a low-power hose.

ability.name: Rough Knuckle
ability.description: Allows you to slightly augment your fists with energy, allowing the average man to shatter bricks with their fists. The more energy you expend, the greater the augmentation, but it is not very efficient.

ability.name: Light Waltz
ability.description: Allows you to cover parts of your body in a light-like aura that decreases the pressure you apply on surfaces to almost nothing, allowing you to walk on cobwebs or water, but does not reduce the damage or effects you take. Falls will still hurt, but where you land will not take damage.

ability.name: Camera Mark
ability.description: Allows you to place glowing red runes on stable physical surfaces that act like cameras that you can view with your mind any time. The number of marks you can have at once depends on your maximum energy; the minimum is 5.

ability.name: Project Image
ability.description: Allows you to conjure 2d planes that show images or play a video that you can remember or imagine accurately. The 2d planes created are stationary and are as durable as 1cm of untempered glass.

ability.name: Truth Assertion
ability.description: Allows you to make others believe the truth of your words, but at the same time, for as long as the ability is active, you cannot speak or communicate with the intent to deceive. Whenever this ability is active, there is a glowing white choker around the user's neck.

ability.name: Sweat
ability.description: Allows you to sweat on command, either stopping sweating or sweating to supernatural levels to cool your body down.

ability.name: Black Trial
ability.description: Black Souls - Allows you to wield the power of the Black Trial, one who hunts sinned blackened souls. You are able to see people's souls, the whiter their soul, the purer of heart they are, the blacker the soul the larger their sins. After observing a Black Soul, you are able to mark that soul and track it anywhere, you can also teleport to the location of that soul at any time.

ability.name: Smoke Conduit Physiology
ability.description: Infamous - Allows you to wield the powers of a Smoke Conduit, alongside giving a mild increase to your physical attributes. Being a conduit allows you to absorb, generate, manipulate, emit, and briefly transform into Smoke. Whenever you are absorbing smoke, you can use it to augment your own regeneration. Conduit abilities do not use the user's energy but instead require them to absorb outside sources of the element to fuel their reserves. You only start with the very basic uses of the ability and have to train to achieve more complex techniques.

ability.name: Neon Conduit Physiology
ability.description: (Tech)Infamous - Allows you to wield the powers of a Neon Conduit, alongside giving a mild increase to your physical attributes. Being a conduit allows you to absorb, generate, manipulate, emit, and briefly transform into Neon, as well as being able to use it to greatly augment your speed. Whenever you are absorbing Neon Light, you can use it to augment your own regeneration. Conduit abilities do not use the user's energy but instead require them to absorb outside sources of the element to fuel their reserves. Note: You do not move at or anywhere near light speed. You only start with the very basic uses of the ability and have to train to achieve more complex techniques.

ability.name: Oil/Napalm Conduit Physiology
ability.description: Infamous - Allows you to wield the powers of an Oil/Napalm Conduit, alongside giving a mild increase to your physical attributes. Being a conduit allows you to absorb, generate, manipulate, emit, and briefly transform into Napalm/Oil, using it to send blasts of fire, dousing enemies in flame, or restraining them. Whenever you are absorbing Oil/Napalm, you can use it to augment your own regeneration. Conduit abilities do not use the user's energy but instead require them to absorb outside sources of the element to fuel their reserves. You only start with the very basic uses of the ability and have to train to achieve more complex techniques.(Lowered rating due to scarcity of element)

ability.name: Ice Conduit Physiology
ability.description: Infamous - Allows you to wield the powers of an Ice Conduit, alongside giving a mild increase to your physical attributes. Being a conduit allows you to absorb, generate, manipulate, and emit Ice, briefly transform into Icy Vapor at will, and perform cryokinesis to send blasts of icy vapor, icicles, making ice constructs burst out of the ground, and much more. Whenever you are absorbing Ice, you can use it to augment your own regeneration. Conduit abilities do not use the user's energy but instead require them to absorb outside sources of the element to fuel their reserves. You only start with the very basic uses of the ability and have to train to achieve more complex techniques.

ability.name: Concrete Conduit Physiology
ability.description: Infamous - Allows you to wield the powers of a Concrete Conduit, alongside giving a mild increase to your physical attributes. Being a conduit allows you to absorb, generate, manipulate, emit, and encase your body in armor of concrete that boosts your physical abilities, shoot spikes of concrete, etc. Whenever you are absorbing Concrete, you can use it to augment your own regeneration. Conduit abilities do not use the user's energy but instead require them to absorb outside sources of the element to fuel their reserves. You only start with the very basic uses of the ability and have to train to achieve more complex techniques.(In the absence of concrete, Sedimentary rocks can be used as a substitute)

ability.name: Lightning Conduit Physiology
ability.description: Infamous - Allows you to wield the powers of a Lightning Conduit, alongside giving a mild increase to your physical attributes. Being a conduit allows you to absorb and manipulate Electricity and Magnetism, allowing you to launch bolts of lightning, create EMPs, create polarity fields, electromagnetic walls, etc. Whenever you are absorbing electricity, you can use it to augment your own regeneration, and with intensive training, you can use it to tweak people's bioelectricity to send their regeneration into overdrive. Conduit abilities do not use the user's energy but instead require them to absorb outside sources of the element to fuel their reserves. You only start with the very basic uses of the ability and have to train to achieve more complex techniques. Note: No, you cannot time-travel or travel at lightning speed.

ability.name: Video Conduit Physiology
ability.description: Infamous - #Infamous - Allows you to wield the powers of a Video Conduit, alongside giving a mild increase to your physical attributes. You are capable of absorbing the energy of artificial light from video displays and use your own reserves to create Hard Light Constructs such as weapons, armors, and even temporary autonomous creations that can fight for you like hardlight minions, angels, and demons. With practice you can even create a field of hardlight that bends light around you to render you invisible. Whenever you are absorbing Video, you can use it to augment your own regeneration. Conduit abilities do not use the user's energy but instead require them to absorb outside sources of the element to fuel their reserves. You only start with the very basic uses of the ability and have to train to achieve more complex techniques. Note: You can't pull people into Video worlds.

ability.name: Fight mode
ability.description: Get your head in the game and start fighting. Using this ability fills your body with incredible amounts of adrenaline, Norepinephrine, cortisol, endorphins, testosterone and dopamine to make your body go into an enhanced fight mode without suffering the negative consequences of overdosing on those chemicals and hormones.

ability.name: Induce Lactation
ability.description: (Nsfw)Allows you to induce lactation on targets in your line of sight, provided they have the biological capability to produce it.

ability.name: Anchor Back
ability.description: Allows you to put down a mark on where you are standing. For as long as this ability is active, you can teleport back to that mark. The longer the distance between you and the mark, the more energy it will consume. Only one mark may be active at a time.

ability.name: Adventure Line
ability.description: Stanley Parable - Manifests a yellow line on the ground that will lead you to an adventure if you follow. And by adventure, I mean an interesting event happening in a distance you can reach comfortably. What is an interesting event? Maybe it's a good food place you haven't visited yet, or a dangerous murderer on a spree very capable of killing you. The guarantee is that whatever you encounter will be interesting.

ability.name: Hormone Regulation
ability.description: Allows you to control the hormones in your body, being able to secrete more of them at will, lowering certain ones, increasing the concentration of certain ones to achieve a variety of effects like forced concentration, depression etc. But exercise caution when using it to not hurt your own body or mess up your biochemistry too badly.

ability.name: Tanuki's Leaves
