ability.description: You to wield the leaves used by Tanuki Yokai, allowing you to conjure leaves that you can shapeshift into any object you desire, changing their size, texture etc. the durability and longevity of your shapeshifted leaves is proportional to the amount of energy you supply to them, once the energy runs out the leaf turns back to normal. You can also place leaves on top of people to disguise them, with the duration lasting as long as you keep supplying it energy.

ability.name: Tonguelash
ability.description: Allows you to reinforce and elongate your tongue to several to dozens of meters, to use as a whip, another limb, or the other obvious use cases.

ability.name: Meal
ability.description: Allows you to enhance the properties of the food you cook, making them more nutritious and amplifying the properties the ingredients already had while enhancing their taste proportional to how well you cooked the dish.

ability.name: Mental Out
ability.description: Toaru - Mental Out allows you to control the minds of humans and human adjacent creatures with incredible precision, being able to control them, change their minds, personalities, and even subtly manipulate them, but using your ability on a target creates a marking in their eye, so beware. This ability works by hyper-specialized ultra-micro hydrokinesis. If the target is not close enough to human biology, you will have to study their biology extensively to adapt your ability to it. The effectiveness of Mental Out scales with the power difference between you and the target.

ability.name: Rebake
ability.description: You can expend your energy to recreate any food you have cooked with your very own hands. The created food is an exact replica that is a permanent matter. The energy cost depends on the complexity of the food, how expensive its ingredients are, and the volume of the food you are creating. Cannot create food with supernatural effects.

ability.name: Rasengan
ability.description: Naruto - Allows you to weave your energy into an energy sphere rotating in multiple directions that can inflict incredible damage on hit. But to make it properly, one needs time and concentration to build up the force. With enough training, you can increase the size of the Rasengan and even use it as a projectile. Rasengan can also be combined with abilities that have elemental properties to use elemental variants of the ability.

ability.name: Thought Acceleration
ability.description: Fate - By concentrating, you can increase the speed at which your brain processes information to think faster in less time. With enough practice and combat skills, it can also be used in combat. Beware that overusing it can have negative consequences.

ability.name: Eros Hide
ability.description: (Nsfw)Allows you to erect an aura around yourself and your partner, making it so that people do not perceive your actions done in that aura as sexual or indecent. You could have sex in public and no one would bat an eye.

ability.name: Caladrious Form
ability.description: Allows you to turn into, or a hybrid of, the Caladrious, the white bird of healing. In Caladrious form, you possess slightly enhanced physical abilities, but your real ability is the ability to discern sickness with your eyes, and by making contact with a disease or cursed target, you can absorb their ailment into yourself. In this form, you possess great resistance against curses and illnesses, and by bathing under sunlight, you can slowly purge these effects from yourself; the speed at which you purge scales with your energy reserves. While in this form, unholy and dark abilities cannot be used, but holy and recovery abilities are enhanced.

ability.name: Envemon
ability.description: Allows you to imbibe poison within your own body and use to increase your own performance, greatly increasing physical performance, awareness, alertness, and pain resistance but damages your body with posion.

ability.name: Sightline
ability.description: When activated, creates a red line that connects to everyone that can sense you visually and highlights them through lines.

ability.name: Soul Arrow
ability.description: Darksouls - Draw energy from your life and soul and shape it as a weapon, taking the shape of a simple arrow projectile that can curve in the air towards targets. As the origin of the arrow is linked to the soul, it's power scales with the might of one's soul in addition to their energy levels.

ability.name: Great Soul Arrow
ability.description: Darksouls - Draw energy from your life and soul and shape it as a weapon. This is a more refined and potent version of the Soul Arrow, which forms an arrow-like projectile that can curve in the air towards targets. As the origin of the arrow is linked to the soul, its power scales with the might of one's soul in addition to their energy levels.

ability.name: Soul Spear
ability.description: Darksouls - Draw energy from your life and soul and shape it as a weapon, the power of the soul condensed, refined, and sharpened into a powerful spear that can curve mid-air to home in on enemies and pierce through defences. As the origin of the spear is linked to the soul, its power scales with the might of one's soul in addition to their energy levels.

ability.name: Crystal Soul Spear
ability.description: Darksouls - Draw energy from your life and soul and shape it as a weapon, the power of the soul condensed, refined, and sharpened, and then even further empowered through crystallization takes the form of a crystalline spear that can curve mid-air and pierce with incredible power. As the origin of the spear is linked to the soul, its power scales with the might of one's soul in addition to their energy levels.

ability.name: Bulk Up
ability.description: You are able to bulk up, reinforcing and strengthening all of your muscles to superhuman levels, allowing you to exert superhuman strength. Even as a base human, you can easily tear apart and throw around cars. Overuse can lead to extreme soreness and muscle tears.

ability.name: Creation
ability.description: You can create objects and matter through your magical energy as long as you remember how to make them. This can range from creating a phone, creating a bar of gold, or even creating a magical sword, provided you know exactly how to make one. The higher the mass and the more magical an object you create, the more energy you need to expend.

ability.name: Inner Gate
ability.description: Re:Zero - You have a gate inside of you that allows you to convert your energy to elemental mana that you can use to cast a variety of elemental magic depending on your aptitude.

ability.name: Highlight
ability.description: Allows you to mark a target with a Highlight by touching them. All highlighted targets have a colored outline that you can see as long as they are within a distance you'd be able to see with your eyes. You can see these colored outlines even if you are vision-impaired or there are blockades between you and the target.

ability.name: Bequeth
ability.description: Allows you to grant your physical abilities to others, granting them percentages of your own physical statistics, such as giving someone 10% of your strength or 20% of your agility. Only consumes your current physical abilities and grants them exactly. Physicals granted are permanently decreased but can be retrained. Only works with unaltered base physical abilities.

ability.name: Rescale
ability.description: Allows you to adjust your physical abilities in terms of a percentage allocation. By default, you have 500.0% allocated 100.0% each to Vitality, Strength, Toughness, Agility, and Stamina. As long as this ability is active, you can freely redistribute that 500.0% among your stats as long as you leave enough percentage to not die. Such as lowering Agility down to 10.0% and increasing Toughness to 190.0%.

ability.name: Liason
ability.description: Allows you to select up to an amount of Liasons equal to the number of ability slots you have. These Liasons can freely use all of the abilities you currently have slotted in through you, expending your energy as if you were using them while they wield the effects. For this effect to be active, Liason must be slotted in.

ability.name: Absolute Terror Field
ability.description: Evangelion - You are able to harness your very own AT Field, a field that covers your soul and separates it from the world around you. This field is invisible and manifests centered on you, only being visible when being impacted sufficiently. With mastery, you can change the shape of your field to use it more precisely. The power of this field scales with your energy reserves and the strength of your soul.

ability.name: Challenge
ability.description: "Come at me!" When Challenge is activated, you can designate targets in your line of sight to be affected by this ability, and as a result, these targets will have an immense and hard-to-resist urge to main or kill you. For the ability to work, targets must be in your sensory range and vice versa.

ability.name: Dying Will Flame
ability.description: Katekyo Hitman Reborn - Upon receiving this ability, it automatically takes the form of a Sky Dying Will Flame that best matches your temperament and replaces itself with it.

ability.name: Sky Flames
ability.description: Katekyo Hitman Reborn - Dying Will Flames that represent Harmonization, in addition to granting the ability to control the flames, its property allows it to temporarily fuse itself with another ability to create a flame-based ability greater than the sum of both their parts.

ability.name: Storm Flames
ability.description: Katekyo Hitman Reborn - Dying Will Flames that represent Disintegration, the flames produced by this ability do not act like normal flames, and instead of burning, they disintegrate and tear apart their targets in a violent manner.

ability.name: Rain Flames
ability.description: Katekyo Hitman Reborn - Dying Will Flames that represent Tranquility, the water-like flames produced by these flames have the special property of weakening whatever they touch, decreasing the intensity of their effects.

ability.name: Sun Flames
ability.description: Katekyo Hitman Reborn - Dying Will Flames that represent Activation,  the light-like flames produced by this ability have the special property of increasing the performance of whatever it affects, increasing the natural healing of someone, the output of an ability, or increasing physical performance. But using this ability can tax the target affected by it.

ability.name: Lightning Flames
ability.description: Katekyo Hitman Reborn - Dying Will Flames that represent Hardening, the lightning-like flames produced by this flame have the special property of solidifying and hardening objects, such as turning air into a wall or making a barrier out of the lightning, or even using the lightning itself as sharp blades.

ability.name: Mist Flames
ability.description: Katekyo Hitman Reborn - Dying Will Flames that represent Construction, the mist-like flames produced by this flame have the special property of being able to alter their looks, texture, smell, etc., to fool the five senses, and even being able to condense enough to pass off as real objects, but have comparatively weak firepower.

ability.name: Cloud Flames
ability.description: Katekyo Hitman Reborn - Dying Will Flames that represent Propagation, the cloud-like flames produced by this flame have the special property of being able to increase, replicate, and duplicate targets, such as creating a temporary copy of a sword, increasing one's muscle mass, and creating mirror images of oneself, but the stronger the target effect, the higher the energy consumption. In addition, this makes the Cloud Flames very good at creating large-scale effects and attacks despite their relatively weak firepower.

ability.name: Drillmaker
ability.description: Make, not break. Allows you to create Drills out of energy that you can control telekinetically to either launch as projectiles or wield like weapons.  The strength and rotational power of drills scale with the amount of energy expended.

ability.name: Bloody Loan
ability.description: "Future for the Present." Allows you to freely recover your energy, but the moment you stop using this ability to siphon energy, you will suffer damage proportional to the amount of energy you gained. Ranging from mild cuts to devastating wounds that are nigh impossible to heal, to straight-up death.

ability.name: Bloody Savings
ability.description: "Present for the Future." Allows you to expend your health and energy to store it in this ability at a 5 to 1 ratio to be reclaimed at anytime as long as this ability is not taken off the active ability slot.

ability.name: Barbs
ability.description: While this ability is active, all strikes and blunt attacks consume more energy; in exchange, all strikes and blunt attacks act like they are covered in razor or barbed wire, leaving lacerations and cuts on hit proportional to the power of the attack.

ability.name: Equal Blood
ability.description: "This will hurt both of us." Increases the damage all targets take from your attacks, but forces you to take a portion of the damage you inflict on targets.

ability.name: Trial
ability.description: Allows you to see people in grayscale according to your sense of Morality; the more immoral they are according to your sense of morals, the darker shade they appear in.

ability.name: Inversion
ability.description: Allows you to invert the effect of any Ability you currently have slotted in, such as Pyrokinesis becoming Cryokinesis, Curse becoming Bless, etc., but you also double the energy consumption of the ability while inverting its effect.

ability.name: Lesser Curse
ability.description: Allows you to put a curse on a target through physical contact; this curse decreases a chosen physical attribute of a target, such as Strength, Resiliance, Stamina, Vitality, and Agility. The potency of the curse applied and its duration are relative to the difference in strength between you and the target, as well as the amount of energy you expend. Only one curse may be applied to a target at a time.

ability.name: Curse
ability.description: Allows you to apply one of three curses on a target through physical contact; the Curse of Weakness that decreases the target's Strength, Resilience, and Stamina. Curse of Ruination that hinders a target's Energy and Vitality regeneration, and the Curse of Obsufication that weakens a target's all fire senses. The potency of the curse applied and its duration are relative to the difference in strength between you and the target, as well as the amount of energy you expend. Only one curse may be applied to a target at a time.

ability.name: Watcher's Curse
ability.description: Allows you to apply the Watcher's Curse on a target. The target affected by this curse will have an ethereal watcher's eye floating over them and watching them. This eye will constantly transmit the target's location and what it sees to you. The Curse can also be used as an anchor to cast abilities and spells from.

ability.name: Root
ability.description: Allows you to grow ethereal roots that dig into the ground, rooting you in place but allowing you to drain the energy and nutrients from the ground to accelerate your vitality and energy regeneration.

ability.name: Kamikaze
ability.description: Allows you to expend your own Vitality to produce a powerful and violent explosion from your body. The more Vitality you expend, the more powerful the explosion is, and at a bare minimum, the vitality you expend must be enough to considerably hurt you.

ability.name: Tower Down
ability.description: "Fractured Language" Allows you to bring down the Tower of Babel temporarily, making all forms of communication impossible in a 1km radius. No matter what, people cannot understand what other people try to communicate, whether written, spoken, or gestured. The range of this ability expands as you get stronger; energy consumption scales with the number of people affected.

ability.name: Physical Trauma Response
ability.description: Your flesh, it hardens in response to physical trauma. When experiencing sudden impacts and or strikes above a certain threshold, your muscles, fat, skin, and every layer of your body on the point of impact compacts and locks together briefly to form an armored layer to defend yourself against physical trauma without impeding movement.

ability.name: Tinker - Mech(I)
ability.description: (Tech) Allows you to design, modify, and build technology and technological constructs related to Mechs and large piloted mechanical armors and their construction. At this level, you can create basic mechs, Such as large exosuits made to help with construction or basic clunky mechs with standard armors and machine guns.

ability.name: Tinker - Mech(II)
ability.description: (Tech) Allows you to design, modify, and build technology and technological constructs related to Mechs and large piloted mechanical armors and their construction. At this level, you can create proper combat-ready mechs, such as sleek and agile mechs that can briefly fly, or ones that are less mobile and more armored. Modular ones that can be easily repaired. You can also design and build weaponry and modules that only work for your mechs and nothing else, based on your other abilities and traits.

ability.name: Tinker - Mech(III)
ability.description: (Tech) Allows you to design, modify, and build technology and technological constructs related to Mechs and large piloted mechanical armors and their construction. At this level, you can create powerful and versatile mechs that can contend with the likes of Knightmares and other such Mechs. Such as creating large mechs that can withstand missile onslaughts and have power canons and guns that can demolish streets equipped onto them. You can also design and build weaponry and modules that only work for your mechs and nothing else, based on your other abilities and traits.

ability.name: Tinker - Mech(IV)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify, and build technology and technological constructs related to Mechs and large piloted mechanical armors and their construction. At this level, your mechs can be called proper mechs. As long as you have enough resources and time, you can create the skyscraper-sized, esoteric energy-harnessing forcefield-protected Mecha with dozens of different modules that can withstand nuclear warfare and annihilate entire city blocks and cities with its canons.

ability.name: Tinker - Mech(V)
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify, and build technology and technological constructs related to Mechs and large piloted mechanical armors and their construction. You can create the Mecha of your dreams that would make Gundams proud. Mechs that are powered by antimatter with Hadron canons, planet-sized Mechs that can travel through space with Death Star canons, as long as you have the Resources, Knowledge, and Time, you can use them to design a badass mech. You can also design and build weaponry and modules that only work for your mechs and nothing else, based on your other abilities and traits.

ability.name: Tinker - Hydro
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify, and build technology and technological constructs related to Water and water-based constructs. Such as a dehydration gun, a sprinkler system, hydro canons, very efficient irrigation systems, all the way up to bombs that rip all water molecules from a 100-meter radius, and engines that run on nothing but water, depending on your skills, experience, and materials available.

ability.name: Tinker - Aero
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify, and build technology and technological constructs related to Air and atmospheres. Such as a blow dryer, a hyper-efficient wind turbine, wind bombs, flying machines, super-efficient blimps, all the way up to weather alteration devices, tornado grenades, and vacuum bombs, depending on your skills, experience, and materials available.

ability.name: Tinker - Henshin
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify, and build technology and technological constructs related to transformation and transformable technology. Such a belt that allows you to don a suit of stylish armor, a car that transforms into a jet, and those jets come together to form a mech, a pen that transforms into little mechanical lion, a band that inhibits transformations, and even stylish(mandatory) themed armors that harness the power of exotic materials to empower the wearer, depending on your skills, experience, and materials available.

ability.name: Tinker - Ultrakill
ability.description: (Tech)Allows you to design, modify, and build technology and technological constructs from the world of Ultrakill. Specializing in the production of a variety of robots ranging from hyper mobile ones to moving artileries and all the way up to ones larger than skyscrapers with overwhelmingly powerful weapons and defensive systems. This tinker ability has the unique caveat of requiring technology built through it to be fueled by Blood primarily.

item.name: Gae Bolg
item.description: Fate Cu Chulainn - A cursed demonic spear crafted from the skull of a great beast owned by the legendary hero Cu Chulainn, the wounds inflicted with this spear are cursed to never heal. This effect can only be bypassed with Legendary rank healing. With Master rank Polearm mastery and practice you can access the noble phantasms of this weapon.

item.name: Excalibur the Sword of Promised Victory
item.description: Fate Artoria - The Sword of Promised Victory that was crafted by the fae as the ultimate hope of humanity, one of the strongest weapons bound by 12 restraints unable to show its true power.

item.name: Laevatein
item.description: Fate Surtr - The Sun-Like Sword that Becomes a Calamity owned by Surtr capable of wiping out all life on the planet as it incinerates all things, prioritizing life above all else, even a god would be reduced to ashes.

item.name: Deep Sea Knight Anchor
item.description: Black Souls - The Anchor wielded by the Knight of the Deep Seas blessed by the blessing of the Secret Princess. Wielding this anchor doubles your strength and boosts the power of all water-based abilities.

item.name: Vorpal Blade
item.description: Blacksouls - The sword of the Evil Dragon Slaying Rabbit, when wielded against a Dragon it gives the user enhanced physical stats and ignores a portion of the dragon's durability.

item.name: Demon Catalyst
item.description: BlackSouls A staff carved from the bones and soul of a great demon, amplifies the power of all spells cast with it by 2x but also increases their mana consumption by 2x

item.name: Astral Injection
item.description: Calamity Mod - An injection made from the essence of the starborn astral blight, MASSIVELY increases energy regeneration for 10 minutes but while the effect is active your insides will start tearing up and rotting from the influx of astral energy. Restock time: 120 hours

item.name: Yharim Stimulants
item.description: Calamity Mod - An injection made by Dreadon to give its user immense might for a short time, upon injecting these stimulants you will receive a large boost in physical ability and a large boost in regenerative capabilities for 30 minutes. After duration passes you will be inflicted with weakness and exhaustion. Restock time: 120 Hours

item.name: Ring of Invisibility
item.description: An ornate platinum ring that constantly bends light around its wearer, rendering them invisible.

item.name: Master Key
item.description: Allows you to open any physical lock and even barriers and wards by inserting the key and twisting it.

item.name: Spear of Longinus X
item.description: Evangelion - A large red spear that adjusts size according to its user and changes its shape according to their needs, this spear can tear through even the strongest of barriers. When stabbed into the body of a god it will lock down their soul and render them paralyzed until it is removed.

item.name: Invisible Air
item.description: Fate Artoria - Barrier of the wind king is a barrier made of several layers of extremely compressed air that the user can control at will

item.name: Gae Buidhe
item.description: Fate Diarmuid - A legendary spear carried by the hero Diarmuid. This spear is cursed to make the wounds inflicted never close whether it is by traditional healing or through magic that is below Legendary Level. The curse is also dispelled when the owner dies or the spear is broken. If the spear is broken, a skilled enough blacksmith or crafter may still be capable of mending it back together.

item.name: Gae Dearg
item.description: Fate Diarmuid - A legendary spear carried by the hero Diarmuid. This spear is capable of severing and nullifying magic, making all forms of magical protection almost useless against it. This effect is not useful for dispelling spells but for bypassing them.

item.name: Gram
item.description: DxD - The Strongest Demonic Sword on par with even Durandal. This sword is nigh unbreakable and the user is able to emit a destructive aura by expending their own energy, in addition, this sword is lethal against all Dragons, dealing massively increased damage against them.

item.name: Durandal
item.description: DxD - One of the strongest Holy Swords. The legendary Durandal is said to be unbreakable and capable of severing anything, in addition, the Durandal can release a destructive aura in accordance to its user's wishes by expending their energy. This sword is extremely difficult to use for an inexperienced user.

item.name: Sword Birth
item.description: DxD - A sacred gear created by god. It allows the user to conjure constructs of demonic swords with varying properties depending on the user's capabilities and skill. Swords that absorb flame or ones that are exceptionally sharp are just a few of the many examples. The user cannot create a sword that does something they themselves cannot do.

item.name: A skeleton
item.description: An ordinary human skeleton from a completely ordinary person

item.name: Auric Tesla Armor
item.description: (Tech)Calamity Mod - A power armor modeled after the one worn by the God Slaying Tyrant Yharim, wearing this armor grants an extreme boost to physical abilities, rare rank regeneration, hovering, and an extremely fast dash that can be activated every 10 seconds. This armor is managed by a virtual intelligence that controls its systems

item.name: Enuma Elish
item.description: Fate Gilgamesh - The Sword of Rupture, Ea. Granted by the gods to King Gilgamesh, this sword was forged before the concept of swords was created. The sword is capable of releasing red winds capable of dislocating and shredding spacetime without expending the user's energy, in addition, it can act as a mortar when its full power is unleashed, allowing the user to unleash a beam that removes the texture of the world, essentially annihilating everything in its path.

item.name: Pokeball Set
item.description: Pokemon - A set of Pokeballs that can capture creatures and house them for convenient storage, creatures caught by Pokeballs are registered as familiars by the system. Contains 6 regular pokeballs. Restock timer: 24 hours

item.name: Inverted Spear of Heaven
item.description: JJK - The inverted spear of heaven is capable of dispelling any active ability effect it comes into contact with such as a fireball or a barrier, but does not work on basic energy applications and magic. Cannot dispell effects beyond its rank.

item.name: Cornucopia
item.description: A horn that contains an unlimited amount of delicious and fresh mundane vegetables, fruits and fruits etc. that can be taken out at any time, the user has to think of the ingredient they want before pulling it out.

item.name: Tome of the Erdtree
item.description: (Tome)Elden Ring - Allows you to learn the incantations of the Erdtree such as healing and blessings. https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Erdtree+Incantations

item.name: Tome of the Grand Rizzard
item.description: (Tome)A tome containing vast knowledge in erotic magical arts allowing you to learn Eromancy.

item.name: Tricksters Book of Illusions
item.description: (Tome)A tome containing a variety of spells about illusions and tricks allowing you to learn DnD illusion spells from it. https://dnd5e.wikidot.com/spells:illusion

item.name: Dragon Ball
item.description: Dragon Ball - A singular Dragon ball, if you gather all 7 you can summon Shenron to grant you a wish that is within his power or give yourself any ability below a 6.9 rating.

item.name: Stone Mask
item.description: JoJo - A stone mask crafted by the Pillar Men that transforms any who wears it and drips blood on it to become a vampire.

item.name: Stone of Aja
item.description: JoJo - A legendary jewel that has the ability to amplify hamon and light to extreme levels, wearing this pendant makes light abilities stronger, and using it with the stone mask one can turn themselves into a perfect lifeform.

item.name: Grimoire of the Twice Dead Death Mage
item.description: Death Mage - A grimoire belonging to a magician of death who has died twice. Allows you to learn death attribute magic belonging to Vandalieu https://death-mage.fandom.com/wiki/Death-attribute_magic

item.name: Grimoire of the White Mage
item.description: A tome containing a variety of spells about White Magic allowing the reader to learn White Magic spells such as healing, curing, buffs, and warding from it.

item.name: Grimoire of the Pyromancer
item.description: A tome containing a variety of spells about fire and flame allowing the reader to learn Fire Magic from it.

item.name: Grimoire of the Cryomancer
item.description: A tome containing a variety of spells about ice and cold allowing the reader to learn Ice Magic from it.

item.name: Grimoire of the Aeromancer
item.description: A tome containing a variety of spells about Wind and Lightning allowing the reader to learn Air Magic from it.

item.name: Alchemilia
item.description: A tome containing guides on how to make a lot of minor yet useful potions such as healing, energy recovery, etc. from mundane or ordinary ingredients. Those who haven't read Alchemilia physically cannot craft the potions it gives knowledge about.

item.name: Midas' Bag of Holding
item.description: A small pouch the size of a human hand that contains a 1km x 1km square of space inside of it, whoever puts their hand inside can pull out what they are looking for no problem, the weight of the pouch does not change.

item.name: Bar of Vibranium
item.description: Marvel - A bar of pure and refined Wakandan Vibranium ready to be processed, Vibranium has the special property of being able to absorb kinetic energy and vibrations, making it nigh unbreakable by conventional means. Restock Timer: 168 Hours

item.name: Angel Ring
item.description: Modded Minecraft - An ornate gold ring that allows the user to freely move through the air at the same speed they can run at.

item.name: Black Barrel
item.description: Fate - A gun that imposes the concept of limited life on any entity it hits, even absolute immortals will be rendered mortal by this weapon.

item.name: Black Key Rites
item.description: Fate - A holy rite that allows the user to create black keys themselves expending their energy and praying according to the rites.

item.name: Shroud of Martin
item.description: Fate - A holy shroud once worn by a saint, when wrapped around an object, the shroud suppresses the object's state, making it stay "normal".

item.name: Enkidu
item.description: Fate - The Chains of Heaven that can suppress the very gods, the chains can be manifested at any time and be controlled with your mind, the more holy or divine a target is, the stronger Enkidu is.

item.name: A pair of very comfortable socks
item.description: Very comfortable, if you managed to roll this out of every treasure of the multiverse inside of the gacha you deserve pity.

item.name: Character Card Destinys Child
item.description: Legendary Mechanic - Predict an 'opportunity' in the future. Can indicate a mission, an item, an action of a certain person… etc. The vision is accurate and detailed. This item has 5 uses and after 5 uses it will fade away.

item.name: HF Murasama
item.description: (Tech)Metal Gear Rising Revengence - A crimson expertly crafted High Frequency blade, the best of it's kind, capable of cutting through practically any physical material, in addition, this blade comes with a gunslash in order to better facilitate Iai moves. The sheath has infinite charge to supply the blade.

item.name: Playful Cloud
item.description: JJK - A cursed three-sectioned staff that amplifies in destructive power the higher the strength of its user.

item.name: Pokedex
item.description: (Tech)Pokemon - A smart handheld device that can scan, identify, categorize, and analyze any race or species of creature in less than 10 seconds.

item.name: The Infinite Magazine
item.description: A magazine that can morph into the magazine of any projectile shooting weapon and will supply it with infinite amounts of the ammo it uses as long as it stays attached.

item.name: Ticket to Belethor's General Goods
item.description: Skyrim - Once you use this item, you are teleported to Belethors General Goods in Tamriel, Skyrim for 1 hour. You cannot leave a 10-meter circle from where you first appeared, allowing you to buy goods native to the world of Skyrim and Tamriel such as Soul Gems, Magic Books, etc. Cooldown: 720 hours

item.name: Hito Hito no Mi
item.description: One Piece - A devil fruit that is capable of making an object or an animal capable of taking on a human or a hybrid form on the downside of making them unable to swim.

item.name: Triactis True Paladinian Mage-Hammer of Might
item.description: Calamity Mod - A hammer once wielded by the greatest Paladin. Using this hammer amplifies the user's magical and physical abilities considerably as well as augmenting all spells that use the hammer as a focus. This hammer possesses tremendous might capable of flattening mountains, and when thrown, this hammer will find its way back to its user like the Mjolnir.

item.name: Ticket to the ITOPOD
item.description: When used it sends you to the ITOPOD otherwise known as the Infinite Tower of Pissed Off Dudes. Every floor contains an enemy with an ability as strong as the corresponding floor. According to the floor you manage to finish your climb at, you will get an item of equal level. The tickets dissappears upon being torn.

item.name: Tome of Hands
item.description: Love Advice From the Great Duke of hell - While holding this tome you are capable of transforming and creating hands out of any surface that you can control like your own limbs, with practice and study you can learn to do it without relying on the tome.

item.name: Furniture Catalog
item.description: Allows you to instantly buy and get delivered any mundane furniture in your current world to your location via teleportation, all pieces of furniture cost their manufacturing cost. Cannot be accessed while in combat or in hostile territory.

item.name: Abyssal Diving Suit
item.description: (Tech)Calamity Mod - An extremely tough power armor suit designed for deep sea exploration, and deep sea as in 3,000km under the sea deep, this suit is capable of easily adapting to any underwater condition whether its poison, corrosion, sea pressure, this suit will perform perfectly, allowing you to move and live in any underwater condition with ease.

item.name: Grand Gelatin
item.description: Calamity Mod - A rainbow-colored gel in an ornate glass bottle, if you consume the grand gelatin you gain Advanced Poison Resistance, as well as a sizeable boost to your vitality and agility.

item.name: Ring of Swiftness
item.description: A magical silver ornate ring that improves your agility, reflexes, and balance.

item.name: Sand Cloak
item.description: A dusty brown cloak that helps hide your presence, and once every 8 hours you can cover yourself in a violent localized sandstorm to retreat or hide yourself.

item.name: Ambrosial Ampule
item.description: Calamity Mod - Ambrosia of the gods, upon drinking it massively increases the drinker's vitality to the point it almost seems like they have regeneration, in addition, the drinker is cured of all illnesses and ailments.

item.name: Bloom Stone
item.description: Calamity Mod - An ancient relic made out of a special green gem fitted into a necklace, under sunlight it gives its user regeneration depending on the time of day, at morning its Uncommon Regeneration, at Noon it is Rare Regeneration, afternoon Uncommon and at evening its Common, it gives no benefits at night.

item.name: Butchers Bag of Infinite Meat
item.description: A bag containing a limitless amount of fresh meat inside of itself, you can only take 100kg of meat out of it every 24 hours, it contains meat from all mundane animals from earth in all cuts, all of it clean, not ethically sourced. Just plunge your hand into the bag of meat think of what you want and ignore the implication of infinite meat and its source.

item.name: Living Dew
item.description: Calamity Mod - A living dew from the deepest depths of the ancient jungle was said to be capable of granting its owner longevity and vitality, and they were right. When you consume the living dew your vitality and lifespan are significantly increased, making you very resistant to all ailments and heal faster, in addition, these effects are amplified when you are in a jungle or forest.

item.name: Permafrosts Concoction
item.description: Calamity Mod - The culmination of the Archamge Permafrost's work. Upon drinking this elixir, your energy/mana reserves and regeneration are greatly increased and all of your frost-related abilities gain massive buffs in addition to taking less energy/mana to cast. You are also greatly resistant to both cold and flame.

item.name: THE Stop Sign
item.description: An indestructible stop sign, whenever the head of this stop sign makes contact with something it kills all of its momentum instantly.

item.name: Trinket of Chi
item.description: Calamity Mod - A trinket held a devout monk who stood still until they became a statue. When standing still for more than 3 seconds you recover your energy/mana and health faster.

item.name: Evasion Scarf
item.description: Calamity Mod - A scarf held by an evasive rogue swift as a shadow. When worn you can activate the effect of the scarf to gain a large speed boost and become intangible as you move in a straight line for 1 second, allowing you to move through your enemy's attack or slip through a wall when you need to dodge. 30 second cooldown.

item.name: Grimoire of Hemomancy
item.description: (Tome)Black Clover - A book containing the secrets of Blood Magic from the Clover Kingdom, allowing its users to learn and utilize Hemomancy. Spell List: https://blackclover.fandom.com/wiki/Blood_Magic

item.name: Grimoire of Pyromancy
item.description: (Tome)Black Clover - A book containing the secrets of Fire Magic from the Clover Kingdom, allowing its users to learn and utilize Pyromancy. Spell List: https://blackclover.fandom.com/wiki/Fire_Magic

item.name: Tome of Vector Magic
item.description: (Tome)Soul Eater - A tome belonging to one Medusa Gorgon, this book allows its user to learn and utilize her signature Vector Magic. Spell List: https://souleater.fandom.com/wiki/Vector_Magic

item.name: Boar Vessel 600-500 BC Etruscan ceramic
item.description: It is a Boar Vessel 600-500 BC Etruscan ceramic, no further explanation needed.

item.name: Shitty Copper
item.description: A bag of infinite shitty copper sourced from EA Nasir. Only contains 1000 tons of copper at a time and replenishes every 24 hours.

item.name: Belt of Giant Strength
item.description: DnD - A large and crude brown belt that raises your physical strength to the level of a giant! (Which in effect acts like a Rare rank strength) But this only works if you are weaker than the strength of a giant

item.name: Blackrazor
item.description: DnD - A legendary sentient greatsword sword capable of devouring souls, the souls Blackrazor devours are added to you as health and invigoration that fades over the span of 24 hours or can be stored inside of the blade. In addition, when wielding Blackrazor you can sense all souls in a 100-meter radius. But not letting the sword devour souls for a long span of time may make it grow restless.

item.name: Verminshroud
item.description: DnD - A filthy patchwork cloak made of the hide of vermin such as rats and mice, no amount of cleaning will make this thing even remotely clean. While wearing this cloak you are able to transform yourself into a mundane vermin at will, in addition, you can control any vermin you can sense and gain Elite rank resistance to illness and poison while wearing it.

item.name: Topaz Annihilator
item.description: DnD - This magic ranged weapon resembles a musket, but in lieu of any ammunition, it holds a glowing yellow scale from a topaz dragon in its heart, just like the founding fathers intended. Shots released from this gun are capable of rotting living creatures and disintegrating physical objects alongside the physical impact.

item.name: Hypnos' Mask
item.description: A sleeping mask blessed by Hypnos, the god of sleep, when wearing this mask, your nights are perfectly restful and all of your energy recovers after 8 hours of uninterrupted sleep.

item.name: Blade Smith
item.description: DxD - A Sacred Gear created by God that allows its user to create constructs of holy blades at will. The user can create holy swords that possess different attributes depending on the user's ability and skill. Examples like a sword that absorbs flames or a sword that poisons.

item.name: Dimension Lost
item.description: DxD - A Longinus Created by God, capable of destroying the world with a good enough user - Dimension Lost is capable of creating a mist that can act as inviolable barriers or portals that transport targets to pocket dimensions it creates, allowing the user to teleport themselves and others freely as well as create their own pocket dimensions.

item.name: Sepiroth Graal
item.description: DxD - A Longinus Created by God, once someone gets in possession of the Sepiroth Graal, they are granted knowledge of Soul, Death, and Life of the highest order on the level of a god, allowing its user to manipulate souls and life as long as they can withstand the mind-crushing levels of information that come from possessing it.

item.name: Alchemists Cauldron
item.description: A large cauldron that can fill itself with a chosen potion once a day. As a basic cauldron, it is capable of filling itself with basic potions: Enhanced Strength, Enhanced Agility, Waterbreathing, Healing, Minor Regeneration, Stone Skin, etc. As long as the user knows what the potion(No Elixirs) is and it is Rare rank or below it can be brewed

item.name: Dragon Vessel Intermediate
item.description: A large cauldron that can fill itself with a chosen potion once a day. As an intermediate cauldron, it is capable of filling itself with more advanced potions: Strength, Agility, Waterbreathing, Healing, Regeneration, Iron Skin, energy recovery, fertility, vitality, etc. As long as the user knows what the potion(No Elixirs) is and it is Elite rank or below it can be brewed

item.name: Dragon Vessel Major
item.description: A large cauldron that can fill itself with a chosen potion once a day. As a major cauldron, it is capable of filling itself with major potions: Enhanced Strength, Enhanced Agility, Waterbreathing, greater Healing, greater Regeneration, Iron Skin, dragon breath, etc. as long as the user knows what the potion(No Elixirs) is and it is Epic rank or below it can be brewed.

item.name: Absorption Line
item.description: DxD - A sacred gear created by god, allows the user to conjure energy lines that they can attach to targets to siphon their energy and restore their own. The lines can also be used to bind opponents or swing around like Spiderman.

item.name: Dreadons Gaming Chair
item.description: (Tech)Calamity Mod - An incredibly powerful floating chair that is a marvel of technology, it has more calculation power than even the strongest supercomputers, can fly at supersonic speeds, and has powerful forcefields to guard whoever is sitting on it, the ultimate gaming chair.

item.name: Returner's Clock
item.description: An ornate antique hand clock, this clock has 3 charges that cannot be refilled. You can use this watch to return to the morning of the current day by spending a charge. Once all 3 charges are spent, this clock will turn into dust.

item.name: Havels Greatshield
item.description: Dark Souls - A shield of magical stone wielded by Havel the Rock. Wielding this shield grants enhanced durability and the user can expend energy to cover their body in stone to further reinforce their body.

item.name: Sanctus - Dark souls
item.description: Dark Souls - A legendary weapon of the Way of White, granted to an Undead paladin long ago. Once blessed with the protection of a white flame, but its power has all but faded, so now all that remains of it is providing its wielder slight regeneration.

item.name: Altar of Earth
item.description: HOTA - An altar of fire that collects mana from nature to give birth to spirits of earth, as the owner of the altar these elementals are naturally loyal to you.

item.name: Ring of Favor and Protection
item.description: Dark Souls - A ring symbolizing the favor and protection of the goddess Fina, known in legend to possess "fateful beauty". This ring boosts its wearer's Health, Stamina, and Endurane, but breaks if ever removed.

item.name: Covetous Gold Serpent Ring
item.description: Dark Souls - The serpent is an imperfect dragon and a symbol of the Undead. Its habit of devouring prey even larger than itself has led to an association with gluttony. This gold ring, engraved with the serpent, boosts its wearer's luck so that more items can be amassed.

item.name: Ring of the Sun Princess
item.description: Dark Souls - Ring associated with Gwynevere, princess of sunlight and eldest daughter of Gwyn, the First Lord. The ring is vaguely warm, like a beam of sunlight, and grants the user regeneration and restoration, this effect is further amplified by sunlight.

item.name: Slumbering Dragoncrest Ring
item.description: Dark Souls -  his ring was secretly worn by a certain surreptitious sorcerer at Vinheim Dragon School. The ring is engraved with an everlasting dragon in silent slumber, and masks all sound emitting from its wearer.

item.name: Cloranthy Ring
item.description: Dark Souls - This ancient ring, engraved with a large green flower, is of unknown origin. Hastens the regeneration of stamina and recovery from exhaustion.

item.name: Red Stoneplate Ring
item.description: Dark Souls - Stoneplates, the symbol of a true knight, grant the strength to face various hardships. The red stoneplate symbolizes fire and boosts defense against flame and heat.

item.name: Blue Stoneplate Ring
item.description: Dark Souls - Stoneplates, the symbol of a true knight, grant the strength to face various hardships. The cyan stoneplate symbolizes ice and boosts defense against ice and cold.

item.name: Yellow Stoneplate Ring
item.description: Dark Souls - Stoneplates, the symbol of a true knight, grant the strength to face various hardships. The yellow stoneplate symbolizes lightning and storms and boosts defense against lightning and wind.

item.name: Speckled Stoneplate Ring
item.description: Dark Souls - Stoneplates, the symbol of a true knight, grant the strength to face various hardships. The precious rare speckled stoneplate grants a small boost to defense against all elemental effects.

item.name: Ring of Steel Protection
item.description: Dark Souls - This ring belonged to the Knight King Rendal. It grants its wearer protection by boosting defense against physical attacks.

item.name: Energy Drink
item.description: A can of drink that contains 330ml of green juice inside, drinking all of the liquid recovers your energy/mana by 30%, drinking more than 3 cans a day will instantly cause a stroke and a heart attack. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: Cloak of Billowing
item.description: DnD - A fancy embroidered red cloak that can billow majestically even in the absence of wind.

item.name: Wardrobe of Mending
item.description: A wardrobe of fancy clothes that suit your tastes, when not worn for more than 24 hours these clothes instantly mend themselves into mind condition.

item.name: Sakuya Fumo
item.description: A Fumo of one of the greatest maids, it is said that whatever house this plushie is placed in is maintained as if 10 maids are cleaning and organizing it 24/7.

item.name: Dread Helm
item.description: DnD - A black metal helmet that is fairly durable, the eye holes in the visor can also glow an intimidating red.

item.name: Cleaning Stone
item.description: DnD - A small blue bead that slowly cleans and removes filth from everything within a 10-meter radius of it.

item.name: All-purpose tool
item.description: DnD - A screwdriver that shapes itself into any mundane tool such as hammers, knives, chisels, etc.

item.name: Amulet of Health
item.description: A gold amulet with a red gem that slightly increases the vitality of its wearer.

item.name: Magical Beans
item.description: A pouch containing a bunch of magical bean seeds that when planted grow over the course of 24 hours to create a steam that is 50 meters thick and extends into space.

item.name: Special Tattoo Kit
item.description: A tattoo kit that allows the user to create and inscribe special magical tattoos onto people and imbue them with a variety of effects according to their abilities. Only one tattoo may be applied to one individual at a time. Effects applied by the tattoos can only be equal to a Common Rarity Trait in potency or lower.

item.name: The Collar of Obedience
item.description: A collar that when placed around someone's neck, compels them to obey the owner of the collar, cannot be placed around the neck of someone capable of resisting.

item.name: Unbreakable Shield
item.description: A shield that is completely unbreakable, it is the shape of a heater shield slightly larger than one torso. Despite being unbreakable, the shield will still transfer energy when attacked just like a regular shiled. But it won't break or deform no matter what.

item.name: Mystery of the Night Sky
item.description: Blacksouls - A pair of panties belonging to the Outer One beyond the stars who exist everywhere at once, when in your possession these panties help recover your energy and health faster as well as decrease the cooldown of abilities by 33%.

item.name: Can of Febreeze
item.description: A can of Febreze that can spray infinitely. From Walmart.

item.name: Meeseeks Box
item.description: Rick and Morty - A box with a button that when pressed summons a very competent humanoid called Mr. Meeseeks that will obey your order to the best of their capabilities and disappear afterward. Warning, giving Meeseeks a mission they cannot complete or will take more than 7 days to complete will cause them to get hostile and violent.

item.name: Monstergirls and You
item.description: A book about monster girls, but its real use is to turn any monster it touches into female versions that the user would find attractive, the strength and abilities of the target are not altered in any way and the target views this change as natural and will not question it.

item.name: Magic Scroll Blizzard
item.description: A magical scroll that when invoked calls on a fierce 1km wide blizzard centered on the user that does not affect them that lasts for 30 minutes. Restock Timer: 8 hours

item.name: Exorcists Gloves
item.description: A pair of magical white gloves that allows you to interact with spiritual beings like they are solid.

item.name: Tome of Rennala
item.description: (Tome)Elden Ring - A tome containing the research and magic of the Carian Royal family, allowing those who study it to learn and wield the Carian Sorceries. Spell List: https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Carian+Sorceries

item.name: Tome of Deathblight
item.description: (Tome)Elden Ring - A tome contains the research and records of Those Who Live in Death that worship Godwyn, the Prince of Death, allowing those who study it to learn and wield the Death Sorceries. Spell List: https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Death+Sorceries

item.name: Perfect Decoy
item.description: An exact replica of your body down to the most minute detail but damaging it reveals that even though it looks like you, it has no DNA or genetics, more like a flesh puppet made to look like you.

item.name: Tome of Raya Lucaria
item.description: (Tome)Elden Ring - A magical tome containing the teachings of the Raya Lucaria Academy, allowing its reader to learn and harness Glintstone magic. Spell List: https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Glintstone+Sorceries

item.name: Tome of the Starscourge
item.description: (Tome)Elden Ring - A magical tome containing the studies and records of Radahn the Starscourge, allowing its reader to study it to learn and harness his gravity magic. Spell List: https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Gravity+Sorceries

item.name: Cruise Ship
item.description: (Tech)A large luxury cruise ship that is 350 meters long and 80 meters wide, the cruise ship is manned by automatons that cannot perform any duty other than the ones they are assigned to in the ship. In addition, this ship has infinite fuel in its engine.

item.name: Tank
item.description: (Tech)A large indistinct military tank with infinite fuel and tank shells inside of it. Fuel and shells cannot be taken out of the vehicle.

item.name: Pocket Armory
item.description: A large grey duffel bag containing a copy of every cold weapon made from high-quality steel, you can take any one weapon out at a time from this bag, if you put the weapon back, the next time you take it out, it will be back in perfect condition.

item.name: Servant Voucher
item.description: A coupon that allows you to summon your own Heroic Spirit for free, the summoned heroic spirit depends on you as a person. The servant is bound to you in standard Grail War style, with them receiving mana through you via coitus and you possessing 3 command seals to give absolute commands to them. Cannot summon Divine Servants(Divinity above C or Explicitly a god) or Servants that qualify for a Grand position. Servant summoned cannot exceed the performance of an Elite Rank familiar.

item.name: Stimpack
item.description: (Tech)Fallout - A potent medical tool from a post-apocalypse world. A stim pack is a syringe pack filled with modified stem cells and healing agents that boost the human body's natural regenerative properties into overdrive. WARNING: Usage of the stimpack without enough nutrients or minerals in the body can cause more harm than good. Restock Timer: 24 hours

item.name: Staff of the Pheonix
item.description: An ornate staff carved out of pure ruby with gold engravings, using this staff as a focus for using fire abilities and spells increases their power and reduces their cost.

item.name: Moonlight Greatsword
item.description: Dark Souls - A sword mage of moonlight crafted from the severed tail of Seath the Scaleless. Wielding this sword makes your spells stronger and you can unleash blasts of magical power from its blade.

item.name: Super Crown - Mario
item.description: A magical crown that turns whoever wears it into a pretty girl.

item.name: Crate of Explosives
item.description: A crate full of 64 sticks of dynamite that restocks itself every 24 hours.

item.name: Gold Apple
item.description: Minecraft - A magical apple with skin resembling gold, eating it gives the eater uncommon level regeneration for one hour. Restock Timer: 120 Hours

item.name: Enchanted Golden Apple
item.description: Minecraft - A magical apple with skin resembling gold that has been enchanted with magic, eating it gives the eater rare level regeneration for one hour and also bolsters their vitality. Restock Timer: 210 Hours

item.name: Grimoire of Wind Magic
item.description: (Tome)Black Clover - A book containing the secrets of Wind Magic from the Clover Kingdom, allowing its users to learn and utilize Aeromancy. Spell List: https://blackclover.fandom.com/wiki/Wind_Magic

item.name: Lightsaber
item.description: Star Wars - A classic textbook lightsaber made from a Kyber Crystal that projects a blade of energy, no, you do not need force powers to use this one.

item.name: Wand of the Ice Fairy
item.description: A wand made of blue ice crystals that is somehow not cold to the touch but pleasantly cool instead, using this wand as a focus for cold and ice abilities and spells increases their potency and reduces their cost.

item.name: Divine Shotgun
item.description: "Faith in the form of bullets." An unremarkable-looking two-barrel shotgun that consumes your energy/mana and condenses holy light bullets with each trigger. These bullets are lethal to all unholy beings and they are unable to heal from the wounds inflicted by the shotgun.

item.name: Druids Living Wand
item.description: A wand crafted out of still living wood, focusing nature and healing abilities and spells from this wand increases their power and reduces their cost.

item.name: Movement Ring
item.description: Very useful when you really need some mobility. This ring has 3 total charges and recovers a charge every hour. You can use a charge for three things, a 10-meter range blink, 10 seconds of flight, or 10 seconds of Haste.

item.name: Pitcher of Eternal water
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - A water pitcher that can pour endless amounts of refreshing clean water when tipped.

item.name: Skin Care Hot Springs
item.description: Grants you ownership of your own hot spring onsen, the onsen is fully functional and magically maintains itself without your input, when taken out of storage the onsen places itself in an appropriate position in your current city with proper paperwork and its own history in the world, people will not find the existence of the hot spring popping into existence strange.

item.name: Apartment in Between
item.description: You are now the proud owner of an apartment floating in stasis between all of eternity and infinity, it is a modern one-bedroom apartment with working electricity, heating, wifi, and gas.

item.name: Liquor Spring
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - An ornate spring fountain that flows with water perpetually, any water taken out of the spring turns into a high-quality alcoholic drink of the user's choice. The water will only transform if it has been taken out of the spring for an hour. Returning the transformed alcohol to the spring will return it back to its water state.

item.name: Mystery Pond
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - A large mysterious pond. If you release one fish into it, the next day you will have another of that same type. This pond allows for all different kinds of fish to live within it together, regardless of whether they are freshwater or saltwater fish.

item.name: Golden Scales
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - When faced with two different choices, these scales will tell the user which of the choices will be better for the future. These scales can be extremely useful in tough situations. One example could be whether to run or fight. Another could be whether you should take up a job offer or when you first meet someone.

item.name: Angels Breath
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - A golden card that can someone all of all injuries and illnesses below Mythical rank. Can only be used once.

item.name: Poltergeists Pillow
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - This card allows the user's spirit to explore the world at your own will, providing that you sleep on it first. This card can be useful for spying on other people or just plain exploring the world in a different way. Whilst in your astral form, you are able to pass through solid objects and you can't be seen by other creatures. You will turn into a real ghost though if you don't return to your body within 24 hours.

item.name: X-ray Goggles
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - a pair of X-ray goggles that can be used to see through any wall or object. A dial is available to adjust the vision depth.

item.name: Book of VIP Passes
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - A book which contains 1000 V.I.P Passes. You are able to use each pass to act as a 'Very Important Person'. As such, you are able to go anywhere and access any area for the price of a single pass. Each pass transforms to match the required specifications for an event. The pass is destroyed after use. The book is destroyed when no more V.I.P. passes are left.

item.name: Hormone Cookies
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - These cookies when ingested, temporarily change the user's gender to the opposite sex. These effects last for 24 hours. The card gives you 10 boxes, with each box containing 20 cookies. Eating 20 in one day makes the change permanent. Restock Timer: 48 Hours

item.name: Recycling Can
item.description: A large metal can the size of a person, whatever item you put inside of it will be perfectly broken down to its basic physical materials.

item.name: Hideout Realtor
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - Create a secret hideout in a location of your choosing, the hideout will be stocked with the essentials and the only way to access it will be through the door you have created.

item.name: Long Lost Delivery
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - A cell phone with a single number inside of it, call the number and describe the item or object you have lost and it will be returned and delivered back to you in less than a week. Cooldown: 168 Hours

item.name: Witch's Rejuvenation Potion
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - A bottle containing 100 pills that each make you physically one year younger when consumed. Restock Timer: 168 Hours

item.name: Doyens Growth Pills
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - A vial of 100 pills that make you grow by 1cm each time you take a pill, it is not advised to be used by people under 20 years of age. Restock Timer: 168 Hours

item.name: Doyens Virility Pills
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - A vial of 100 pills that give you endurance and fertility in bed, taking more than one at a time may have unintended effects. Restock Timer: 168 Hours

item.name: Doyens Hair Cream
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - A tub of cream that permanently grows luxurious and quality hair wherever it is applied, it is advised to use gloves when handling. Restock Timer: 168 Hours

item.name: Mad Scientists Steroids
item.description: Hunter x Hunter - A box of 7 1 liter vials of special medicine that makes your body more powerful when you ingest them, you have to ingest 1 liter of this every day throughout an entire week for them to take effect, afterwards, you gain the Uncommon Trait Enhanced Strength. Restock Timer: 168 Hours

item.name: Levitation Necklace
item.description: A necklace that when worn, allows the user to slowly fly at 10 km/h.

item.name: Heros Bandages
item.description: A set of sentient bandages that automatically wrap around your wounds and injuries, the bandages are really good at stopping bleeding and stabilizing broken bones. With training, you can manipulate the bandages yourself too.

item.name: Fairy Powder
item.description: Blacksouls - A bag of fairy powder from the Lost Empire, inhaling causes people to fall into a deep sleep instantly but any injury will cause them to wake up instantly. Does not work on people over a tier stronger than you. Restock Timer: 48 Hours

item.name: Scrap Iron Candy
item.description: Blacksouls -"Tastes like its name" When consumed, bolsters the user's defence for 30 minutes. Restock Timer: 8 Hours

item.name: Hlanith Wine
item.description: Blacksouls - A wine favored by the ones beyond the stars, its taste is indescribable, and drinking it, while making the drinker tips, also grants mental clarity and insight. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: Star Fluid
item.description: Blacksouls - A drug created by harvesting it from star pests from beyond the unfathomable cosmos, drinking this fluid causes one to become an immortal ghoul but lose all sanity and still continue decomposing. This more refined version only grants a brief immortality for 30 seconds, allowing the drinker to avoid death for the duration. But taking more than 2 in a week will result in one becoming a Ghould. Restock Timer: 480 Hours

item.name: Phantom Thief's Mantle
item.description: Blacksouls - A crimson worn by a famous death-defying thief who tempted fate one too many times and got executed by the tyrant. Wearing this mantle grants you basic danger sense and enhanced reflexes.

item.name: Evil Eye Ring
item.description: Blacksouls - "Did the eye just move?" A gold ring topped with a ruby in the shape of an eye, wearing this ring grants the user minor regeneration.

item.name: Hydrogen Bomb
item.description: (Tech)A Hydrogen Bomb and a remote detonator for it, simple as. Try not to end up in the blast zone.

item.name: Cheshire Cats ring
item.description: Blacksouls - A gold ring with the engraving of a cat that looks suspiciously smug. When wearing this ring, you are immune to falling damage even if you drop from 100,000 kilometers.

item.name: Wind Gods Ring
item.description: Blacksouls - An ornate silver ring from Wonderland, blessed by an unnamed god of wind, wearing it boosts the agility and reflexes of the wearer to superhuman levels.

item.name: Thief's Ring
item.description: A magical ring worn by a famous thief known for their whimsy and mischief. This can carry 3 charges at a time and recovers a charge every hour. You can use a charge to use the ability steal to steal an item on a person and bring it to your hands, the better the item the lesser the success rate. You can also spend a charge to muffle all noises you make for a minute or increase your dexterity and agility for a minute

item.name: Windless Wrap
item.description: Blacksouls - A blue cloak that makes the user not disturb even the wind, while wearing this cloak you gain enhanced agility and reflexes, in addition, all sounds you make are muffled and you don't disturb the air around you as you move.

item.name: 0 - The Fool
item.description: Tarot Card - Temporarily gives you a skill or minor ability that is best suited for the situation, said abilities rating cannot be higher than the Fool. 168-hour cooldown

item.name: I - The Magician
item.description: Tarot Card - Increase the rarity of an ability temporarily for one hour. 240 hour cooldown

item.name: II - The High Priestess
item.description: Tarot Card -  Temporarily speeds up perception, emulating a bullet time effect and gives Precognition for 30 minutes. 120 Hour Cooldown

item.name: III - The Empress
item.description: Tarot Card - Creates an aura that increases defense and recovery centered on the user for 30 minutes. 120 Hour Cooldown

item.name: IV - The Emperor
item.description: Tarot Card - Creates immense mental pressure that can dominate a target or crush their minds. 72 Hour Cooldown

item.name: V - The Hierophant
item.description: Tarot Card - Allows you to dispel any illusions in your line of sight. 72 Hour Cooldown.

item.name: VI - The Lovers
item.description: Tarot Card - Allows you to select an ability from anyone in a 100-meter range and copy their ability into your ability slot for 1 hour. 120 Hour Cooldown

item.name: VII - The Chariot
item.description: Tarot Card - Allows you to teleport to any location within your range of perception or even through a camera. 120 Hour Cooldown

item.name: VIII - Strength
item.description: Tarot Card - Increases all of your physical abilities and dulls your sense of pain for 30 minutes. 120 Hour Cooldown

item.name: IX - The Hermit
item.description: Tarot Card - Allows you to read the minds and thoughts for 1 hour. 120 Hour Cooldown

item.name: X - Wheel of Fortune
item.description: Tarot Card - Temporarily swaps all active powers with random powers of the same rarity for 1 hour, (For writing: done by rolling the gacha that corresponds with said rarity). 120 Hour Cooldown

item.name: XI - Justice
item.description: Tarot Card - Clears all abnormal status effects such as disease, poison, curses and charms Epic rank and below in a 10-meter radius. Cooldown: 120 hours.

item.name: XII - The Hanged Man
item.description: Tarot Card - Allows you to absorb all of the wounds and ailments of a target while lessening their intensity by 20%. 120 Hour Cooldown

item.name: XIII - Death
item.description: Tarot Card - In contact, allows you to destroy any active effect, whether that is the speed of an object, a mythical ritual, or a spell keeping an undead animated. 240-hour Cooldown.

item.name: XIV - Temperance
item.description: Tarot Card - Allows you to attain complete mental clarity and focus, dispelling all negative mental conditions. 48 Hour Cooldown.

item.name: XV - The Devil
item.description: Tarot Card - Summons Infernal chains that restrain a target and weaken them, strong enough targets can break out the chains. 48 Hour Cooldown.

item.name: XVI - The Tower
item.description: Tarot Card - Releases a wave of uncontrollable ruinous energy that can destroy entire city blocks partially ignores durability and disorientates enemies. 120 Hour Cooldown

item.name: XVII - The Star
item.description: Tarot Card - Restores all energy and stamina upon use as well as resetting all Ability Cooldowns. 240 Hour Cooldown

item.name: XVIII - The Moon
item.description: Tarot Card - Upon use construct a very convincing illusionary world of your choosing that fools all 5 senses for 1 hour. 120 Hour Cooldown

item.name: XIX - The Sun
item.description: Tarot Card - Upon use recovers all of your health instantly and resets all Item Cooldowns. 240 Hour Cooldown

item.name: XX - Judgement
item.description: Tarot Card - Allows you to compel someone to tell what they think is the truth without being able to intend to trick you. 120 Hour Cooldown

item.name: XXI - The World
item.description: Tarot Card - Allows you to permanently fuse two abilities of the same rank to receive an ability of a higher rank. 240 Hour Cooldown

item.name: Volcano
item.description: Terraria - A sword of flame forged with ore from the depths of hell itself, amplifies the power of Fire based abilities when using Volcano as a focus.

item.name: Starlight
item.description: Terraria - A fancy rapier of light forged from the wing of the empress of light, deals light damage and amplifies the power of Light based abilities when using Starlight as a focus.

item.name: Ghastly Glaive
item.description: Terraria - A glaive from a foreign world that can summon projections of wraiths using the wielder's life energy and amplifies the power of Soul-based abilities when using Ghastly Glaive as a focus.

item.name: North Pole
item.description: Terraria - A crystalline spear forged from what remained of the shattered ice queen. Allows the wielder to produce blasts of frigid from their own energy by using the North Pole as a catalyst. Amplifies the power of Ice-based abilities when using the North Pole as a focus.

item.name: Daybreak
item.description: Terraria - A spear of pure energy formed from the shards of a fallen star. Allows the user to summon copy projections of Daybreak to use as projectiles by hurling them like Javelins. Amplifies the power of Fire and light-based abilities when using Daybreak as a focus

item.name: Sunfury
item.description: Terraria - A flail of flame retrieved from the depths of the underworld. Whenever this flail impacts something it will create an explosion on contact.

item.name: Blue Moon
item.description: Terraria - A flail retrieved from the cursed dungeon. It is made out of incredibly durable material and the chain can stretch up to 50 meters long.

item.name: Ice Blade
item.description: Terraria - A saber crafted from solid ice enchanted with magic so that it holds its sharpness. You can release frigid energy from this blade using your own energy and using this blade as a focus for ice abilities increases their potency.

item.name: Space Dolphin Machine Gun
item.description: (Tech)Terraria - A dolphin from space that has been expertly crafted into a futuristic sci-fi machine gun that can shred through any mundane material but its speed will make it rather difficult to keep up with its ammo consumption.

item.name: Onyx Blaster
item.description: Terraria - A shotgun crafted from shards of pure darkness. This gun does not consume bullets but instead converts energy/mana into shards of dark onyx bullets that deal unholy damage.

item.name: Death's Sickle
item.description: Terraria - A sickle taken from the cold dead hands of the reaper. You can release necrotic energy projection from the blade using your own energy and using this scythe as a focus for Dark and Necrotic abilities increases their potency.

item.name: Inferno Fork
item.description: Terraria - A crimson trident that is taken from the deepest depths of the cursed dungeon. You can release blasts of flame from this weapon by expending your own energy/mana. Using this trident as a focus for Fire and Unholy abilities increases their potency.

item.name: Last Prism
item.description: Terraria - A prism that comes from the moon, By infusing energy/mana into the prism you can release rays of incinerating light that converge into one large laser or you can use it as a focus for light-based abilities to largely increase their potency.

item.name: Holy Water
item.description: A large glass vial holding 500ml of high-quality holy water that can be used for rituals or for dealing with the pesky unholy. Restock Timer: 4 Hours

item.name: Golden Cross
item.description: A golden cross blessed by a powerful angel, it wards off evil and curses when worn around the neck and burns demonic entities in the vicinity.

item.name: Super Absorbant Sponge
item.description: Terraria - A sponge that can hold approximately 1,000,000,000 liters of water inside of it, don't ask how it doesn't change in size or weight regardless of how much is inside of it.

item.name: Heavy Blade
item.description: A very durable longsword that you can control the weight of, going from 5kg at lightest to 50,000kg at heaviest.

item.name: Metal Gear Excelsus
item.description: (Tech)Metal Gear - A gigantic multi-city block-sized arachnid mech with retractable blades and giant plasma canons coupled with uncanny amounts of mobility and dexterity. In addition, this mech was designed to be able to withstand advanced nuclear weaponry and its durability reflects it. It is constantly maintained and repaired by its fleet of nanomachines and even has living quarters.

item.name: The Straw Hat
item.description: One Piece - Holds a lot of sentimental value to a certain sun god but not much material value.

item.name: Modified Compound V
item.description: The Boys - Upon consuming this, the drinker will gain a random ability from the Gold Gacha that they can use even when in ability storage.

item.name: Sharingan
item.description: Naruto - A pair of Sharingan plucked freshly from a Sasuke Uchiha who just unlocked them, stored in a special fluid that makes sure they don't degrade. If you find a skilled enough doctor you can have them implanted.

item.name: Byakugan
item.description: Naruto - A pair of byakugan plucked freshly from a Neji Hyuga who just unlocked them, stored in a special fluid that makes sure they don't degrade. If you find a skilled enough doctor you can have them implanted.

item.name: Iron Man Armor Mark III
item.description: (Tech)Marvel - The iconic armored suit of the Iron Man, while useful is not particularly powerful, and if it breaks, good luck repairing it.

item.name: Infinity Gauntlet
item.description: Marvel - You have the gauntlet, it's pretty damn durable, but the stones are not included.

item.name: Greed's Coin
item.description: "Fancy your chances?" Choose a ticket in your inventory and flip a coin, if it lands on Heads, the ticket gets an advantage, if it lands on Tails, the ticket is destroyed.

item.name: Durable Baseball Bat
item.description: An extremely durable baseball bat, it would take at least a nuclear bomb to deform it.

item.name: Combat Armor
item.description: A basic set of Combat Armor perfectly tailored to you, you can upgrade this armor by putting 10 kilograms of whatever ore you want inside of it, after 24 hours the composition of the armor will change to that of the ore or metal you placed inside.

item.name: Kamui Senketsu
item.description: Kill La Kill - A piece of sentient clothing made exclusively out of liber that synchronizes with its wearer to augment their physical abilities to extreme levels while draining their vitality in exchange. Senketsu is more durable than any manmade material, can act independently and shapeshift into a variety of different forms.

item.name: Goku Uniform 1star
item.description: Kill La Kill - A school uniform made of 10% Life Fibers, granting their wearers superhuman physical abilities strong enough to break walls and flip cars. The uniforms themselves are also extremely durable, even more than carbon fiber. You can choose the colors before taking it out.

item.name: Goku Uniform 2star
item.description: Kill La Kill - A uniform made of 20% Life Fibers, granting their wearers superhuman physical abilities strong enough to break punch through solid metal and throw around cars. The uniforms themselves are also extremely durable, even more than carbon fiber. You can choose the colors and design before taking it out.

item.name: Goku Uniform 3star
item.description: Kill La Kill - A uniform made of 30% Life Fibers, granting their wearers superhuman physical abilities strong enough to demolish entire buildings. The uniforms themselves are also extremely durable, even more than carbon fiber. You can choose the colors and design before taking it out. By consuming your own vitality you can unlock a second form of the uniform that increases its abilities even further.

item.name: Your Laptop
item.description: (Tech)Your laptop from back on earth, or whatever computer you had, still connected to the internet you had back on earth.

item.name: Infinite Bowl of Spaghetti
item.description: A bowl containing an infinite amount of spaghetti, it cannot be poured out but you can take servings out infinitely, the spaghetti that comes out is always comfortably warm and tastes pretty good.

item.name: Kanaedas Bike
item.description: (Tech)Akira - A very fancy and fast sci-fi-ish bike, very iconic.

item.name: Any Vehicle Voucher
item.description: (Tech)You can exchange this voucher any time for any Mundane Vehicle available in your world, ranging from a supercar to a cruise ship, the vehicle will teleport in front of you with all of the legal work taken care of.

item.name: Refined Heart-Shaped Herb
item.description: MCU - A mystical herb from Wakanda blessed by the goddess Bast. This harvest has been refined to filter out any harmful side effects and mystical strings attached, making it completely safe to consume. Consuming it grants enhanced strength, speed, stamina, durability, reflexes, agility, and instincts. Restock Timer: 240 Hours

item.name: Senzu Bean
