item.description: Dragon Ball - A small bean containing mystical power cultivated personally by the guardian of the earth. Consuming it instantly restores physical condition to its peak, restores energy completely, and keeps a person satiated for 10 days. Restock Timer: 720 Hours

item.name: Unknown Mask
item.description: A white featureless mask that covers the entire face, unless the user desires to remove it the mask cannot be removed except by breaking it, this mask cannot be seen through and is resistant toward thinker abilities. The user can see through the mask without a problem.

item.name: Monster Cell
item.description: One Punch Man - A cell resembling a virus the size of the human hand. Upon consumption, it makes the consumer unbelievably stronger and transforms them into a monstrous creature with an extended lifespan in exchange for making them unable to develop any further through natural means.

item.name: Ability Ticket
item.description: A ticket that acts as a 6x Advantage Platinum Ability Gacha Ticket

item.name: Trait Ticket
item.description: A ticket that acts as a 6x Advantage Platinum Trait Gacha Ticket

item.name: Skill Ticket
item.description: A ticket that acts as a 6x Advantage Platinum Skill Gacha Ticket

item.name: Uroboros Virus
item.description: Resident Evil - The Uroboros virus is a powerful virus that is capable of transforming hosts. If you aren't an exact match for the Virus to consider you a host, you will be transformed into an anomalous mass of blackened matter with incredible regenerative capability, if you are a match however, it will instead overhaul your body, granting you enhanced stats and bio immortality as the virus will regenerate and heal your body as well as being able to command it from your body. Or you could pour the vial into the ocean and watch the apocalypse.

item.name: Tvirus
item.description: Resident Evil - A super virus that is capable of mutating people into zombie-like creatures with enhanced physical ability but little brain activity, it is incredibly viral and easy to spread. There is a small chance of having appropriate resistance to the virus and only gaining positives from it like superhuman capabilities and regeneration without mutation and degradation but it is an incredibly rare chance of that level of compatibility. Maybe a scientist could refine it to make it more useful, you could pour the vial into the ocean and watch the apocalypse.

item.name: Modified Tvirus
item.description: Resident Evil - A modified syringe of modified T-Virus that gives whoever is injected all of the benefits of the T-virus without any of the downsides, granting them superhuman physical abilities, regeneration, and telekinesis.

item.name: The Beherit
item.description: Berserk - A red egg resembling a face that can call down God's Hand. In exchange for sacrificing your everything in the eclipse, you can become a member of the Godhand and become an Apostle. ...If you are even considering using this, something is truly wrong with you.

item.name: Chekov's Box
item.description: A box that looks like a wrapped gift, when you open this box it will give you precisely what item you need for the situation as long as it is ranked Rare or below. The box will vanish once used.

item.name: Cloak of Levitation
item.description: Marvel - A relic belonging to the sorcerer supreme. This cloak allows its user to fly freely, but not only that but it is also self-aware and can act on its own to pull its wearer out of danger and hinder their opponents.

item.name: Plague Canister
item.description: (Tech)Calamity Mod - A canister containing the plague, a self-replicating nanomachine virus that devours biomass and turns any living thing into a mindless biomechanically enhanced zombie to add to its own hivemind. Releasing this thing without sufficient biokinetic or techno mastery is basically dooming the entire world, thankfully without a core they lack a hivemind to gather around as a command center.

item.name: Mehrunes Razor
item.description: Skyrim - A blade belonging to the Daedric prince Mehrunes Dagon, this dagger is capable of cutting anything the user can interact with, space, time, soul, connections, etc. The only limit to what it can cut is the user, not the dagger.

item.name: Skeleton Key
item.description: Skyrim - A magical key belonging to the Daedric prince Nocturnal, it is capable of unlocking anything the user can perceive. Ranging from locks to unlocking the structural integrity of a wall to make it collapse to unlocking someone's inner potential and even opening portals to other worlds. The only limit to what it can unlock is the user, not the key.

item.name: Cloak of Invisibility
item.description: Harry Potter - One of the deathly hallows, this cloak is capable of rendering anyone covered by it invisible and resistant to clairvoyance.

item.name: Annihilation Maker
item.description: DxD - One of the strongest Longinus crafted by god. Annihilation Maker is capable of creating shadow monsters that emerge from the user's shadow by expending their own mana. The abilities of the monsters depend on the user's imagination and abilities.  When taken out of the inventory, it resembles a small marble that fuses with the person who swallows it.

item.name: Unknown Dictator
item.description: DxD - Unknown Dictator, one of the modern Longinus. It is capable of manipulating metal and technology on a massive scale as well as being able to construct advanced technology like ion canons and aura engines at will without detailed input from the user. The stronger the user the stronger the creations made by Unknown Dictator are.  When taken out of the inventory, it resembles a small marble that fuses with the person who swallows it.

item.name: Zenith Tempest
item.description: DxD - Zenith Tempest, referred to as one of the mightiest Longinus is capable of controlling the weather, atmosphere, and the natural elements of the world like fire, wind, lightning, and water. Allowing them to call down lightning, country-wiping storms, and much more. A powerful enough user could shred the surface of the planet with violent storms. When taken out of the inventory, it resembles a small marble that fuses with the person who swallows it.

item.name: Star Buster Blaster
item.description: DxD - A Longinus of the highest order and a weapon when you just need simplicity. Even in its basic form, the sword of this weapon can cut through gods and its gun can annihilate islands. But the weapon is incredibly difficult to control and use effectively, and may even destroy the landmass the user is in in a misfire.  When taken out of the inventory, it resembles a small marble that fuses with the person who swallows it.

item.name: Canis Lycaon
item.description: DxD - Canis Lycaon, one of the Longinus weapons created by god. It allows its user to manifest an extremely powerful black wolf avatar wielding a cursed blade, in addition, the user can sprout cursed blades from their body and use them as weapons too. With enough training, they can wield the cursed flames of the sword that prevent healing and sprout blades from any shadow in their range of perception. When taken out of the inventory, it resembles a small marble that fuses with the person who swallows it.

item.name: True Longinus
item.description: DxD - The greatest holy spear that contains a piece of god inside of itself. This holy spear, in addition to having a tremendous holy aura that can utterly annihilate any demonic being weaker than a god, possesses a variety of forms that the user can access with training.

item.name: Telos Karma
item.description: DxD - The Telos Karma, the treasure of god that allows its user to twist causality and fate, altering history to affirm the effect the user wants. The larger the scale of the effect and the stronger the targets it affects the more energy Telos Karma consumes. When taken out of the inventory, it resembles a small marble that fuses with the person who swallows it.

item.name: Regulus Nemea
item.description: DxD - Battle Axe of the Nemean, one of the Longinus crafted by god himself. As its base form, it is a large golden powerful battle axe that protects its user from projectiles when they wield it, it can also turn into a projection of the original Nemean Lion with its invincible skin that can act independently. With training the user can even unlock its balance breaker forms. When taken out of the inventory, it resembles a small marble that fuses with the person who swallows it.

item.name: Nereied Kyre
item.description: DxD - One of the newly manifested Longinus, its user is capable of controlling the ocean and charming dragons with their singing, their ability to charm and control dragons is limited by their singing and magical power. A powerful enough user could use it to sink continents and tame the grandest of dragons. When taken out of the inventory, it resembles a small marble that fuses with the person who swallows it.

item.name: Procellarum Phantom
item.description: DxD - An armor that manifests primarily as leg armor that enhances its user's kicks and speed.

item.name: Nights Edge
item.description: Terraria - A sword of night formed from the essences of the world. In addition to its exceptional durability and sharpness this blade also enhances the potency of all darkness abilities when used as a focus. Under certain conditions, this sword can unlock its true power comparable to the Excalibur itself.

item.name: Moonveil
item.description: Elden Ring - A masterpiece sword forged from glintstone. This katana is able to project the user's slashes as blue blades of light, in addition, this sword amplifies the power of spells when used as a focus.

item.name: Malikeths Black Blade
item.description: Elden Ring - A sword that still carries traces of the destined death inside of its blade, by expending your own energy/mana you can unleash black flames of destined death that permanently harm the lifeforce of any it harms, making them unable to be healed by anything lesser than divine intervention.

item.name: Beginners Guide to Runecraft
item.description: Fate - A beginner's guide on basic Nordic/Scandinavian runecraft written personally by the Allfather Odin himself. Allowing those who study it to learn the art of Runecraft.

item.name: Grow Your Own Golem Kit
item.description: A beginner-friendly kit for growing your very own golem that even a child can use. Contains a comically large pot the size of a person, a watering can, a pack of cores, and a notebook. Simply put the core in the comically large pot alongside the items you want the golem to be made out of and then put in a piece of paper detailing the specifications of the golem you want to be made. Then bury it all with any kind of dirt and water 2 times morning and night for 7 days in a spot where it can receive sunlight and then dig up your ready golem from the dirt! You can make the process faster by using energy-rich soil.

item.name: Kiriichimonji
item.description: Akame Ga Kill - A katana that creates wounds that refuse to heal by normal means, you need healing of at least Epic level to heal a wound inflicted by Kiriichimonji.

item.name: Water Dragon Sword
item.description: Akame Ga Kill - An ancient longsword that resembles a dragon, there are two fangs on the hilt of the sword, and if the user stabs their body on the fangs they gain massively enhanced physical stats and minor draconic characteristics for 3 minutes, after the 3 minutes wear off the user becomes extremely tired and fatigued.

item.name: Incursio
item.description: Akame Ga Kill - In its dormant state the Incursio resembles a short sword that can be activated into a white armor that completely covers the user and grants them enhanced physical stats as well as the ability to turn invisible for a duration. But the true strength of the Incursio lies in its ability to adapt and become stronger, so the longer you use it the stronger it will become and acquire new forms.

item.name: Demon Extract
item.description: Akame Ga Kill - An incredibly powerful extract created from the blood of a mythical beast. Drinking the blood from this chalice grants the user the Legendary Rank Ability: Demon's Extract but if their willpower is not strong enough they will be driven insane by the power.

item.name: Perfector
item.description: Akame Ga Kill - A pair of gloves that gives their user almost perfect dexterity and speed for their fingers and hands, allowing them to move with extreme speed and precision beyond the realm of human speeds.

item.name: Ring of the Paladin
item.description: An enchanted ring worn by a legendary paladin, now infused with his prayers. This ring can hold a total of 3 charges and recovers a charge every hour. You can spend a charge to cast a Rare tier Heal on yourself or a target, grant a target any one Uncommon tier blessing like strength or agility or you can bless an object with holy energy to either create holy water or create a temporarily blessed weapon effective against the unholy.

item.name: Yatsufusa
item.description: Akame Ga Kill - A katana with the ability to reanimate undead to serve as their puppets, only 8 undead can be maintained at a time and the undead are in the same state as they have died, they cannot learn any new skills but they maintain all the skills they had in their life. In addition, for every undead animated the user loses a portion of their own strength.

item.name: Spectator
item.description: Akame Ga Kill - A mechanical third that manifests on the user's forehead, this eye can be used to read the surface of targets you are focused on, see through walls and clothing, have perfectly clear vision and clairvoyance as well as combat precognition by reading minute muscles movements in targets bodies.

item.name: Murasame
item.description: Akame Ga Kill - A cursed blade that inflicts a killing curse on whatever it cuts, once cut the curse markings will originate from where the cut is placed and move towards the heart before stopping it. This can be resisted by cutting off the inflicted area, having resistance to curses, or being stronger than the blade.

item.name: Amulet of Imitation
item.description: An amulet that lets you transform into the shape of whatever creature you touch while also holding the amulet, you will be in the form of the creature until you dispel the transformation. Cooldown: 8 Hours

item.name: Balzac
item.description: Akame Ga Kill - When worn, Balzac can tap into the wearer's body and mind and unlock their potential by 100%, giving the wearer super speed, super strength, lightning-quick agility, and unparalleled intelligence. After all of the wearer's potential is unlocked, it cannot exceed that person's limits. Wearing it for an extended amount of time can cause extreme exhaustion.

item.name: Black Marlin
item.description: Akame Ga Kill - The user can control any liquid around themselves, including water and blood with simple hand gestures by expending their energy/mana. However, it only functions in the presence of water or any other form of liquid around. Oftentimes, the water takes the shape of serpents or dragons.

item.name: Charismatic Sunglasses
item.description: A pair of really cool-looking sunglasses that make you seem more charismatic. Are the sunglasses charismatic because they look cool or do they look cool because they make you more charismatic?

item.name: Sword of Judgement
item.description: Hota - A sword blessed by the divine that imbues its user with great might and magical power. But it also fills them with righteous rage, making them berserk against unholy and undead beings unless they can tame the sword. Boosts the power of holy and light abilities when used as a focus.

item.name: Armageddon Blade
item.description: Hota - The blade of Armageddon in myths. This sword imbues its user with great power but burns to touch, the user can expend their energy to call down armageddon, a swarm of hellfire raining down from the skies onto the mortal world.  Boosts the power of fire and unholy abilities when used as a focus.

item.name: Sword of Hellfire
item.description: Hota - A sword forged and bathed in hellfire, the user can expend their energy to cover the blade in violent flames. Boosts the power of fire abilities when used as a focus.

item.name: Angellic Alliance
item.description: Hota - A divine artifact of the heavens. Wielding this sword greatly increases the user's physical and magical abilities, in addition, any army or ally under the user's command also becomes stronger and is imbued with powerful morale. You can also expend your own energy to grant any blessing at Rare tier or below, Boosts the power of holy and light abilities when used as a focus.

item.name: Titans Thunder
item.description: Hota - A sword of thunder that grants its user the power and might of the giants. It grants its user extreme physical strength and the ability to rain down thunder by expending their own energy. Enhances the power of lightning-based abilities when used as a focus.

item.name: Armor of the Dammed
item.description: Hota - A pitch-black armor with a demonic visage used by the most wicked of conquerors. This armor, while augmenting the user's physical abilities, also allows them to unleash a variety of curses on a massive scale such as slow, misfortune, weakness, etc. to debilitate entire armies with training. Amplifies the power of darkness-based abilities when used as a focus.

item.name: Power of the Dragon Father
item.description: Hota - An armor crafted from the corpse of a mighty dragon. Wearing it imbues the wearer with great physical might and extreme resistance to magic thanks to the scales of the dragon.

item.name: Spellbinders Hat
item.description: Hota - A hat worn by a legendary archwizard, containing echoes of the spells he used to cast. When worn grants you the ability to cast the spells: Dimensional Door, a portal with a range of 100 km, Fly: Allowing you to soar through the skies at the same speed as your land speed, Magic Mirror: Allows you to reflect a magic effect back at an enemy. Implosion: Deals severe damage to an enemy by engulfing them in an explosion, and Summon Elemental: Allowing you to summon an elemental of your choice with power roughly similar to yours for 30 minutes. This artifact holds 3 charges at a time and recovers a charge every 8 hours.

item.name: Admirals Hat
item.description: Hota - The hat of a legendary admiral. Allows you to conjure and summon any mundane seabound vessel manned by a crew of spirits. It can be a destroyer-class warship or a cruise ship. You can summon a vessel every 720 Hours, in addition, when wearing the hat you gain Master rank Riding when riding any seasbound vessel.

item.name: Cloak of Silence
item.description: Hota - When worn, the cloak prevents the user from using any magic below Epic Rank but at the same time, prevents any magic below Epic rank from being used on them.

item.name: Cape of Velocity
item.description: Hota - A cape that makes the wearer faster when worn.

item.name: Cloak of the Undead King
item.description: Hota - A cloak of the legendary undead king. When worn, boosts the power of all necromancy and soul-based abilities and removes the limit on the amount of undead the user can control at once.

item.name: Charm of Eclipse
item.description: Hota - A mystical charm that amits an aura that causes people around the user to suffer from magical interference, reducing their magical capabilities.

item.name: Wizards Well
item.description: Hota - A large cauldron that is filled to the brim with magical power equal to the maximum of the user. At 8 am every morning this cauldron is instantly filled back to the brim once more.

item.name: Orb of Silt
item.description: Hota - An orb containing raw ancient magical power that boosts the power of earth-based abilities and magic of those who hold it.

item.name: Orb of Firmament
item.description: Hota - An orb containing raw ancient magical power that boosts the power of wind and lightning-based abilities and magic of those who hold it.

item.name: Orb of Driving Rain
item.description: Hota - An orb containing raw ancient magical power that boosts the power of water and ice-based abilities and magic of those who hold it.

item.name: Orb of Tempenstous Fire
item.description: (Tome)Hota - An orb containing raw ancient magical power that boosts the power of fire-based abilities and magic of those who hold it.

item.name: Tome of Air
item.description: (Tome)Hota - A legendary tome from an ancient kingdom that is imbued with magic, allowing whoever holds it to cast the spells it contains within even without training. You can also learn the spells yourself through study to cast them without the assistance of the book. Spell List: https://heroes.thelazy.net/index.php/School_of_Air_Magic

item.name: Tome of Earth
item.description: (Tome)Hota - A legendary tome from an ancient kingdom that is imbued with magic, allowing whoever holds it to cast the spells it contains within even without training. You can also learn the spells yourself through study to cast them without the assistance of the book. Spell List: https://heroes.thelazy.net/index.php/School_of_Earth_Magic

item.name: Tome of Water
item.description: (Tome)Hota - A legendary tome from an ancient kingdom that is imbued with magic, allowing whoever holds it to cast the spells it contains within even without training. You can also learn the spells yourself through study to cast them without the assistance of the book. Spell List: https://heroes.thelazy.net/index.php/School_of_Water_Magic

item.name: Tome of Fire
item.description: (Tome)Hota - A legendary tome from an ancient kingdom that is imbued with magic, allowing whoever holds it to cast the spells it contains within even without training. You can also learn the spells yourself through study to cast them without the assistance of the book. Spell List: https://heroes.thelazy.net/index.php/School_of_Fire_Magic

item.name: Sphere of Permanence
item.description: Hota - A magical orb that prevents the removal of magic on a target, you are immune to spells or abilities that dispel.

item.name: Orb of Vulnerability
item.description: Hota - A magical orb that allows the user to bypass immunities and resistances, you can hurt living fire or poison a hydra as long as you hold this orb.

item.name: Angel Feather Arrows
item.description: Hota - A quiver of infinite arrows fletched with the feathers of angels, these arrows do not get slower from flying and retain their maximum speed when flying until they hit a target.

item.name: Vial of Lifeblood
item.description: Hota - A vial containing condensed vitality in the form of blood, drinking it grants enhanced vitality, a minor healing factor, and an increased lifespan.

item.name: Elixir of Life
item.description: Hota - The legendary Elixir of Life, drinking it grants boundless vitality, immunity to most poisons and illnesses, and a lifespan increasing a hundredfold.

item.name: Endless Purse of Gold
item.description: Hota - A purse filled with endless riches, every 24 hours, 500 200-gram pure gold goins fill this bag and the bag can hold an infinite amount of these coins.

item.name: Horn of the Abyss
item.description: Hota - A horn from the deep, abyssal depths with eldrich power. This horn can raise the dead as shoggoths, fangarms, or other creatures from the depths that are loyal to you.

item.name: Archmages Robes
item.description: Robes worn by an archmage that is suspiciously comfortable. Wearing this robe lets you learn magic much quicker and amplifies the power of the spells you cast.

item.name: Altar of Fire
item.description: HOTA - An altar of fire that collects mana from nature to give birth to spirits of fire, as the owner of the altar these elementals are naturally loyal to you.

item.name: Altar of Air
item.description: HOTA - An altar of fire that collects mana from nature to give birth to spirits of air and lightning, as the owner of the altar these elementals are naturally loyal to you.

item.name: Altar of Water
item.description: HOTA - An altar of fire that collects mana from nature to give birth to spirits of water and ice, as the owner of the altar these elementals are naturally loyal to you.

item.name: Elemental Conflux
item.description: HOTA - An altar that converges natural elements and collects mana from nature to give birth to spirits of all kinds of elements, as the owner of the altar these elementals are naturally loyal to you.

item.name: Pyre
item.description: HOTA - An altar of ash that is capable of giving birth to firebirds and phoenixes if sacrificed enough wealth and energy. As the owner of the pyre, the phoenixes are naturally loyal to you.

item.name: Dragon's Hoard
item.description: - A cave that contains the ideal condition for a dragon to live, plenty of treasure. You can either take the gold and precious gems inside for your own use or use the cave as a storage for your own valuables, no one can enter your horde without your permission.

item.name: Dragon Utopia
item.description: HOTA - A gigantic castle that houses a horde of dragons of various species that are loyal to you as the owner of the Utopia, the utopia is the ideal living conditions for practically any dragon, you can allow other dragons to also join in exchange for servitude.

item.name: Hydra Pond
item.description: HOTA - A large swampy pond populated by Hydra, the pond itself is incredibly poisonous but the Hydra inside are naturally loyal to you as the owner of the pond.

item.name: Nymph Waterfall
item.description: HOTA - A waterfall populated by lesser Nymphs, spirits of water, the waterfall itself is magical in nature, and nymphs are naturally born inside of it. Nymphs produced by the waterfall are naturally loyal to you as the owner of the waterfall.

item.name: Maelstrom
item.description: HOTA - A large whirlpool of water containing a large concentration of dangerous seabound creatures including the sea serpent Haspid under your command

item.name: Magic Forest
item.description: HOTA - A large patch of forest with a high concentration of magical power and unique herbs that grow inside. This forest is populated by creatures like ents, treants, and even legendary unicorns under your command. This forest slowly replenishes itself over time.

item.name: Crystal Cave
item.description: HOTA - A large cavern filled with unique red crystals containing potent magical power and energy, in addition, there are crystal dragons inside of the cavern under your command. The crystals in the cave replenish over time.

item.name: Frozen Cliffs
item.description: HOTA - A gigantic frozen mountain range even taller than Everest is home to extreme amounts of magical energy and houses a variety of powerful dragons and even the legendary azure dragon that will serve under your command.

item.name: Cloud Temple
item.description: HOTA - A gigantic temple over a kilometer tall and several wide, by giving sacrifices to the cloud temple in the form of wealth such as gold coins and gems, you can summon Giants and Titans of stone to serve under your command, the summoned Giants and Titans are absolutely loyal and obedient to you. Beware, the costs to summon them are rather expensive.

item.name: Experimental Shop
item.description: HOTA - A giant experimental workshop manned by the most talented gremlin master artisans and workers loyal to you, these gremlins can create items for you with their tools and skills as long as you provide them with the resources, they are also capable of building animated legendary giants of stone and golems of several varieties to serve under your command

item.name: Portal of Glory
item.description: HOTA - A divine gate that over time produces angels to serve under your command, to produce an angel you must give the portal enough energy and resources such as gold.

item.name: Garden of Revelations
item.description: A garden filled with a variety of beautiful flowers and has a mystical aura around it, inside the garden it is easier to study and learn magic.

item.name: Fountain of Youth
item.description: A large ornate fountain whose waters have the property of reversing aging the more one bathes inside of it, every hour spent inside is a year of your biological clock rewound

item.name: Magic Spring
item.description: HOTA - A large spring that is filled with mana rich water that replenishes itself at a rapid pace, taking a bath in the spring is said to replenish magical power very quickly.

item.name: Marika's Hammer
item.description: Elden Ring - A partially broken stone hammer that is still supernaturally durable, it has the property of boosting the power of holy abilities and spells.

item.name: Sacrificial Doll
item.description: A simple doll made of straw and twine that vaguely resembles the user, this doll can be substituted for any kind of sacrifice, after which it vanishes. Works for human sacrifice, vitality sacrifice, sacrificing a part of yourself or even a part of your soul. Can only be used by the one who rolled it.

item.name: Relic Gold
item.description: A gold coin that is perceived as something of incredible value in the eyes of anyone who sees it while not having any real use. You could trade it for a real artifact and the one you gave it to would still find it a fair deal.

item.name: Stack of Gold Bars
item.description: A stack of ordinary gold bars weighing a total of 33 kilograms.

item.name: Greedy Ring
item.description: An ornate red and gold that attracts wealth to its wearer, making it easier for them to make money and find treasures.

item.name: Gold Ring Gift
item.description: Æ Gold Ring that you can give as a gift to a loved one. The patterns of the ring customize themselves according to whoever you give them to.  Restock Timer: 48 Hours

item.name: Chlorophyte Bar
item.description: Calamity Mod - A refined bar of Chlorophyte that grew from the deep ancient jungles, it is incredibly flexible and durable, far more than any mundane metal, and is also capable of converting sunlight into energy, synergizes very well with bio and nature abilities. Restock Timer: 8 Hours

item.name: Aerolite Bar
item.description: Calamity Mod - A refined bar of Aerilite from the sky islands infused with sky energy, when infused with energy this one is capable of releasing wind and even emulating weather effects under special conditions, it also synergizes very well with lightning and air. Restock Timer: 8 hours

item.name: Astral Bar
item.description: Calamity Mod - A refined bar crafted out of the depths of the Astral Infection, a bar containing refined cosmic energy that is nigh breakable, when infused with energy it is capable of releasing cosmic energies. Restock Timer: 8 Hours

item.name: Broken Biome Blade
item.description: Calamity Mod - A broken sword handle that can be infused with energy to produce a blade with the properties of the element it is infused with

item.name: Roxcalibur
item.description: Calamity Mod - The legendary sword in the stone, except you couldn't pull it out, no worries, just bring the sword along with you as a bludgeoning weapon. If you meet all of the original conditions of the Excalibur you can pull the sword out of the stone and get both the Excalibur and an unbreakable rock

item.name: Sahara Slicers
item.description: Calamity Mod - A pair of arid daggers that allows you to manifest 10 arid shivs every 30 seconds that you can send as a volley against your opponents

item.name: Unbreakable Blade
item.description: A simple sharp steel longsword that is completely unbreakable and undamagable.

item.name: Bag of Endless Coins
item.description: A bag that produces 1000 gold coins every day.

item.name: Endless Bag of Ninja Supplies
item.description: A bag the size of a satchel that contains 100 shurikens, 100 kunai, 100 caltrops, 50 explosive tags, and a Katana all made out of high quality steel that replenishes itself every 24 hours.

item.name: Portable Supercomputer
item.description: A laptop with computational power on par with humanity's strongest supercomputers and is always connected to the native internet of the world regardless of location.

item.name: Bag of Ore
item.description: A duffel bag the size of an average human's torso that you can pull 33 kilograms of any mundane ore out of every 24 hours.

item.name: Portable Pharmacy
item.description: A simple satchel that you can pull out any item that you could otherwise find at an average pharmacy.

item.name: Droid Factory
item.description: (Tech)Star Wars - An autonomous factory that produces Star Wars droids under your command as long you can provide it with appropriate materials.

item.name: Flowing Water Crushing Rock Fist Manual
item.description: One Punch Man - A book containing detailed instructions on how to train in the art of Flowing Water Crushing Rock Fist created by Bang. Those without the manual cannot replicate the martial arts.

item.name: Grimoire of Izalith
item.description: (Tome)Dark Souls - A Grimoire that allows its reader to learn the Pyromancies of the Great Swamp and Izalith. Spell List: https://darksouls.fandom.com/wiki/Pyromancy_(Dark_Souls)

item.name: Tome of the Way of the White
item.description: (Tome)Dark Souls - A tome that allows its reader to learn the miracles of the Way of the White, this Tome was written by Rhea of Thorulund, allowing you to learn all of her miracles. | Spell List: https://darksouls.fandom.com/wiki/Reah_of_Thorolund#Miracles

item.name: Tome of Orbeck
item.description: (Tome)Dark Souls - A magical tome containing research and anecdotes written by Orbeck of Vinheim allowing you to learn all of his spells. | Spell List: https://darksouls.fandom.com/wiki/Orbeck_of_Vinheim#Wares

item.name: Rites of the Dragon Communion
item.description: (Tome)Elden Ring - Church Rites detailing how one can commune with the great dragons, studying the rites allows communion with dragons, allowing the user to borrow their powers to conjure miracles. Spell List: https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Dragon+Communion+Incantations

item.name: Rites of the Dragon Cult
item.description: (Tome)Elden Ring - Rites of the Dragon Cult, studying these allows one to learn of the miracles performed by the dragon cult by imitating the power of the great dragons. Spell List: https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Dragon+Cult+Incantations

item.name: Capsule Case
item.description: (Tech)Dragon Ball - A case containing 20 capsules made by Capsule Corp. The capsules contain a House, fridge, oven, large quantities of preserved foods, a boat, a high tech motorcycle, etc. Any slightly upgraded mundane appliance or vehicle is a capsule in this case. Restock timer 48 hours.

item.name: Rites of the Edtree
item.description: (Tome)Elden Ring - Rites of the old ones who used to worship the ancient Erdtree. Studying these rites allows learning of the miracles of the Erdtree. Spell List: https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Erdtree+Incantations

item.name: Grimoire of Spatial Magic
item.description: (Tome)Black Clover - A book containing the secrets of Spatial Magic from the Clover Kingdom, allowing those who study it to learn and utilize the spells it contains inside. Spell List: https://blackclover.fandom.com/wiki/Spatial_Magic

item.name: Grimoire of Lightning Magic
item.description: (Tome)Black Clover - A book containing the secrets of Lightning Magic from the Clover Kingdom, allowing those who study it to learn and utilize the spells it contains inside. Spell List: https://blackclover.fandom.com/wiki/Lightning_Magic

item.name: Grimoire of Water Magic
item.description: (Tome)Black Clover - A book containing the secrets of Water Magic from the Clover Kingdom, allowing those who study it to learn and utilize the spells it contains inside. Spell List: https://blackclover.fandom.com/wiki/Water_Magic

item.name: Grimoire of Ice Magic
item.description: (Tome)Black Clover - A book containing the secrets of Ice Magic from the Clover Kingdom, allowing those who study it to learn and utilize the spells it contains inside. Spell List: https://blackclover.fandom.com/wiki/Ice_Magic

item.name: Grimoire of Darkness Magic
item.description: (Tome)Black Clover - A book containing the secrets of Darkness Magic from the Clover Kingdom, allowing those who study it to learn and utilize the spells it contains inside. Spell List: https://blackclover.fandom.com/wiki/Dark_Magic

item.name: Grimoire of Light Magic
item.description: (Tome)Black Clover - A book containing the secrets of Light Magic from the Clover Kingdom, allowing those who study it to learn and utilize the spells it contains inside. Spell List: https://blackclover.fandom.com/wiki/Light_Magic

item.name: Familiar Contract
item.description: A contract that allows those who sign it to become registered in your gacha as a familiar that you can treat like any other familiar. They must sign the contract while knowing what it does otherwise it does not work.

item.name: Master Blacksmith Commision
item.description: Rip this ticket to get transported to the forge of a master blacksmith who you can commission to make any piece of equipment for you as long as you provide them with the material, after finishing the deal, you will be transported back and receive your commissioned item back in 7 at the latest. The blacksmith is not a god so there are limits to what they can make. Restock Timer: 360 Hours

item.name: Giant Ominous Floating Obsidian Sphere
item.description: A gigantic ball of pure obsidian that always floats 100 meters above the ground, its radius is 5km wide and it constantly emits a pitch humming sound that can be heard from over 50km in distance. That's all.

item.name: Beauty Perfume
item.description: A bottle of pink perfume that amplifies your attractiveness to the opposite gender.

item.name: Bellowing Dragoncrest Ring
item.description: Dark Souls - A special ring granted to only the most accomplished sorcerers at the Vinheim Dragon School. The ring is engraved with an everlasting dragon and boosts the strength of magic cast by its wearer.

item.name: Dusk Crown Ring
item.description: Dark Souls - This magic crown-shaped ring was granted to Princess Dusk of Oolacile upon her birth. The wearer will lose a portion of their vitality that is converted into their energy/mana, increasing the potency of their abilities and spells.

item.name: Great Swamp Ring
item.description: Dark Souls - Ring said to be chiseled from the bone of a flame salamander by blighted Pyromancers living in the Great Swamp. It bolsters flames wielded by its wearer, increasing the potency of fire based abilities and spells.

item.name: Chaos Witch's Ring
item.description: The Witch of Izalith and her daughters, scorched by the Flame of Chaos, taught humans the art of pyromancy and offered them this ring. It greatly bolsters flames wielded by its wearer, increasing the potency of fire based abilities and spells.

item.name: Sage's Ring
item.description: Dark Souls - A ring given to Farron's Undead Legion by one of the preacher twins, known more commonly as the Crystal Sages. It makes it easier to learn and cast spells while wearing the ring, reducing the energy costs of spells.

item.name: Sahelanthropus
item.description: (Tech)Metal Gear - A nuclear armed bipedal humanoid tank designed for warfare containing a variety of weaponry for combat, this one has been modified to make space for a human operator. This metal gear possesses a high power railgun, guided missile launchers, retractable flexible nanofiber high frequency blades, and independently operating high tech sensory drones that can deploy explosives, flamethrowers, and high caliber machine guns. In addition, its armor is made of depleted uranium that can be enriched by its internal reactor and detonated to cause a nuclear explosion. All ammo and missiles etc. restock every 24 hours. This machine also self repairs itself via Nanomachines.

item.name: Twilight Healing
item.description: DxD - A sacred gear created by god. Twilight Healing manifests as a pair of ornate rings that allows its user to convert their own energy into neutral healing energy that can heal others or yourself, potency depends on how much energy you expend.

item.name: Gravity Jail
item.description: DxD - A sacred gear created by god. The Magical Eyes that Shackles, the Gravity Jail manifests in the user's eyes indicated by them glowing, allowing you to expend your energy to increase gravity on any location or target in your line of sight. When taken out of the inventory, it manifests as a marble that fuses with whoever swallows it.

item.name: Boosted Gear
item.description: DxD - One of the Longinus created by God. The Gauntlet of the Red Dragon Emperor houses the soul of Ddraig, the Heavenly Dragon of Domination. This gauntlet allows its user to amplify their stats by expanding their stamina, the higher the level of boost, the higher the level of stamina expenditure.

item.name: Divine Dividing
item.description: DxD - One of the Longinus created by God. The Wings of the White Dragon Emperor house the soul of Albion, the Heavenly Dragon of Supremacy. These wings allow its user to fly and divide the magical power of enemies and add it to their own reserves to replenish their energy, excess energy is released through the wings.

item.name: Holy Collider
item.description: Calamity Mod - A sword carved from the corpse of the profaned god, capable of emitting explosions of divine flame upon contact, and releasing holy flames by expending the user's energy. In addition, holy and fire abilities are amplified when using this sword as a focus.

item.name: Jackall & Casull
item.description: Hellsing - A pair of incredibly unwieldy pistols wielded by a certain vampire that resemble hand canons more than regular pistols. Casull is white and Jackall is black, these guns are too heavy for a normal person to wield and each holds 6 rounds of 13mm blessed silver exploding rounds. One needs to have supernatural strength to not get their arms ripped off by pulling the trigger. You are also provided with 2 magazines for these guns every 24 hours.

item.name: Dragon Slayer
item.description: Berserk - "It was too big to be called a sword. Massive, thick, heavy, and far too rough. Indeed, it was a heap of raw iron." A massive dull unwieldy sword larger than a man, this sword is supernaturally durable and having bathed in the blood of countless spirits and astral beings is capable of harming and killing the immaterial.

item.name: Wastelanders Survival Kit
item.description: (Tech)Fallout - A survival kit containing the loadout of a true courier. Containing an Elite Riot Gear, A fully modified Anti-Material Sniper Rifle, a Riot Shotgun, A .44 Magnum revolver, A bowie knife, 5 repair kits, 10 stim packs, 5 doctors bags, and 200 ammo for each weapon. No way to be caught lacking in the wastes now.

item.name: The Courier's Stash
item.description: (Tech)Fallout - A stash every courier needs to have around just in case they get robbed, shot in the head and left for the dead. This large briefcase contains a lightweight metal armour, a double-barrel shotgun with 20 packs of 20 shells, 4 basic repair kits, and 5 stim packs.

item.name: Hei Gui Stealth Suit
item.description: (Tech)Fallout - A special armour designed by China made for infiltration and stealth missions given to special units. In addition to its dense armour and mesh, the stealth suit is capable of emitting a forcefield that bends light around it to make the user invisible.

item.name: Feng Shui Engine
item.description: Street Fighter - An advanced prosthetic eye that houses a miniature Tandem Engine, allowing it to generate extreme amounts of Artificial Qi to massively enhance all of the user's physical abilities. However overuse may cause strain.

item.name: Enma
item.description: One Piece - A masterpiece sword once wielded by the legendary Kozuki Oden. This sword has a will of its own and has the ability to release the wielder's energy like a burst of power. But at the same, before the sword is tamed it will try to forcefully drain the user's energy and constantly release it.

item.name: Shusui
item.description: One Piece - A masterpiece sword once wielded by the mythical samurai Ryuma, this sword's blade has permanently blackened from absorbing Ryuma's hardening over time. This sword is nigh unbreakable, sharper than a razor and is an excellent conductor of energy.

item.name: Pip-Boy 3000
item.description: (Tech)Fallout - The Pip-Boy, otherwise known as the Personal Information processor, is a more versatile and robust computer that is worn on the wrist and powered by an internal fission battery. Pip Boy is capable of autonomously monitoring the health of its wearer, connecting to networks, map areas, shining light etc. An all-around solid multitool.

item.name: Power Fist
item.description: (Tech)Fallout - A pneumatic standard power fist that can help the average Joe put a crater on the wall with their fist. The power fist adds a static power boost to your punches to the level of a superhuman. But in the hands of someone who is already a superhuman, it is not too helpful.

item.name: Rasaka's Fang
item.description: Solo Levelling - A dagger carved from the venomous fang of Rasaka, this dagger is perpetually imbued with venom that afflicts whoever it cuts with paralysis and makes the wounds harder to heal.

item.name: Rasaka's Venom
item.description: Solo Levelling - A pouch containing the refined venom of Rasaka, ingesting it completely grants you increased physical resistance in exchange for weakening your muscles. With poison resistance, you can resist the latter part.

item.name: Knight Killer
item.description: Solo Levelling - A large dagger made for dealing with heavily armoured opponents, the stronger the armour an opponent is wearing, the more damage the dagger deals.

item.name: Baruka's Dagger
item.description: Solo Levelling - A large dagger wielded by a frost elf chieftain. In addition to being extremely durable and sharp, this dagger increases the potency of ice and cold abilities that use it as a focus.

item.name: Demon King's Daggers
item.description: Solo Levelling - A pair of daggers forged from the corpse of the demon king. These daggers are able to synchronize themselves with the user's strength, getting stronger proportional to their physical strength. these daggers increase the potency of unholy abilities that use it as a focus.

item.name: Demon King's Longsword
item.description: Solo Levelling - A giant sword wielded by the demon king that has the ability to summon devastating thunderstorms from its blade with each swing. The stronger its user the stronger the lightning storms are.

item.name: Kamish's Wrath
item.description: Solo Levelling - A pair of daggers made of the dragon Kamish, they are nigh unbreakable and sharper than any manmade blade. In addition, these blades synchronize with the user's mana and adjust their strength accordingly. The user can also increase their weight at will.

item.name: Costume Wardrobe
item.description: A regular-looking closet containing an infinite amount of clothes ranging from lingerie, formal wear, cosplay etc. As long as the clothes are completely mundane you can pull any clothing weighing less than 5kg and costs less than a standard gold coin from it, and the clothes that will come out will be according to the desires of whoever reaches inside. Only 50 outfits can be taken out per day.

item.name: Teleportation Amulet
item.description: An ornate platinum amulet that allows its wearer to teleport anywhere they can see with a 1-minute cooldown.

item.name: Divine Crucifix
item.description: A holy cross crucifix blessed by a divine spirit, being in its presence immensely weakens any unholy and dark being and instantly kills weaker ones. Any holy or light ability channelled through it is increased in potency.

item.name: Telepathic Implant
item.description: (Tech)Invincible - A neural implant that allows the wearer to communicate two ways with a target in their range of perception. Can only communicate with one target at a time. This item manifests as a ticket that when torn automatically installs itself in your head.

item.name: Ripperdoc Ticket
item.description: (Tech)Cyberpunk 2077 - A ticket that when torn, transfers you over to the clinic of a mechanical Ripperdoc that you can request to install implants from Cyberpunk 2077 or ones that you bring in yourself into you for the right price. Beware, while top quality, his wares are rather expensive and you may need to barter. The moment you leave the clinic you are transported back to where you came from and you can only spend 24 hours inside the clinic. Restock Timer: 15 Days

item.name: Clover Amulet
item.description: A golden amulet with a jade engraved into the shape of a 4-leaf clover that grants the user good luck.

item.name: Holy Antidote
item.description: A vial containing a powerful holy antidote that can cure all diseases and ailments below the Legendary rank. Restock Timer: 7 Days

item.name: Sandevistan
item.description: (Tech)Cyberpunk 2077 - A cybernetic spine replacement augment that allows the user to massively increase their perception of time, making time slow around them in exchange for taxing their brain. Overuse may cause brain damage. This item manifests as a ticket that will be installed instantly on whoever rips it.

item.name: Omni Phone
item.description: A mobile phone that has everything you need, being able to connect to a network regardless of distance, more storage space than you can count in numbers, a firewall that would take a machine got an aeon to crack and enough processing power to make a supercomputer blush.

item.name: Ender Pearl
item.description: Minecraft - A round crystalline pearl containing spatial energies, when thrown by someone, it teleports them to wherever the pearl breaks on. Restock Timer: 8 Hours

item.name: Character Card Wolverine
item.description: A character card that allows you to give yourself or another the full healing factor of Wolverine for 10 minutes. 3 uses.

item.name: Bronze Heart Ticket
item.description: Apparently, they sell even affection nowadays. Just think of the person you want to affect and rip the ticket, making them like you slightly more. Is it mind control? Nope, retroactive reality and probability bending. No unwanted side effects.

item.name: Silver Heart Ticket
item.description: Apparently, they sell even affection nowadays. Just think of the person you want to affect and rip the ticket, making them like you more. Is it mind control? Nope, retroactive reality and probability bending. No unwanted side effects.

item.name: Gold Heart Ticket
item.description: Apparently, they sell even affection nowadays. Just think of the person you want to affect and rip the ticket, making them like you a lot more. Is it mind control? Nope, retroactive reality and probability bending. No unwanted side effects.

item.name: Royal Heart Ticket
item.description: Apparently, they sell even affection nowadays. Just think of the person you want to affect and rip the ticket, making them like you considerably more. Is it mind control? Nope, retroactive reality and probability bending. No unwanted side effects.

item.name: Cupid's Ticket
item.description: Apparently, they sell even affection nowadays. Just think of the person you want to affect and rip the ticket, making them fall in love with you. Is it mind control? Nope, retroactive reality and probability bending. No unwanted side effects.

item.name: Auto Doc
item.description: (Tech)Fallout - An automatic autonomous advanced doctor station created in big MT. by Doctor Mobius. This large capsule can perform even the most complicated medical procedures with almost perfect expertise with simple instructions. Just hook it up to any sufficient power source.

item.name: Blight Spewer
item.description: (Tech)Calamity Mod - A technologically advanced flamethrower that spews clouds of Plauge Nanomachines that seek out flesh and quickly devour it from the inside out. The nanomachines quickly disintegrate after a few seconds as a safety precaution.

item.name: Shadethrower
item.description: (Tech)Calamity Mod - A modified flamethrower that turns regular burnable fuel into corrupted flames that rot whatever they burn rapidly.

item.name: Heavenly Gale
item.description: Calamity Mod - A divine bow crafted from the essences of earth and cosmos. Whatever arrow is notched onto this bow is converted into Exotic resonance crystals. The arrows summon down resonant lightning wherever it strikes, powerful enough to flay even gods alive and rend the surface world.

item.name: Telluric Gale
item.description: Calamity Mod - A bow crafted from the remains of the profaned goddess. Whatever arrow is nocked onto this bow is converted into powerful scorching bolts of divine holy flames powered by the user's energy.

item.name: The Storm
item.description: Calamity Mod - A bow carved from the remains of the storm weaver, this bow can convert any arrow nocked into it into a bolt of lightning which scales with the power of its wielder.

item.name: Hoarfrost Bow
item.description: Calamity Mod - A mystical bow made from the essence of the frozen castle that turns any arrow nocked to its string into one made of freezing mist which scales with the power of its wielder.

item.name: Lunarian Bow
item.description: Calamity Mod - A bow crafted from the elements of the natural world, the user is capable of converting their own energy into energy arrows to shoot out of the bow with.

item.name: Pheonix Feather
item.description: Black Souls - "Enraged by the haughty bird, god picked its wings clean" placing this feather on top of a corpse whose soul still exists and is not prevented from being resurrected by a legendary rank effect or above will revive them in exchange for burning the feather. Restock Timer: 720 hours

item.name: Grimm Pool
item.description: RWBY - A large jar containing evil black goop that summons lesser Grimm once it lands on a stable surface. The summoned lesser Grimm are loyal to you.

item.name: The Stand Arrow
item.description: JoJo - An ornate arrow made out of a meteorite from outer space, those stabbed by this arrow are infected by it, either slowly succumbing to a severe fever or having enough willpower and potential to survive and awaken a stand(Roll a Platinum Ticket to decide which stand gets awakened in the target.)

item.name: Wolverine's Skeleton
item.description: Marvel - Wolverine's Adamantium Bonded Skeleton freshly picked off of his body as he was sleeping. As the skeleton is bonded with Adamantium it is virtually unbreakable albeit a bit short. Don't worry about a Wolverine regenerating from it as all genetic material has been scrubbed clean.

item.name: Nano Machine heart
item.description: (Tech)Metal Gear Rising Revengance - A super high-tech nanomachine heart that belonged to Senator Armstrong. By having this heart implanted in you, it gives you access to powerful nanomachines that enhance your physiology massively, allow you to absorb other nanomachines, drain electricity to charge itself and harden in response to physical trauma or on command.

item.name: Danzo's Right Arm
item.description: Naruto - Danzo's Right Arm torn fresh off of the torso in mint condition. This right arm is made up of Hashirama cells and implanted with 10 sharingans. You can either implant this arm onto your own body to enjoy the benefits of Sharingan and Hashirama cells or dismantle it to use all parts separately.

item.name: Hashirama Cells
item.description: Naruto - A vial containing the living cells of Hashirama Senju, due to the sheer potency of Hashirama's genetics if you successfully manage to implant these cells in your body, they will increase your vitality and energy reserves considerably. Not only that but they also grant you considerable passive regenerative ability that consumes your energy.

item.name: Rinnegan
item.description: Naruto - A pair of Rinnegan plucked fresh off of Nagato's body contained in preserving fluid. These eyes can be surgically implanted in yourself or others to gain access to their abilities. Beware, you will need a lot of energy to handle them.

item.name: Fire Release Jutsu Scroll
item.description: (Tome)Naruto - A large scroll containing information on all Fire Release Jutsu recorded inside up to A rank that allows the user to study and train to learn the Fire Jutsu that are recorded inside. Those without the user's permission cannot understand what is inside the scroll.

item.name: Water Release Jutsu Scroll
item.description: (Tome)Naruto - A large scroll containing information on all Water Release Jutsu recorded inside up to A rank that allows the user to study and train to learn the Water Jutsu that are recorded inside. Those without the user's permission cannot understand what is inside the scroll.

item.name: Wind Release Jutsu Scroll
item.description: (Tome)Naruto - A large scroll containing information on all Wind Release Jutsu recorded inside up to A rank that allows the user to study and train to learn the Wind Jutsu that are recorded inside. Those without the user's permission cannot understand what is inside the scroll.

item.name: Earth Release Jutsu Scroll
item.description: (Tome)Naruto - A large scroll containing information on all Earth Release Jutsu recorded inside up to A rank that allows the user to study and train to learn the Earth Jutsu that are recorded inside. Those without the user's permission cannot understand what is inside the scroll.

item.name: Lightning Release Jutsu Scroll
item.description: (Tome)Naruto - A large scroll containing information on all Lightning Release Jutsu recorded inside up to A rank that allows the user to study and train to learn the Lightning Jutsu that are recorded inside. Those without the user's permission cannot understand what is inside the scroll.

item.name: T-51b Power Armor
item.description: (Tech)Fallout - A set of power armour developed before the Great War and mass-produced for soldiers to wear. This power armour is strong enough to shrug off low-calibre bullets and allow the average man to lift a car overhead. The power armour is powered by a fusion core that gets replaced by a new one every 24 hours.

item.name: Gene Seed Ticket
item.description: (Tech)Warhammer 40k - A ticket that when ripped transports you to a room full of robotic surgeons that allow you to undergo the creation procedure of a Transhuman Astartes. This procedure is perfected and you will end up with the augments of an Astartes regardless without the downsides. This procedure will not affect your looks or the general shape of your body due to being perfected.

item.name: Justice's Shades
item.description: Helltaker - A pair of cool shades belonging to the blind demon. When wearing these shades you are able to tell when someone speaking to you thinks they are lying to you.

item.name: E-11 medium blaster rifle
item.description: (Tech)Star Wars - A standard issue arm of a Stormtrooper, these high-tech rifles shoot bolts of high heat energy that are strong enough to kill the average light armoured target in one shot and blast apart concrete. It has three settings Lethal, stun and sting and its cartridge holds 500 shots. You get a new cartridge every day.

item.name: Soul Solid
item.description: One Piece - A cane sword belonging to Brook of the Straw Hat Pirates. This sword is extremely sharp and durable, not having dulled even after years of use. It is also extremely dapper.

item.name: Wado Ichimonji
item.description: One Piece - A great-grade katana crafted by a master blacksmith in Wano. This sword is extremely sharp and absurdly durable, the perfect pick for any swordsman. In addition, this sword is great at channelling energy after years of use, making abilities using it as a channel cost slightly less energy.

item.name: Tozama
item.description: JJK - A basic cursed tool in the form of a short sword. The sword sword is sharp and durable while also being able to interact with and harm spiritual beings.

item.name: Split Soul Katana
item.description: JJK - A powerful cursed tool in the form of a large Japanese Broadsword. This sword is capable of cutting through all physical matter by ignoring durability to strike at the soul directly, inflicting wounds that cannot be healed by normal means.

item.name: Repair Powder
item.description: Darksouls - An enchanted golden powder, when the entire bag is spread across a weapon its durability is restored and its damages repaired as long as the item is in one piece. The stronger or more magical an item is, the more powder is required. Restock Timer: 12 Hours

item.name: Threaded Cane
item.description: Bloodborne - One of the weapons of the workshop hunters used to face off against the beasts. In its cane form, the threaded cane still has a sharp edge enough to hurt beasts, but when its trick form is revealed the cane splits into numerous blades arranged into a whip that can be used to rend and shred flesh from a distance.

item.name: Chikage
item.description: Bloodborne - A blade wielded by the royal guards of Annalise, Queen of the Vilebloods. Chikage is an exceptional katana with incredible durability. But its power comes from the runes engraved onto it, allowing its user to sink the blade into their own flesh and imbue it with their vital essence to amplify its power. In addition, while wielding the Chikage all Necromancy and Blood-based abilities are amplified.

item.name: Holy Moonlight Sword
item.description: Bloodborne - An ancient sword uncovered and wielded by Ludwig. By expending the user's energy the blade channels the endless abyssal cosmos and wreathes itself in moonlight to amplify its power. The user can expel the moonlight to amplify the power of the blade, release energy bursts or channel their own powers through the blade alongside the moonlight to boost the power.

item.name: Reiterpallasch
item.description: Bloodborne - A refined weapon wielded by the knight of Cainhurst Castle. This weapon combines a rapier and a gun without compromising either. This weapon can be transformed into a bayonet to amplify the aspects of the gun part. You can let your own blood and turn it into quicksilver bullets to feed into the gun.

item.name: Saw Cleaver
item.description: Bloodborne - Iconic weapons of the hunters. This saw can transform into a long cleaver or a serrated saw depending on your needs. In addition, this weapon is stronger the most beastlike your opponent is.

item.name: Bottle of infinite lotion
item.description: A simple bottle of slimy lotion that contains an infinite amount of lotion inside. Lotion must be squeezed out manually and trying to tamper with the bottle will simply break it.

item.name: Power Pole
item.description: Dragon Ball - An incredibly durable Bo Staff wielded by Son Goku(The Saiyan, not the god), that allows the user to freely extend its length by expending their energy.

item.name: Kubikiribochi
item.description: Naruto - An oversized cleaver-shaped curved sword revered as one of the blades wielded by the seven swordsmen of the mist. This blade is incredibly durable and conducts energy well. In addition, no matter how damaged the blade is, it will repair itself as long as it absorbs blood.

item.name: Malorian Overture
item.description: (Tech)Cyberpunk 2077 - A heavy-duty, powerful double-action revolver produced by Malorian Arms. This gun is incredibly powerful, even being able to punch a hole in half-borgs with each bullet. You also get 30 bullets every day for it.

item.name: Deed to Land
item.description: A deed to a land, just rip this deed in half and you will have always owned land in a location that is favourable to you.

item.name: Deed to Mansion
item.description: A deed to a mansion, just rip this deed in half and you will have always owned a lavish mansion manned by a Schrodinger crew that keeps it clean and maintained, they always do the work but can never be seen or interacted with.

item.name: Door to Jail
item.description: Allows you to open a door to a jail block, this jail block is maintained by automatons, anyone inside of the cells is unable to use their abilities or a portion or their abilities unless allowed by you or who you appoint as warden, their maximum output being reduced a mundane human unless specified otherwise. Anyone inside the cell is healed slowly and gets served 3 meals a day by the automatons.

item.name: Five Hundred Cigarettes
item.description: 500 non brand name generic ciggaretes. Useful for taking the edge off.

item.name: Rust Bucket
item.description: (Tech)Ben 10 - A fairly large cozy RV owned by Maxwell Tennyson that has been upgraded numerous times with Plumber Technology. In addition to being an effective mobile home, it can fly and is equipped with numerous offence and defence systems.

item.name: Transformer Spark
item.description: (Tech)Transformers - A spark is what makes up the being of a Transformer. When you imbue this spark into any sufficiently large piece of technology it will turn into a transformer and register itself as a familiar.

item.name: ColorS
item.description: Fairy Tail - A small book-like magic item that allows the holder to change the color scheme of their clothing by sliding their finger over its surface.

item.name: Gale Force Reading Glasses
item.description: Fairy Tail - A magical item in the form of a pair of spectacles. Wearing these glasses allows one to read books much faster. Allowing them to read any book they are holding 64x faster without sacrificing reading comprehension.

item.name: Music Player
item.description: (Tech)Not just an ordinary music player, this player is indestructible and has excellent sound quality, with built-in speakers and headphones. It is capable of playing any song the holder has heard of before and records it inside its archive.

item.name: Archenemy
item.description: Fairy Tail - A sealed sword imbued with extremely uncontrollable amounts of magical power. The moment the sword is unsheathed it will produce a slash that can cut through several city blocks like butter at minimum. It is advised to keep it inside the sheath.

item.name: Magic Ticket
item.description: Fairy Tail - A magical ticket that when you rip allows you to choose a grimoire that contains a branch of magic from the world of Fairy Tale. Chosen magic cannot be a Lost Magic, Ancient Magic, Time Magic, Space Magic, Dragonslayer Magic, Archive Magic or otherwise any magic above Elite tier. The Chosen Magic category is transformed into a Grimoire you can study to learn from.

item.name: Fev Vat
item.description: (Tech)Fallout - An industrial vat filled with Forced Evolutionary Virus. Turning any human dropped inside into a Super Mutant. In addition, it can also affect animals dropped inside too, usually granting them increased abilities or killing them.

item.name: Null Void Projector
item.description: (Tech)Ben 10 - A handheld projection gun that allows the user to open portals to the Null Void or send whatever they hit into the Null Void. It requires recharging between shots but hey, whatever you sent there is no longer your problem. Incapacitating someone with the Null Void does not grant a feat.

item.name: Tome of Destruction
item.description: (Tome)Skyrim - A tome that compiles the various destruction spells found in the kingdom of Skyrim and allows the user to train in and learn the spells inside. Spell List: https://elderscrolls.fandom.com/wiki/Destruction_(Skyrim)

item.name: Tome of Restoration
item.description: (Tome)Skyrim - A tome that compiles the various restoration spells found in the kingdom of Skyrim and allows the user to train in and learn the spells inside. Spell List: https://elderscrolls.fandom.com/wiki/Restoration_(Skyrim)

item.name: Tome of Conjuration
item.description: (Tome)Skyrim - A tome that compiles the various conjuration spells found in the kingdom of Skyrim and allows the user to train in and learn the spells inside. Spell List: https://elderscrolls.fandom.com/wiki/Conjuration_(Skyrim)

item.name: Tome of Alteration
item.description: (Tome)Skyrim - A tome that compiles the various alteration spells found in the kingdom of Skyrim and allows the user to train in and learn the spells inside. Spell List: https://elderscrolls.fandom.com/wiki/Alteration_(Skyrim)

item.name: Tome of Illusion
item.description: (Tome)Skyrim - A tome that compiles the various illusions spells found in the kingdom of Skyrim and allows the user to train in and learn the spells inside. Spell List: https://elderscrolls.fandom.com/wiki/Illusion_(Skyrim)

item.name: Potarra Earrings
item.description: (Tome)Dragon Ball - A pair of magical earrings that when worn one each by two different beings, permanently fuses them into one entity that possesses the sum of their powers and abilities.

item.name: Celestial Bronze
item.description: Percy Jackson - A mythical metal native to Mount Olympus. Celestial Bronze possesses the property of being deadly to any magical or mythical being while being completely harmless to anything mundane, passing through them like it's not even there. You get 3 10kg bars. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: Stygian Iron
item.description: Percy Jackson - Stygian Iron is a metal native to the River Styx of the underworld. This metal has the property of being able to destroy or absorb the essences of those it kills. Additionally, it is extremely durable and amplifies the power of darkness, necromancy, or infernal abilities. You get 3 10kg bars. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: Ebony Blade
item.description: Skyrim - A Daedric Artifact owned by Mephala, Ebony is an indestructible and sharp katana that is capable of absorbing a portion of the vitality of those it has slain and imbue it into the wielder to heal them of their injuries. It is also capable of silencing those it strikes preventing them from casting magic. This blade is strengthened by slaying those who consider you as a friend with its blade.

item.name: Emperors Blade
item.description: Samurai Jack - The ultimate divine blade against evil forged by Odin, Ra and Rama that represents all good in the world. It can only be used in the hands of the righteous and good. The blade is completely unbreakable and incredibly sharp, being reinforced by the user's spirit. Any creature of darkness or infernal will get parts of its body vaporized when damaged by the sword. Massively amplifies the power of holy and light abilities when used as a focus.

item.name: Stopwatch
item.description: A stopwatch that allows the user to stop the time of the universe around them when used, often employed by Ugly Bastards or people whose hair obscures their eyes.

item.name: Ricks Portal Gun
item.description: (Tech)Rick and Morty - A portal gun built by one of the smartest yet stupidest and drunkest inventors in the multiverse. This portal gun is capable of opening portals to any non-spatial blocked location including other universes as long as you know the location's co-ordinates or specifications. The portal fluid refills every 24 hours.

item.name: Ring of the Bull
item.description: This golden ring ruby ring grants its wearer increased strength and endurance when worn. These increased stats are half a flat boost and half a percentage boost.

item.name: Riptide
item.description: Percy Jackson - Riptide is the sword of the demigod son of Poseidon made of Celestial bronze. Making it exceptionally durable and sharp while being unable to hurt anything or anyone mundane. In addition it is able to switch between the form of a pen and a sword at will for you to decide which is stronger. Boosts the power of water affinity when used as a focus.

item.name: Helm of Darkness
item.description: Percy Jackson - One of Hades' symbols of power, this ornate helmet allows whoever wears it to become completely invisible to all senses, pass through walls and melt into shadows. In addition, they are able to radiate an aura of primordial fear when using it. Using the helmet's abilities consumes the energy of the user.

item.name: Hyperbolic Time Chamber
item.description: Dragon Ball - This Hyperbolic Time Chamber allows whoever enters to spend time training inside the gravity-enhanced dimension or just use the safe part as a hideout. The time dilation of the Time Chamber is 3 to 1 meaning three days inside equal to one day outside. You can access the Time Chamber From any door place your hands on.

item.name: Weapon Voucher
item.description: A ticket for any one mundane cold weapon, just tear apart the ticket and think of the weapon you want and it will arrive in your hands.

item.name: Nail of Helena
item.description: Hellsing - A true divine artefact used to nail the saint to the cross. When nailed to someone's heart it transforms them into a being known as a Monster of God(See trait: Monster of God).

item.name: Dragon Dictionary
item.description: (Tome)Skyrim - A dictionary on Thu'um written by Parthuunax, written to be able to teach anyone the Thu'um. Inside it is all of the Shouts from Tamriel that those who study the book can learn. Your ability to learn the shouts depends on your talent in magic and vocals. The more powerful and esoteric a shout the harder it is to learn it and its stages. Spell List: https://elderscrolls.fandom.com/wiki/Dragon_Shouts

item.name: Cupids Arrow
item.description: An arrow that makes two people it pierces fall in love. Just stab each target once. The moment you stab the first, they will fall in love with the second person you pierce. To make it reciprocal just repeat the process by stabbing the other person first. Targets Legendary Rank or Stronger can resist the effects.

item.name: Hand of Midas
item.description: The severed hand of King Midas that still retains his power to turn anything it touches into gold. Anything that you touch with the pointer finger that weighs less than 5 tons or is weaker than Epic rank will be turned into solid gold. But living beings can resist its effects depending on how strong they are.

item.name: FREAK Chip
item.description: Hellsing - A high-tech complex chip developed and created by Incognito. When implanted into a person, the Freak Chip transforms their body into that of an artificial vampire(From Hellsing) along with all of their powers and weaknesses. The success of the transformation depends on the compatibility. But there is little chance of failure. Once implanted the chip fuses with the person. You would need Expert Biology and Master Mechanics to reverse engineer it.

item.name: Retroactive Builders Contract
item.description: A folded-up contract that promises full satisfaction. Just put the specifications of what you want built and where inside of the contract and put in enough money that would normally be required to fund the construction including labor costs etc. The moment you sign the contract off it will burn to ashes whatever you asked for will have been retroactively expertly built an unspecified amount of time ago alongside the money being removed from your possession. Restock Timer: 720 hours.

item.name: Mansion of the Boundary
item.description: A regular mansion to the user's tastes that sits in the middle of everything. Even the Outer Ones cannot breach its dimension, and as the mansion sits in the middle of everything in its own reality, you can enter the mansion through any door you touch and exit it at any door that exists in the confines of reality. Even other multiverses or gardens.

item.name: Plague Reaper Armor
item.description: (Tech)Calamity Mod - A high-tech plague doctor armor fused with the Plague Nanovirus. Wearing this armour greatly amplifies your physical stats and includes a hud to help with your aiming. The armour makes you immune to all diseases and poison below Divine Level while amplifying the power of your own poison and bio abilities greatly. You can also temporarily release a little of the Plague Nanovirues to rot your enemies from the inside out before they dissolve naturally to avoid an apocalypse.

item.name: Wulfrum Armor
item.description: (Tech)Calamity Mod - A simple high-tech armour made of wulfrum that provides reasonable defence and comfort. But when the switch is activated the armour turns into a power armour with its own powerful machinegun with energy already supplied. This mode has a 24-hour cooldown.

item.name: Photon Ripper
item.description: (Tech)Calamity Mod - An incredibly high-technology chainsaw made by Dreadon out of Exo materials. This chainsaw projects dozens of hard light sharp that spin at insane speeds and can adjust its distance as needed, strong enough to shred basically anything in its path. Just a little bit of an overkill for chopping trees.

item.name: Master Ninjas Belt
item.description: A black inconspicuous belt that once belonged to a master ninja. Wearing this belt grants you incredibly acrobatic abilities, allows you to stick to walls, ignore fall damage and muffle all sounds you make unintentionally(Does not work for anything above the volume of speaking).

item.name: Smoke Bomb
item.description: "Smoke Bomb!" a simple-looking smoke bomb. You can throw one of these at your feet and if you successfully manage to obscure yourself from everyone you can teleport anywhere in a 25-meter range instantly that you would otherwise be able to get into. Restock Timer: 12 Hours

item.name: ASTER Augmentation Ticket
item.description: (Tech)Halo - A ticket that when ripped, sends the user into a dimension with highly advanced robotic doctors and surgeons who will perform the ASTER procedure on you in order to turn you into a Spartan. This procedure is perfected and will not cause failure regardless of the target's age or condition. This procedure gives a more durable skeleton, enhanced musculature, visual acuity and reflexes with enhanced mental clarity.

item.name: MJOLNIR Powered Assult Armor IV
item.description: (Tech)Halo - An advanced Power Armor designed for Superhumans. This high-tech suit is incredibly flexible, not hindering the user's mobility while enhancing their physical capabilities, providing excellent protection against harm and terrain. It is also equipped with basic AI to manage the suits features as well as HUD.

item.name: Ultimate Nullifier
item.description: (Tech)Marvel - The Ultimate Weapon, the Ultimate Nullifier is capable of destroying anything, from universes to small targets to even timelines, granted the user is capable of wielding its power without perishing.

item.name: The Infinity Gauntlet
item.description: Marvel - The Infinity Gauntlet of the Mad Titan containing all of the Infinity Stones inside, allowing the user to wield their power as long as they can handle its nigh-unlimited power. The gauntlet is perfected and will be able to withstand the power of all of the stones without problem.

item.name: Chaos Card
item.description: Binding of Isaac - A simple-looking card that coins unknowable power. Throw this card at a target, and that target will perish instantly unless they are immortal as long as the card makes contact. Once the card kills a target, it is rendered completely inert and unusable.

item.name: Ring of the Shooting Star
item.description: Overlord - A Ring that contains 3 uses of the spell Wish. By invoking a wish you can use the effect of any ability of Mythical tier or below once like using Law of Regression to cure someone, Invoke Genesis etc.

item.name: Sukuna's Finger
item.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - A finger contained 1/20th of the King of Curses, Ryomen Sukuna.
