It contains incredible cursed energy and will attract cursed lifeforms to it like moths to a flame, a cursed being ingesting the finger will receive a power boost. If a proper vessel ingests the finger they will either incarnate as 1/20th Ryomen Sukuna, exist in the same vessel as him or possibly defeat his fragment and consume the power of said fragment.

item.name: Sukuna's Fingers
item.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - All 20 fingers of King of Curses, Ryomen Sukuna that each contain 1/20th of his power. Each finger contains incredible cursed energy and will attract cursed lifeforms to it like moths to a flame, a cursed being ingesting the finger will receive a power boost. If a proper vessel ingests the finger they will either incarnate as 1/20th Ryomen Sukuna, exist in the same vessel as him or possibly defeat his fragment and consume the power of said fragment.

item.name: Eye of Agamotto
item.description: Marvel - The Eye of Agamotto contains the Time Stone, one of the 6 Infinity Stones. The Eye of Agamotto allows the user to manipulate the time as long as they can harness its power correctly, allowing them to stop time, time travel, set up time loops and much more. The more power they exert with the stone, the more of a backlash they will face that can even kill them.

item.name: Power Stone
item.description: Marvel - The Power Stone is one of the 6 Infinity Stones, one of the most powerful artefacts. The Power Stone allows the user to wield its immense destructive power, whether to empower their body, empower a weapon, or direct its power as blasts and projections. The stone can allow one to shatter even planets when used correctly, but few can withstand its full power.

item.name: Soul Stone
item.description: Marvel - One of the Infinity Stones, some of the most powerful artefacts in existence. The Soul Stone allows the user to control souls, bestow life and even resurrect people with it as long as you are capable of handling the power of the stone.

item.name: Shadow Perfume
item.description: A bottle of pitch black cologne that, when applied, erases all scent from the user and muffles their movements to an extent for 1 hour.

item.name: Ring of Suppression
item.description: A smooth black nondescript ring that completely erases your energy signatures as long as you aren't actively using abilities or spells.

item.name: Neuralyzer
item.description: (Tech)Men in Black -  Otherwise called electro bio-mechanical neural transmitting zero synapse repositioner, that allows the user to flash a target with the flash of the device to erase certain memories and put them in a suggeestible state. How many memories are deleted and other stuff can be configured on the device. Strong-willed targets or opponents more powerful than you may be able to resist the effects.

item.name: Jarate Training Kit
item.description: Team Fortress 2 - "Comes with an infinite supply of kidney enlarging pills." This training manual describes how one can effectively utilize their piss in combat by training themselves with kidney enlarging pills.

item.name: 1 UP
item.description: Mario - a Green, odd-looking mushroom that, when consumed, will grant the user an extra life, where they will instantly return to life upon the moment of their death at maximum health.

item.name: Portal Gun
item.description: (Tech)Portal - A Portal Gun developed by Aperture Science that allows it to send a blue and orange pulse, wherever the pulse lands, will open a person-sized portal that connects to the other portal of the opposite colour. Only one of each colour can exist at once.

item.name: Gordon's Crowbar
item.description: Half Life - A crowbar that once belonged to the legendary Gordon Freeman. It has spilt innumerable alien blood, making it deal conceptually more damage to all inhuman enemies.

item.name: Stamin Up
item.description: Call of Duty - "For when you are going at it long and fast" A special kind of Soda that, when drunk, slightly enhances your agility and stamina for the duration of 1 hour. Effects apply after finishing an entire can and do not stack by drinking more than 1 can. Warning: Drinking more than 3 different buff drinks at once will cause intense haemorrhaging, strokes, and heart attacks. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: Deadshot Daiquiri
item.description: Call of Duty - "I'm not even gonna try and spell that." Upon drinking whatever this is called, you temporarily receive increased proficiency and accuracy with all ranged weapons and projectile-based abilities for 1 hour. Effects apply after finishing an entire can and do not stack by drinking more than 1 can. Warning: Drinking more than 3 different buff drinks at once will cause intense haemorrhaging, strokes, and heart attacks. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: Vulture's Aid
item.description: Call of Duty - "Like a scavenging Vulture" Upon drinking the Vulture's Aid you will be granted treasure sight that allows you to see outlines of treasures and objects of interest through walls. Effects apply after finishing an entire can and do not stack by drinking more than 1 can. Warning: Drinking more than 3 different buff drinks at once will cause intense haemorrhaging, strokes, and heart attacks. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: Melee Macchiato
item.description: Call of Duty - "This really 'packs a punch' badum tss!" Upon drinking Melee Macchiato, you will be granted temporary enhanced strength and melee skills for 1 hour. Effects apply after finishing an entire can and do not stack by drinking more than 1 can. Warning: Drinking more than 3 different buff drinks at once will cause intense haemorrhaging, strokes, and heart attacks. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: Juggernog
item.description: Call of Duty - "Reach for me, Jugger Girl. Oorah." Upon drinking the Juggernog, you will be granted temporary enhanced Vitality and Resilience for 1 hour. Effects apply after finishing an entire can and do not stack by drinking more than 1 can. Warning: Drinking more than 3 different buff drinks at once will cause intense haemorrhaging, strokes, and heart attacks. Restock Timer: 24 Hours.

item.name: Speed Cola
item.description: Call of Duty - "Crazy Sugar High" Upon drinking Speed Cola, you will be granted temporary enhanced Dexterity for 1 hour. Effects apply after finishing an entire can and do not stack by drinking more than 1 can. Warning: Drinking more than 3 different buff drinks at once will cause intense haemorrhaging, strokes, and heart attacks. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: Death Perception
item.description: Call of Duty - "You can't escape death" Upon drinking Death Perception, you will be granted temporary reaper's gaze, allowing you to see the outlines of enemies through walls and through any obstruction for 1 hour. Effects apply after finishing an entire can and do not stack by drinking more than 1 can. Warning: Drinking more than 3 different buff drinks at once will cause intense haemorrhaging, strokes, and heart attacks. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: Bonk!
item.description: Team Fortress 2 - Drinking Bonk! Grants you extremely increased reflexes and slows down your perception of time massively for 8 seconds, allowing you to dodge almost all attacks headed your way. But after the 8 seconds are up, you will be rendered exhausted. And you will need to survive the extreme sugar and radiation of this drink. Restock Timer: 72 hours

item.name: Homerun
item.description: An inordinately durable baseball that has vastly increased knockback when it hits an object or target, as it imbues them with increased velocity at the moment of contact.

item.name: Deeds' Bell
item.description: SCP-662 - A silver ornate bell that, when rung, summons a supernatural butler named Mr. Deeds that can fullfill any one task that can be done by a butler of varying levels of skill such as doing laundry, killing someone, making a sandwitch(Does not need ingredients), do your taxes or give you a bar of gold(Does not need access to gold to do so.). If Deeds cannot accomplish a task, he will inform you so and ask you to pick an alternative. Cooldown: 12 Hours

item.name: Sling Ring
item.description: Marvel - The Sling Ring is a mystical ring that allows its user to open Interdimensional portals, allowing them to travel even across the multiverse by visualising where they want to go and opening a portal to there. But magical training is needed to make full use of the ring's abilities.

item.name: Psychic Paper
item.description: Doctor Who - A piece of psychic paper that causes those who look at it to see what they expect or want to see on the paper, such as identification papers, IDs, permits etc. Does not work on exceptionally strong beings or geniuses that may notice the difference.

item.name: Holy Grail
item.description: Fate - The Holy Grail is a mass of incredible amounts of raw magical power in the shape of a chalice. The Chalice can either be used as an immense source of mana or be used to grant the user's wishes as long as they can be achieved through the effects of magic below Legendary Tier. Restock Timer: 720 Hours

item.name: Warhammer 40k
item.description: 40,000 regular quality standard Iron Warhammers, you can take out one at a time from your system storage. What did you think it was?

item.name: Demon Blood Blade
item.description: Adventure Time - A tough and sharp blade created out of the blood of a demon, created by said demon, Kee-Oth. The blade in Unholy in nature, dealing increased damage against Angelic and Holy beings and being able to damage spiritual creatures. If one is a Hemokinetic, they may be able to utilise the blade further.

item.name: Moondrip
item.description: Fairy Tail - A powerful potion that was created by accumulating the power of the moon and condensing it over a long period of time into a potion. Emptying this bottle completely on a spell will dispel it as long as it is elite level or below in effect. If drunk, it will cleanse magic effects from the user on the same level. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: God Emperor's Blade
item.description: Warhammer 40k - One of the most powerful weapons created personally by the God Emperor of Mankind out of mastery over Science and Warpcraft. This weapon is the Anathema of all Demon or Infernal aligned beings, vaporising all but the strongest infernals(Legendary and above) with a single graze. This blade is covered by Psyker flames that can be used to emit attacks and empower the power of your own pyrokinetic abilities. The blade may still contain a part of the Emperor's essence.

item.name: Salt
item.description: A handful of salt distilled from the tears of failed rolls.

item.name: Snake's Box
item.description: Metal Gear Solid - A very unassuming cardboard box, so unassuming in fact that anything inside the box or covered by it gets its presence completely suppressed, not leaking off any energy or aura. If the box is destroyed, it will return to item space in an hour in pristine condition.

item.name: Blades of Chaos
item.description: God of War - The Blades of Chaos, weapons of Ares, forged by Hepheastus in the furnace of Hades. Whoever is bound to these blades gains immense physical might and unnatural anger of war. The blades can absorb the lifeforce of those whom they claims the lives of and imbues it to the wielder to further strengthen them. They can absorb and use power sources imbued into them. You get the blades from the first moment they were created. The blades also empower fire attributes when using them.

item.name: Blade of Olympus
item.description: God of War - The Blades of Olympus, forged from the Heavens, the Seas, the Afterlife and the Earth. The most powerful weapon of the Olympus gods is strong enough to shatter even the titans with a single swing. The blade contains divine might and can create Divine Energy projections and amplify all Divine Attributes of the user, as well as enhancing all items and abilities in their possession related to the Divine.

item.name: Leviathan Axe
item.description: God of War - The Leviathan Axe is the peer of Mjolnir, being an unbreakable, sharp axe imbued with numerous runes. The Axe allows the user to project an aura of frost from it that they can shape into attacks. The axe also greatly augments the power of Ice/Frost attributes when held. The runes on the axe also allow it to return to the user's hand when thrown.

item.name: Draupnir Spear
item.description: God of War - A spear forged for Kratos himself, imbued with the winds of all realms. The spear is actually a ring worn on the finger that can manifest up to 8 spears at once. Holding a spear allows you to project your energy as wind and boosts the power of your wind attribute. You can also explode the summoned spears at any time into an explosion of wind.

item.name: Canto
item.description: (Tech)Cyberpunk - The Canto is a legendary Cyberdeck considered a myth by many. This implant functions as a very powerful computer connected to your brain, allowing you to interface with and easily hack even the toughest networks, thanks to the sentient Super AI loaded inside helping you with your endeavours. Manifests as a ticket that installs itself in your body when you rip it.

item.name: Kano's Eye
item.description: (Tech)Mortal Kombat - A high-tech cybernetic eye implant without the faceplate part. The eye is capable of switching between several modes of vision, like infrared, heat, electromagnetic, X-ray, etc. It is also capable of releasing condensed energy beams from the eye that vary in power. The eye charges itself by drawing power from your energy reserves. This item manifests itself as a ticket that implants itself perfectly in whoever rips it.

item.name: Hsu's Cybernetic Heart
item.description: (Tech)Mortal Kombat - A high-tech cybernetic implant that replaces the recipient's heart. The Cybernetic Heart grants the user superhuman physical abilities and increased stamina and energy regeneration. The heart can also release a death laser from your chest if you leave it uncovered(by default, the heart is implanted beneath the muscle layer). The cybernetic heart charges its extra reserves over time to build up its laser. The lower your current energy level, the weaker the enhancement the heart will provide. This item manifests itself as a ticket that implants itself perfectly in whoever rips it.

item.name: Classic Omnitrix
item.description: (Tech)Ben 10 - The Classic Omnitrix, the first version ever released. This watch allows the user to turn into any of 10 aliens(And maybe slightly more with experimentation) for around roughly 30 minutes before going on cooldown. This watch can also be used to capture the DNA of creatures you are in contact with to turn into a version of them. The watch is biologically bound to you, and you would need at least Master Mechanics and Biology to tamper with it.

item.name: Omnitrix
item.description: (Tech)Ben 10 - The True Omnitrix, the final version made by the genius Azmuth. The Omnitrix allows the user to transform into any of the millions of aliens stored inside, ranging from living gravity-manipulating planetoids to multiversal reality warpers.

item.name: Chaquetrix
item.description: (Character)(Tech)Chaquetrix - A... weird variant of the fabled Omnitrix that instead creates and summons aliens to you. It will create a version of the selected alien into a breeding compatible companion with you and summon her to either to help you or "help" you. Only contains the original 10, but the roster can be increased eventually. Also contains a lifeform analyser to increase the roster.

item.name: Divine Stone
item.description: Arifureta - Despite its name, it is not of Divine Origin. This 10cm crystal is crystallised energy that, while also capable of holding enchantments very well, melts into a sort of Ambroisa over time. Said ambrosia has incredibly potent healing and curing properties.

item.name: Falcon's Eye
item.description: Xiaolin Showdown - A Shen Gong Wu monocle that grants its wearer super sight, allowing them to see through objects, see in the dark and see far.

item.name: Mantis Flip Coin
item.description: Xiaolin Showdown - A Shen Gong Wu coin tied to a rope fashioned into a necklace. When worn around the neck or anywhere around your body the coin grants you the ability to jump high and enhances your acrobatics skills.

item.name: Sword of the Storm
item.description: Xiaolin Showdown - A Shen Gong Wu in the form of an intangible that the user can imbue their energy into to create powerful winds and enhance the power of wind and weather-based abilities.

item.name: Third Arm Sash
item.description: Xiaolin Showdown - A Shen Gong Wu in the form of a sash that can act as a third arm under your control, it is long and flexible while also being considerably stronger than a grown man.

item.name: Ascalon
item.description: Ben 10 - A sword created by the Thinker Azmuth, one of the greatest weapons of the Universe in the form of a sword. The blade Ascalon channels the fundamental forces of reality and creates an armour created out of Cosmic energy, granting them an incredible physical boost, and defence and immunity to mental effects. By channelling the fundamental powers of the universe, the blade can cleave anything, even realms and reality itself, or the fabric of spacetime to teleport. It allows the user to project energy slashes. It can deflect, reflect and cut energy itself. It can also drain the powers of opponents it stabs into the blade.

item.name: Duffel of Hardware
item.description: (Tech)A simple backpack that contains anything you could reasonably find in the average hardware store in unlimited quantities, but you need to physically reach in and pull the item out. To retrieve an item, you have to at least know what you are pulling out.

item.name: The Market Catalogue
item.description: (Tech)A simple catalogue that allows you to order anything from any regularly accessible store from Base Earth that will be instantly delivered to your location. Everything in the catalogue costs double the regular cost of the items, adjusted to the economy of the world you are currently in.

item.name: Stockpile
item.description: (Tech)A Simple cardboard box that contains a seemingly infinite amount of mundane raw materials like wood, stone, ore, rope and other such materials that the average person could get their hands on. Only 50kg of materials may be taken out every 24 hours. If the box is somehow lost or destroyed, you will be able to stumble upon it in perfect condition if you go searching for it.

item.name: Box of Scraps
item.description: (Tech)"If Tony Stark could make do with it, so can you" It's a box containing an unlimited amount of scrapped electronics that are stealthily stolen from Earth. Any broken electronic that the average Joe may have thrown away is in here. You have to physically reach in and grab it, though. No turning the box upside down.

item.name: Scrapyard
item.description: (Tech)Allows you to place down the scrapyard on a location of your choosing. The scrapyard is 250 x 250 meters wide and produces scrap for your use. The scrapyard fills with scrap over time, ranging from busted-up cars to thrown-away electronics sourced from copies of the original Earth. If you are lucky, you might find an almost intact military tank, or you might find a rotten bed. Who knows?

item.name: The Assembly
item.description: (Tech)The Assembly is a large room-sized machine; you can throw any item into the assembly and it will disassemble it down to its most basic components(Down to the size of snowflakes). The assembly can reassemble any item it has broken down into ingots or materials for the user's use or reassemble them into an item, as long as the user can provide the blueprint.

item.name: Captain's Shield
item.description: Marvel - The Shield of Captain America, created out of Pro-Adamantium, one of the toughest materials known to man, capable of withstanding even the toughest of blows. The shield also has a knack for bouncing back to its owner when thrown.

item.name: Guardian Shield
item.description: God of War - An extremely durable bracelet that can unfold into a supernaturally durable shield faster than the blink of an eye. It can also serve the duty of a bludgeon if need be.

item.name: Shield Saw
item.description: (Tech)Doomslayer - "You will never see a cooler shield" This high-tech shield is the lovechild of a chainsaw and a powerful shield. The shield itself can block incredibly well and is incredibly durable. The blades on the shield can spin incredibly fast, and when thrown, the shield can adjust its trajectory mid-flight and return to the user.

item.name: Feedbacker
item.description: (Tech)Ultrakill - The disembodied arm of V1 that works as a prosthetic implant. This arm has tremendous physical strength and speed, being able to punch hard enough to make bullets go faster and parry blasts of energy. This arm fuels itself by consuming blood, whether that of the user or that of others. But the user can also heal themselves using the Feedbacker to steal the blood of others. This item manifests as a ticket that the user can rip and install the prosthetic on themselves.

item.name: Marksman Revolver
item.description: (Tech)Ultrakill - An incredibly high-tech, powerful revolver that puts even anti-tank rounds to shame. The marksman revolver allows the user to manifest up to 4 gold coins that they can throw in the air. Hitting a coin will cause the bullet to ricochet towards the closest target's weak point if it can be hit, the more coins you chain, the stronger your bullet will become. Instead of bullets this gun uses high velocity metal shards with incredible ammo efficiency, it would takes days of shooting to deplete the ammo, and even then, showing some metal in there should make it for several more.

item.name: Dust Supply Crate
item.description: RWBY - A supply crate containing refined high-quality dust from the world of Remnant to be used for your own needs. The crate will contain 5kg of the dust of your choice. Restock Timer: 120 Hours

item.name: Crescent Rose
item.description: (Tech)RWBY - The ungodly mechashift fusion of a massive scythe and a high-calibre sniper rifle. The weapon can be compacted and carried or shifted into several forms for combat, such as a rifle or war scythe. It also comes with a magazine of dust sniper rounds of your choice every 24 hours.

item.name: Myrtenaster
item.description: (Tech)RWBY - "Don't even try to spell it." is a mechashift revolver rapier with 6 slots for dust rounds. By activating a dust cartridge, the rapier can cut with flames or even freeze depending on the dust used. You get 6 dust rounds per day of a specified dust type of your choice.

item.name: Sento
item.description: Mortal Kombat - Sento is an ancient blade passed down through Kenshi's clan and contains the spirit of his ancestors. In addition to its exceptional durability and sharpness, wielding the blade grants the user enhanced sensory ability and the ability to telekinetically control the sword. By imbuing energy into the blade and having enough affinity with the spirits inside, you can temporarily summon them to aid you in combat.

item.name: Light Cycle
item.description: (Tech)Tron - A high-tech, sleek sci-fi bicycle that is extremely durable and extremely fast. And most of all, extremely cool. This bike does not need to be recharged or fueled.

item.name: Robot Workbench
item.description: (Tech)Fallout - An advanced Robot Workbench that allows you to put in raw materials that will be recycled into robot parts that can be used to assemble any configuration of Robot that the original Robot Workbench can produce. As well as upgrade them. But you need the appropriate materials to do so.

item.name: Robot Assembly
item.description: (Tech)An advanced room-sized station that allows you to assemble robots by inputting raw materials that are converted into Robot parts that can be assembled into Robots. The robots that can be assembled depend on the blueprints you can feed into the machine. By default, the machine has access to the blueprints of Fallout Robots. The quality of the robot parts depends on the quality of the material you feed into the machine.

item.name: Web Fluid & Shooters
item.description: Spider-Man - "Don't forget the hyphen!" A vial of Spider-Man's patented web fluid and a pair of webshooters you can equip to your wrists. You get one full vial every 24 hours.

item.name: Goblin Glider
item.description: Spider-Man - A high-tech glider that can fly at great speeds and can be controlled by the user's mind, it also has bladed edges to be used as a weapon. It includes some storage space for your needs if needed. It gets refuelled every 8 hours, and as long as it is not completely damaged, it will slowly repair itself.

item.name: Mechanical Tentacles
item.description: Spider-Man - A high-tech harness that has 4 mechanical tentacle arms fused into it, you can move the tentacles with your thoughts, or they can move independently according to your commands. The arms possess supernatural strength and have several tools integrated into them depending on what they need to do.

item.name: 2008 Menu #4 Cheese and Vegetable Omelette
item.description: The infamous MRE nicknamed "Vomelette" by the troops. It may not be palatable, but it is food, and it is digestible. Restock Timer: 10 minutes

item.name: Favour Cheque
item.description: A blank cheque that you can hand over to someone to cash in a favour with them. The favour is not large enough to make someone do something that strongly goes against their moral codes, but large enough that they will try to fulfil it even if it greatly inconveniences them, like letting you live in their house rent-free, etc. Once the check is used, it will be burnt.

item.name: A Doctor's Appointment
item.description: A ticket for a doctor's appointment, whoever rips the ticket will instantly receive a detailed doctor's note containing detailed notes about their physical condition, as well as a large variety of possible treatments for any conditions they might have. Restock Timer: 120 hours

item.name: Tactical Trenchcoat
item.description: A rather cool-looking, exceptionally durable and tough yet comfortable trench coat. In addition, all pockets on the trenchcoat are 10x bigger on the inside than they should otherwise be, allowing you to store more things.

item.name: Chaos Gacha Promotional Shirt
item.description: A regular white shirt with the words "I rolled a ticket and all I got was this stupid shirt in return" written on it. In the event that the shirt is destroyed or lost, it will reappear somewhere accessible to the user in mint condition.

item.name: Forgiveness Ticket
item.description: Just give this ticket to someone to bury the hatchet and make them forgive you for whatever you did. Stole all of their money? It's fine since you gave them this ticket. But does not extend to murder. For the ticket to work, the target must have had at least a neutral reputation with you before.

item.name: Skeleton in Closet
item.description: A completely ordinary skeleton from an ordinary person, comes with its own closet that it is inside of.

item.name: Fairy Dust
item.description: Peter Pan - Some Fairy Dust, freshly shaken down from Tinker Bell. This pouch has enough powder to make 5 grown men float for 1 hour, or one grown man for 5 hours. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: Skippy
item.description: (Tech)Cyberpunk 2077 - Aiming is overrated anyway, Skippy is a Smart Handgun, capable of shooting homing bullets and having a smart AI on board to regulate the gun, being able to choose where to aim on the fly and distinguish ally and enemy. It can also judge you for your actions. You get 5 magazines every 24 hours.

item.name: Herrera Outlaw
item.description: (Tech)Cyberpunk 2077 - Sometimes all you need is a stylish drive around. Herrera Outlaw is a luxury limousine, but it is also built to survive the streets of Night City, so don't expect anything below .50 calibre to get through the windows. Not the best car, but it is a stylish set of wheels sure to impress any girl.

item.name: Regalia
item.description: (Tech)Final Fantasy - Do you want a badass supercar? Do you want it to fly? Well, you got the right vehicle then, this fully upgraded Regalia is a very powerful, durable and most importantly, incredibly stylish car that can also drive itself. And even turn into a flying vehicle. The fuel tank gets refilled automatically every 8 hours.

item.name: Zero Point Energy Gloves
item.description: (Tech)Incredibles - These high-tech gloves allow you to point at a target and send an energy beam towards them. If the beam connects, they will be rendered immobile, while you can still move them around to your liking. Strong enough targets can resist and break through the effects. The glove uses your own energy reserves to function.

item.name: Demon-Slayer Blade
item.description: Black Clover - A large black blade that has the effects of dispelling any magical spell or effect it comes into contact with, as long as they are Legendary Rank or below. The anti-magic energy inside the sword can be used to send out black energy slashes with the same attribute or be used to manipulate the sword to fly and come to the user.

item.name: The Slaughterhouse
item.description: This rusty old key allows you to open a door to the Slaughterhouse. The workers of the Slaughterhouse will supply you with any amount of any mundane earth native meat on demand, and if you give them any two of a live animal they can breed, raise and butcher them for you and supply you the meat with 60x the efficiency and any non-living meat you send will be perfectly processed, packed and given back to you. You can also enter the universe-sized industrial slaughterhouse complex filled with soulless butchers and workers if you really want to, for some reason, just don't get lost or wander. WARNING: Do not send anything into the Complex if you do not want their meat, this includes yourself. The workers inside do not care for reason.

item.name: Yukari Fumo
item.description: Touhou - Shake this fumo violently to open a portal that connects to any location you have been to in the dimension you are in. Only one portal can be open at a time.

item.name: Blue Spider Lily
item.description: Demon Slayer - An incredibly fragile and rare flower contained in a special container. If refined into medicine properly, this flower can turn the one who ingests the medicine into a Progenitor Demon(Legendary Trait).

item.name: Volendrung
item.description: Elder Scrolls - A Daedric artefact in the form of an enchanted, nigh-unbreakable, powerful hammer. The Volendrung can sap the strength of those it hits, rendering them temporarily weaker. By expending energy, you can activate the enchantment on the hammer that can paralyse those it strikes, the duration of the paralysis depending on the strength of the target.

item.name: Reapers Census
item.description: A simple notebook that keeps track of every single sapient life lost in the dimension you are in. To turn to the specific page of a target, you must roughly know their face and name; otherwise, you will have to turn pages manually. On the page of a deceased, it lists their cause of death, how long ago they died, the current location of their corpse or the location of the largest piece of their remains, as well as the location of their soul, as long as it is in the same dimension you are in. The book will reform somewhere accessible to you if destroyed.

item.name: Venom Vial
item.description: Batman/DC -  A sealed injection vial filled with a dose of Venom, a very powerful fast-acting steroid that enhances the physical strength of whoever consumes a full vial for 12 hours, after which they are left in a weakened state. Venom is incredibly effective and can have debilitating withdrawal symptoms. It may also fill the user with an urge to break people's backs. Restock Timer: 24 Hour.

item.name: Origin Rounds
item.description: Fate - This otherwise ordinary .30-06 calibre bullet is made from the ground-up ribs and fragments of the soul of Kiritsugu Emiya, the Magus Killer. Origin Bullets enforce the concept of Severing and Binding on their targets' magic after a direct hit, temporarily disrupting their ability to use magic and abilities. Restock timer: 12 hours.

item.name: Erza Fumo
item.description: Fairy Tail - A Fumo of Erza Scarlet, shake it violently to be able to instantly change into any pair of clothing you own and replace your current worn clothes with the one you are thinking of, leaving them in their place.

item.name: Lancelot Albion
item.description: (Tech)Code Geass - Among the strongest and most advanced Knightmare of the Holy Britannian Empire, the Lancelot Albion is a Mech of incredible ability. It is equipped with reinforced armour, super high-speed flight using energy wings, several slash harkons, an advanced Factsphere for incredible detection capabilities, energy projectiles from its wings, Blaze Luminous Generators to generate incredibly durable energy shields and is equipped with a Super V.A.R.I.S. Rifle that can send either energy blasts or transform into a Hadron Canon, and a Maser Vibration Sword. The Yggdrasil Drive that powers Lancelot Albion is refilled every 24 hours. This Knighmare is incredibly demanding to operate, making it nigh impossible for regular people to operate it.

item.name: Gurenn Seiken
item.description: (Tech)Code Geass - Gurenn is the strongest, most advanced Knightmare Frame, an absolute marvel of technology condensed into an incredibly mobile force of destruction. It is equipped with advanced armour, super high-speed flight via energy wings, basic knightmare equipment like slash harkens and most importantly, its Radiant Wave Technology that can be used both for defence and offence. Allowing it to create a barrier that can stop projectiles and objects by disintegrating or destroying them while acting as a physical barrier. This Radiant Wave Technology can also be focused into blasts and close-range bursts that cause massive damage and devastation. The ammo for the Radiation Wave Unit and the Sakuradite for the Ygdrassil Drive powering the unit get replenished every 24 hours.

item.name: Gawainn
item.description: (Tech)Code Geass - An Experimental Knightmare that has been perfected by the Black Knights. Gawainn is a tall Knightmare that can be operated by one or two pilots. It is equipped with Reinforced Armour, Floatation Systems for sustained flight, 10 finger-mounted slash harkons and 2 shoulder-mounted powerful Hadron Canons that can unleash great devastation. The Ygdrassil Drive powering the unit gets replenished every 24 hours.

item.name: Sutherland
item.description: (Tech)Code Geass - The most basic baseline Knightmare mass-produced by the Holy Britannian Empire. The Sutherland is equipped with armour, a powerful mounted machine gun, a landspinner propulsion system, a factosphere for a sensor and two slash harkons, as well as a basic assault rifle fitted for a Knightmare. The Ygdrassil Drive powering the unit and the ammunition for its weapons get replenished every 24 hours.

item.name: Magic Reflecting Mirror
item.description: An ornate golden hand mirror that has the ability to perfectly reverse any magical attack that makes contact with its mirror surface. The moment a magic makes contact with it, its direction is instantly reversed.

item.name: Nazar
item.description: An eye-shaped blue glass charm that passively grants the user's decent resistance to curses and negative energy. If the user is afflicted with an Epic rank or above curse, the Nazar will break to nullify the curse.

item.name: Scooby Snacks
item.description: Scooby Doo - A box of dog treats, no reason for anyone to consume these. But familiars and familiar candidates seem to like the taste. You have a lifetime supply as the treats will keep pouring out of the box indefinitely.

item.name: Familiar Card
item.description: The Ainsworths can suck it. The Familiar Card allows you to capture one of your familiars into the card and give it to someone to insert it into themselves and activate it. If they do, they will be granted the powers of the familiars to use as their own. Does not transfer familiar stats, only abilities. Familiar Cards can be forcefully ejected from a target by recalling the familiar inside back into familiar space.

item.name: Gun Cache
item.description: A dark grey duffle bag that you can pull out a copy of any single mundane firearm or bullet magazine produced for public use on Basic Earth. Ranging from revolvers, sniper rifles, etc., with bullets included. You can only pull out up to 20kg of items per day from the bag.

item.name: Rivers of Blood
item.description: Elden Ring - An old katana that has been used to the blood of countless, used by a champion of Mohg. The blade is incredibly durable and sharp despite its appearance. Whenever this blade scores flesh, the target will begin haemorrhaging unnaturally fast.

item.name: The Jar
item.description: Elden Ring - A large jar made to wear on the head. Once worn by a tarnished warrior when he vanquished the goddess of rot a thousandfold. Wearing the Jar over one's head grants them increased physical abilities, reflexes and instincts when facing Gods or Divine entities. Despite its appearance, the jar does not hinder vision and is supernaturally durable.

item.name: Contract from Below
item.description: "Is it worth the price?" A seemingly ordinary worn piece of paper stained in blood. By offering up 3 sacrifices(Abilities, Items, Familiars etc. Skills do not count) of equal level, you can sign this paper with your blood to gain the Summon Demon ability of equal rank that does not consume an ability slot. For example, sacrificing a Rare Ability and 2 Rare Items, you can get the ability Summon Demon(Rare). The moment this paper is signed, it can never be used again. This item can be refunded for free, giving back the ticket it was rolled with.

item.name: Covenant from Above
item.description: "Devotion at a price." A seemingly ordinary scroll made of gold and trimmed in silver. By offering up 3 sacrifices(Abilities, Items, etc. Skills and Familiars do not count) of equal level, you can sign this paper with your blood to gain the Summon Angel ability of equal rank that does not consume an ability slot. For example, sacrificing an Elite Ability and 2 Elite Items, you can get the ability Summon Angel(Elite). The moment this scroll is signed, it can never be used again. This item can be refunded for free, giving back the ticket it was rolled with.

item.name: Dimensional Courier
item.description: A phone with a singular phone number dialled into it. By dialling the number and calling, you can contact the Dimensional Courier. The Courier can buy anything in your stead from anywhere you have been to, and it is something that can be bought by a civilian with money, even across realities and dimensions. The courier will come with you to deliver your delivery within 8 hours at most. But they will take 10% commission for whatever you buy.

item.name: Vial of Everflowing Blood
item.description: An ornate red vial that, when turned, keeps pouring out fresh, healthy blood from it endlessly. The blood is O- and does not belong to an existing person but is manifested into existence.

item.name: Ring of Sustenance
item.description: A ring that, when worn, constantly and steadily provides sustenance for the wearer. No matter what dietary needs they have.

item.name: Morgue
item.description: This key allows you to use it on any door to unlock a door that leads to The Morgue. Inside the morgue is an endless supply of fresh, indistinct human corpses stored in a seemingly infinitely vast morgue. Any biological matter placed inside will cease to decay and will be kept fresh and preserved.

item.name: Grow Your Own Darkroot Garden Kit
item.description: Darksouls - A box that contains everything one needs to have to grow the flora of the Darkroot gardens, including special fertilisers, seeds and spores for growing stuff like Ents, Mushroom People, Red and Purple moss, green blossoms, glowing plants, etc., but you will need additional fertilisers such as corpses of powerful beings to grow them quicker.

item.name: Lifeblood Seeds
item.description: Hollow Knight - A bunch of seed packets containing clusters of Lifeblood, or Plasmium, a sentient sort of Blue Fluid that can grow into plants that produce more of it in practically any fertile environment. Ingesting Lifeblood temporarily grants increased vitality to whoever consumes it and can be used as a very potent medicine. But beware, Lifeblood can be addicting and ingesting too much over a period of time may lead to it taking control over the body like a parasite, but if one has the proper constitution, it may turn into a symbiotic relationship with the lifeblood granting the host regeneration and sustenance. And if not carefully cultivated, it can spread rapidly.

item.name: The Casino
item.description: Allows you to manifest a door that leads to the Casino, the Casino is a large structure inside of a 1 km x 1 km pocket dimension, including everything a Casino needs like slot machines, poker tables, a fully stocked bar, private rooms etc., that all are manned by Schrodinger workers that always do work but can never be observed or acknowledged. If the Casino is damaged, it will slowly be repaired. Anyone can leave at any time through the main doors.

item.name: Emperor's New Clothes
item.description: The Emperor wasn't actually naked. These invisible yet comfortable clothes automatically conform to the shape of the wearer and has incredible defensive abilities. By default, the wearer is immune to low-calibre gunfire; these defensive abilities scale with the natural defences of the user. It also increases other physical abilities to a lesser extent. No other clothes can be worn alongside these clothes, or else they lose all effectiveness.

item.name: Cookie Jar
item.description: Cookie Clicker - One of the flagship products of "The Bakery", a glass jar that contains a practically limitless supply of perfectly warm and fresh chocolate chip cookies, endlessly produced by the compressed universe contained inside the jar, optimised solely for cookie production. Note: DO NOT BREAK THE JAR. Note2: DO NOT BREAK THE JAR; THE BAKERY IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE CONSEQUENCES OF BREAKING THE JAR.

item.name: Yuuka Fumo
item.description: Touhou - A Fumo of Kazami Yuuka, whenever placed down, this doll continuously enriches the soil around it and increases the speed of crop growth as well as their quality in a 2 km x 2 km range. If carried around, it increases the potency of the Chlorokinetic abilities of the user.

item.name: Flintslate
item.description: Silksong - A slate made of refined Flintgem. Whenever a bladed weapon is sharpened by this slate, it becomes temporarily red-hot without damaging the blade for 5 minutes. It can be used up to 3 times every 24 hours.

item.name: Mimic Ore
item.description: A blank featureless ore that by itself has the exact same properties as iron. But when this ore has been in direct contact with another metal weighing at least 5kg for 1 hour, it will transmute its subatomic structure and magical composition to become that ore and lose its mimicing properties as long as said ore is Epic rarity or lower. You get 3 5kg bars. Restock Timer: 240 hours

item.name: Idiot's Guide to Einzbern Homunculi
item.description: Fate - A guide to creating homunculi simplified enough that even a regular person can understand it without compromising its effectiveness, written personally by Justeaze Lizrich von Einzbern herself. It details the process of creating Einzbern Homunculi, and more advanced Homunculi modelled after Justeaze herself, also includes the methods to build Homunculi vats and other related items concerning Homunculi production inside.

item.name: Idiot's Guide to Amestris Alchemy
item.description: Fullmetal Alchemist - A guide to performing the Alchemy developed by the State Military as taught by the Amestris. It details how to draw Transmutation Circles of all basic elements(Water, Earth, Wind, Fire, etc.) and how to activate them, and more advanced guides on how to use them effectively. In order to use Alchemy, one must have read the guide to using them.(Note: Does not include human transmutation, Scar's disintegration, Philosopher Stone creation, only transmutation circles that have been used before by State Alchemists)

item.name: Idiot's Guide to Father's Philosophy
item.description: Fullmetal Alchemist - A simple guide written by Father, otherwise known as the Dwarf in the Flask, to performing specialised Alchemy to create Philosopher Stones and advanced Homunculi. By studying this book, you can create Human Transmutation circles to convert living Human or Humanoid souls to Philosophers Stones, very potent energy stones that serve as excellent fuel by draining the souls inside. You can also create advanced superhuman homunculi with special abilities by using Philosopher's Stones as a base. You can grant a homunculus you made a copy of any ONE ability in your possession, Elite rank or below. While creating them, they will draw on the power of the Philosopher's Stone to use said ability, and if the stone runs out of energy, it will need to be replaced. The more powerful an ability, the more energy they will need to use it.

item.name: Chekov's Gun
item.description: An otherwise ordinary M1 Garand. But whenever you are in a situation where this gun would come in useful, you will be able to quickly find it, no matter, whether that is by reaching under a couch, or under a rug, etc. No matter where the gun was or its condition was, when you find it, it will be in pristine condition and fully loaded. The gun can be modified without losing these properties.

item.name: Icon of Geed
item.description: "They would do anything for it." A simple gold coin that embodies the concept of greed. Whoever sees will feel the need for it, an incredible compulsion to get possession of the coin, no matter the cost, whether that is selling their family, swearing fealty, or killing their kin. The stronger an entity is, the more resistance they have towards the compulsion. Once willingly given to someone, the coin loses this property and returns to being a normal coin. Despite that, whatever they traded for the coin will still be yours, and they will feel no need to get them back, being satisfied with the deal.

item.name: Heal Juice
item.description: A green juice in a glass vial, drinking this vial restores the consumer to perfect health with all health complications and negative status effects resolved without complications. To take effect, one must consume the full dose; dilution will ruin the dose. It will heal literally anything that is not death, as long as the target can consume it.

item.name: Universal Rations
item.description: A bottle of small white pills, consuming a pill will completely satiate you and give you all of the nutrients and dietary needs you require regardless of your race or peculiarities, the pills do not have flavor. Each pill is roughly equal to a regular meal and will satiate you for at least 8 hours. Each bottle contains 100 pills. Restock Timer: 120 Hours

item.name: Pocket Universe
item.description: No hyperbole, it is a pocket-sized gate that leads to an entire universe that is a replicate of the base mundane universe, except without any cognizant creatures or civilizations inside of it. You can freely move the gate and even safely carry it in your pocket; it can expand to 50 meters in circumference and shrink down to 5cm. The portal always leads to the coordinates 0.0.

item.name: High Roller Suite
item.description: Congratulations, you have been given a key to the high rollers' suite. Gambler, take some time off and enjoy yourself. Using this key on any door will make it a gate for the High Roller Suite temporarily. The suite is a luxury hotel room with 3 beds, 2 bathrooms, running water, electricity, heat, and is connected to the local internet alongside other amenities. The room automatically cleans itself perfectly every 24 hours. The Suite exists in the middle of nowhere and cannot be exited without the key; exiting will bring the user back to where they left from. The key cannot be lost or destroyed.

item.name: Fairy Boots
item.description: Terraria - These boots made of living material enhance the user's running speeds greatly, and wherever the wearer steps, 1 1-meter radius around their step will grow lush flora, their steps will leave behind flowers in their wake, and it does not create plants but instead instantly grows whatever mundane plant that was stepped on to maturity. In addition, when standing in nature while wearing these boots, the user's energy regeneration and nature affinity are increased.

item.name: Garden of Eden Seed
item.description: These rather unassuming looking grass seeds, when planted in any kind of soil, or even sand, will quickly grow into a lush garden without any nutrients or such needed, enriching the ground around them, the plants from the soil increase the quality of energy in the air, the garden will continously expand in a non-invasive way which can easily be stopped by setting up fences, crops grown on the soil of this garden grow up much faster and are notably healtier. Cattle raised there will be much healthier and vigorous. Restock Timer: 720 Hours

item.name: Uber Fertilizer
item.description: Fertilizers made by a mad scientist using the waste of an eldrich being. Using this fertilizer on a crop will make it grow 30x faster for 24 hours and provide incredible nutrients to the crop, regardless of what the crop needs. Each bag contains enough fertilizer to use on exactly 1 acre of soil. Restock Timer: 240 Hours

item.name: Staff of Regrowth
item.description: Terraria - A staff created out of a solidified flower that has absorbed incredible amounts of nature energy. This staff allows the user to expend their energy to nourish plants in their range and grant them vitality to grow them faster. Even if it's used on an arid land with a half-dead seed, the staff will turn that patch of ground into a lush patch of fertile land with the seed turned to a mature plant. Plants that are more powerful or need more conditions to mature require the user to expend more energy to grow. Amplifies the power of nature-based abilities channeled through.

item.name: Reroll Chip
item.description: A simple golden poker chip, when used, allows you to reroll your latest gacha ticket, losing its result in exchange for rerolling the same ticket to get a different result. Upon use, the chip vanishes from existence.

item.name: Vibranium Weave Patch
item.description: MCU - An ordinary-looking sticker that, when applied to a piece of clothing, perfectly suffuses it with Vibranium weaving, adding threads of vibranium perfectly integrated. Making the clothing incredibly durable and capable of dispersing kinetic energy to the point where even a baseline human can withstand a tank shell without dying. The patch only contains enough vibranium threads to be used on at most 5kg of clothing.

item.name: The Rock
item.description: King Arthur pulled a sword out of this bad boy. And you got the rock in exchange. This rock is magically enchanted to be utterly indestructible to all effects below Mythical level.

item.name: One Million Buzzaws
item.description: Hollow Knight - All sourced unethically from the White Palace, each buzzaw is 3 meters in length and permanently spinning with steel blades that cannot be stopped without being destroyed. Each buzzsaw has to be taken out of storage manually and can hurt the user if not careful.

item.name: Instant Death Soup
item.description: A pot full of very hot and spicy soup, if someone were to drink it willingly while knowing its effects, they will instantly die, no matter their constitution or abilities. They must consume the whole soup for it to take effect.

item.name: Very Hot Soup
item.description: A pot full of incredibly hot and spicy soup, consuming the entire pot of soup will cover their body in [(Rare)Cursed Flames], [(Elite)Blood Flames], [(Elite)Holy Flames], and [(Elite)Godslayer Apostle Flames].

item.name: Morphing Blade
item.description: An iron sword weighing 3kg with a blade made of pure iron that can change shape while conserving its mass, the parts of the blade that are destroyed or separated lose this property. Reforging the sword or modifying it will also get rid of this property.

item.name: Escape Ticket
item.description: A ticket that, when torn, teleports the user into a bunker in another dimension for 8 hours. The bunker is stocked with clean drinking water and MRE's with a space of 4x4x4m inside resembling a prison cell. Those with spatial abilities may be able to track the user. Once 8 hours are up, the user will be released; otherwise exit is not possible without spatial manipulation.

item.name: Gun Voucher
item.description: (Tech)A simple ticket can be redeemed for any commercially available gun sold in the United States of America in the year 2016. Simply tear the ticket and think of the gun you want to redeem, you will also receive a magazine for your chosen weapon every 24 hours.

item.name: Earring of Hearing
item.description: A pair of clip-on earrings that boost the hearing levels and acuity of the wearer to the level of a Barn Owl.

item.name: Hawk Glasses
item.description: A pair of ordinary-looking glasses that grant the wearer the farsight and visual acuity of a Bald Eagle

item.name: Hound Collar
item.description: A red dog collar that, when worn, grants the user the smelling and olfactory abilities of a Gray Wolf.

item.name: Horseshoe Necklace
item.description: A horseshoe fashioned into a necklace that grants the wearer the stamina and leg strength of a Mustang Horse.

item.name: Ghost Blade
item.description: Dark Souls - A sharp and long dagger wielded by the ghosts of New Londo, the curse on this blade allows it to wound spiritual beings(does not inflict soul damage on living beings).

item.name: Black Knight Set
item.description: Dark Souls - A set of armor and weapons wielded by the Black Knights of Lordran. The armor is perfectly fitted to your body and will keep conforming to your body as long as your body shape does not change too drastically. The set contains a Greatsword, Battle Axe, Halberd, Sword, and Shield.

item.name: Perfume Pouch
item.description: Elden Ring - A pouch of spraymists and aromatics created by the Perfumers of the Lands Between, this pouch contains one each of Acid Spraymist, Poison Spraymist, Bloodboil Aromatic, Ironjar Aromatic, and Uplifting Aromatic. Another set is added inside the pouch every 24 hours.

item.name: Explosive Tag Deck
item.description: Naruto - A leather deck that contains a set of standard Explosive Tags produced in the Hidden Leaf village. When imbued with energy, these tags will explode with decent power behind them. The user can set the amount of time the tags will take to explode, and with practice and imbuing with energy beforehand, can remotely explode the tags. One set contains 5 tags that restock every 24 hours.

item.name: Eochaid's Dancing Blade
item.description: Elden Ring - The famed blade of a family of executioners, this sword is greatly sharp and durable, in addition, the user can imbue their energy into the blade to make it fly according to the users will with the same power and strength it would have as if it were swung normally. Making the sword fly consumes energy.

item.name: Sword of St Trina
item.description: Elden Ring - A sword carried by the clerics of St. Trina, while the blade itself is not too powerful, it has the ability to convert the user's energy into magical purple mist that puts those who inhale it into deep sleep. The stronger the target, the longer they have to be exposed to the mist.

item.name: Velvet Sword
item.description: Elden Ring - The sword of Saint Trina, forever dyed velvet. The sword is supernaturally sharp and durable, but its true ability is to expend the user's energy to unleash the Mist of Eternal Sleep. When exposed to the Mist of Eternal Sleep, the target will be put into a slumber that is impossible to wake up from, even if hurt or damaged. The stronger a target is, the longer they have to be exposed to the mist to get affected, and the easier they can wake up.

item.name: Ferryman's Favor
item.description: Charon, the Ferryman, owes you a favor, and this IOU cheque proves it. By tearing the cheque, you can ask Chiron to bring you any one dead soul that belongs to the world you tore the ticket in, alongside the biggest part of their corpse. Chiron will give you the soul and body in separate sealed containers.

item.name: Sentry Turrets
item.description: (Tech)Portal - A shipment of Aperture Science Brand Sentry Turrets, equipped with twin machine guns and is a very cost effective way to keep out intruders, but are not built with quality in mind but rather with cheapness and reliability in mind. This box contains 9 turrets whose bullet reserves refill every 24 hours(bullets cannot be taken out of turret). Restock Timer: 168 Hours

item.name: Barrel of Everflowing Oil
item.description: A standard black barrel that contains infinite amounts of quality medium crude oil, when this barrel is tipped, oil flows out of the bung at a steady rate of 10 gallons per minute. If the barrel is damaged or forcefully modified, it will lose this attribute.

item.name: Job Application Form
item.description: "Does this scare you?" An otherwise ordinary looking job application form, that when filled with the correct information and handed to an employer will guarentee that the applicant is hired no matter the job or their qualifications, altough not guarenteed that they will keep the job. The form loses this effect after being used once.

item.name: Ancient Fruit Wine
item.description: Stardew Valley - A bottle of the finest Iridium Quality Wine made from a very rare Ancient fruit with excellent taste personally handcrafted and aged by a farmer with too much time, skill and money. Altough it does not have any supernatural effects, it's refined and refreshing taste is superb and has incredible artisan value. Restock Timer: 12 Hours

item.name: Satchel of Seeds
item.description: An otherwise ordinary looking satchel that contains virtually unlimited amounts of seeds and saplings that can be found on the surface of planet earth in the year 2020. Only 10kg of material can be taken be out of the bag every 24 hours. To take out a seed or sapling, simply reach in while thinking of your target. One of the satchel pockets contains a notepad containing information on every item inside.

item.name: Dunce Cap
item.description: A simple white cap with the words "dunce" written on top, usually used to shame someone.

item.name: Hera's Breastmilk
item.description: "Hey, it worked for Hercules" A bottle filled to the brim with the Goddess Hera's freshly squeezed breastmilk, when someone consumes the entire bottle, the potential of their body will vastly increase, allowing even a regular human to train to reach superhuman levels of strength and durability. This does not, however, increase your talent or the speed at which you will reach that strength. Restock Timer: 168

item.name: Mystic Eye Killers
item.description: Type Moon - An otherwise ordinary-looking pair of stylish glasses that, when worn, forcefully suppresses eye-based abilities and magic and also makes the owner resistant to other ocular/eye-based abilities. Too strong abilities can overpower this effect.

item.name: Nichirin Ingots
item.description: Demon Slayer - Ingots made of Scarlet Ore that have absorbed a lot of natural sunlight and changed in composition. Nichirin is a very durable metal that has anti-demon properties and amplifies the power of Fire-based abilities, and is capable of reaching extreme temperatures without deforming. You get 3 5kg ingots. Restock timer: 120 Hours

item.name: Relic of Knowledge
item.description: RWBY - A divine relic created by the Brother gods, this relic allows one to summon the spirit within called Jinn. Jinn is capable of granting the user a single question that they can ask the spirit, as long as a non-divine being in your current world knows the answer to your current question, she can give you the answer to it. You can also use the artifact to converse with Jinn without expending questions, but she won't be able to use her power without it, although without combat power, she is quite smart and wise. You get another question every 720 hours.

item.name: Desert Key
item.description: An ornate key that, when turned in a sufficiently large space, creates a portal leading into a pocket dimension that is 5 km x 5 km x 5 km in size that contains a desert inside. The sunlight is harsh, the wind is strong, the night is cold, and few creatures can survive. The gate that leads outside the dimension is always open and leads to where the entrance was last opened.

item.name: Forest Key
item.description: An ornate key that, when turned in a sufficiently large space, creates a portal leading into a pocket dimension that is 5 km x 5 km x 5 km in size that contains a temperate forest inside. Full of life and resources to support an ecosystem, it also contains some of Earth's native lifeforms inside, like wolves. The gate that leads outside the dimension is always open and leads to where the entrance was last opened.

item.name: Beach Key
item.description: An ornate key that, when turned in a sufficiently large space, creates a portal leading into a pocket dimension that is 10 km x 10 km x 10 km in size that contains a beach that leads into a sea filled with sea life. Perfect for fishing or taking a relaxing vacation. The gate that leads outside the dimension is always open and leads to where the entrance was last opened.

item.name: Tundra Key
item.description: An ornate key that, when turned in a sufficiently large space, creates a portal leading into a pocket dimension that is 5 km x 5 km x 5 km in size that contains a frozen tundra inside. It is perpetually cold and often has snowstorms and blizzards, though it does contain some earth life inside, and the northern lights can be observed. The gate that leads outside the dimension is always open and leads to where the entrance was last opened.

item.name: Dust Mines Key
item.description: An ornate key that, when turned in a sufficiently large space, creates a portal leading into a pocket dimension that is 500 km x 500 km x 500 km in size which contains an expanse of caves that contain Raw Dust Crystals from Remnant. There are no living organisms in the caves, only minerals and all types of dust crystals and their rarer varieties in lesser amounts, may require special equipment and caution to excavate safely. The gate that leads outside the dimension is always open and leads to where the entrance was last opened.

item.name: Magic Lake Key
item.description: Rwby - An ornate key that, when turned in a sufficiently large space, creates a portal leading into a pocket dimension that is 5 km x 5 km x 5 km in size which contains a large spacious cave with a giant crystal blue lake in the middle. The water of the lake contains unusually high amounts of magical energy, and resting inside of it can help one recover their energy quicker or use the water as an excellent alchemical ingredient. The gate that leads outside the dimension is always open and leads to where the entrance was last opened.

item.name: Hot Springs Key
item.description: An ornate key that, when turned in a sufficiently large space, creates a portal leading into a pocket dimension that is 5 km x 5 km x 5km in size, which contains a small mountain inside that has natural hot springs, a small bamboo forest, and overall a great view. The mountain itself cannot be descended from due to the isolated space; the hot springs contain properties that slightly accelerate natural healing and automatically replenish themselves. The gate that leads outside the dimension is always open and leads to where the entrance was last opened.

item.name: Apartments Key
item.description: An ornate key that, when turned in a sufficiently large space, creates a portal leading into a pocket dimension that is 1 googol kilometers cubed in size, which is a circular wall of apartment rooms filled with standard stuff that can be found in Earth apartments, yet not a single living entity dwells inside, even if the powers are on. The entire pocket space is a wall of apartments that wrap around the entire inside of the walls of the dimension, facing inwards with empty space in the middle. The gate that leads outside the dimension is always open and leads to where the entrance was last opened.

item.name: Silver Samurai Armor
item.description: The Wolverine/MCU - A specially designed adamantium-plated powered exoskeleton paired with a superheated Adamantium blade. The armor itself has over 100 tons of lifting strength; in addition, it has life support systems inside for its user that can allow even a sick old man to use it to its full potential. The armor has been modified in such a way that it will conform to the shape of the user as long as they are vaguely humanoid in shape and size. The power supply will charge itself to maximum within an hour as long as its not in active use.(Mutagen manipulation device not included)

item.name: Psycho
item.description: Fallout - Psycho is an addictive combat drug made for soldiers, it works by flooding the body with chemicals and hormones specially designed to suppress the sensation of pain, induce a bloodthirsty haze, speed up reflexes, increase metabolism, and enhance concentration. But it is also incredibly addictive with a host of side effects, although a skilled enough Chemist may be able to improve upon the design. You get 8 doses in a bandoleer. Restock Timer: 24 hours.

item.name: Mentats
item.description: Fallout - Mentats, often described as a miracle drug that temporarily heightens the mental functions of the consumer, granting them increased mental clarity, faster thought processing speeds, and greater memory retention. But it is also highly addictive; overuse of it can cause permanent memory degeneration and mental disorders. Perhaps a highly skilled chemist can improve upon the design. You get a single box containing 8 doses. Restock Timer: 76 Hours

item.name: Buffout
item.description: Fallout - Buffout is a pre-war chem created as a very potent and temporary physical effort enhancer and steroid, capable of allowing the string bean joe punch through wood and take a baseball bat to the face thanks to the increased endurance, strength, and reflexes it provides. Restock Timer: 76 Hours

item.name: Super Rod
item.description: Pokemon - For when you really want to catch big game, the Super Rod is a fishing rod that requires no bait to fish, as it has the properties of luring in fish who feel compelled to it. In addition, it's more likely to attract quality or powerful sea-dwelling creatures than not. A fisherman's wet dream.

item.name: Dragonslayer Spear
item.description: Darksouls - The spear of Ornstein, the Dragon Slayer, this large spear is imbued with his essence and allows the user to channel their energy through it to wreathe it in lightning, in addition, this spear is more lethal towards draconic enemies.

item.name: Cipher Pata
item.description: Elden Ring - A holy blade worn on the hands, formed out of shapeless ciphers, making it almost impossible to clash with. The power of the ciphers scale with the users maximum energy levels.

item.name: Crystal Spear
item.description: Elden Ring - A spear fashioned out of pure crystals that is tougher than steel, thanks to its unique material. This spear can also be used as a catalyst from which to cast magic with, like a wand.

item.name: Pharis' Bow
item.description: Dark Souls - A finely crafted bow once wielded by the legendary archer Pharis. This bow is quite powerful and can sharpshoot at longer ranges. Some of Phari's essence still seems to remain, slightly aiding the user's aim. Comes with a quiver of 30 standard arrows that restock every 24 hours.

item.name: Glock
item.description: (Tech)A gun, the old reliable Glock 19, simple, easy to use, easy to handle, and will work for most situations where you will simply need a basic handgun. You get a magazine for it every 24 hours.

item.name: Darkmoon Bow
item.description: Darksouls - A bow wielded by the god of the Darkmoon, Gwyndolin. Wielding the bow empowers the arrows shot with your magical energy and grants them a slight sliver of moon energy. It comes paired with special moonlight arrows that receive further benefits from these effects. You get 24 in a quiver that restocks every 48 hours.

item.name: Silver Spoon
item.description: A spoon made of pure silver, directly personally blessed by the heavenly god, is extremely lethal against vampires, ghouls, werewolves, and similar beings. Also doubles as cutlery.

item.name: Irithyll Knight Set
item.description: Dark Souls - A set of armor and weapons granted to the Outrider knights of Pontiff Sulyvahn, they are enchanted to forever be cloaked in freezing temperatures and mist. This set includes an Irithyll Straightsword, Irithyll Rapier, Pontiff Knight Curved Sword, and Pontiff Knight Great Scythe alongside Outrider Knight Armor that perfectly conforms to the body of the user, providing the user with great defense and protection against cold. Infusing the blades of these weapons with energy can further plunge their temperatures and cause them to emit freezing mist.

item.name: Vordt's Great Hammer
item.description: Dark Souls - A great hammer made of titanite that belonged to Vordt of the Boreal Valley. The weapon is incredibly heavy and requires inhuman strength to swing properly. The head of the mace is imbued with frost, forever below freezing temperatures. It also increases the power of ice-based abilities channeled through it.

item.name: Sunlight Sword
item.description: Dark Souls - An expertly crafted blade from the kingdom of Anor Londo, although simple looking, this straight blade contains the power of Sunlight. Raising the blade high and praising the sun while imbuing energy into the blade will strengthen you and your nearby allies with sunlight, increasing their physical abilities for 3 minutes with a 30-minute cooldown. Boosts the power of lightning and fire-based abilities channeled through it.

item.name: Reduvia
item.description: Elden Ring - Reduvia is a jagged, dagged, forever-stained, and dripping with blood, carried by the servants of the Lord of Blood. You can infuse this weapon with energy to transform its never-drying blood into a flying slash to hit enemies from afar. Slightly decreases the drain of Vitality costing abilities and effects when held.

item.name: Dragonslayer Swordspear
item.description: Dark Souls - The armament the mighty god, Nameless King, the heir of lightning, used to slay countless dragons. The blade is forever infused with lightning, and expending energy into the weapon allows one to call down a bolt of lightning from the skies and strengthen the lightning cloaking the blade. Increases the potency of lightning-based abilities when used as a focus.

item.name: Holy Hand Grenade of Antioch
item.description: Monty Python - The Holy Hand Grenade is a powerful grenade personally blessed by a saint. The grenade contains 1 kiloton of power and deals extra damage against unholy enemies. Restock Timer: 24 hours.

item.name: Arc Reactor
item.description: (Tech)MCU - The Arc reactor is a revolutionary technology created by one of the greatest minds of the universe, Tony Stark. Even a tinker would find it difficult to replicate the technology due to the new element. The Reactor is so efficient that it can run indefinitely without replacement and provide more than 5 gigajoules of energy per second.

item.name: Vorpan
item.description: Dead Cells - An unbreakable frying pan that can double as a very useful and practical cooking utensil. Strikes done with the Vorpan are slightly stronger than usual. 666.Erdtree Seed,4.2 Elden Ring - A seed that, when planted, will sprout a small ineffectual Erdtree. This tree, when nourished with energy supplied or fed through burying corpses under it as a ritual, grows larger and more powerful. When powerful enough, the Erdtree will shine down its blessings, warding off diseases and curses, nourishing the land, and increasing recovery and healing of those under its light.

item.name: Golden Apple Tree
item.description: Minecraft - A seed that, when planted, will sprout a tree capable of growing Golden Apples(uncommon item), but to flourish and grow, the tree needs very nutrient-dense soil and an energy-rich environment.

item.name: Gag of Silence
item.description: A simple red ball gag that, when worn in the mouth, suppresses all noise emanating from the user. Useful for spies and ninjas.

item.name: Veil of Invisibility
item.description: A cloak that turns the wearer invisible as long as they are not wearing any piece of clothing other than the veil.

item.name: Feline Attachment
item.description: (Nsfw)A buttplug with a cat tail attached, often used to imitate felines. Wearing this accessory in the appropriate place increases the reflexes, agility, balance, and acrobatic abilities of the user, and reduces the fall damage they take.

item.name: Bondage of Enduring
item.description: (Nsfw)A set of bondage ropes, that, when worn in an appropriate position in place of one's clothes, increases the wearer's durability, stamina regeneration, and converts pain into pleasure.

item.name: Bunny's Blessings
item.description: (Nsfw)A pair of rather raunchy bunny ears headband and bunny tail buttplug pair. This pair of items slightly increases the charm of the wearer and makes them more appealing to other people.

item.name: Prayer Beads
item.description: (Nsfw)A sign of true devotion and faith, these silver beads on a string increase the power of Holy abilities and spells as well as faith-based abilities and one's connection to holy beings, so long as all beads are inside the anal cavity.

item.name: Whip of Ecstasy
item.description: (Nsfw)A supernaturally durable whip that, when striking an opponent, does not deal any harm beyond superficial levels; instead, it converts all of the damage it would have done to the target otherwise if it were a normal whip into sexual pleasure.

item.name: Helltaker's Apron
item.description: Helltaker - A black apron with the words Satan embroidered in white, owned by the Helltaker himself. Wearing this apron increases the rate at which one improves their cooking proficiency. Especially when it comes to pancakes.

item.name: Second Skin
item.description: A skintight, ultra-lightweight, and thin black bodysuit that adheres to the body of the wearer perfectly. The suit stimulates their body and muscles to bring out more of their latent power and improve their physical performance, though it also amplifies the sensations felt by the user. When worn with other clothing, it may suffer decreased efficiency. The material itself is incredibly durable, being tougher than steel, and if torn, it will slowly mend itself.

item.name: Bucket of Milk
item.description: Minecraft - A bucket filled with 1 liter of milk. If the milk inside the bucket is drunk in one continuous motion, it will dispel all unnatural afflictions ailing the user such as curses, sicknesses, magical effects, everything unnatural to them affecting at the moment, good or bad. Does not work on wounds and injuries as it does not have restorative properties. And cannot affect effects that have become a part of the drinker.

item.name: Shikai - Ryujin Jakka
item.description: Bleach - A zanpakuto, a spiritual katana bound to the soul that can manifest as a raging inferno capable of manipulating flames. The output and control over the flames, as well as the strength of the blade, scale with the user, by default being capable of shattering large boulders and burning down a house. Amplifies the power of fire-based abilities of the user. (A/N:Does not give spiritual energy, cannot be evolved)

item.name: Bankai - Ryujin Jakka
item.description: Bleach - Ryujin Jakka, the Blade of Ember is a Zanpakuto, a spiritual armament in the shape of a burnt blade bound to the user. The strength of this armament scales with the power of its user. With its Bankai unlocked, it has reached its most powerful state. It allows the use of 4 abilities based in cardinal directions, East allows all of the flames of the user to be concentrated only in the blade to achieve maximum destructive power. West allows the user to cloak their body in exteme heat as defense. South allows them to call upon the corpses of those they have slain to use as puppets. North is the maximum power of the ability that concentrates all of their power into a superheated slash. The potency and heat of the flames wielded by the sword scale with the user.  (A/N:Does not give spiritual energy, cannot be evolved)

item.name: Shikai - Shinso
item.description: Bleach - Shinso is a Zanpakuto, a spiritual armament bound to the soul in the shape of a wakizashi. The strength of this armament scales with the power of its user. When activating its shikai with the command phrase, Shinso's length can be extended beyond its regular limits; the maximum size of the expansion and how fast it can expand scales with the power of its user. By default, it can extend to 10x its base length.(A/N: Does not give spiritual energy, cannot be evolved)

item.name: Bankai - Shinso
item.description: Bleach - Shinso is a Zanpakuto, a spiritual armament bound to the soul in the shape of a wakizashi. The strength of this armament scales with the power of its user. With its Bankai unlocked, it has reached its most powerful state. When activating its Bankai with the command phrase, the weapon can extend to insane lengths with blinding speeds, capable of reaching several kilometers in length fast enough to be nigh impossible to react to, given the user is strong enough to reach those levels. Does not contain the poison ability. (A/N: Does not give spiritual energy, cannot be evolved)

item.name: Shikai - Kyokai Suigetsu
item.description: Bleach - Kyokai Suigetsu is a Zanpakuto, a spiritual armament in the form of a Katana. The strength of this armament scales with the power of its user. By chanting the name of the shikai and unleashing its name, you can place targets under "Absolute Hypnosis." allowing you to manipulate their 5 senses. These effects last even after the Shkai has ended as long as they saw the effect being used. The effectiveness of the Hypnosis scales with the power difference between the user and the target.(A/N: Does not give spiritual energy, cannot be evolved)

item.name: Shikai - Minazuki
item.description: Bleach - Minazuki is a Zanpakuto, a spiritual armament in the form of a Katana. The strength of this armament scales with the power of its user. By chanting its command, the blade can be transformed into a giant flying creature familiar that is capable of swallowing people into its stomach to help them recuperate and heal. The power of the healing scales with the user. (A/N: Does not give spiritual energy, cannot be evolved)

item.name: Bankai - Minazuki
item.description: Bleach - Minazuki is a Zanpakuto, a spiritual armament bound to the soul in the shape of a katana. The strength of this armament scales with the power of its user. With its Bankai unlocked, it has reached its most powerful state.
