When chanting its Bankai, it allows the user to cover the battlefield in a blood-like substance under their control that they can use to either enhance their attacks or to heal themselves and others. The potency of destruction and healing of the attack scales with the power level of the user. (A/N: Does not give spiritual energy, cannot be evolved)

item.name: Shikai - Tachikaze
item.description: Bleach - Tachikaze is a Zanpakuto, a spiritual armament in the form of a wakizashi. The strength of this armament scales with the power of its user. The Shikai form of this blade allows the user to manipulate the winds around them to send out empowered slashes of wind that they can detonate at will. It also increases the potency of wind based abilities channeled through it. (A/N: Does not give spiritual energy, cannot be evolved)

item.name: Bankai - Tachikaze
item.description: Bleach - Tachikaze is a Zanpakuto, a spiritual armament bound to the soul in the shape of knuckle dusters fused with upper body armor in the shape of wrappings. The strength of this armament scales with the power of its user. With its Bankai unlocked, it has reached its most powerful state. The Bankai of this Zanpakuto allows it to release powerful explosions of wind with every punch landed. It also increases the potency of wind-based abilities channeled through it. (A/N: Does not give spiritual energy, cannot be evolved)

item.name: Shikai - Gonryomaru
item.description: Bleach - Gonryomaru is a Zanpakuto, a spiritual armament in the form of a Rapier. The strength of this armament scales with the power of its user. The Shikai ability allows the user to wrap the blade in lightning in order to enhance its powers and send out slashes of lightning. It also increases the potency of electricity-based abilities channeled through it. (A/N: Does not give spiritual energy, cannot be evolved)

item.name: Bankai - Gonryomaru
item.description: Bleach - Gonryomaru is a Zanpakuto, a spiritual armament in the form of a Rapier. The strength of this armament scales with the power of its user. With its Bankai unlocked, it has reached its most powerful state. The Bankai of this Zanpakuto allows it to control the weather and call down powerful strikes of lightning as well as wreath their sword with violent lightning. It also greatly increases the potency of electricity-based abilities channeled through it. (A/N: Does not give spiritual energy, cannot be evolved)

item.name: Asauchi
item.description: Bleach - Asauchi is a Zanpakuto, a spiritual armament in the form of a weapon that befits its user. The strength of this armament scales with the power of its user. Asauchi is a dormant, unnamed Zanpakuto that grows along with the user. If the user is able to unlock the Shikai of the blade, it will attain its own unique ability according to the nature of its user, equal to or weaker in power than a rare rank ability. And if they are able to unlock its Bankai, that ability will be upgraded to equal an Epic rank ability.

item.name: Space Stone
item.description: Marvel - One of the infinity stones possessing the power to change the very universe. The Space Stone allows the user to manipulate space, open portals, siphon energy from space itself and many other abilities one can utilise with the ability to control space. But a strong user is needed to bring out its power without devastating consequences.

item.name: Dojo Key
item.description: An ornate key that, when turned in a sufficiently large space, creates a portal leading into a pocket dimension that is 1 km x 1 km x 1 km in size that contains a large dojo building inside with a moderate garden area. The inside of the Dojo contains all the expected amenities, training dummies, sparring weapons, running water, training uniforms, towels, etc., Everything that originally belonged to the Dojo will be restocked within 24 hours, with the broken parts disposed of, and any destruction that happened inside the Dojo will be repaired at the same time. Nothing that originates from the dojo can be taken out of it. The gate that leads outside the dimension is always open and leads to where the entrance was last opened.

item.name: Flynn's Ring
item.description: Dark Souls - Ring of the Fabled Thief, Flynn. When worn, this ring slightly increases the wearer's physical strength proportional to how little they are carrying.

item.name: Witch Ring
item.description: Dark Souls - Rings bestowed by the Witch of Izalith and her daughter to the successors of the art of pyromancy, the ring thrums with a strange warmth. Increases the potency of fire-based abilities and spells while decreasing their costs when equipped.

item.name: Father Garcia's Trenchcoat
item.description: Faith the Unholy Trinity - "True faith looks forward, not back." An iconic black trench coat worn by Father Garcia, it is fairly durable and has the property of warding off curses and negative energy from the wearer.

item.name: Father Garcia's Shotgun
item.description: Faith the Unholy Trinity - "You shall drink the wrath of the Almighty." A shotgun wielded by Father Garcia to fight off against demons and evil spirits. The bullets fired from this gun can affect intangible entities and is more effective against Unholy entities.

item.name: Big Hat Logan's Big Hat
item.description: Dark Souls - The titular big hat of Big Hat Logan, a legendary sorcerer, wearing this uncomfortably large hat on your head makes it slightly easier to study magic.

item.name: Bold & Brash
item.description: Spongebob - A masterpiece of art created by the acclaimed artist from Bikini Bottom, Squidward Quincy Tentacles. To ensure the safety of the canvas, it is refreshed to perfect condition every 24 hours.

item.name: Monster Fucker Permit
item.description: "Officially Sanctioned by the Goat herself." This permit, whenever pointed at a monster or a creature, will turn them into a more humanoid form of an attractive member of the gender the user is attracted to and grant them baseline intelligence if they do not possess it. In addition, authority figures will acknowledge the permit as a legitimate sanctioned permit that shows you are qualified to deal with monster girls and cases involving them.

item.name: Berserker Armor
item.description: Berserk - A magical armor created by a Dwarven Blacksmith. This armor is exceptionally durable and shapes itself to fit the wearer perfectly. The berserker armor has the ability to enhance its users' performance by suppressing their pain aversion or mental limiters, allowing them to push their bodies to the utmost limit. The armor will also actively impale the wearer's body in the case that they suffer damage to pin their body back together. The armor will also magically repair itself over time. But it has the drawback of amplifying the user's negative emotions as well, requiring careful moderation of one's emotions to use effectively.

item.name: The Cursed Ticket
item.description: "Fancy your chances?" A ticket that, when torn, spins the Curse Roulette for the user, and automatically applies the result and the ticket they would have gotten to the recipient.

item.name: Metal Gear
item.description: A rather ordinary, if not extraordinarily solid, gear made of iron.

item.name: Taimanin Changing Booth
item.description: Taimanin - A changing booth that allows anyone to enter and receive their very own Taimanin Suit tailored specifically for them and their repertoire of abilities. These suits are always skintight but incredibly lightweight and easy to move around in while still being bulletproof and exceptionally durable, and also very receptive to reinforcement-type abilities and spells. Only one outfit can be created per person, and going inside the booth again will repair it.

item.name: Claidheamh Mor
item.description: Team Fortess 2 - "Don't even try to pronounce it" This sword is a very durable and sharp zweihander with a unique enchantment on it, allowing it to take a portion of whoever it has beheaded's energy and use it to refuel the user's energy.

item.name: One Thousand Bottles of Baby Oil
item.description: Confiscated from a certain mansion. One thousand unbranded bottles of standard baby oil.

item.name: Soylent Green
item.description: Soylent Green - A tin of Soylent Green, it is not appetizing, but it is nutritious enough to not let you starve; the taste generally varies from person to person. Restock Timer: 1 Hour

item.name: Prismatic Cloak
item.description: A white cloak that, when exposed to natural sunlight, renders the user invisible by bending light around them. This cloak also has the property of reflecting all light-based attacks below Epic rank.

item.name: Truants Stopwatch
item.description: A silver stopwatch that, when started, speeds up the perception of the person who started it. The longer the stopwatch stays active, the more the energy it drains from the user exponentially increases.

item.name: Heavenly Tribulation Ticket
item.description: "Pissing off the Heavens has never been easier." When this ticket is ripped, it will summon a Heavenly Tribulation, where energized lightning with power equal to an Epic rank attack will strike down on you from the sky, aiming to kill you. But if you manage to withstand the lightning and use it to temper your body, your physical abilities will improve considerably.

item.name: Gravitational Beam Emitter
item.description: (Tech)Blame - A super high-tech handheld pistol-shaped device that has the ability to shoot Condensed Graviton Energy Beams that rip apart anything in their way, with several levels of output ranging from anti-personnel to anti-spacecraft. But instead of having conventional ammunition, this weapon draws energy from its user to function. Beware of the intense recoil.

item.name: The City
item.description: (Tech)Blame - The city is a fairly large megastructure that started as a regular Dyson sphere that kept expanding. The City is made up of several segments, such as hyper-compressed dense layers that act as defense and computational devices, factories, cities, and terminals. The City contains millions of impossibly advanced technologies, and their blueprints contained within itself. You get a key that can open a portal to any part of the City, and you can freely command the City with absolute authority. Due to size constraints, the City itself is contained in its pocket universe but can open portals into your current plane of reality.

item.name: Hell Hammer
item.description: An infernal hammer created out of steel tempered with hellflames. In addition to being incredibly durable and strong, this hammer creates explosions of hellflame whenever it impacts a target in proportion to the physical force of the impact itself.

item.name: Exorcists Mace
item.description: A blessed mace made of sanctified steel. In addition to being made of incredibly durable materials and being a very formidable bludgeon, this mace is suffused with Holy Light. It is exceptionally effective against Unholy entities.

item.name: Clergy Ring
item.description: A ring blessed by angels, this ring gains one charge every 8 hours and can store up to 3 Charges. Allowing its wearer to activate one of 3 effects.  1: Smite - Charges the user's fists or held weapon with holy energy, empowering their next strike. 2: Blessing - Increases one chosen physical stat of the target for 5 minutes. 3: Purify - Purifies a target, curing them of afflictions with the strength of the purification scaling with the user's energy levels.

item.name: Thalasin
item.description: Thalasin - A box of prescription Thalasin. One pack of Thalasin contains 8 of each pill that chemically induces the associated emotion regardless of the ingester's biology. Commonly included emotions include: Anger, Sadness, Happiness, Fear, Relief, Hope, Frustration, Pride, Lust, etc. Restock Timer: 24 Hours

item.name: Evil Ring
item.description: A rather mundane iron ring that is exceptionally evil and malicious. But as it is only an iron without any ability to affect anything or communicate, it is without any means to conduct its malice.

item.name: Heavy Rock
item.description: An otherwise ordinary and unremarkable head-sized rock that is always ever so slightly heavier than the maximum weight of whoever tries to lift it can lift.

item.name: Farmland Key
item.description: An ornate key that, when turned in a sufficiently large space, creates a portal leading into a pocket dimension that is 10 km x 10 km x 10 km in size, that consists entirely of already tilled farmland and a refilling pond of water alongside a small farmhouse in the middle. The dirt inside the dimension is always fertile and nutritious and is capable of growing any crop, magical or mundane, that is planted. The farm is managed by Scarecrow golems with the capacity to look after whatever you plant without tiring. The water and dirt that came with the dimension cannot be taken out of it. The gate that leads outside the dimension is always open and leads to where the entrance was last opened.

item.name: Element Zero
item.description: Mass Effect - A sealed, insulated crate containing 5 Tons of Element Zero, otherwise referred to as "Eezo", a special kind of super-rare material that, when electrically stimulated, creates a field that alters the virtual mass of objects nearby, either decreasing or increasing it through what is called the "Mass Effect". Restock Timer: 48 Hours

item.name: Ahzidial
item.description: Skyrim - A dragon priest mask, crafted out of Ebony and enchanted with great power. This mask, when worn, grants the user resistance towards Fire and heat while increasing their Fire affinity, increasing the potency of their Fire-based abilities and spells.

item.name: Zahkriisos
item.description: Skyrim - A dragon priest mask, crafted out of Ebony and enchanted with great power. This mask, when worn, grants the user resistance towards Lightning and Wind while increasing their Lightning affinity, increasing the potency of their Lightning-based abilities and spells.

item.name: Dukaan
item.description: Skyrim - A dragon priest mask, crafted out of Ebony and enchanted with great power. This mask, when worn, grants the user resistance towards Ice and Cold while increasing their Ice affinity, increasing the potency of their Ice-based abilities and spells.

item.name: Otar
item.description: Skyrim - A dragon priest mask, crafted out of Malachite and enchanted with great power. This mask, when worn, grants the user considerably resistance towards Ice, Cold, Heat, Fire and Lightning elements.

item.name: Stormbreaker
item.description: MCU - A mastercraft weapon made of Uru, made to complement Thor's powers. This axe-hammer. This weapon has the ability to be commanded by the user telekinetically and grants them flight alongside immense physical abilities and regeneration. The main power of Stormbreaker is to command lightning and storms, either unleashing lightning in incredible waves or calling down lightning from the sky. Also massively enhances all Sky and Lightning-based abilities when used as a focus.(Not connected to Bitfrost)

item.name: The Trumpet of Apocalypse
item.description: "Judgement" The Trumpet of the Apocalypse, when blown, summons a [Heavenly Gate(Mythical)] that fuels itself and unleashes a massive army of angels, such as Dominions, Principalities, Thrones, and 4 Seraphim before disappearing. The army summoned by this item will last indefinitely and count as independent entities while still staying under your command.

item.name: Can of Whoopass
item.description: A regular-looking tin can with a label stating explicitly what it does. When this can is opened, 6 familiars from the Gold Familiar Gacha will be summoned to beat the person who opened the can to death. The familiars will never stop trying to beat the target to death with intense focus until the target dies, at which point they will disappear.

item.name: Hepheastus' Forge Key
item.description: An ornate key that, when turned in a sufficiently large space, creates a portal leading into a pocket dimension that is 100mx100m in size. Inside this dimension is a fully stocked forge with unbreakable tools and a furnace that can heat up higher than the sun's core without turning the room into a deathtrap. It is a forge that is worthy of a god. Nothing that was originally inside the forge can be taken out of it. The gate that leads outside the dimension is always open and leads to where the entrance was last opened.

item.name: Shrimp Fried Rice
item.description: A plate of excellently fried rice cooked by the greatest Shrimp chef in his native universe. He did not graduate from culinary school for people to doubt his ability to cook rice.

item.name: Safeguard Ring
item.description: "Safety is paramount." This ring, when worn by a person, will protect them; if it detects considerable danger to the person, it will cover them in a Rare Rank Barrier and will teleport them to the safest location within a 25000-meter radius. This ring breaks after use. Restock Timer: 168 hours

item.name: Kitchen Gun
item.description: It's the kitchen gun! Just aim it at dirty appliances, countertops, and even furniture, and pull the trigger. The gun will shoot and clean the target. Who cares about how it works? It's a kitchen gun.

item.name: Loud Ring of Invisibility
item.description: A wooden ring that, when worn, renders the wearer invisible by bending light around them, but the ring will continuously scream and yell things such as "THEY ARE HERE!" and "LOOK OVER HERE!" in order to get the wearer noticed.

item.name: Clergy Robes
item.description: The white and black robes belonging to clergy, a sign of faith and devotion, when this garb is worn, it grants a minor resistance to darkness, curses, and negative energy. The fabric itself is also very tough.

item.name: One Day Blinding Stew
item.description: A good and reasonable punishment for those who misbehave. This is an unusually hot and spicy but still nutritious stew that renders whoever drinks it blind for 24 hours. Restock Timer: 12 Hours

trait.name: Nothing Wrong Here
trait.description: A weaker normality, people instinctively try to rationalize your actions and find things more accepting about you.

trait.name: Efficient Physique
trait.description: Your body is incredibly efficient, you are naturally able to digest and gain more energy from breathing, eating and sleeping. In addition, abilities consume slightly less energy to use.

trait.name: Hygienic
trait.description: You are almost always hygienic, no bad breath or germs for you.

trait.name: Digestive Expulsion Independence
trait.description: You never piss or shit. Don't ask where all the waste in your body goes.

trait.name: Blind Eye
trait.description: You just disappear in a crowd, as long as you shouldn't stand out you won't.

trait.name: Whats monogamy
trait.description: Your potential partners are very accepting of any delusions of harem or a woman loving you you might have. They tend not to question the logistics or logic of having multiple people as lovers.

trait.name: Antibody
trait.description: You are very resistant to most diseases.

trait.name: Longevity
trait.description: You will live for a long time, 100 times longer, on top of that, even if your lifespan were to be drained or destroyed you also regenerate your own lifespan.

trait.name: Devils advocate
trait.description: People try to justify your actions instinctually, even when you act in a way completely opposite to their moral compass, you must have had a reason. You always have the benefit of the doubt.

trait.name: Cardboard World
trait.description: You have complete and perfect control over your own strength and the power you exert, even with enough power to shatter a planet you can still easily punch with low enough force to not hurt a foam brick.

trait.name: Photosynthesis
trait.description: Who cares about food or breathing? Natural sunlight is all you need in this life. You regenerate energy faster under sunlight and when under the sun you also feel satiated and don't need to breathe as your body can function off sunlight alone. Water is still needed though.

trait.name: Enhanced Stamina
trait.description: You have inordinate amounts of stamina, always relative to your current status, so if you were a human with inordinate stamina and became a dragon you would be a dragon with inordinate stamina.

trait.name: Terrifying Presence
trait.description: You are terrifying, children cry near you and grown men piss their pants in front of you. When you want to, you appear less like a man and more like a sadistic force of nature.

trait.name: Battle Continuation
trait.description: You are an unstoppable machine. You can power through wounds, exhaustion, and injuries and still keep fighting. This does not dull the pain but the chances are, if the wound isn't lethal and you can still stand, you will be fine.

trait.name: Mountman
trait.description: You are a master rider, whatever vehicle you get on, you know how to ride as if you have been riding it for years.

trait.name: Magic resistance
trait.description: You are naturally resistant to magic and all magical effects, effects scale with your energy level.

trait.name: Energy Acceleration
trait.description: All of your abilities and spells are way faster because your energy moves way faster than it should.

trait.name: Headpat
trait.description: You were born with hands made for patting the heads of all that is cute. Targets feel much more pleasure from you petting their heads, giving a comforting and comfortable feeling when you do. This also helps dispel negative mental effects and build affection.

trait.name: Greater Headpat
trait.description: You were born with hands made for patting the heads of all that is cute. Targets feel much more pleasure from you petting their heads, giving a comforting and comfortable feeling when you do, maybe even arousal if they are kinky. This also helps dispel negative mental effects and build affection. Even the most frigid emo won't be able to fight the power of your palms.

trait.name: Efficient Cells
trait.description: Your cells are supernaturally efficient at converting sustenance into energy, you regain your energy significantly faster.

trait.name: Protection From Arrows
trait.description: You have a natural instinct to avoid projectiles, you always have a sense of where they are coming from and instinctually try to dodge them like a sixth sense.

trait.name: Blessing of Fae
trait.description: You are blessed by the fae, you have an increased energy capacity and all fairies start off with at least neutral to you, fae won't try to trick you and spirits like you.

trait.name: Golden Rule
trait.description: You can spot treasure from a mile away, and you can just sniff opportunities when they are near you. You gain a sixth sense of obtaining wealth and treasure.

trait.name: Heroes Reward
trait.description: Every Hero deserves, that whenever you save someone, they will feel very indebted to you and feel compelled to repay you.

trait.name: Reward Assurance
trait.description: Whenever you do something for someone, whether that be a big quest or a chore, you will get your due reward, as long as both parties have agreed, the opposite party will feel compelled to deliver on their promise.

trait.name: In Shining Armor
trait.description: Whenever you save a damsel in distress they are almost guaranteed to develop romantic feelings for you.

trait.name: Winners Rights
trait.description: Whenever you win a competition or a bet, you get to dictate the terms of your rewards, and the other party cannot refuse as long as your demand is directly proportional to the bet you won.

trait.name: Kakyoin's Gift
trait.description: Married women and milfs find themselves more attracted to you and consider you a potential romantic interest more easily.

trait.name: King of Disco
trait.description: You are the best dancer around, no one can beat you at the art of dance, this also has the effect of increasing your body control, finesse, balance, sense of rythmm and nimbleness.

trait.name: Mmmm Milk
trait.description: Drinking milk replenishes Energy.

trait.name: Animal Lover
trait.description: All mundane animals like you, and non-mundane ones like you more easily.

trait.name: Taming specialist
trait.description: You are skilled at the art of turning a wild animal into a domesticated one.

trait.name: Bitch Breaker
trait.description: (Nsfw)Sometimes all a bad attitude needs is a good fucking, you are an expert at correcting attitudes through sex correction.

trait.name: Sunshine Charm
trait.description: You exude a vibe of goodness and purity, good-aligned beings like you more. It is easier to convince that you are doing good.

trait.name: Bad Boy/girl Charm
trait.description: You have that raw bad boy/girl edge, you are an object of affection for emo's and edgy people. Rudeness may come across as cool more often.

trait.name: I know a guy
trait.description: Your car broke down? You know a guy. Your friend is sealed in a rune array? You know a guy. Once every 30 days you can retroactively rewrite reality to have known a person that can help you with your current situation. That person must be someone who already exists and is not a full tier above you in power. You do not choose who you know, just that you learn that you know of someone who could help you.

trait.name: Serene Grace
trait.description: You have an aura of refinement and grace around you, your presence is calming to those around you and your presence is very noticeable.

trait.name: Voice
trait.description: You have a very powerful and versatile voice, you can make it loud, quiet, smooth, rugged, feminine, masculine, etc. Boosts the power of voice-based abilities.

trait.name: Tough Skin
trait.description: You have abnormally tough skin, enhancing your durability beyond the norm.

trait.name: Fire Resistance
trait.description: You are naturally resistant to fire and fire-based effects and attacks, such as being set on fire, high temperature environments, or being hit by fireballs. This resistance scales with your basic stats.

trait.name: Water Resistance
trait.description: You are naturally resistant to water and water-based effects and attacks, such as being struck by water canons, being placed under depth pressure, your lungs being filled with water or getting water spat in your eye. This resistance scales with your basic stats.

trait.name: Air Resistance
trait.description: You are naturally resistant to air and weather-based effects and attacks such as vacuums, wind slashes, being caught in a tornado, and being lifted off your feet by wind. This resistance scales with your basic stats.

trait.name: Lightning Resistance
trait.description: You are naturally resistant to lightning and lightning-based effects and attacks such as being tasered, struck by lightning, or licking an outlet. This resistance scales with your basic stats.

trait.name: Earth Resistance
trait.description: You are naturally resistant to Earth and earth-based attacks and effects such as being stuck in quicksand, being buffeted by a sandstorm, or being struck by a meteor. No, metal does not count. This resistance scales with your basic stats.

trait.name: Ice Resistance
trait.description: You are naturally resistant to ice and ice-based attacks and effects such as being frozen, being in low-temperature environments, or eating a large icicle to the face. This resistance scales with your basic stats.

trait.name: Thermal Balance
trait.description: You are always thermally balanced to be at a comfortable temperature, as long as the temperature isn't hotter than 1000°C or colder than -100°C your body will always keep an optimal body temprature.

trait.name: Disney Princess
trait.description: All animals naturally adore you and are friendly toward you, in addition, all Animal or Animal aligned entities take a liking to you easier and it is easier to earn their affection and bond with them. In addition, you are naturally incredibly good at singing even without training.

trait.name: Sartorial Savant
trait.description: Your clothes are, for some reason, always clean and tidy, even your wardrobe, and small damages seem to even mend themselves.

trait.name: Quantum Disentanglement
trait.description: You are an anomaly, whenever you are bound or restrained you somehow find yourself untangled.

trait.name: Linguist
trait.description: You are able to understand all mundane languages and are very good at learning non-mundane ones too.

trait.name: Silent Steps
trait.description: You naturally walk silently and softly like an assassin or a cat.

trait.name: Counter curse Mantra
trait.description: Whenever someone tries to inflict a curse on you, depending on the power difference between you and the target it will either be nullified or reflected back at them.

trait.name: Chameleon
trait.description: When you stand still for long periods of time, you start blending into the surroundings, after 10 minutes, people don't even detect your breathing or be able to acknowledge you there. This effect is dispelled when you make any major movements like attacking or fleeing.

trait.name: Perfumer
trait.description: You smell nice, that's about it, you have no distinct, your smell like what the person that's smelling you likes.

trait.name: Magpies Eye
trait.description: You are very good at spotting treasure and valuables, treasures in sight are highlighted.

trait.name: Iron Palate
trait.description: You can eat and digest just about anything that isn't lethal poison to you.

trait.name: Prophecy
trait.description: You are able to see the future in your dreams, with or without your consent.

trait.name: Winner Takes All
trait.description: When you win against someone, you can force them to grant you a reward. The reward you extract must be proportional to the victory you have achieved. Minor victories equal minor rewards while winning a fight to the death would be a reward equal in value to their life. The reward must be something they are capable of granting you.

trait.name: Natural Scent
trait.description: Upgrade of Perfumer - You smell really good, even your sweat does, and your natural body odor is like perfume that most people like. You never have to worry about smelling bad ever again.

trait.name: Poisonous
trait.description: You are poisonous, meaning if anyone eats your flesh they are going to have a mildly bad time.

trait.name: Venomous
trait.description: You are venomous, and your bite contains paralyzing venom.  The power of the paralysis scales with your physical abilities.

trait.name: Iron Man
trait.description: You are unusually tolerant, you can sleep under horrible conditions, endure strain far better, and push through wounds and exhaustion more easily. Overall, you are very hardy and enduring.

trait.name: Shiver
trait.description: Disco Elysium - You feel the cold breeze raise the hairs on your neck. Tune into the world, listen to the whispers of the wind, and hear what the city has to say. You are supernaturally attuned to the world around you, sometimes the world around you speaks and you can hear its voice.

trait.name: Inland Empire
trait.description: Disco Elysium - You are unusually attuned to your supernatural instincts, to the point where you randomly hear supernatural insights and even get flashes of the future that you need to decipher. Honing this sense can allow you to get insights into the world around you that you otherwise wouldn't get. On the other hand, not having control over this trait can make a schizophrenic unable to distinguish reality from intuition.

trait.name: Half Light
trait.description: Disco Elysium - You are unnaturally attuned to your baser instincts, fight, flight and fuck to the point where you can almost hear your instincts speaking to your ear. Honing this sense can help you in combat, gauge the strength of others, know when to run, etc. but on the other side, if you cannot learn to control this side of yourself you can just as easily become a paranoid savage.

trait.name: Volition
trait.description: Disco Elysium - You are unnaturally connected to your own inner morale. The voice that pushes you to move forward, your determination and will to keep going. Honing this sense can allow you not to lose your will even against extreme adversity and pull off feats of tremendous willpower with ease. But losing control over your volition can also lead to overconfidence.

trait.name: Raphael Ambrosius Costeau
trait.description: Disco Elysium - Listen to your inner detective, your deductive reasoning and ability to read cues have increased, you are basically a detective already! Albeit with none of the training of a real detective.

trait.name: Blood Pack
trait.description: Your body holds inordinate amounts of blood, approximately 5 times the average person, this does not affect your body in any noticeable way... somehow.

trait.name: Steady
trait.description: Easy does it, you are incredibly steady, those small those small shakes your body makes are no more, and you do not lose your footing either, even if you are hopped up on adrenaline you could hold a gun like it was on a tripod.

trait.name: Emphaty
trait.description: Some say this is a basic human trait but you would be surprised how many people just don't have it. You are able to emphasize with and understand people's emotions much better to the degree of a savant.

trait.name: Receptive Body
trait.description: Your body is incredibly receptive and open to change without getting damaged and curbing negative side effects. Healing is more effective on you and you are less likely to suffer from negative effects from changes like super soldier serum or abilities that cause physical instability.

trait.name: White Mage
trait.description: Nobody fucks with the white mage. All of your recovery class abilities are more potent and cost less energy to use, and people are more grateful for you healing them because they better be.

trait.name: Endbringer Physiology
trait.description: Worm(Race Change) - You are an Endbringer in the form of whatever you were before, despite not looking any different, your physiology is completely overhauled. Your nonstandard biology grants you extreme physical stats and makes you completely immune to all Biological and mental abilities. In addition, your body is made up of hundreds of layers that get exponentially more durable the closer they get to your core through the warping of spacetime. As long as your core, the most durable part of your body is intact, you will eventually regenerate. While your outermost layers are not that much more durable. To get to your core, someone must destroy at least a planet-sized mass, even at the minimum durability you have. This also makes you resistant to all Spacetime abilities and effects used on you against your will. Durability and stats scale with base stats. You still retain all the functions your body had before.

trait.name: Healthy
trait.description: You are very healthy for your body, granting you slightly increased vitality and virility. In addition, any previous natural health complications you had before getting this trait are fixed.

trait.name: Cardio
trait.description: You have great cardio, granting you slightly increased stamina and exhaustion recovery speeds. You've got a good set of lungs and heart on you.

trait.name: Nimble
trait.description: You are pretty nimble, granting you slightly faster reflexes and speed.

trait.name: Durable
trait.description: You are fairly tough, granting you a slight increase to your defense and letting you take more punishment.

trait.name: Strong
trait.description: You were always pretty strong, granting you slightly increased strength, allowing you to exert more force with your body.

trait.name: Reservoir
trait.description: Your energy reserves and recovery speed are greater than what most would consider average.

trait.name: Breathless
trait.description: Your body doesn't need to breathe, your body still acts like you are breathing and receives all of the benefits from it even if you don't breathe or are in an airless environment. You can also speak without air.

trait.name: Red Tear
trait.description: Whenever you are near death your energy output and strength are increased considerably. This effect fades when you are no longer in danger or are healed.

trait.name: Blue Tear
trait.description: Whenever you are near death your energy output, defense, and resistance are increased considerably. This effect fades when you are no longer in danger or are healed.

trait.name: Magician
trait.description: You are a natural-born Magician, making you naturally talented in the mystical arts, allowing you to learn, understand, and develop magic far faster and you have a unique intuition when it comes to matters of magic.

trait.name: Pugilist
trait.description: You are natural in martial arts, how to move your body efficiently and powerfully comes as second nature to you. You learn and develop martial arts far faster and have a unique intuition when it comes to combat.

trait.name: Esper
trait.description: You are a naturally born Esper, abilities are second nature to you. You understand, develop, and master abilities far faster and you possess a unique intuition when it comes to your abilities. Ability cooldowns are halved.

trait.name: Poseidons Kiss
trait.description: You are blessed by the god of the seas Poseidon, you move underwater as naturally as you would above water, in addition, all mundane aquatic life is friendly to you.

trait.name: Tinker
trait.description: (Tech)You are a natural at building technology. All tinker abilities are more potent, in addition, it's far easier to innovate new tech and build tech. You can also push your specializations far more. (A/N: If you pulled this perk without having a tinker ability, reroll the ticket) 4/28288.

trait.name: Hacker
trait.description: (Tech)You have an increased intuition towards interfacing with technology and getting around technological and code based defenses as well infiltrating networks and abusing the faults of technology.

trait.name: Empath
trait.description: You really are an empath. You can easily tell what people are feeling, understand emotions better, and how to control your own far better.

trait.name: Grand Mage
trait.description: Your talent in magic cannot be surpassed, you are one in 3000 years talent, learning, understanding, and developing magic is as natural to you as breathing, what would take the average mage a hundred years to learn, you can learn in one.

trait.name: Master Pugilist
trait.description: Your talent in martial arts is inhuman. Learning and developing martial arts is as natural to you as breathing, you can pick up martial arts and understand them just with simple glances, your talent in combat is unrivaled. What would take 100 years to master would take barely a year for you.

trait.name: Esgod
trait.description: You are an esper beyond all espers, the potency in your blood is monstrous. Using your abilities comes as naturally to you as breathing, you develop and master abilities with much greater and abilities cost much less energy to cast. You can even train out the hardcoded effects of abilities such as cooldowns and limits.

trait.name: Tinker Supreme
trait.description: (Tech)You are the supreme Tinker, capable of building constructs of scientific and mechanical wonder that would leave all other scientists foaming at the mouth. You don't even need specializations anymore, you are able to innovate and come up with tinker mechanisms on your own with your merits, the tinker specializations are boosts to your natural prowess now but you cannot utilize Tinker abilities not from your native world.

trait.name: Gambler
trait.description: Lets go gambling! Ah dangit. Every time you would roll the ticket, you roll a D20 first, depending on the roll you get, {20}= Ticket Rank Up, {19 - 17}= Advantage, {16 - 13}= Change Ticket Type, {12 - 8}= Nothing happens, {7 - 2}= Ticket rank down, {1}= Ticket is destroyed. This trait can be rerolled or toggled.

trait.name: Lady Killer
trait.description: You are a natural lady killer, women always find you at least a little attractive regardless of their preferences, and a decent chunk of women would consider you handsome.

trait.name: Charming Smile
trait.description: Your smile is really charming, helping people feel more at ease and comfortable with you. Or more attractive to your preffered partners.

trait.name: Minty Breath
trait.description: No more bad breath, your breath always smells fresh and minty regardless of what you ate beforehand.

trait.name: Loveable Pervert
trait.description: When others are perverts they get beat up and/or charged. When you are a pervert it's charming or at most exasperating. As long as you don't cross the line people don't mind you being a perv.

trait.name: Iron Fist
trait.description: Your fists are like iron, enhancing the power behind your unarmed strikes and fist-type abilities.

trait.name: High Specs
trait.description: You are incredibly intelligent, you learn, process, and utilize knowledge far far faster than anyone of your caliber should be able to. You can outpace most computers.

trait.name: Child Friendly
trait.description: Let's keep it PG, allows you to activate a filter that makes you more presentable to a younger audience, placing a censor on your privates, getting rid of gore on your body, etc.

trait.name: Fast Reflexes
trait.description: Your reflexes are beyond the norm, even as a base human you can weave around the average man's punches with ease and you can even aim dodge guns with training. Scales with your stats.

trait.name: Reactive Precognition
trait.description: You've got a bad feeling about this. Sometimes, you will receive short precognition before stumbling into danger, like receiving a vision of stepping on a trap just before you enter a room or being shot by an assassin when walking through the street. This won't always trigger but is more likely to trigger the higher the danger to your life.

trait.name: Mysterious Stranger
trait.description: A guardian angel with a revolver and a fedora, always just slightly out of reach. Sometimes, in moments the stranger will come and offer you his brief assistance, maybe he shoots your enemy in the ankle to cripple them or disables a trap you need him to. (Once the functionality of a skilled man with a gun becomes useless for the MC, the mysterious stranger will drop by one last time and give them a gold rarity trait ticket as a refund before the trait disappears.)

trait.name: Iron skeleton
trait.description: Your skeleton is exceptionally durable, your bones are considerably harder to break and absorb shock way better, making you way more durable.

trait.name: Tough Claws
trait.description: Your claws are exceptionally sharp and durable, more than they should be, all claw-based attacks and abilities are stronger, and you can turn your nails into simple claws whenever.

trait.name: Iron Nerves
trait.description: Your nerves are made of iron, you don't flinch or get startled, and this does not affect your reflexes.

trait.name: Smell the Magic
trait.description: You can smell magic and mysticism. You can decipher the scents of people to learn more about them from their magic. A necromancer might have the stench of death and decay on them. Ice magicians may smell like crisp winter air. Etc.

trait.name: One Size Fits All
trait.description: (Nsfw)Your partners no longer feel any discomfort with your physical features, this extends to your phallus somehow fitting inside of them even if it reaches ludicrous sizes.

trait.name: Salt Detection
trait.description: You can tell where salt is, only salt is ready for human consumption.

trait.name: Commander
trait.description: You are a commander, you are better at exerting your authority and receiving obedience from your subordinates. In addition, you are better at organizing, managing, and commanding personnel as well as managing their morale.

trait.name: Healing... Fluids
trait.description: Your sweat, saliva, and cum heal, yes, it is very awkward but the effects cannot be denied. The effect scales with your physical stats. It is not incredibly potent but it is healing, someone can lick the sweat off your abs to heal themselves.

trait.name: Blessed Child
trait.description: Gods really favor you, it's easier to garner favor and affection from divine beings. Blessing-type abilities are slightly stronger.

trait.name: Undeniable
trait.description: Your senses cannot be hindered, you can't be blinded even when sand is thrown at your eyes, and you won't become deaf even if someone sonic blasts your ear. The only way to hinder your senses is by physically ripping out the organ.

trait.name: Aware
trait.description: You have an enhanced sense of awareness, far beyond the average. You can easily tell when there is something wrong with your body, it is hard to catch you by surprise and you can more easily tell what is going on around you.

trait.name: Avian Ally
trait.description: You have great affinity with birds, avians, and creatures that are aligned with them. Making it easier to earn their affection and favor, and form relationships with them. In addition, all flight feels more natural to use, and flight effects require less energy to maintain.

trait.name: Thick Skin
trait.description: Your skin is way denser and tougher than the average person's, and it is very smooth and nice to touch. This toughness scales with your physical stats, being able to serve as natural armor at higher levels.

trait.name: Strong Legs
trait.description: Your legs are stronger and tougher than average, slightly enhancing your speed and increasing the power behind your kicks substantially.

trait.name: Pyromaniac
trait.description: Burn baby burn, you are a natural pyromantic, fire abilities cost less energy, and your natural fire and heat resistance are increased. You recover energy faster the hotter you are but slower the colder you are.

trait.name: Cryonist
trait.description: You are a natural with cold, your ice-based abilities cost less energy, and your natural ice and cold resistance are increased. You recover energy faster the colder you are but slower the hotter you are.

trait.name: Nature's Child
trait.description: Nature subtly favors you, you tend to find fresh and healthy fruit when you go out for walks, you can grow a garden with minimal care, and animals and beings that are aligned with nature are more favorable toward you. In addition, you recover energy faster the closer you are to nature.

trait.name: Mind Palace
trait.description: Your mind is a palace you have absolute control over, you are immune to all mind abilities below Mythical level, and you can freely control your own mind, possess enhanced thought speed and perfect memory. In addition you learn things much faster than the average person and can freely change your own mental scape.

trait.name: Polymath
trait.description: You are a polymath, a once-in-a-generation talent in all areas. You improve in all areas of expertise with speed that vastly outstrips the average person.

trait.name: Talented
trait.description: You are a talent in every field of experience. You pick up any skill considerably faster than the average person and improve faster too.

trait.name: Persuasive
trait.description: You are very persuasive, it is easier to make people see things from your perspective and get them to agree with you.

trait.name: Manager
trait.description: You are really good at organizing and managing things, distributing tasks, and prioritizing.

trait.name: Thinker
trait.description: I think, therefore I am. All of your thinker abilities are more potent and cost less to use, in addition, thinker headaches are mitigated.

trait.name: Dramatic Tumbleweed
trait.description: During tense and dramatic moments like a standoff, a stray tumbleweed will pass by you and your opponent in a dramatic manner. The tumbleweed fades out of existence the moment it stops being observed.

trait.name: Herbalist
trait.description: You have a vast knowledge base related to plants, you can easily understand the function and origin of a plant just by looking at it. You can also make basic medicines.

trait.name: Feline Friend
trait.description: You have great affinity with cats, tigers, felines, and creatures that are aligned with them. Making it easier to earn their affection and favor, and form relationships with them. Thanks to your affinity with felines, you are unusually flexible and possess a heightened sense of balance and slightly improved reflexes.

trait.name: Sexual Calibration
trait.description: (Nsfw)All of the minor inconveniences sex once had are now gone, forget about STDs, hygiene precautions, or unwanted pregnancies because you can adjust how all of those interact with you. In addition, you are very talented in the tantric arts.

trait.name: Golden Shot
trait.description: Your little swimmers are the strongest in the world, any woman you cum inside of WILL get pregnant, even if they are more barren than the arid desserts your semen does not care. (If you didn't have the right equipment before, you will now if you choose to. If not, reroll this this trait.)

trait.name: Ygdar Orus Li Ox
trait.description: "You only live once" At the moment of your death, you are resuscitated and revived with all of your lethal wounds healed and some of your energy restored, once Ygdar Orus Li Ox is triggered this trait is deleted from your status.

trait.name: Hero Candidate
trait.description: You are a Hero in training, whether you are fit to take on the title of a real hero is to be seen, all Holy and Light abilities are slightly enhanced and the strength and duration of blessings are extended.

trait.name: Demon Scion
trait.description: You are a Demon Lord to be, whether you are fit to take the title is to be seen, all Darkness and Unholy abilities are slightly enhanced but at the same time you are more vulnerable to holy and light abilities.

trait.name: Goth Magnet
trait.description: Goths and emos are drawn to you for some reason, making it easier for you to garner affection and favor from goths or those with daddy issues. In addition, people turn a blind eye to your less-than-favorable actions more easily, just like how those fathers turned a blind eye to their daughters.

trait.name: Background NPC
trait.description: You fade into the background really easily, unless you do something to draw attention to yourself people overlook you very often and it becomes very hard to notice you. Does not work on people who are looking for you or are aware that you specifically are there. Stranger class abilities are slightly more potent.

trait.name: Untraceable
trait.description: You are very hard to track, cameras mysteriously stop recording when you step into the frame, your footprints get covered by the natural elements, and normal people just cannot remember which way you went when someone asks them. Very good for a serial killer or a paranoid.

trait.name: Golden Goose
trait.description: People want you on their side and they will dote on you to make sure you don't defect from their side, if you are in an organization your higher-ups like you way easier and they will try to accommodate you. If the king or queen meets you they will probably also take a liking to you.

trait.name: Ex Nihilo
trait.description: All abilities that create constructs or new matter now cost significantly less energy to produce and maintain.

trait.name: Peerless
trait.description: You are peerless in bed, you can quickly adapt to your partners' preferences and learn their weak spots in bed, you improve at the tantric arts much faster also, none will leave your bed unsatisfied.

trait.name: Helltaker
trait.description: "You wake up, dreaming of a harem of demon girls" Infernally aligned/Demonic beings find themselves more attracted to you and it is easier to earn their affection.

trait.name: Heaventaker
trait.description: "You wake up, dreaming of a harem of... angel girls? That doesn't sound right-" Holy aligned/Angelic beings find themselves more attracted to you and it is easier to earn their affection.

trait.name: Denied from Oblivion
trait.description: The gates of hell are closed for the likes of you, and heaven kicked down the ladder so you are just stuck here. You remain in the mortal world as a soul after your death.

trait.name: Curse Devouring Physique
trait.description: Your physique is unique, it devours curses like a hungry animal. If you get cursed your body starts fighting against it and slowly eating the curse, the strength of the physique scales with your maximum energy. Completely devouring a curse increases your maximum energy slightly, devouring more of the same curse has diminished returns. You also recover energy faster in places with more negativity.

trait.name: Mysticism
trait.description: Your energy reserves and recovery speeds are beyond the norm. Allowing you to use abilities and spells for longer.

trait.name: Hyper Reflexive
trait.description: Your entire nervous system is overhauled, and your reflexes are so fast they almost seem like precognition.

trait.name: Surging Magic Power
trait.description: Your connection to the mystical is far more potent, any magic you use is far stronger than it normally would be and you can overload spells without breaking them.

trait.name: Nine Lives
trait.description: Curiosity killed the cat, but it had 8 lives. You have nine lives, every time you die, one of these lives is exhausted and you are returned to full health.

trait.name: Scholar
trait.description: You are an expert at reading, learning, and retaining information, you could read 50 books in a day and still be able to retain all of the information from the individual books.

trait.name: Winterman
trait.description: You were born in the harsh winter winds, you are more resistant to cold and ice-based abilities, and your ice-based abilities cost less energy to use.

trait.name: Constant
trait.description: You are a constant, your body cannot be changed by outside influences without your consent(as in stuff like soul manipulation or biomancy, not regular attacks), in addition, you are immune to paradoxes and only one of you exists as you cannot be cloned or be replicated either.

trait.name: Master Rider
trait.description: You are a master at riding any mount, when you get on top of a mount your senses are linked and you can communicate your intentions to your mount instantly.

trait.name: Dragon Rider
trait.description: You are the one destined to ride dragons, all dragons view you more favorably and it is far easier to earn their affection.

trait.name: My Master
trait.description: You are an excellent master, any servant under you or serving you is more favorable toward you and it is easier to earn their affection. This also applies to submissive people.

trait.name: Corrupting
trait.description: Your presence is very corrupting, the longer you influence people the more they are willing to betray their morals for you and ignore the morality of your actions.

trait.name: Pacifism
trait.description: With pacifism, you are able to turn off your killing potential, even if you hit a medieval serf with a final flash, he will still be alive albeit barely.

trait.name: Gym Nut
trait.description: You are a gym nut, want those powerful muscles? Better get to grinding. Your body recovers from exercise far quicker and far better, and your physical training efficiency is increased considerably. You could achieve peak human fitness in a few months of decent training.

trait.name: Fireborn
trait.description: You were born in the flames, molded by them, You are completely immune to all fire-based attacks, and the higher your body temperature, the faster you recover energy and health up to 500%.

trait.name: High Capacity
trait.description: You have an extra ability slot.

trait.name: Immutable
trait.description: Your body refuses to change. You are incredibly resistant to abilities that would try to change, anyone trying to change you without your consent has to wrestle control over you first. Abilities like rot or wither inducement, sickness inducement, biokinesis, etc. are automatically resisted.

trait.name: Ice Monarch
trait.description: You are the Ice Monarch, the ruler of all that is ice. You are massively resistant to all elemental effects, for every element that comes in contact with you freezes. All ice and frost-related abilities below Mythical Tier are increased by rank and cost less energy to use. All ice and frost-aligned beings instinctively recognize you as the monarch. You are immune to ice and cold-based abilities.

trait.name: Fire Monarch
trait.description: You are the fire Monarch, the ruler of all that is Fire and Plasma. Your energy is massively enhanced, as your soul is an eternal reactor. All Fire and Plasma-related abilities below Mythical Tier are increased by one rank and cost less energy to use. All fire and heat-aligned beings instinctively recognize you as the monarch. You are immune to  Fire and Plasma-based abilities.

trait.name: Earth Monarch
trait.description: You are the Earth Monarch, the ruler of all that is Earth. Your durability is massively enhanced, you are as immovable as the earth. All Earth and Metal-related abilities below Mythical Tier are increased by one rank and cost less energy to use. All earth-aligned beings instinctively recognize you as the monarch. You are immune to earth and metal-based abilities.

trait.name: Sea Monarch
trait.description: You are the Sea Monarch, the ruler of all that is Water and the depths. Your vitality is massively increased as the sea is the mother of all life. All water-related abilities below Mythical Tier are increased by one rank and cost less energy to use. All water and sea-aligned beings instinctively recognize you as the monarch. You are immune to water and ice-based abilities.

trait.name: Sky Monarch
trait.description: You are the Sky Monarch, the ruler of all that is Sky. Your agility is massively enhanced, as you are as free as the wind. All wind and lightning-related abilities below Mythical Tier are increased by one rank and cost less energy to use. All sky-aligned beings instinctively recognize you as the monarch. You are immune to wind and lightning-based abilities.

trait.name: Hero
trait.description: You are a Hero, a child blessed by light and holy. All Light and Holy-based abilities are strengthened alongside your physical abilities. Beings aligned with the Divine/Clergy are more favorable toward you and are more likely to view you with reverence and affection, and to reward you for your merits and service for them. In addition, all blessings are stronger and last longer on you.

trait.name: Free Bird
trait.description: You are a perfect flyer, flight comes as naturally to you as walking or breathing, all flight abilities are more precise, and potent and cost considerably less energy to maintain.

trait.name: Relentless Stamina
trait.description: Your stamina is ridiculous, even as a regular human you could run a marathon and not be winded, you also recover from exhaustion really fast and it takes a lot to get you exhausted.

trait.name: Cat's Feet
trait.description: You almost always land on your feet when falling, in addition, you are immune to all fall damage, even falling down from space to earth will not hurt your legs.

trait.name: Cuddle King
trait.description: You are the king of cuddling, whoever you are cuddling or having a skinship with will feel comfortable, and you are the best cuddling partner. Good for building relationships.

trait.name: Eagle Eyes
trait.description: Your sense of sight and visual acuity are far beyond the norm, you can see a lot farther and a lot more clearly than the average person.

trait.name: Bloodhound
trait.description: Your sense of smell is far beyond the norm, comparable to canines, in addition, you can differentiate smells with great accuracy.

trait.name: Sharp Hearing
trait.description: Your sense of hearing is far beyond the norm. You can distinguish many quieter sounds, you are able to differentiate between sounds much easier, and automatically adjust your hearing depending on the sound of the noise.

trait.name: Soft Hugger
trait.description: Sometimes all you really need is a hug. Your hugs feel really nice and comforting, they also help dispel negative emotional states. Your hugs are literally therapeutic. Go figure.

trait.name: Boundless Stamina
trait.description: Your stamina is boundless, even a regular person with this trait would be able to run a marathon with ease and only need a minute's rest afterward. Your stamina recovers incredibly and exhaustion fades from your body much faster.

trait.name: Lucky Sukebe
trait.description: (Nsfw)You are a lucky fellow alright, just in ways you wouldn't expect. You often stumble into lucky perverted or lewd situations. The chaos of all infinity and eternity is distilled into an ability to affect the composition of all of reality itself and it makes you more likely to find a girl changing. Amazing.

trait.name: Spirit Affinity
trait.description: You are talented in the art of everything spirits, spiritual creatures, and objects take a liking to your and soul-based abilities are easier to master

trait.name: Immortal Soul
trait.description: Your soul is immortal, it can be wounded and shattered but never annihilated as long as you possess energy.

trait.name: Last Stand
trait.description: When your health is down 10% or when you are on the brink of death your physical stats increase by a stage.

trait.name: Lord Death of Murder Mountain
trait.description: Murder and maiming are just instinct, you were born with blood in your hands and you will spill many more.

trait.name: Enhanced Strength
trait.description: Enhances the user's existing strength, increasing the physical force they can exert proportional to their own strength.

trait.name: Enhanced Agility
trait.description: Enhances the user's existing agility, augmenting their speed and reflexes.

trait.name: Enhanced Vitality
trait.description: Enhances the user's existing vitality, allowing them to recover from wounds and afflictions quicker and making them more healthy overall.

trait.name: Enhanced Endurance
trait.description: Enhances the user's existing endurance, allowing them to function for longer before getting tired and enduring more punishment.

trait.name: Dexterous
trait.description: You are unusually dexterous, granting you impeccable hand-to-eye coordination, motor skills, and control over your body.

trait.name: Vengeful
trait.description: When fighting against any target you have lost to before, all abilities and traits you possess are increased by a stage which is a + by the way so Uncommon would become Uncommon+.

trait.name: Masochism
trait.description: "Hurt me more" Whenever you are hurt or damaged you recover energy proportional to the damage you receive.

trait.name: Demon Lord
trait.description: You are a Demon Lord, all Darkness and Unholy magic and abilities are strengthened and so are your physical stats, this effect is increased if your race is demonic or infernal., you greatly resist all darkness and unholy attributes. Demonic/Infernal beings are more servile to you and it is easier to assert your authority over them and receive their obedience. All Demonic/Infernal beings under your service or command you can command and manage better, in addition, they get minor buffs from being under you.

trait.name: Item Warranty
trait.description: Your gacha items now have warranty, if an equipment you own is broken to a level where it cannot be used effectively, within 24 hours that item and all parts of that item will be replaced with a replica in perfect condition as long as the item has not been traded away or given away. Only applies to items that were broken during intended use, warranty does not apply in cases of sacrifice, smelting, destruction during modification etc. and does not apply to consumable items.

trait.name: Hero Time
trait.description: Can only be activated once a week, if you are fighting to protect someone all enhancement abilities receive a full rank boost.

trait.name: In Time of Need
trait.description: -A Hero arises. Once every 120 hours you can restore your stamina and energy to full. Hours afterwards you will be extremely exhausted.

trait.name: Seamster
trait.description: You are naturally very talented at sewing, you can spot flaws in clothing and easily make your own or fix others

trait.name: Wrath Made Manifest
trait.description: You are wrath given form, all of your physical start increasing the angrier you get, caps out at Epic Rank

trait.name: Pride King
trait.description: Your very existence is oppression, in your presence, any creature below Epic rank will have all their energy lowered by one rank, and anyone more than two ranks below you cannot breathe without your permission

trait.name: Gluttonous Abyss
trait.description: You can extract the energy out of any object you eat to permanently increase your own energy reserves

trait.name: Free Flier
trait.description: You are a master of flight, flying is as natural to you as walking or breathing, as long as you are capable of flight that is. Flight using abilities costs less energy.

trait.name: Stable
trait.description: You will never lose your balance from anything short of your legs getting sheared off.

trait.name: Zenkai Boost
trait.description: Every time you return from near death all of your stats are increased permanently.

trait.name: Black Heart
trait.description: Solo Levelling - You have a second metaphysical heart that massively increases your mana capacity and regeneration while also boosting all necromancy abilities significantly.

trait.name: Energy Heart
trait.description: Your heart is replaced with a more metaphysical alternative that pumps raw energy through your veins instead, massively increasing your maximum energy reserves and adding your natural regeneration speeds to your energy regeneration speed alongside your regular energy recovery.

trait.name: Mana Substitution
trait.description: Whoever said you needed paltry things such as blood, food, water, or air to breathe were liars. You can substitute any of those things with your own mana but don't depend on it for too long, or else you may instantly die when you run out of mana.

trait.name: Iron Mind
trait.description: Your mind is made of iron and your body will obey. Even if you are exhausted and starving the effect it has on your performance is minimal. Regardless of your suffering, your performance will be optimal. Does not extend to physical limitations or wounds. Also increases resistance against all Negative Mental Ailments.

trait.name: Bloodless
trait.description: Bloodloss who? You don't bleed like they do, even if your body is drained of most of its blood, as long as there is a cupful left you won't feel its effect. If you are a vampire with this trait, you won't suffer the need for blood.

trait.name: Bloodbank
trait.description: You just keep bleeding and bleeding, your body can hold 10x the amount of blood and regenerate blood 10x faster, don't ask how your body can store that much blood without changing mass or size.

trait.name: Eternal Bleed
trait.description: Your body holds a virtually limitless amount of blood and you regenerate blood 100 times faster, you can feed a whole clan of vampires for the rest of their lives or be the ultimate bank for a Hemokinetic.

trait.name: Living Nightmare
trait.description: You can recover your energy by converting the fear people hold towards you into energy, if enough people fear you you might even gain permanent stat increases.

trait.name: Lord of Fear
trait.description: You are the ruler of fear, if your opponent fears you their energy starts getting drained to yours, and you can physically interact with fear and absorb it into your own energy.

trait.name: Necromancer
trait.description: Specialization - You are a natural-born necromancer, dealing with death and souls is just your lane of business. Any death or soul-related ability is easier to master and costs less energy.

trait.name: Plaugemaster
trait.description: Specialization - You are a natural-born contagion, spreading disease, poison, and decay is second nature to you. Any poison or disease-related ability is easier to master and costs less energy to use.

trait.name: Shaper
trait.description: Specialization - You are a natural-born shaper, shaping the body is second nature to you, all biological or body alteration abilities are easier to master and cost less energy.

trait.name: Non Binding Clause
trait.description: That contract you just signed? The one with the soul bindings or magical enforcement? Yeah, unfortunately for them it's non-binding for you. At any time you choose to, you can destroy any contract or clause bound to you that you have agreed to. The fae will cry.

trait.name: Lil' Hercules
trait.description: You are unusually strong, even as a regular human without powers you could rip a man in two with your bare hands and are durable enough to take your own punches. This strength scales with your current physical abilities, you are always stronger than you should be.

trait.name: Peak Specimen
trait.description: You are genetically the peak of your race, all those impurities or genetic defects your race could have had don't affect you, it's almost like you were selectively bred to be the peak specimen of your species.

trait.name: Ancestry
trait.description: You have some... unique ancestry, your parentage and lineage have changed from mundane or regular to you being the secret child of a great figure, which figure? Who knows, maybe they were a great swordsman or a legendary magician. Once you unlock your lineage ability or talent this trait gets replaced with it.

trait.name: Chutzpah
trait.description: You don't give a shit, panic and apprehension can get you when they have earned you. If you choose to, you can shrug off that panic and fear and show your audacity in the face of even god itself.

trait.name: Sisyphean
trait.description: "A lifetime defined by futile struggle." Your mind is inhumanely durable, even if you get bored, even if you get tortured, even if you have to push a boulder up a mountain for hundreds of years, your mind may bend, but it will never break. You are rendered MASSIVELY resistant to any external mental interference.

trait.name: Magic Well
trait.description: You have an abnormally large pool of energy you can access, allowing you to use abilities and spells for far longer.

trait.name: Big Battery
trait.description: Your energy reserves are noticeably above average, not so much that you would be touted as a genius above all but enough to be very noticeable.

trait.name: Dragon Core
trait.description: Instead of ordinary energy reserves, your energy core is that of o dragon. If the average mage has a generator, you have a power plant in your heart.

trait.name: Energy Abyss
trait.description: Your energy storage is infinite, and your regeneration and output are unaffected but you will never hit a limit with how much energy you can hold inside of you, even if the most you can conjure is a measly fireball. You can hold the energy equivalent of a billion supernovas inside of you.

trait.name: Lord of Magic
trait.description: Your talent in magic is one in a trillion, magic just makes sense to you, you can learn even the most complex of spells in the hundredth of the time it would take the average "genius". You can come up with spells on the fly, your talent is practically unrivaled.

trait.name: Warlord
trait.description: Your talent in weaponry and warfare is one in a trillion, you can pick up and master basically any martial arts and weaponry in a hundredth of the time it would take the average "genius". You are basically Garou.

trait.name: Demigod
trait.description: You are the child of a god, which one? Who knows, could be anyone, chances are, even if they don't know about your existence, maybe you will get a doting mother when they find out or get Kronos'd. After you discover your lineage and awaken your ability this trait will be replaced by it

trait.name: Untired
trait.description: "I can do this all day." You never get tired, even if your energy is at its last dregs or you have been running for days you won't get tired, your body may feel all of the negative effects from overworking your body but you don't feel tired or exhausted.

trait.name: Infinite Stamina
trait.description: "I can do this forever" You must be some kind of monster, that's the only explanation. You could walk forever and not get out of breath, and you can be sure that no matter what you will never run out of stamina, you may strain your body but in terms of bodily energy, you have infinite, does not affect mana/energy.

trait.name: Recoilless
trait.description: Ability drawbacks are severely reduced and Newton's 3rd law cowers before you. You can draw upon more power than your body should be able to and you will barely feel it.

trait.name: Your Majesty
trait.description: You have the blood of royalty inside of you, you have more charisma than the average person and it is easier to assert yourself as a figure of authority in people's minds. If you are responsible for someone, they will view you with more respect and authority.

trait.name: Rivalry
trait.description: Swordsmen, Martial Artists and competitive people seem to be drawn to you; they want to test themselves against you and grow fond of you more easily, especially if you manage to defeat them. Martial skills grow  faster when engaging in combat.

trait.name: Demon God
trait.description: You are the reincarnation of a Demon God, all Darkness and unholy abilities and magic are increased by a tier if they are below mythical level and cost less energy to use, all demonic and infernal beings recognize you as an absolute authority if they are weaker than you and even ones stronger than you recognize you for what you are. Your basic physical stats are massively increased and in addition, you can convert your energy directly into a darkness attribute like a Mana Burst.

trait.name: Wanted
trait.description: People want you on their side or organization and they don't want you to leave, you are likely to be treated way better in any organization you sign up with and the rules would be way less strict on you, you are needed on their side after all.

trait.name: Quest Marker
trait.description: "Another settlement needs our help, I'll mark it on the map for you", whenever you get a quest or someone requests something you can summon an arrow that points you toward your objective.

trait.name: Pretty Privilidge
trait.description: You aren't physically more attractive of course, but others just find your face and figure more appealing to their tastes. If you were a 5/10 in their eyes before you are now a solid 7/10.

trait.name: Lese Majeste
trait.description: Your chutzpah and boldness are perceived as more charming rather than irreverent or disrespectful by people in positions of power, in addition, people in power like nobles, bosses, royalty, etc. find themselves more attracted to you.

trait.name: Lovers
trait.description: You are better at understanding others and expressing your own feelings through speech or words, making yourself understood better. For all intents and purposes, this is essentially talent in communication.

trait.name: Charming Eyes
trait.description: Not to be confused with the mystical eyes of charming, instead of hypnotizing people your eyes are just really pretty.

trait.name: Precise
trait.description: You are very precise and controlled when using your abilities or spells, your control over your own moves and body is beyond the norm.

trait.name: Exact
trait.description: You are incredibly precise with your control over both your abilities and spells to the point that other people would struggle to match them.

trait.name: Chronolog
trait.description: You have a perfect internal clock, you can when was the last time you did something. You can recall things by the milliseconds and you are perfect in timing things like a stopwatch too.

trait.name: Post Mortem
trait.description: The reaper's car got stuck in traffic so he is going to be a little late. When you die, you can still move and use your abilities for up to 1 hour before the traffic jam clears and the reaper takes your soul.

trait.name: Infinite Money Glitch
trait.description: Something is very wrong but you don't have to worry about that. You can always pull out enough money you need to pay for something from... somewhere. Just reach into your pocket and you will something like a gold coin, perfect legal tender that doesn't cause inflation, whatever, you will somehow find enough money whenever you need it.

trait.name: Magic Circuits
trait.description: Fate/Tsukihime - Possess natural Magic Circuits in your body that act as natural magic computers in your body that help you regenerate energy and help you in actualising magic and abilities, as well as numerous other capabilities. The amount of Magic Circuits in your body and their quality are dependent on your energy reserves and energy traits. If you already have Magic Circuits, their quality and quantity are doubled.

trait.name: Nature's Embrace
trait.description: Well, you can officially call Mother Nature mommy so that's nice. Nature itself favors you, trees bend down branches to offer you fresh and healthy fruits, animals and nature-aligned beings favor you and are more affectionate towards you, you know how to maneuver around a forest, and wild animals will help you. You also recover energy faster the closer you are to nature.

trait.name: Nature's Chosen
trait.description: Mother nature has chosen you as her favored one, you receive her protection in forests and nature, wild animals are all friendly toward you and understand your words, the trees part to show you the way, and bounties offer fresh fruit and vegetables, animals and nature aligned beings favor you and are more affectionate towards you, some may even recognize her touch on you. You also recover energy faster the closer you are to nature.

trait.name: Hamon
trait.description: JoJo- You possess a unique physique and affinity, allowing you to instinctively use and master the Hamon breathing technique to utilise the force of Life Magnetism and harness the power of sunlight through your breathing. Practising Hamon for extended periods of time can grant a superhuman physique, vitality, longevity and a bunch of other effects. You can also grant others Hamon Breathing by punching their diaphragms.

trait.name: Gaia's Child
trait.description: You are the child Gaia herself, now mother nature is your actual mom. Anyone trying to attack you in a forest is asking for death as mother nature will actively defend you, branches of trees will move like snakes with spear tips harder than metal, treats will rise and roots will shield you, nature itself treats you like her child. Animals and nature-aligned beings favor you and are more affectionate towards you, some may even recognize her touch on you.

trait.name: Heavy Weapons Guy
trait.description: "I am heavy weapons guy". The heavier the object you wield, the stronger you get in proportion to it, and you do not suffer penalties for wielding weapons heavier than you should be able to comfortably swing around.

trait.name: Superconductor
