trait.description: Your body is a funnel and connection for lightning. All Lightning-based abilities are more potent, cost less energy to use, and are easier to master. In addition, you can ground lightning and electricity, absorbing a portion of their energy as you do so.

trait.name: Earthbound Ancient
trait.description: You are one with the primordial earth, all earth-based abilities are far more potent, cost less energy to use, and are easier to master. In addition, you recover energy faster when in standing on ground and even faster the more underground you are.

trait.name: Grounded
trait.description: You embody the immovable earth, all earth-based abilities are more potent, cost less energy to use, and are easier to master. In addition, you recover energy faster when underground.

trait.name: Skyward
trait.description: You belong to the skies, all wind-based abilities are more potent, cost less energy to use, and are easier to master. In addition, you recover energy faster when in the sky.

trait.name: Electric Sheep
trait.description: (Tech)Do robots dream? Well, even if they don't, they certainly think of you. All tinker abilities are easier to use and innovate with, in addition, you can interface with any existing machine and network with greater ease. (A/N: Reroll if you don't have a tinker ability)

trait.name: Flexible
trait.description: You are inordinately flexible, even more so than an expert contortionist.

trait.name: Demon King
trait.description: You are the destined Demon King, all Darkness and Unholy-related abilities and magic are greatly enhanced alongside your physical abilities. this effect is increased if your race is demonic or infernal., you greatly resist all darkness and unholy attributes.Demonic/Infernal beings are more servile to you and it is easier to assert your authority over them and receive their obedience, weaker ones are compelled to serve you. Whenever a creature submits to your rule or to you personally you get slightly stronger depending on their level of power.

trait.name: True Hero
trait.description: You are the True Hero blessed by the divines themselves. All Light and Holy-based abilities are greatly enhanced alongside your physical abilities. Beings aligned with the Divine/Clergy are more favorable toward you and are more likely to view you with reverence and affection, and to reward you for your merits and service to them. In addition, all blessings are stronger and last longer on you. Whenever you are combating a creature in order to save someone you gain a temporary enhancement to all of your stats depending on your willpower and the stakes.

trait.name: Chosen Champion
trait.description: You are the chosen Hero of Humanity. All Light and Holy-based abilities are increased by a rank if they are below Mythical rank and your base physical abilities are massively enhanced. Beings aligned with the Divine/Clergy are more favorable toward you view you with reverence and affection, and reward you for your merits and service to them. All blessings are permanent for you. Whenever you are fighting a creature in order to save someone you gain a temporary enhancement to all of your stats depending on your willpower and the stakes.

trait.name: Alluring Whisper
trait.description: (Nsfw)You have a smooth, buttery and attractive voice that belongs to a top-tier singer, in addition, your voice can impress even the most picky hardasses and used to sound more convincing. Enhances your voice-based abilities.

trait.name: Charisma
trait.description: You have a sort of charismatic presence around you, an aura that just pulls people in and makes you seem like more in their eyes.

trait.name: Sensual Prescence
trait.description: (Nsfw)You are a sensual kind of presence around you, it's not exactly too noticeable but people find themselves more attracted to and aroused by you. The longer they are exposed to your presence the higher the effects, but only works on people friendly to you.

trait.name: Harem Lord
trait.description: You are an aspiring harem enthusiast. Potential partners and society as a whole mind you having a harem a lot less, it still won't be easy building your harem of beauties but it will be a lot less of a hassle.

trait.name: Harem King
trait.description: You are a harem king to be, your preffered partners are more attracted to you and society as a whole does not see a problem with you having a harem. In addition, your partners do not mind you dating others either, they might still have their own problems but the concept of a harem isn't one of them.

trait.name: Camaraderie
trait.description: You build affection, trust and respect with your teammates or allies much faster, especially if you fight alongside them, what better way to build affection after all than overcoming the threat of a violent demise? In addition, you are much better at working together with others.

trait.name: Trustable Face
trait.description: You naturally seem like a dependable and trustworthy guy to people you encounter, making it easier to gain their trust and respect. Does not work on people with a negative opinion of you.

trait.name: Large Pockets
trait.description: Your pockets are deceptively large, any pocket you own that you slip your hand into is 10x large on the inside, this applies to backpacks and such but does not affect the object itself.

trait.name: Conflict Drive
trait.description: "I love a good challenge" Conflict and challenges are attracted to you like a magnet, your life will be challenged and worthy opponents will pop up. But at the same time, conflict means rewards.

trait.name: Challenge DLC
trait.description: Did someone say challenge? A challenge board is added to your gacha, depending on your location, current state and power level you have the option to grab one of 3 challenges from the board as limited-time quests, you can only take one challenge every 48 hours and the board resets every 48 hours. If you fail a challenge the next time you can take a challenge is instead 168 hours later.

trait.name: Relationship Tracker DLC
trait.description: Adds a relationship tracker to the gacha page, showing you your current relationship with people you are interested in and what they think of you, this also logs their interests, likes and dislikes.

trait.name: The Real Weapon
trait.description: There is only one weapon you truly own. And they are they are your very fists. Your physical stats get augmented proportionally to the strongest weapon you own. But the increase in physical stats is negated the moment you wield a weapon of any kind.

trait.name: One with the Blade
trait.description: You are one with your weapon, whatever item you wield gets your physical stats added to its own stats. As long as you are holding it, that copper coin in your hands is tougher than diamond, a regular bronze sword could split the heavens as long as you are strong enough yourself.

trait.name: Caveman
trait.description: Unga Bunga. You are a caveman at heart, giving you enhanced physical strength and endurance. In addition, you are skilled at wielding blunt instruments and toughing it out in the wild.

trait.name: Void Childe
trait.description: You are a child of the void, giving you enhanced spatial awareness, you can sense a portal opening a kilometre away and all Space-based abilities are more potent and you master them faster.

trait.name: Father Time
trait.description: Who knew Time Itself picked favourites? You are immune to all time-based abilities, time travel and paradoxes, even stopping time in the same world as you is completely impossible even for the mightiest gods. In addition, the strain and energy cost of all Time-related abilities and magic is massively reduced and you can ignore the paradox and time resistance of all targets weaker than god level.

trait.name: Shub's Favor
trait.description: Rest assured knowing the biggest milf of all is rooting for you. Thanks to her blessing your vitality and virility are considerably increased. And those with maternal instincts find themselves more attracted to you. You are also assured to be a great father regardless.

trait.name: Yog's Blessing
trait.description: Rest assured knowing that the best girl is rooting for you. Thanks to Yog's blessing you are granted safe passage, all drawbacks from Space-related abilities are mitigated. In addition, they also cost less energy and have far higher range. You also have incredible resistance against Space attribute attacks.

trait.name: Carnal Engine
trait.description: (Nsfw)You are an eternal engine when it comes to carnal activity, while performing sexual actions your stamina recovery, endurance, and resilience are massively boosted, you can go on for literal days without rest.

trait.name: Four Leaf Clover
trait.description: You are pretty lucky, not to the point where it's blatantly supernatural but the scales of fate are skewed towards you.(Does not affect Gacha)

trait.name: Rabbits Foot
trait.description: You are naturally very lucky, being on the good books of lady fate pays off. You can rob a casino blind and in general, things without a high impact on fate go in your favor.(Does not affect Gacha)

trait.name: 21 Leaf Clover
trait.description: You are naturally incredibly lucky. Not enough that someone would consider it a superpower but expect to be called a lucky bastard. It's almost impossible to lose games of chance unless you want to, if it's up to chance, it will land in your favour.(Does not affect Gacha)

trait.name: Fortune's Lover
trait.description: You are absurdly lucky, to the point where even if you did not have any other abilities this alone could be considered an ability. If it's a chance, it's in your favour. Fate is curved in your direction, but not all luck is good. (Does not affect Gacha)

trait.name: Hellsing
trait.description: You are the true hunter of all inhumane, Ghouls, Ghosts, Cryptids, and Demons. When facing anything that fits this category all of your reflexes and skills are enhanced and you enter a special state of focus. In addition, you gain enhanced intuition against any opponent or topic in this category.

trait.name: Marksman
trait.description: You are a natural marksman, giving your exceptional aim and accuracy with most projectiles, especially with stuff like bows and ranged weaponry.

trait.name: Rebellion
trait.description: Whenever you get inflicted with a debuff or a binding your physical stats and magical resistance increase. The more penalties you incur the stronger Rebellion is.

trait.name: Child of Artemis
trait.description: You are a child blessed by Artemis, the goddess of the hunt. Your proficiency and talent with all ranged weapons are greatly increased. In addition, your tracking and wayfinding abilities are enhanced to a supernatural level, allowing you to easily track prey across a country and not get lost in even the deepest of woods.

trait.name: Master of Arms
trait.description: You are a Master of Arms, being able to wield any weapon you lay on your hand as if you have been wielding it for 10 years, in addition, you are able to bypass any requirements a weapon might have to wield it such as being an angel or a chosen hero. In addition, all sentient or conscious weapons adore you and weapons would love to be wielded by you.

trait.name: Qualified
trait.description: Who says you aren't qualified? It says right here! You can wield any item or pass through any door with qualifications. Excalibur wants a worthy wielder? Too bad, you are qualified to wield it whether it likes it or not. Unarmed combat does not count, you have to be holding said weapon, mastery vanishes upon letting go of the weapon you are wielding.

trait.name: Innocuous
trait.description: Look at that face! How can you stay angry at that? People are far more forgiving to you, and they cannot stay angry at you too long. It even works in court.

trait.name: Sharing Is Caring
trait.description: People are naturally much more generous when it comes to you, you can always expect to be paid handsomely when getting compensation, and people rarely keep secrets from you.

trait.name: Lucifer's Child
trait.description: The child of evil shall rebel against the heavens. All of your stats are significantly increased when facing an enemy that is aligned with Holy or Light. But at the same time, you cannot receive blessings or healing from Holy or Light.

trait.name: Nothing Strange
trait.description: There is nothing strange about you. People try to normalize your weirdness or oddities, like why you keep skipping out on class, how you speak weirdly or how it's weird to kiss your relatives in the mouth. Just the normal stuff.

trait.name: Common sense
trait.description: Common sense works differently when it comes to you, people try to rationalize and accept your more unusual or alerting actions. People automatically try to normalize matters related to you but the effect is lessened the more drastic and inexcusable your actions are.

trait.name: Lethal Charm
trait.description: "This could get problematic" The more evil a person is the easier it is for you to gain their favor and affection.

trait.name: Titan Crusher
trait.description: Your body is... unnatural, nobody should hold that much power. Even as a basic human, you can demolish the entire world military with ease, your body is unnaturally strong, however strong you should be you are at least a hundred times stronger than that.

trait.name: Motivational Speaker
trait.description: "Dattebayo!" You are an excellent motivational speaker, whatever corny stuff you speak will actually strike at their heart cords instead of sounding cringy to them. It is far easier to get through to someone even if they are stubborn..

trait.name: Blessing of Isis
trait.description: You are a child blessed by Isis, the goddess of Magic. You learn magic and comprehend magic with ease, in addition, you are able to learn any magic regardless of your affinity or race restriction.

trait.name: Blessing of Durga
trait.description: You are a child blessed by Durga, the goddess of righteous fury. You are immune to corruptive effects and negative effects and mental statuses during combat. In addition, the more evil an enemy is the more advantage you have against them.

trait.name: Blessing of Amaterasu
trait.description: You are a child blessed by Amaterasu, the Goddess of the Sun. You are incredibly resistant against curses and darkness-based attacks while your light-based abilities are much stronger.

trait.name: Blessing of Izanami
trait.description: You are a child blessed by Izanami, the Goddess of the Underworld and Death. You are incredibly resistant to all curses and necrotic effects. In addition your affinity to all Spirit and Death attribute abilities, spells and items are increased. The dead favour you more.

trait.name: Blessing of Hestia
trait.description: You are a child blessed by Hestia, the goddess of Hearth. You have resistance to all mental effects and negative ailments. Your body is way healthier and people feel more comfortable around you due to the natural aura you have around you.

trait.name: Blessing of Bast
trait.description: You are blessed by the goddess Bast, the goddess of Cats and Grace. You have improved cat-like reflexes and agility as well as night vision. In addition, you are beloved by felines.

trait.name: Fertility Calibration
trait.description: You can freely adjust your own fertility, being able to freely go from absolutely inert to being so fertile you can impregnate even someone completely infertile at will. Or depending on your parts, make yourself sterile or rival the Goat of a Thousand Young.

trait.name: Draw of Fate
trait.description: Your fate is strong, things are not moderate for you, destiny curves in your direction like a main protagonist. You have plenty of luck, bad and good.

trait.name: Dealmaker
trait.description: "A Deal's a Deal." Whenever people make a deal with you, they feel compelled to fulfil their end of the deal that they agreed on, so long as the deal was explicit in its conditions(No clever wording or Fae deals). In addition, it's far easier to goad people into making outrageous bets.

trait.name: Hentai Logic
trait.description: (Nsfw)Apparently this world runs on Hentai Logic, objects revolving around you are far more perverted and people's logic is slightly skewed.

trait.name: Ecchi Logic
trait.description: (Nsfw)Apparently this world runs on Ecchi Logic, objects revolving around you are far more perverted and people's logic is slightly skewed.

trait.name: Honesty
trait.description: You have an aura around yourself that seems to garner honesty from people. People are worse at lying around you and feel worse and more remorseful about trying to deceive you.

trait.name: Truthspeaker
trait.description: Whenever you say the truth people will believe your words, although you can change the wording of what you say, you must still believe it to be true yourself.

trait.name: Loyalty
trait.description: People are naturally more loyal towards you, being more willing to put themselves on the line for you and be less inclined to betray you.

trait.name: Vault
trait.description: Information-gathering abilities and technologies start working improperly when it comes to you.

trait.name: Library Mind
trait.description: Your mind is like a library, organized and efficient. Your memory, mental clarity and speed are slightly faster.

trait.name: Embrace
trait.description: Your embrace is soft as a mother's love, your embrace feels, calming, comforting and even therapeutic. Even an evil man might break down crying if you capture them with your loving arms.

trait.name: Transhuman
trait.description: You are a transhuman... or whatever race you are, genetic and mechanical augments work very well with you. You suffer no penalty for changing your race or installing cybernetic implants. Change your body however you'd like, it was meant to be changed anyway.

trait.name: All Trades
trait.description: Didn't even have the dignity to put "Ace of" there. You have a Basic level of mastery over all mundane skills, you know how to cook well enough to not burn eggs, know enough about mechanics to change a lightbulb, know enough how to dance to not tangle your feet, know how to hold a sword to not cut yourself. You are also mildly talented in all fields.

trait.name: Paper Trail
trait.description: For some reason you are always carrying the relevant paper or information with you. And so do your familiars apparently. Just reach into your pocket and you can find whatever legal identification you need.

trait.name: No Strangers
trait.description: (Nsfw)To Love, apparently they are a stranger to it. People don't seem to mind open displays of affection as long as you aren't too overt.

trait.name: No Peeking
trait.description: Information Gathering doesn't work against you, scrying spells fall apart, precognition fails, and cameras stop recording.

trait.name: Battery Saver
trait.description: Whenever you have an ability slot you aren't using, the other abilities cost less energy. If you have 3 slots and only use one, the ability in the first slot is 3x cheaper.

trait.name: Rule 63
trait.description: "Where Banana?" Reality across all of existence has been twisted, warped, retconned and remade to make some men women. Or women men.

trait.name: Monster Mater
trait.description: (Nsfw)"I really shouldn't have sex with that, buuut-" The more monstrous a member of the opposite sex is, the more they are attracted to you. Only works on things you yourself would be attracted to.

trait.name: Musk
trait.description: (Nsfw)Your smell is really good, a bit arousing even.

trait.name: No Enemies
trait.description: "You really don't" Everyone you meet has a good impression of you, even evil dictators, violent murderers or mindless beasts have a decent liking of you as soon as they get to know about you. Only works on named characters.

trait.name: My Friend Now
trait.description: Everyone you meet starts off friendly to you as long as they don't have a preconceived opinion of you. You can walk up to Thanos and open a can of beer with him. Even death seems to like the cut of your gib.

trait.name: Uchiha
trait.description: Naruto - You are a member of the Uchiha Clan, granting you increased martial talent, energy reserves, fire affinity and a natural sharingan that does not take up an ability slot.(Does not give Chakra)

trait.name: Uzumaki
trait.description: Naruto - You are a member of the Uzumaki clan, granting you increased life force and endurance. In addition, you can heal yourself and others by imbuing your blood with your energy and life force. And with training, you can unlock the ability to create sealing adamantine chains capable of suppressing and sealing energy.(Does not give Chakra)

trait.name: Hyuga
trait.description: Naruto - You are a member of the Hyuga clan, granting you increased dexterity, energy reserves and fine control over your body and energy. In addition, you possess a natural Byakugan that does not take up an ability slot. You also may or may not have dormant alien-good genes.(Does not give Chakra)

trait.name: Senju
trait.description: Naruto - You are a direct descendant of Hashirama Senju, granting you greatly increased lifeforce and energy reserves as well as martial prowess. In addition, you possess a natural Wood Release and have increased Natura Affinity.(Does not give Chakra)

trait.name: Hanma
trait.description: Baki - You are a Hanma, you are incredibly genetically gifted, possessing increased resistance to poisons and your physical stats grow way faster. In addition, you have so much testosterone in you, any other men may as well be a girl in comparison. Your talent in martial arts is also greatly increased. If you are female the same effects apply without the testosterone, you are just a genetically gifted freak.

trait.name: Lesser Undead
trait.description: Race - You are a lesser undead, once you get this trait you have to choose between being a zombie or a skeleton. As an undead, you have no stamina and instead consume energy for everything and get unique bonuses and demerits depending on the undead you end up as. Once a race trait is toggled it is permanent until contested.

trait.name: Greater Undead
trait.description: Race - You are a greater Undead, once you activate this trait you transform into a Death Knight or Lich depending on your stats. As an undead, you don't have stamina and consume energy in its stead for everything and get unique bonuses and demerits depending on the undead you end up as.

trait.name: Fishman
trait.description: Race(One Piece) - You are a fishman of a random hybrid, as a Fishman you are naturally stronger than humans with your enhanced physical stats. You can also breathe underwater and possess great water affinity. In addition, you can communicate with seabound creatures and learn Fishman Karate.

trait.name: Lunarian
trait.description: Race(One Piece) - You are a Lunarian, a being of a legendary race. As a Lunarian you have massively increased physical stats, wings and even natural fire manipulation, as long as the fire on your back is lit your durability is massively increased.

trait.name: Nightkin
trait.description: Race(Fate) - A special kind of vampire developed from the blood of a dead apostle. As a Nightkin, you possess superhuman physical and magical abilities and have rewinding regeneration as long as you have blood. You can get stronger and eventually evolve to the next stage of undeath by consuming enough blood.

trait.name: Nightmare
trait.description: Race(Tsukihime) - You are a special kind of vampire known as a Nightmare born from the blood of a Dead Apostle. As a Nightmare, you possess superhuman physical and magical abilities and have rewinding regeneration as long as you have blood. In addition, as a high-rank vampire, you can turn people into ghouls and have your own unique Elite rank ability you can use without an ability slot. You can get stronger and eventually evolve to the next stage of undeath by consuming enough blood.

trait.name: Dead Apostle
trait.description: Race(Tsukihime) - You are a fully realized Dead Apostle, a blight upon the kands and possessing your own ability unique to yourself befitting your rank, granting you an epic ranked ability that does not take up an ability slot. In addition, you have vastly superior physical stats and have time rewinding regenerative immortality as long as you have blood in your body. You can turn humans and animals into your thralls as lower-ranking apostles. The more blood you consume the stronger you get and recover energy.

trait.name: Dead Apostle Ancestor
trait.description: Race(Tsukihime) - You are a true Dead Apostle Ancestor, a crimson stain from the moon to the earth. As a Dead Apostle Ancestor you have immense physical and magical powers, your body naturally rewinds its own time whenever you are injured to restore your health as long as you have blood. You have your own Idea Blood, a Legendary Ability that suits you which you can freely use without an ability slot. Your blood can turn those who ingest it into fully fledged powerful vampires instantly. Any vampire and undead will acknowledge your existence as the ultimate vampire class.

trait.name: Beastkin
trait.description: Race - You are a beastkin of a random animal such as a bear, rabbit cat, wolf etc. granting you enhanced physical stats, night vision as well as unique traits and biological features depending on what you are a hybrid of.

trait.name: Ghoul
trait.description: Race(Tokyo Ghoul) - You are a ghoul, a flesh-eating superhuman with a powerful and flexible unique organ named a Kagune of your choosing. As a ghoul, you also possess formidable regeneration. But as a downside, you cannot digest anything other than human flesh and if you don't you dine for longer than two weeks you will slowly enter a feral state.

trait.name: One-Eyed Ghoul
trait.description: Race(Tokyo Ghoul) - You are a One-Eyed Ghould, which despite how it sounds is more powerful than the average ghoul. As a One-Eyed Ghoul you have superhuman stats and a flexible super organ called a kagune of your choosing. You get stronger by consuming human flesh but unlike a normal ghoul, you don't need to and can simply eat human food.

trait.name: Vampire
trait.description: Race(JoJo) - You are a vampire born of the Stone Mask created by the pillar man Kars. As a vampire you have amped physical stats, the ability to create ghould and vampires as well as manipulate your flesh. But you are deathly vulnerable to sunlight.

trait.name: Pillar Men
trait.description: Race(JoJo) - You are a pillar man whose potential was unlocked by the stone mask. Granting you self bio kinesis, flesh absorption, thrall creation and massively increased physical stats in exchange for being vulnerable to sunlight.

trait.name: Perfect Lifeform
trait.description: Race(JoJo) - You are a perfect lifeform, as a pillar man who had their true potential unlocked by the stone mask used with the super Aja you have enhanced physical and magical stats. In addition as the perfect lifeform, you can freely manipulate your own biology and the shape of your own body.

trait.name: Viltrumite
trait.description: Race(Invincible) - You are a viltrumite, one of the fiercest warrior races of the galaxy. As a vitrumite, you possess an incredibly powerful body and the ability to freely fly. You are almost invulnerable to most things but are vulnerable to a specific sound frequency.

trait.name: Kryptonian
trait.description: Race(DC) - You are a Kryptonian, enough said. Your physical and energy reserves increase the more sunlight you take, in addition, you have heat vision, ice breath, high-speed flight, no need to breathe, tactile telekinesis, X-ray vision, and probably more. Under the yellow sun you are basically a living god.

trait.name: Saiyan
trait.description: Race(Dragon Ball) - You are a Saiyan warrior, having a great natural physique and a monkey tail as a weakness. When exposed to a full moon you turn into a rampaging giant monkey with massively increased stats. Don't expect to be too strong too soon, even Goku needed decades of training from the greatest martial artists.

trait.name: Child of Man
trait.description: Warhammer 40 - You are the child of the God Emperor of Mankind himself, sharing most of his attributes like his gifted physique, charisma, martial prowess, scientific gift and the talent to be possibly the strongest Psyker. You are capable of mastering all Psyker Disciplines(Not related to Chaos) and reaching levels where you may eventually be able to tear apart a planet with your Psyker power alone, as long as you train enough. Your psyker power is not connected to the Warp but emulates its power

trait.name: Majin
trait.description: Race(Dragon Ball) - You are a Majin, a descendant of Majin Buu, possessing a malleable gum-like physique with massively enhanced physical and magical stats. As a Majin you can survive and regenerate if even a handful of your body is left, in addition, you are able to absorb people and objects to strengthen yourself. Alas, you are no Majin Buu, starting off with only greatly superhuman physical abilities and increased energy levels.

trait.name: Rodrigues
trait.description: You are a Brazillian, but not only that, you are a descendant of the legendary Jetstream Sam. Not only do you have the Brazillian ability to double jump but you are also talented in swordsmanship and swordsmithing.

trait.name: Tepes
trait.description: You are a descendant of the legendary Tepes bloodline, the original vampires, or something like that. As a Tepes all Vampirism, Unholy and Hemokinetic abilities are more potent and all undead and vampires are more respectful towards you.

trait.name: Mithril Skeleton
trait.description: Your skeleton is unusually durable, being able to take a lot of punishment before it suffers damage. In addition, it is flexible and conducts energy better. Note that your skeleton isn't real mithril and scales with your physical stats.

trait.name: Adamantium Skeleton
trait.description: "Suck it Wolverine" Your skeleton is incredibly durable and dense, to the point where it seems nigh unbreakable. And unlike a certain angry small man, it doesn't poison you. Note that your skeleton isn't real adamantium and scales with your physical stats.

trait.name: Vibranium Skeleton
trait.description: Your skeleton resembles Vibranium more than regular bone. Being nigh unbreakable and not only that, they are able to absorb and store kinetic energy that you can spend to enhance your physical strength temporarily.  Note that your skeleton isn't real Vibranium and scales with your physical stats.

trait.name: Adamantium Bonding
trait.description: Marvel - Your Skeleton is bonded with Adamantium, making it borderline unbreakable but also severely poisons you. Unless you have countermeasures lined up you should wait before you activate this trait.

trait.name: Sensor
trait.description: You have always had a knack for sensing and locating energy/mana/chakra etc. Your ability to sense and locate energy as well as your Thinker abilities are enhanced.

trait.name: Man vs World
trait.description: It's you against the world. The more you are outnumbered in a fight, the stronger you get. For an enemy to count they must be willing to inflict grievous harm on you. The upper limit is 1 vs 1000, this effect is cut in half for every ally you have against the outnumbering enemies.

trait.name: Duelist
trait.description: It's time to duel! When in a one vs one fight your stats are increased. This trait is dispelled when any other combatant intervenes in the fight. But people are less likely interrupt any duels you get into.

trait.name: Multitasking
trait.description: You are very good at multitasking, being able to divide your attention into multiple sources without a decrease in efficiency. Your efficiency may decline with too many tasks at once.

trait.name: Scavenger
trait.description: Whenever you go scavenging, whether it is for treasure, lost parts, artefacts, etc. You have a better chance of finding something useful.

trait.name: Meet Cute
trait.description: As you go about your daily life, you are much more likely to encounter romantic interests in favourable positions.

trait.name: Blood Mana
trait.description: You've got no energy? Well, you've got something else, don't you? You can treat your own vitality as a secondary mana bar at a 1 to 1 rate of exchange. Expended vitality cannot be cured by healing but only through rest.

trait.name: Angel
trait.description: Race Change - You are an Angel, a being created with holy power, as an angel you have slightly increased physical stats and the ability to fly using your wings naturally. In addition, your Holy and Light-based abilities are more potent along with the ability to use Holy Light(Rare Rank Ability), in exchange all Darkness and Unholy abilities are weakened. You are also vulnerable to unholy attributes.

trait.name: Principality
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Principality, a higher tier angel with two pairs of wings, a being created with holy power, as an angel you have increased physical stats and energy reserves as well as the ability to fly using your wings. In addition, your Holy and Light-based abilities are more potent Holy Light(Rare Rank Ability), in exchange all Darkness and Unholy abilities are weakened. You are also vulnerable to unholy attributes.

trait.name: Dominion
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Dominion, a high-tier angel with three pairs of wings. As a Dominion, you possess increased magical and physical abilities. All Holy and Light attributes are considerably boosted and cost less mana to use. You also possess the ability to convert your own energy to greater holy light(Elite Rank Ability) and instinctively learn Holy and Light Magic. In exchange, all Darkness and Unholy attributes are greatly weakened.

trait.name: Throne
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Throne, one of the highest-ranking angels with four pairs of wings. As a Throne, you possess great physical and magical abilities. All Holy and Light attributes are greatly boosted and cost less mana to use. You are capable of instinctively developing Holy and Light Magic. You also possess the ability to convert your own energy to searing holy light or pure holy energy. In exchange, all Darkness and Unholy attributes are greatly weakened and will hurt you upon use.

trait.name: Seraphim
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Seraphim, the strongest kind of Angel there is, as a being of pure holy power you have 5 pairs of wings. As a Seraphim you have incredible magical and physical power. All Holy and Light abilities and magic you have are boosted by a tier as long as they are legendary rank or below, you are also instinctively capable of using and developing Holy and Light Magic. You can convert your own Mana into a Holy Mana Burst. But in Exchange, you are completely incapable of using all Darkness and Unholy abilities and magic.

trait.name: Student
trait.description: You are a studious student. You learn things faster and easier when taught personally by someone who has a higher skill level than you in the subject in question.

trait.name: Disciple
trait.description: You are a great disciple. You learn things faster and easier when taught personally by someone who has a higher skill level than you in the subject in question. In addition, it is easier to earn the favour of your teachers.

trait.name: Prodigious Pupil
trait.description: You are THE Pupil. You learn things much faster and far more easily when taught personally by someone who has a higher skill level than you in the subject in question. In addition, it is easier to earn the favour of your teachers.

trait.name: The Taker
trait.description: "You wake up with a dream, a harem full of... what the fuck?" You are the Taker, all beings that are either Infernal, Holy or Divine who you are attracted to find themselves more attracted to you and it is easier to earn their affection.

trait.name: Monstergirl Enthusiast
trait.description: (Nsfw)You seem to fancy some interests that most don't. Hybrid Girls or those of the opposite gender with monster or beast traits take more of a liking to you and it is easier to build relationships with them. And some monsters you encounter seem oddly humanoid and... compatible.

trait.name: Reapers Presence
trait.description: Upgrade to Terrifying Presence - The reaper is here and they know it. Your presence is that of nightmares, you can make a grown man shit himself without saying a word. If you want to, every gesture of yours seems like a death threat. Acting like the scariest thing they have seen comes naturally to you.

trait.name: Magic Is Not Real
trait.description: You heard it, it's not real, all just nerds pretending with smoke and mirrors. All magic is completely nullified against you, a god of magic could drop the big bang on you but as long as it was magic you wouldn't get scratched, because magic is not real, obviously. But as magic is not real you also cannot use it to any extent as long as this trait is active.

trait.name: Summoner
trait.description: You are a summoner, summoning and commanding creatures, familiars, spirits and summons come naturally to you. All Familiars get enhanced stats and consume less energy. The potency of all projection-type abilities and spells is increased, it is easier to build affection and loyalty with summons and contracted entities.

trait.name: Brand of Tzeentch
trait.description: Warhammer 40k - You wear the brand of Tzeentch, the Changer of Ways. Greatly speeding up your comprehension and learning abilities. Allowing you to improve in skill and magic far faster. In addition, you are capable of spells that you otherwise wouldn't be able to learn due to restrictions like racial differences. Note: Brands do not connect you to the  Chaos Gods or Warp.

trait.name: Brand of Slaanesh
trait.description: Warhammer 40k - You wear the brand of Slaanesh, the Lord of Pleasure. Greatly increasing your understanding of others, you can vaguely feel the emotions of others, in addition, your presence is naturally more charismatic and alluring to others. Note: Brands do not connect you to the  Chaos Gods or Warp.

trait.name: Brand of Khorne
trait.description: Warhammer 40k - You wear the brand of Khorne, the Blood God. Greatly increasing your propensity for combat, your instincts are greatly heightened in the midst of combat, you have greater intuition into using any weapon or skill in combat, making you a natural killing machine. You can track blood and are able to sense killing intent like it is second nature. Note: Brands do not connect you to the  Chaos Gods or Warp.

trait.name: Brand of Nurgle
trait.description: Warhammer 40k - You wear the brand of Nurgle, the Plague Father. Making you immune to all poisons, toxins, and diseases below Legendary rank and greatly increases your resistance to those above Legendary rank. The brand also heightens your understanding of poisons, toxins, and diseases, increasing the potency of abilities and spells relating to it as well as increasing your ability to cure them. Note: Brands do not connect you to the  Chaos Gods or Warp.

trait.name: Spiral
trait.description: Tengen Toppa Gurenn Lagann - If there is a will there is a way.

trait.name: Monster of God
trait.description: Hellsing | Race Change - You are a monster of god, a being pierced through the heart by Helena's Nail and transformed by it. As a monster of god, you possess monstrous physical stats and are imbued with holy energy so potent even your touch can set a true vampire ablaze. You are able to conjure holy thorned vines from your body and control them freely as if they were limbs and they will protect you on instinct, any unholy touched by vines will be set ablaze by holy fire. You are also completely immortal as long as your heart remains intact as your holy vines will rebuild your body. This does not consume energy or use an ability slot.

trait.name: Magical Girl Transformation
trait.description: All transformations have that overly dramatic Magical Girl Transformation flair to them.

trait.name: Hard to Kill
trait.description: Someone really oughta put you down. You are ordinarily hard to kill, your existence constantly tries to preserve itself, whether that is swapping ability slots and instantly using heal on you when you get shot in the head by an ambush, or whether it is rearranging your insides in any way it can to preserve your life. The closer to death you are the more effective and cost-efficient your abilities are and even at the moment of your death this trait can still use your abilities and items for up to 10 minutes in order to revive or preserve you.

trait.name: Deathless
trait.description: You lack the concept of death. To say you are immortal is wrong, it is more that the concept does not apply to you in the first place, no afterlife can take you nor can you be put down forever by immortal killing weapons. Even if every quark in your body were to be annihilated you would eventually reform.

trait.name: True User
trait.description: You can use any item, ability, or spell without suffering from their drawbacks and instantly meet all qualifications. Whether that be using the Excalibur, Rhongomyniad, Hijacking the Gate of Babylon or using an item with a 99.999% chance to kill you.

trait.name: All Devouring Physique
trait.description: There is something primordial inside you and it devours. Any infiltrator or transgressor in your mind, soul, body or any form of your existence will get devoured. Even a god trying to possess you would get shredded to the ether, even telepathic connections will be torn apart and turned to pure energy to nourish you. May the nuclear chaos have mercy on anything trying to touch your soul.

trait.name: Renown
trait.description: You are quite well known, aren't you? The news of your exploits and accomplishments travel fast. And the effect on your reputation is slightly increased. If you saved a village even the king may learn about it and decide to reward you. Your reputation is always well known if possible.

trait.name: Buerocrats Eye
trait.description: You have the eye of a bureaucrat, allowing you to easily understand all legal jargon and loopholes in contracts as well as being able to quickly brief documents. This will definitely save you some time in any world with an established government.(If not, the ticket this trait came from can be rerolled)

trait.name: Legal Exemption
trait.description: "It has been officially exempted? How? Do not ask." You do not pay taxes or rent as those are waived by the government or the people who want you to pay them. The officials or authority figures may even look over minor crimes or mischiefs and pardon you.

trait.name: Hoarder
trait.description: You are the type to not use your limited items even against the final boss, aren't you? The restock timer and cooldown of all items are halved.

trait.name: Avaricious Greed
trait.description: More more more, you just can't get enough. Restock timers and the cooldown of all Items are reduced by 100x.

trait.name: Blood Demon
trait.description: Demon Slayer - You are a demon transformed by the blood of Muzan. Granting you a superhuman physique and biological immortality, in exchange for being lethally harmed by sunlight and the light attribute. You also develop your own demon blood art that is equal to an uncommon rank ability. Lastly, you need to consume humans to sustain yourself otherwise you will starve to death.

trait.name: Progenitor Demon
trait.description: Demon Slayer - You are a progenitor sharing all of the powers of Muzan Kibitsuji. Allowing you to freely shapeshift and have extremely powerful regeneration as well as the ability to turn others into demons with your own blood in addition to your superhuman physical abilities. But sunlight is extremely lethal to you.

trait.name: Regenerator
trait.description: Your body is unusually receptive to all forms of healing. Your natural regeneration when not affected by anything is increased by 5x and all healing effects you receive are 2x more effective on you.

trait.name: Wardrobe
trait.description: Ever want the advantage of your equipment but don't want to wear it? Perhaps you want the powers and safety of the dread armour without looking like a dark lord? With Wardrobe active any items you put on will be sent to your wardrobe while you still retain their bonuses. But you can't wear two magical items that go on the same part of the body and only wear mundane items while active.

trait.name: Nothing
trait.description: Literally just nothing, it's simply impressive that you got this unlucky.

trait.name: No Weakness
trait.description: You will show no weakness. Any resistance of yours that is in the negatives is automatically set to zero. 8x weak to fire? It's neutral now. Even a shadow demon would be unharmed by light.

trait.name: Beast
trait.description: Fate - You are a beast of Humanity. A being formed from the evil of Humanity and a being that loves humanity. As Beast of Humanity, you possess nigh unlimited magical power and mystery as well as your own Logos or Law that represents your power as well as your own Nega ability, an authority on the level of a Divine ability that does not require a slot to use. You also possess Independent Manifestation and any other powers a beast might otherwise have.

trait.name: Metabolism
trait.description: You have an unnaturally high metabolism, or not. You are able to control your metabolism, allowing you to slow it down to a near stop or speed it up to unnaturally fast levels.

trait.name: Hunger
trait.description: You recover energy and health slightly faster by eating food; the more nutritious the food you eat, the better the recovery.

trait.name: Voracity
trait.description: You are a voraciously hungry one. You digest anything you eat with extreme efficiency, being able to draw out more nutrients and energy from them, allowing you to recover energy and health faster from what you eat. In addition, your stomach is 50x bigger than it should be on the side. You will also never experience digestive issues.

trait.name: Restful
trait.description: "Nap time." Your energy and health recover faster when you are sleeping.

trait.name: Hypnos' Blessing
trait.description: You are blessed by Hynos, the God of Sleep. Whenever you sleep, your health and energy recovery speeds drastically increase. In addition, you are able to fall asleep anywhere and still experience an uninterrupted restful sleep. Blessing needs at least 10 minutes of constant sleeping to start.

trait.name: Inventory DLC
trait.description: You get your very own Inventory Page added to your system! The inventory addon allows you to store objects inside the System as long as their weight does not exceed what you can carry under optimal conditions. Items originating from the gacha are exempt from this and can be stored without problem.

trait.name: Vaunt
trait.description: You're quite vauntful, aren't you? It is easier to increase your fame and gain recognition and rewards for your achievements. In addition, it is easier to assert your achievements and get people to believe what you say.

trait.name: Gloryhound
trait.description: You are a Gloryhound, always seeing the next achievement. You have a sixth sense for opportunity, or more correctly, opportunities that would let you increase your fame and reputation. You have an easier time making people perceive you how you want them to, being able to change your vibe to one that feels dangerous, to comforting, to imposing.

trait.name: King Engine
trait.description: One Punch Man - You have the King Engine in your heart, or more specifically, your heart is really loud in just the right moments. You are a master of bluffing, such that you don't even need to make assertions; they will actively delude themselves about you. As long as you have enough luck to back it up, you are almost invincible.

trait.name: Psyker
trait.description: Warhammer 40k - You are a Psyker, a being who draws power from the Immaterium, only you don't, you emulate their powers through the infinite Chaos instead. And you are able to choose one of the 5 common disciplines to specialise in and be able to wield the powers of(Only one may be chosen, another can be chosen if the trait is rolled again)

trait.name: Greater Psyker
trait.description: Warhammer 40k - You are a Psyker, a being who draws power from the Immaterium, only you don't, you emulate their powers through the infinite Chaos instead. As a greater Psyker, you master your disciplines far quicker and can master the abilities of all 5 common disciplines without any penalty.

trait.name: Psyker(Biomancy)
trait.description: Warhammer 40k - You are a Psyker, a being who draws power from the Immaterium, only you don't, you emulate their powers through the infinite Chaos instead. As a Psyker specialising in Biomancy, you are able to train yourself in the ways of manipulating the flesh of friend and foe with your mind. (You can only train in the specialised disciplines capabilities) Spell List: https://warhammer40k.fandom.com/wiki/Psyker#Biomancy_Discipline

trait.name: Psyker(Pyromancy)
trait.description: Warhammer 40k - You are a Psyker, a being who draws power from the Immaterium, only you don't, you emulate their powers through the infinite Chaos instead. As a Psyker specialising in Pyromancy, you are able to train yourself in the ways of creating fire from your mind and weaving it into great firestorms and attacks. (You can only train in the specialised disciplines capabilities) Spell List: https://warhammer40k.fandom.com/wiki/Psyker#Pyromancy_Discipline

trait.name: Psyker(Telekinesis)
trait.description: Warhammer 40k - You are a Psyker, a being who draws power from the Immaterium, only you don't, you emulate their powers through the infinite Chaos instead. As a Psyker specialising in Telekinesis, you are able to train yourself in the ways of manipulating space and the material world with your mind. (You can only train in the specialised disciplines capabilities) Spell List: https://warhammer40k.fandom.com/wiki/Psyker#Telekinesis_Discipline

trait.name: Psyker(Telephathy)
trait.description: Warhammer 40k - You are a Psyker, a being who draws power from the Immaterium, only you don't, you emulate their powers through the infinite Chaos instead. As a Psyker specialising in Telepathy, you are able to train yourself in the ways of binding the wills and minds of those around you (You can only train in the specialised disciplines capabilities) Spell List: https://warhammer40k.fandom.com/wiki/Psyker#Telepathy_Discipline

trait.name: Psyker(Divination)
trait.description: Warhammer 40k - You are a Psyker, a being who draws power from the Immaterium, only you don't, you emulate their powers through the infinite Chaos instead. As a Psyker specialising in Divination, you are able to train yourself in the ways of uncovering the past, present and future of the world around you (You can only train in the specialised disciplines capabilities) Spell List: https://warhammer40k.fandom.com/wiki/Psyker#Divination_Discipline

trait.name: Old Blood
trait.description: Bloodborne - You have the blood of the Great Ones running through your veins. You have greater vitality and energy thanks to the Old Blood which also grants you resistance against Esoteric effects. The concentration of mystery in your blood increases your energy reserves and makes it easier for you to learn, understand and train Magic and Estoric Arts. Finally, your blood has healing properties that scale with your vitality, but those who ingest too much may be affected by your corruptive presence. If you want, you can exert greater influence over those who consume your blood.(You are not an actual Great One)

trait.name: Salty Tears
trait.description: Your tears are now twice as salty.

trait.name: Lucky Romantic
trait.description: Your luck with your romantic life seems to be substantially increased.

trait.name: Cupid's Blessing
trait.description: Your luck with your romantic life seems to be greatly increased. Remember to thank Cupid.

trait.name: Blessing of Zeus
trait.description: (Nsfw)You are a child blessed by Zeus; there is nothing you can't fuck. What did you expect? You gain increased charisma, fertility and talent in the carnal arts. Changer abilities are easier to use and cost less energy to use and maintain. ...Oh, and your lightning-based abilities are stronger too.

trait.name: Infinity
trait.description: You possess an infinite source of energy for every use, magical power, stamina, soul energy, whatever you need. In addition, your energy output is massively increased. Even a common rank fire ability could dwarf nuclear bombs ten times over.

trait.name: Absolute Victory
trait.description: You will win, there is absolutely no way you won't. Reality passively eliminates outcomes where you fail to accomplish your objective. As long as you actively pursue your goal, you will succeed somehow. The degree of success may depend on your own abilities.

trait.name: Immortality
trait.description: No rhetoric or any other outcome, you are immortal in every way that matters. You regenerate faster than the eye can see, even if the universe were to collapse into you, even if the One Above All tried to erase you, you would simply regenerate back, even from absolute nothingness. Perhaps you could even survive the Blind Idiot.

trait.name: Elemental Immunity
trait.description: You are absolutely immune to all damage from attacks of natural elements such as Fire, Water, Earth, Wind, Light and Dark. Even a Supernova or an Absolute Zero won't even scuff your clothes. But physical attacks and unreal elements such as Space, Time, Raw Energy can get past your defences.

trait.name: The Absorber
trait.description: You are the absorber; your body and soul can absorb anything. Especially Energy. You would survive being dropped into the sun because your body could soak up all of the heat energy and convert it into your energy reserves. The speed and degree of absorption scale with your stats, but even as a base human, nothing short of a nuclear bomb could get past your basic absorption.

trait.name: Cosmetic Calibration
trait.description: While cosmetic calibration is active, changes such as transformations or race changes will not affect your looks in ways you view as undesirable.

trait.name: Imp
trait.description: Race Change - You are an Imp, a low rank Demon. As an Imp, you have increased physical and magical stats. In addition, your affinity towards Unholy, Darkness and Fire is increased. But you are also made vulnerable to holy, light and exorcisms.

trait.name: Demon
trait.description: Race Change - You are a demon, a middle rank infernal being. As a demon, you have augmented physical and magical stats. You possess a greater affinity towards Unholy, Darkness, Infernal and Fire. But are vulnerable to Holy, Light, Divine and Exorcisms. You can also turn your body parts into natural weapons, such as sharp teeth and claws.

trait.name: Fiend
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Fiend, a high rank infernal demon. As Fiend, you have considerable physical and magical abilities. You also have a greater affinity towards Unholy, Darkness, Infernal and Fire, being able to master abilities and spells related to them much faster along with the ability to naturally create Hell Flame(Rare Rank Ability). But as a High Rank Demon, you are rendered incredibly vulnerable to Holy, Divine, Light and Exorcisms.

trait.name: Archfiend
trait.description: Race Change - You are an Archfiend, a Demon Noble. As an Archfiend, you have greatly superhuman stats and potent magical abilities, as well as a presence that allows you to command respect and fear in Infernals weaker than yourself. You have an incredible affinity with Unholy, Darkness, and Infernal, allowing you to utilise related abilities and spells to a greater degree along with the ability to naturally create Hell Flame(Rare Rank Ability). But you cannot utilise Holy and Light under normal circumstances, and are rendered vulnerable against them. You have the ability to unleash your demonic power, taking on a more demonic appearance, which will drain your energies faster, but augment your stats further and allow you to imbue your abilities with the Darkness attribute.

trait.name: True Demon
trait.description: Race Change - You are a True Demon, a Demon Royalty. As a pure demon, you possess incredible Physical and Magical might. The true blood in your veins allows you to command Infernals below your rank, which can be resisted somewhat by those of powerful will. Your affinity with Darkness, Infernal and Unholy is unmatched, and you can naturally convert your energy into Dark or Unholy attributes along with the ability to naturally create Greater Hell Flame(Elite Rank Ability), but cannot utilise Holy or Light under normal circumstances. You are also rendered vulnerable to Holy. You can unleash your True Demon form, assuming a more demonic appearance and augmenting your stats while increasing your energy drains considerably.

trait.name: Daemon
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Daemon; considering you as simply an infernal being is not quite right. As a Daemon, you possess superhuman physical abilities, but incredible Magical Power and Energy Reserves as well as regeneration. You possess an incredible affinity with Darkness, Infernal and Unholy, being able to make up your own spells on the spot and massively amplifying the potency of related abilities and spells. Once unleash your true spirit form, your maximum health and regeneration gets converted to your magical power and become incorporeal, massively amplifying your energy output while being able to imbue your powers with Unholy and Darkness energy. Since vitality is replaced with your energy, as long as you have energy, you cannot die.

trait.name: Demon Kaiser
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Demon Kaiser, a primordial Infernal. As a Kaiser, you possess increased magical ability and massively amplified physical abilities and regeneration, being able to flatten hills with your fists at base. As the Kaiser, you are able to bend any weaker Infernal to your will. Your affinity with Infernal and Unholy abilities is incredible, allowing you to augment related abilities to a higher tier as long as they are below Legendary rank. You are also rendered vulnerable to Holy and Light. By unleashing your True Kaiser form, your physical stats are massively amplified, and you gain incredible magical resistance, as well as losing your vulnerability to Holy and Light, but your energy consumption is amplified, and once you run out of energy, the form gets dispelled.

trait.name: Augmented
trait.description: (Tech)Race Change - You are a converted, half-flesh and half-machine. As an Augmented, you possess increased physical stats and have increased energy reserves. You possess an increased affinity with Tinker abilities and technology, as well as interfacing. But you are also rendered vulnerable to Electricity and Interfacing.

trait.name: Android
trait.description: (Tech)Race Change - You are an android, a higher class of machine-flesh hybrid. As an Android, you possess increased physical abilities and energy reserves. Your natural energy regeneration is lessened, but you can charge yourself like a machine. Your effectiveness when wielding Tinker abilities and technology is increased. But you are also rendered vulnerable to Electricity and Interfacing. You also possess basic augments such as a computer in your head and retractable mantis blades in your arms and legs(Cyberpunk). You can also tinker with yourself to change your body to an extent(You still have fleshy bits).

trait.name: Advanced Android
trait.description: (Tech)Race Change - You are a more advanced model of an android. As an Advanced Model, you possess superhuman physical abilities and increased energy reserves. Your natural energy regeneration is lessened, but you can charge yourself like a machine. Your Tinker abilities are more efficient and progress faster, and your capacity to handle technology is greatly increased. But you are also rendered vulnerable to Electricity and Interfacing. As an Advanced Model, you possess augments such as a powerful computer integrated in your body and multiple combat implants such as Projectile Launcher System, Gorilla Arms and Mantis Blades from Cyberpunk. You can also tinker with yourself to change your body to an extent(You still have fleshy bits).

trait.name: Biodroid
trait.description: (Tech)Race Change - You are the seamless merging of technology and flesh, making you an incredibly effective Bio Android. Granting you increased physical abilities and increased energy reserves, as well as a natural healing factor. You have increased affinity with Tinker abilities and machines, as well as being able to converse and interface with machines.

trait.name: Full Conversion
trait.description: (Tech)Race Change - You are a fully converted Cyborg with minimal flesh. You do not regenerate energy naturally and instead are able to absorb outside sources of compatible energy to recharge yourself. Your Tinker abilities are far more efficient, and you are able to seamlessly interface with technology. You possess multiple Augments, such as a basic supercomputer and VI, and you are capable of integrating compatible technology into your body. You are equipped with basic combat implants such as hidden Machine guns and a pair of mantis blades in each limb. You can also tinker with yourself to change your body to an extent(You still have fleshy bits). But you are incapable of benefiting from biology-based abilities affecting you.

trait.name: Mechlord
trait.description: (Tech)Race Change - You are a Mechlord, a Higher Class of Machine-Flesh hybrid. As Mechlord, you possess superhuman stats and incredible energy storage. While your natural energy regeneration is lacking, you are able to absorb the energy reserves of machines around you. Your efficiency with Tinker abilities is incredible, and any machine or technology you wield gains increased performance scaling with your capabilities. You are also able to convert and command technology and AI below your rank to act in your will, with the effectiveness being dependent on the power difference between you and the target. You can also integrate outside technology into your body and use them as augments. You also get 3 Silver-tier Tech item rolls as augments to start with.

trait.name: The Prime
trait.description: (Tech)Race Change - You are the Prime unit, the highest tier of Machine-Flesh hybrid. As the Prime unit, you possess massively increased Physical Stats and Energy Reserves. You can absorb the energy from machines and compatible energy sources. All Tinker abilities are made incredibly more efficient, and you can reconfigure your body to emulate tech from your Tinker abilities. You can also decipher and learn other tech incredibly fast. All Technology and Virtuals below your rank are bent to your will and cannot contest your authority as the Prime Unit. You can seamlessly absorb and integrate outside technology of the same rank as you or below into yourself. You also get 3 gold-tier Tech item rolls as augments to start with.

trait.name: Vital
trait.description: You have greatly increased vitality, allowing you to heal from wounds faster, resist poisons and illnesses better, be more virile, have an increased lifespan and overall be unbelievably healthy. Your natural healing speed can be compared to a slight healing factor, but you will need to eat a lot to compensate.

trait.name: Marathoner
trait.description: You have greatly increased stamina, you can perform strenuous activities for longer and recover from the exhaustion caused by them far quicker.

trait.name: Racer
trait.description: "It was originally going to be -ist". You possess greatly increased agility, allowing you to move considerably faster with your body and increasing your reflexes and coordination to match.

trait.name: Tough as Nails
trait.description: You are tough as nails, granting you significantly increased durability and endurance. Allowing you to resist stronger blows with less damage and recover from injuries faster(not healing), you are capable of powering through attacks more effectively.

trait.name: Brawler
trait.description: You possess greatly increased physical strength, allowing you to exert more force with your body than you otherwise would have been able to and punch way harder than you should be able to.

trait.name: Surging Vitality
trait.description: You are indordinately vital. You are extremely healthy, being immune to mundane sicknesses and poisons, and the usual genetic vulnerabilities of your body are negated. Your natural healing is closer to a minor healing factor than regular recovery. You also possess an incredible lifespan; you will live to see at least your late hundreds.

trait.name: Like the Wind
trait.description: You move like the wind, you possess greatly augmented Agility, making you faster, nimbler, in addition to augmenting your reflexes and coordination.

trait.name: Resistant
trait.description: You are incredibly tough, granting you greatly increased natural resiliance, allowing you far greater punishment than you should otherwise be able to endure.

trait.name: Power Lifter
trait.description: You are a natural-born strongman, or more like a stronger man. You possess greatly enhanced physical strength, allowing you to exert far more physical force with your body than you otherwise would be able to.

trait.name: Lil' Hermes
trait.description: You are an aspiring divine messenger apparently(Flavor Text). Your natural agility is greatly enhanced, making you faster and increasing your reaction speeds appropriately. In addition, all Mover abilities are slightly more potent and cost less energy to use.

trait.name: The Wall
trait.description: "You can't go through it, and you can't knock it down!" You are the Wall, possessing extreme natural resiliency, even as a base human, bullets simply bounce off your chest, and knives break against your skin. You also possess natural magical resistance that scales with your physical stats, although it does not match your endurance.

trait.name: Ichor
trait.description: It is Ichor that flows through your veins, granting you extreme vitality and a natural healing factor as well as incredible poison and disease resistance. Even as a regular human, you will live to see your late thousands. Your blood also has healing properties and is an excellent potion ingredient.

trait.name: Edible Fluids
trait.description: Somehow, in some way, your bodily fluids such as sweat, saliva, blood, and ejaculate, are nutritionally and calorically dense while also being very healthy. They are also taste surprisingly good. Consuming your own fluids does nothing for you.

trait.name: Midi-Chlorians
trait.description: Star Wars - Your biology is unique; it contains special microscopic lifeforms that are attuned to the Force. Allowing you to train yourself in the ways of the force, the Midichlorian count in your body is dependent on your stats and traits. The higher your midichlorian count, the more potent your connection to the force, and the faster you can master force-related abilities.

trait.name: Deus Eggs Machina
trait.description: You will be able to find a regular chicken egg anywhere in opportune moments.

trait.name: Drunk Driver
trait.description: "It's the drunk crashers that give drunk drivers a bad name." The more inebriated you are, the more skilled you are at driving and operating vehicles.

trait.name: Ceaseless Discharge
trait.description: (Nsfw)"Not the one you are thinking of" Your cum refills almost instantly, and the volume of your ejaculations is substantially increased.

trait.name: Scarousing
trait.description: For some reason, the scarier you act, instead of being rightfully terrified, people that you consider potential partners are also equal parts aroused by you. The mind works in mysterious ways.

trait.name: Larger than Life
trait.description: People feel like your presence is larger than it should be. Even if you are a head shorter than them, it will still feel like you are towering over them.

trait.name: Speak of the Devil
trait.description: -And they shall appear. You become instantly aware of the location of someone in relation to you whenever they say your name while intending you. You are able to sense their location for around 5 minutes when they speak your name like a GPS, and can use them for anchors for stuff like teleportation abilities or Curses.

trait.name: Wolfkin
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Wolfkin, a half beast with the traits of a Wolf, including wolf ears, tail, retractable claws and sharp teeth. In some individuals, the wolf traits may show up as more dominant. You possess increased physical abilities and senses as well as a fierce hunting instinct. You are also able to convey your intent to other animals, even if you cannot understand them back.

trait.name: Lycantrophe
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Lycanthrope, a half wolf who can change into their Werewolf form at will. Depending on the amount you tap into your transformations by, your physical stats are augmented, and so are your instincts, including the animalistic ones. But as a regular lycanthrope, you cannot spread your lycanthropy. You are also able to communicate better with Beasts and have a greater affinity towards Changer powers, increasing their potency and efficiency.

trait.name: Lycan Alpha
trait.description: Race Changer- You are an Alpha Lycan, a ruler among werebeasts and a half wolf. You can tap into your bestial side at will and transform into a Werewolf or a full wolf. Doing so greatly augments your physical stats and grants you powerful claws and teeth while massively amplifying your senses and instincts. As an Alpha, you are able to turn others into Lesser Lycans, werewolves under your command. All Beasts perceive you as having greater authority and presence due to your potent blood.

trait.name: Lunar Lycan
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Lunar Lycan, a Royal Lycantrophe blessed by the moon. You can tap into your bestial side at will and transform into a Werewolf or a full wolf. Doing so massively increases your physical and magical stats, alongside massively amplifying your senses. The blessing of the moon increases your resistance to magic and esoteric effects while increasing your affinity towards all magic. As a Royal Lycantrophe, you are able to convert others into Lesser Lycantrophes to Greater Lycantrophes that share the same blessing of the moon and placing them under your command as their alpha.

trait.name: Managarmr
trait.description: Race Change - You are the Child of the Moon Devouring Wolf, the pinnacle of Lycantrophy. As a divine lycanthrope, you can tap into your Bestial side at will, transforming you into a hybrid or a titanic wolf you can control the size of. Granting you extremely increased physical stats, godlike instincts, and senses. You are able to devour anything; your jaws and claws can rend even space and rip apart anything, even magic and divine flesh. Anything you eat will be destroyed and converted to magical power. You are able to grant your blessing to others, transforming them into Lycantrophes. In addition, you possess authority over all beasts and beastkin below legendary rank. And even those resistant to the effect understand your royal authority.

trait.name: Trainee Tinker
trait.description: You are a Tinker who just started their journey. The efficiency of all Tinker abilities are slightly enhanced; you are faster and more resourceful when building technological constructs.

trait.name: Pugilist Apprentice
trait.description: You are a Pugilist who has just embarked on their path. You learn and train Martial Skills faster, and your natural intuition for combat and martial arts is heightened.

trait.name: Nascent Esper
trait.description: You are an Esper who has just started blooming their latent talent. You train and master abilities slightly faster and have a better instinct for how to handle and use them. All ability cooldowns are decreased by 20%.

trait.name: Initiate Magician
trait.description: You are a Magician who has just embarked on their journey into the mystical. You are able to learn, memorise and master spells faster as well as cast them more efficiently. The penalties for learning a magical system that is not your own are mitigated.

trait.name: Incubus/Succubus
trait.description: Race Change - You are a dream demon, one that sucks on the vitality of your victim as a Succubus/Incubus. You are more attractive and alluring to your preferred partners. You also possess slightly superhuman stats and increased magical power. You are also able to sense arousal, peek into dreams and subtly influence them as well as shapeshift according to your partner's preferences. The potency of all Lewd abilities and spells are increased.

trait.name: Long Live the King
trait.description: May his reign last a thousand years. People who are even at least a bit loyal towards you are much more loyal towards you, and it is easier to earn people's loyalty. People who view you in a favourable light are more willing to make sacrifices for your sake.

trait.name: Tickets Please
trait.description: Allows you to withdraw your tickets as physical, tangible tickets that you can hand over to other people. If someone else rips the ticket, they will get the result of the roll instead, subject to the same rules as the user.

trait.name: Swiper no Swiping!
trait.description: You cannot be stolen from. Whatever item you own that is taken without your consent is returned to your possession in a convenient location.

trait.name: Trade-In
trait.description: When you roll a ticket, you have the option to reroll it, but with its rarity lowered by a stage(Platinum to Gold, Gold to Silver, etc.), don't blame the gacha if it doesn't work out.

trait.name: Sea Serpent
trait.description: You are a Sea Serpent or a Hybrid, a true apex predator of the seas. You are able to unleash your Sea Serpent characteristics, either turning into your Hybrid form or full Sea Serpent size. You also possess greatly superhuman physical abilities and are empowered when wet or underwater. All Water-based abilities cost less energy to use and are more potent. But you are vulnerable to dying out, which will drastically reduce all of your stats.

trait.name: Leviathan
trait.description: Race Change - You are the Leviathan, the creature that lies in the deep and pinnacle of sea life. You can hide your nature and unleash it, either turning into your full Leviathan form or a hybrid form. As the Leviathan, you have tremendous physical abilities and incredible water affinity, but are unable to use fire-based abilities or spells. Your water affinity is at a level where any water-based ability below Legendary level gets raised by 1 rank(Rare to Elite), and you are able to use any water ability rare rank or below. All of your physical and magical abilities are massively amplified when you are underwater, to the point where it would be foolish for even a god to challenge you underwater. But getting dried out also massively reduces your abilities.

trait.name: Jormungandr
trait.description: Race Change - You are the kin of Jormungandr, the World Serpent. You can unleash your characteristics, either turning into a hybrid form or a full-sized world serpent to activate your full capabilities. As a Jormungandr, you possess extreme physical stats, especially strength and endurance. Your venom is one that can bring the strongest of gods to their knees, and wounds you inflict are impossible to heal except by the strongest of healing gods.

trait.name: Nekomata
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Nekomata, a powerful cat yokai with a forked tail. As a Nekomata, you can shapeshift into a human and cat form at will, and you possess enhanced energy reserves and energy regeneration. Due to your nature as a Nekomata, you possess a great affinity towards Necromancy, increasing the potency and efficiency of all Soul and Necromancy-based abilities and spells. You can also naturally use Animate Undead(Elite rank ability) and are able to conjure ghostflames.

trait.name: Sköll
trait.description: Race Change - You are the child of Sköll, the Sun Devouring Wolf. As the Child of Sköll, you are able to manifest and hide your Lycanthropic nature at will; unleashing your nature grants you an extreme increase in Physical and Magical power. As the Sun Devourer, you have immense Fire affinity, massively boosting the potency and efficiency of any Fire-based ability you use. In addition, you absorb sunlight and convert it into energy and are passively stronger under the sun. You are able to grant your blessing to others, turning them into Lycantrophes under your command. You also have the ability to devour "Energy", allowing you to eat spells, magical constructs or high-energy objects to temporarily add them to your energy reserves and increase the maximum amount of energy you can hold.

trait.name: Nemean
trait.description: Race Change - You are the Nemean Lion, being able to switch between your base form and being able to reveal your Lion Form and in between. You possess indomitable physical stats and a nigh invulnerable skin even gods envy. Your skin grants you defence against everything, and I mean everything that scales with your physical stats. Even if it cuts space, even if it burns the soul, even if it curses you, even if it erases you from existence, it has to contend with your resilience and still gets its effects reduced if not outright negated, depending on the power of the attack compared to your defence.

trait.name: Vile Temper
trait.description: Your body is tempered by the Vile. When you are afflicted by diseases or poisons, your body uses them as fuel to become stronger and develop a stronger immune system. The stronger and more exotic disease or poison you are inflicted with, the faster your body will increase its physical stats and develop its immune system.

trait.name: Glowing One
trait.description: You passively absorb radiation with your body like a sponge, using it to fuel your body and energy and consuming it in the process. Absorbing enough radiation, such as Gamma Radiation, X-rays, and even ultraviolet radiation, will have an effect of permanently increasing your physical stats and energy reserves proportional to how much you absorb. You are also immune to the negative effects of radiation and recover stamina and energy faster when exposed to it. While sunlight would have a negligible effect, eating some radium chips would probably act like cultivation pills for you.

trait.name: Soul Vessel
trait.description: Hollow Knight - You are a vessel, capable of absorbing and channelling "soul" to either yourself by focusing or training to use it in Shaman spells as Howling Wraiths, creating Soul Nails, short-range teleportation, and other such spells. You gain soul by inflicting injuries on living beings, and your maximum storage scales with your maximum energy, but is distinctly separate.

trait.name: Ambidexterous
trait.description: You are perfectly ambidexterous, you can use both of your arms and hands as if they were both dominant hands.
