The same applies to all of your limbs, perfectly balanced, as all things should be. 480,Tune Up,3.3 You have received a body tune-up, an upgrade to every aspect of your body, slightly increasing all of your physical stats, your energy reserves, and most importantly, fixing all of the physical or genetic problems ailing in your body at the moment of you rolling this trait.

trait.name: Greater Beastkin
trait.description: Race Change - You are a greater beastkin, a creature that is half beast and half whatever you are. As a Greater Beastkin, you possess superhuman physical abilities and enhanced natural senses and instincts. You possess more affinity towards nature-based abilities and spells, allowing you to utilise them more effectively. Your Beast side is powerful too; even simple cat claws are tough as iron. (Chosen beast is decided by the writer, not an in-story choice)

trait.name: Noble Beastkin
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Noble Beastkin, a beast hybrid that has mystical blood running through their veins. You possess potent physical abilities and greatly enhanced senses depending on your race; your natural instincts are very potent. You possess a greater affinity towards Changer and Nature-based abilities, allowing you to utilise them to greater effect with more finesse. You also possess control over your beast side, being able to completely suppress your traits or completely transform into your beast side. It is easier to command respect from beast-aligned beings.

trait.name: Royal Beastkin
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Royal Beastkin, a powerful beast hybrid that has potent royal blood running through their veins. You possess great physical strength and incredibly honed enhanced senses with slight differences according to the race of your beast side. Your natural fighting instincts are strong enough to compete with trained fighters without having training beforehand. You possess a great affinity toward changer abilities, making them more efficient and easier to control. You possess incredible control over your beast side, being able to completely suppress your beast side or completely transform into it and anything in between. Your royal blood also grants you increased charisma and an authoritative presence, which is far more effective against beast-aligned beings.

trait.name: Nephalem
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Nephalem, an impossible union of a Daemon and Seraphim. You possess immense power, both magical and physical. All Holy, Light, Darkness and Infernal abilities are increased by one tier and cost significantly less energy. You can naturally convert your energy into either Darkness or Holy mana bursts.

trait.name: Provocative
trait.description: You are very good at getting under people's skin, whether it is angering them or breaking their mask of stoicism with a joke or a flirty remark. It is harder for people to keep their composure around you.

trait.name: Steel Man
trait.description: You have a heart of steel that can endure any hardship, your body is like a machine that needs less than even the bare minimum. You only need 1/100th of the sustenance you would normally need; you can go entire years without eating and months without drinking a drop of water, you even need 1/100th of the sleep you usually need, having to sleep every few months or so even as a regular human being.

trait.name: Blacklight Physique
trait.description: Prototype - Race Change - Your previous genetic material has been completely assimilated, turning you into a living mass of Blacklight Virus. Even at your base, you can smash apart tanks and run faster than cars. You are also able to regenerate by assimilating biological matter. As long as you have even a fist-sized mass of Blacklight left that makes up your core, you will still live. Any biological part you consume, you are able to analyse and replicate. The stronger the target you assimilate is, the harder it is to assimilate them.

trait.name: Dragonlord
trait.description: Elden Ring - Race Change - You are the hatching of Placidusax, the Dragonlord. As a Royal Ancient Dragon, albeit a child, you possess greatly superhuman physical abilities and greatly increased magical powers. You can shift between your 5-headed ancient dragon form and humanoid form at will; the size of your dragon form is dependent on your power level and your maturity. You possess gilded gravel scales that give you incredible resilience, and in addition, as the child of Placidusax, you are able to breathe out incinerating golden flames and manifest crimson dragon lightning. A trait unique to your lineage, you possess immense time affinity, allowing you to learn time spells on your own with your natural inclination towards it. But even with your talent, time is not trifling power and mastery over it will take a very, very long time.

trait.name: Everlasting Dragon
trait.description: Dark Souls - Race Change - You are an Everlasting Dragon, a being before the existence of time and light, well, you are a hatching of an Everlasting Dragon at least. As an Everlasting Dragon, you possess greatly superhuman stats and magical abilities. But most of all, you possess the Stone Scales of Immortality. While in your dragon form, as long as your scales are on, you are incredibly resilient towards any attack, as if they were made of adamantium with similar resistance to magic, as well as great regenerative abilities. But when struck by lightning or a greatly powerful attack, your scales are rended from your flesh, and you lose your increased durability. You are able to shift between your base form and dragon form at will.

trait.name: Nidhogg
trait.description: Race Change - You are a descendant of Nidhogg, the mythical dragon of Death and Decay. You are able to swap between your base form and Nidhogg at will; the degree of transformation dictates the amount of power you have access to. You possess tremendous physical abilities and incredibly potent and dense magical energy. You possess an overwhelming affinity towards necromancy, being able to naturally revive the dead into undead under your command and massively boosting the potency and efficiency of any necromancy-based abilities or spells you use. Your dragon breath has the concept of decay distilled into itself, decaying whatever it touches, down to the flesh, down to the soul, down to the existence. Effectiveness varies depending on the target and their power level.

trait.name: Gift of Nyar
trait.description: You have been given a gift by Nyarlathotep, the Crawling Ones. All Stranger abilities are made more potent and cost energy to use. You are more proficient in deception, obscurification and acting.

trait.name: Hydra Heart
trait.description: Your heart is that of a Mythical Hydra, granting you Epic-level regeneration that expends your stamina and energy to work. In addition, you possess 9 lives. Every time your heart or head is destroyed, you will almost instantly be restored to the peak of your health with all negative conditions cleansed. Any resurrection effect, Legendary rank and above, can be used to restore a life.

trait.name: Ork Colour Theory
trait.description: Warhammer 40k -You have a PHD in the study of Ork Colour Theory. Allowing you to paint things to get the benefits that Orks do. RED IZ FASTA, BLACK IZ TOUGHA, YELLOW IZ BIG BOOM, PURPLE IS SNEAKYY, BLUE IZ LUCKER AND GREEN IZ DA BEST. For a target to benefit from this effect, you must be the one to paint it yourself.

trait.name: Reapers Writ
trait.description: Death itself has given you permission to kill anything, and reality shall obey. When facing a target with Immortality, you are capable of nullifying their immortality. Any lethal blow to your land that would otherwise kill them without their immortality will enact absolute death on them, and prevent their resurrection unless you declare that they can live. Even a god, even an avatar, even a spirit, you will strip away their immortality.

trait.name: Introspection
trait.description: You are very well aware of how you are. You know when you are affected by what effects, when you are poisoned, when you are feeling ill or uncomfortable. Nothing about you escapes your attention.

trait.name: Insurance Policy
trait.description: It's quite a shame when your beloved Familiars die, that's why you should always get them insured. Whenever a familiar of yours dies, they will get revived in your familiar space, but in the process of reviving they will be using your energy reserves to heal themselves and be left in a temporary weakened state for several days afterwards. If you have a familiar that automatically revives, they revive 50% faster and need 50% less energy to revive.

trait.name: Psionic
trait.description: You are a psionic, someone who specialises in the Mind and Mental world. Granting you greater control and finesse over your mental abilities and making them more efficient to use. You also train mental abilities faster and have a better natural grasp of them.

trait.name: Netoranger
trait.description: (Nsfw)You are a Netoranger; no relationship is sacred to you. It is easier to get people to betray their loved ones for you, and people in relationships find themselves more attracted to you.

trait.name: Natural Restoration
trait.description: Your natural healing works differently; instead of regenerating, your body heals itself at the same speed as your natural regeneration, but instead restores your body to its most healthy state constantly, affecting even curses, diseases and afflictions. Of course, the more severe an effect, the longer and harder it is for you to get restored to full condition.

trait.name: Tune Up
trait.description: Your body has received a Tune Up, all previous health complications have been erased, and your body has been altered to become improved, increasing your latent genetic potential and giving you a fit and incredibly healthy body.

trait.name: Code of Immortality
trait.description: Code Geass - You are marked by the Code of Immortality by an imitation of C's World. Whenever you get fatally wounded, are sick or are otherwise unable to function, parts of you will get instantly replaced by a pocket dimension constantly producing replacement parts for your existence, constantly keeping you healthy, ageless and alive. This includes your mind and soul. The only way to keep you dead is to either separate you from your dimension, exhaust your lives faster than they can be reproduced or kill you with a spatial attack. In addition, you are capable of granting individuals Geass', a power over that manifests in their eyes, the exact function and power of which depends on the potential of the individual. You can always sense the individual you have given a Geass to, and those they deem closest to them.

trait.name: Shoebody
trait.description: "Bop!" Your skull is unusually durable, and not only that, but headbutt and skull-based attacks are more potent.

trait.name: Silkheart
trait.description: Silksong - Allows you to naturally turn your energy reserves into Silk, you can manipulate this silk as if it were a part of your body and dissolve it at will. You can control this silk to perform a wide variety of Silk Arts, such as shooting needles of silk, whipping it around, using it to bind your own wounds, etc.

trait.name: Chaos Response
trait.description: Your existence is chaos as defined by the chaos gacha, automatically causing feedback to whatever tries to peek into your existence. Future seeing gets scrambled and incoherent, abilities that try to read into you will malfunction and trying to read your mind will cause them a great headache at minimum.

trait.name: Broken Limiter
trait.description: One Punch Man - You possess a broken limiter, making your physical abilities practically boundless. Whenever you are pushed, your physical abilities grow at an exponential rate, scaling with how much you are challenged.

trait.name: Elementalist
trait.description: You have a great affinity with the elements. Decreasing the energy cost of Elemental abilities and spells while increasing your affinity with elementals and spirits, making them like you easier.

trait.name: Exorcist
trait.description: You are an Exorcist, an agent of the Heavenly Realm, a profession specialising in destroying spiritual beings and demons with the Holy attribute. You have an increased affinity towards Holy, Spiritual and Light and learning magic from those disciplines. You can also sense nearby unholy and spiritual entities, whether to give them a peaceful passing or a painful eviction from the material realm.

trait.name: Warlock
trait.description: You are a Warlock, a practitioner whose interest lies in Dark and Demonic Arts. You have an increased affinity towards Unholy and darkness-based abilities and spells. You are also immune to fae deals and are capable of detecting the true nature of magical bindings as someone wanting to deal with Demons. You also naturally know how to make magically binding deals, though only ones where both parties explicitly know exactly what they are getting out of the deal.

trait.name: Death Knight
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Death Knight, an Undead that has evolved into a far tougher and physically capable caste. As a Death Knight, you have greatly increased physical capabilities and do not need any kind of rest or sustenance; all functions are powered by your energy reserves. You are capable of naturally using the ability [Necrotic Weapon]. You possess increased Necromancy, Darkness and Martial Affinity, augmenting the potency of related abilities, skills and magic. But you are rendered vulnerable to Holy and Light-based abilities and magic. Your energy recovery speeds are increased when in locations with more negative energy.

trait.name: Dread Knight
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Dread Knight, a Higher Caste of Undead specialising in Direct Martial Combat. As a Dread Knight, you have very potent physical abilities as well as virtually unlimited stamina, the only thing you need to sustain yourself with is Energy. You are naturally capable of using the ability [Dread Blade] and possess great Necromancy, Darkness and Martial Affinity, augmenting the potency of related abilities, skills and magic. But you are rendered vulnerable to Holy and Light-based abilities and magic.

trait.name: Gravelord
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Gravelord, a Royal Cast of Undead evolved to specialise in Direct Combat. As a Dread Knight, you have mighty physical abilities and virtually unlimited stamina, as the only thing you need to sustain yourself with is your own Energy reserves. You are naturally capable of using the ability [Gravelord's Blade] and possess greatly increased Necrotic, Dark and Martial Affinity, augmenting the potency of related skills, magic and abilities. But you are rendered vulnerable to Holy and Light-based abilities and magic.

trait.name: Necro Kaiser
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Necro Kaiser, an Undead Ruler, evolved specifically for devastation. As a Dread Knight, you have incredible physical abilities and virtually unlimited stamina, as the only thing you need to sustain yourself with is your own Energy reserves. You are naturally capable of using the ability [Gravelord's Blade] and [Animate Undead], all undead under your command are naturally stronger and possess the ability to act independently. You possess immense affinity towards Necromancy, Darkness and Martial abilities, spells and skills, greatly increasing their potency. But you are rendered vulnerable to Holy and Light-based abilities and magic.

trait.name: Ruin Tyrant
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Ruin Tyrant, the highest caste of undead, ruler of all dead and the extinguisher of life. As the Ruin, you have unrivalled physical abilities and unlimited stamina; you do not even need energy to sustain yourself, you are like a force of nature, you just are, but you are still liable to getting destroyed. You are capable of naturally using the [Ruin Edge] and [Animate Undead]; all undead under your command are naturally stronger and possess the ability to act independently. You possess unrivalled Necrotic, Dark and Martial Affinity, augmenting the potency of related skills, magic and abilities. But you are rendered vulnerable to Holy and Light-based abilities and magic.

trait.name: Lich
trait.description: Race Change - You are Lich, a Caste of Undead specialising in Necromancy and Dark Magic, not the phylactery kind. Although rather weak physically, you have increased energy reserves and nigh-unlimited stamina, as the only thing you need to sustain yourself with is your own Energy reserves. You are capable of studying magic more easily and have increased Darkness and Necromancy affinity. In addition, you can naturally use [Lesser Necromancy] to raise your own Undead Servants.

trait.name: Elder Lich
trait.description: Race Change - You are an Elder Lich, a higher cast of Undead evolved from a regular lich, specialising in raising armies of the dead and Necromancy. Although rather disappointing physically, you have greater energy reserves and magical abilities paired with nigh-unlimited stamina, as the only thing you need to sustain yourself with is your own Energy reserves. You are capable of studying magic with greater ease and have increased Darkness and Necromancy affinity. In addition, you can naturally use [Lesser Necromancy] to raise your own Undead Servants, undead under your command are naturally more powerful and intelligent than they would otherwise be. You can also command more undead at once than you would otherwise.

trait.name: Night Lich
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Night Lich, an evolved undead with dark magic thrumming in their bones, specialising in raising armies of the dead, Dark Magic and Necromancy. Albeit lacking in physical might, you have great energy reserves and magical ability paired with nigh-unlimited stamina, as the only thing you need to sustain yourself with is your own Energy reserves. You have a great capacity for learning, developing and studying Necromancy and Dark Magic, and Necromancy-based abilities you use are more efficient. In addition, you can naturally use [Animate Undead] to raise your own Undead Servants; undead under your command are naturally more powerful and intelligent than they would otherwise be. You can also command more undead at once than you would otherwise. You can instinctively sense the dead around you like a sixth sense.

trait.name: Overlord
trait.description: Race Change - You are an Overlord, the highest caste of regular undead, a being whose existence exists to overturn the living into an army of the dead. While your physical abilities are only superhuman, your magical prowess is mighty, granting you increased energy reserves and magical potency paired with nigh-unlimited stamina, as the only thing you need to sustain yourself with is your own Energy reserves. Your Necromancy affinity is incredibly potent, allowing you to learn, study and create Necromancy spells with great ease and any Necromancy-related ability you use is increased in potency. You can naturally use [Greater Animate Undead] to raise your own Undead Army; undead under your command are naturally more powerful and intelligent than they would otherwise be. You can also command an unlimited number of undead at once. You can instinctively sense the dead around you like a sixth sense. You can also wrestle command of any undead you come across as long as you are overwhelmingly stronger than them or defeat them yourself.

trait.name: Eclipse
trait.description: Race Change - You are the eclipse, pure necromancy in the shape of an undead, a living icon of death that exists to extinguish life. Altough your physique is only superhuman, your magical reserves are vast and incredibly potent alongside your infinite stamina due to being undead. You are Necromancy embodied, thus your affinity towards Necromancy spells and Abilities is unmatched, increasing all of their potency beyond their normal limits and allowing you to invent necromancy spells purely off of instinct and learn existing ones simply off of observation. You are also naturally capable of using [True Necromancy] to raise an army of undead servants, all undead under your command are naturally more powerful and can act with cognizance, you can command an unlimited number of undead at once. Any undead not under your command naturally feels the need to submit to your rule.

trait.name: Skeleton
trait.description: Race Change - You are an animated skeleton, the most basic of undead. Your physical stats are the same as if you were alive, but you no longer need any kind of sustenance or rest, instead only needing your own energy reserves to sustain yourself. You also possess an increased Necro and Dark affinity but are rendered vulnerable to Light and Holy-based abilities.(This can be rerolled for free)

trait.name: Kure
trait.description: Kengan Ashura - You are a Member of the Kure Clan, a clan of people selectively bred to be assassins and martial artists. Your genes grant you increased physical abilities, greater physical growth, and better combat instincts. You can also use the skill "Removal", which removes the natural limiters the brain has to stop you from using all 100% of your physical strength in order not to hurt yourself. You can increase your removal percentage by training.

trait.name: Pretty Up
trait.description: You receive a cosmetic alteration to your physique and form, making you more attractive, at least by your own standards. Perhaps longer prettier hair, a few inches, different eye color. etc. Cannot completely change your looks, only enhances what is already there, it would take an ordinary person to a fairly attractive person, but still at a level where anyone who knows you would still be able to recognise you.

trait.name: Newtype
trait.description: Gundam - You are a Newtype, an evolved form of human to adapt to space. As a Newtype, other than having a slightly stronger body, you have greatly increased spatial awareness and mental focus, boosting the potency of all Thinker abilities. You are also naturally capable of sensing malintent directed towards you. With enough training and meditation, you may even be able to unlock the ability to communicate with the minds of others.

trait.name: Rule of Cool
trait.description: You have the Rule of Cool, physics bends around you slightly to allow you to do things the "cool" way while ignoring the fact that it shouldn't work, Style AND Substance baby. Grab a bullet out of the air and send it back, walk with your back to an explosion without feeling anything, do tricks in the middle of a fight without incurring any disadvantages, etc. Doing things the cool way just comes naturally to you.(Does not affect your stats or level of skills.)

trait.name: Crazy Lure
trait.description: Crazy, Mentally Unstable, or otherwise insane people find themselves more attracted to you, and it is easier to gain their affection and favour. It is also easier for you to reason with them.

trait.name: Beelzebub's Blessing
trait.description: You are blessed by Beelzebub, the Lord of all that is vermin and insect. Increasing your affinity with all vermin, insects and arachnids, making them more friendly towards you and making it easier to earn their affection. All Vermin and Poison based abilities are more potent and cost less energy to use.

trait.name: Great Ass
trait.description: You have a great ass, with incredible cushioning abilities, you can sit upon practically any surface without discomfort. It also looks and feels very good.

trait.name: Cuddle Emperor
trait.description: Your existence is one that "Cuddles Greatly." Your hugs and snuggles are incredible, being able to comfort even broken souls. Being cuddled by your cuddles feel like being wrapped by the softest, warmest blanket, and they are even therapeutic, helping stabilise the mental state and comfort whoever you are targeting.

trait.name: Chompers
trait.description: You've got a big ol' pair of chompers on you. Your teeth are spectacularly durable and strong, you are even able to take bites out of rocks and chew them without any damage to your teeth. In addition, you will never have to worry about dental health ever again. If your teeth break, they will regrow like one might regrow fingernails.

trait.name: Nakiri
trait.description: Shokugeki no Souma - You are a child of the Nakiri Clan, a born gourmet and chef. You have a natural affinity towards cooking, allowing you to improve your cooking skills and recipes much faster than an ordinary person. You also possess the God Tongue, allowing you to discern taste at a level unimaginable by the average person, even being able to pick out specific ingredients and their amounts from others with a single bite.

trait.name: Anathema
trait.description: Your existence is one that opposes the Gods and Divine. You have a massive resistance to any Divine influence or Authorities, and against any Divine opponent, your physical and magical abilities are massively increased.

trait.name: Dominant
trait.description: You are naturally dominant, its easier to assert yourself on others and act in a more dominant fashion. In addition, people are more receptive to your acting more dominant and assertive, especially submissive people.

trait.name: Light Resistance
trait.description: You are naturally resistant against Light and Light based effects. You can stare straight at the sun, flashbangs are far less effective and you can resist attacks like light arrow, purification rituals, searing beams of light, etc. This resistance scales with your base stats.

trait.name: Dark Resistance
trait.description: You are naturally resistant against Darkness and Darkness based effects. Such as shadow blasts, darkness chains, clouds of darkness, shadow blades, etc. This resistance scales with your base stats.

trait.name: Tech Priest Diploma
trait.description: (Tech)Praise the Omnisaiah! At least you can try to. You have the ability to pray and perform rituals to appease the machine spirit dwellin in machines and have it actually work. Burn some incenses, do a cool dance, sing to it, make some cool drawing depicting it and depending on how pleased the machine spirit is with your devotion it will somehow increase the power and efficiency of the machine. With enough worship you may even develop a relationship with the machine that it will stick through thick and thin with you.

trait.name: Blessing of the Omnisiah
trait.description: (Tech)You are blessed by the Omnisiah; they praise you, not the other way around. Any machine you handle or encounter is eager to please you, blatantly favoring you. Their charges will deplete slower, cars will go faster than they normally can and handle better, slot machines will give better odds, simply speaking, there is a machine spirit inside the machines and they naturally like you unless you lose that favor.

trait.name: Kitsune
trait.description: Race Change - You are a single-tailed Kitsune, a Fox Yokai(semi-spiritual being) who is attuned to nature and illusions. As a Kitsune, your humanoid form is naturally incredibly attractive, and you possess slightly increased physical stats and increased energy reserves. You can naturally weave and use [Foxfire] and all Stranger abilities and illusion spells you use are more potent. This also extends to nature-based abilities you have. You can also shift between your fox and humanoid form at will, and even hide your fox features using illusions. As you age or your energy reserves increase, you naturally gain more tails, reaching up to 9 in number, each tail slightly enhancing the aforementioned capabilities.

trait.name: Kyubi
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Kyubi, a nine-tailed Kitsune, a powerful fox yokai(semi-spiritual being) who is incredibly attuned to nature and illusions. As a Kyubi, you possess superhuman physical ability and greatly increased energy reserves. You can swap between your Nine-Tailed Kitsune form and human form at will that is supernaturally good-looking. You can naturally use [Nine Tailed Foxfire] at will and possess a great affinity towards Stranger and Nature-based abilities and spells, making them more efficient to use and maintain.

trait.name: Demeter's Blessing
trait.description: You are a child blessed by Demeter, the goddess of Nature and Harvest. Increasing your affinity towards nature-based abilities and magic, making it easier to master and increasing their potency. In any territory you own, the soil will be enriched and fertile, and the crops will be protected from disease and vermin.

trait.name: Comforting Presence
trait.description: Your presence is a very comforting one; those who encounter you might feel like they just came home. This also makes you feel very trustworthy. People are more likely to confide in you and feel less threatened by you. Comforting people in distress also comes naturally to you. Does not work on people with a strong negative opinion of you.

trait.name: Poseidon's Child
trait.description: You are the child blessed by Poseidon, the god of the seas. Thanks to this blessing, you are freely capable of breathing, moving, and seeing underwater as naturally as if you were on land. All mundane aquatic life are friendly, and supernatural ones are more friendly towards you. You also possess increased water affinity, making your water-based abilities and spells more potent and easier to master.

trait.name: Deviant Fashion
trait.description: It is no longer illegal or unacceptable to wear whatever you want to wear, people can still get uncomfortable with it, but legally or morally, there is nothing wrong with what you are wearing. Yes, that also means you can go into high society wearing whatever you were born with.

trait.name: Machine Spirit Mechanic
trait.description: (Tech)You are a special kind of mechanic; whatever sufficiently advanced technology you make has a newborn Machine Spirit inside of it. The existence of a machine spirit passively improves the quality of the machine over time and increases its performance. Depending on the mood of the spirit, the machine can work even more efficiently or perform worse and even prevent a user from accessing it altogether. More mature Machine Spirits can even use their tech autonomously and independently. All Machine Spirits you create naturally see you as their creator.

trait.name: Necromantic Heart
trait.description: Race Change - You possess the Necromantic Heart, turning you undead, but at the same time, granting you the capacity to evolve. You start as (Uncommon trait)Skeleton but the more time you spend "alive", the more you kill and the more negative energy you immerse yourself in, the faster you will evolve into the next tier of undead. In addition, you can still retain a humanoid facade that can act with the same functions as a human but will fall apart when you use your undead traits or get damaged.

trait.name: Oedipus Simple
trait.description: (Nsfw)"Complex? I think you'll find it is quite simple." There is nothing wrong with keeping it in the family. Society as a whole does not find it particularly morally wrong if you marry your own kin. In addition, all genetic problems that could possibly occur with inbreeding are resolved. Any biological conceived and born children of yours inherit your traits far better and inherit at least two of your abilities. It is easier to earn the affection of your family, platonically or romantically. This trait can be rerolled for free.

trait.name: Full Coverage Insurance Plan
trait.description: Your Familiars get a full coverage insurance plan, as long as a familiar is in Familiar space for 24 hours straight, uninterrupted, they are completely and absolutely returned to perfect health. If a familiar dies, they will be resurrected in the familiar space after 48 hours have passed in perfect health.

trait.name: The Real Familiars
trait.description: "-Were the friends we made along the way." This trait allows you to register any cognizant living being as a familiar as long as they completely submit to you and are tamed.

trait.name: Perception Awareness
trait.description: You are able to instinctively tell when someone is looking at you or observing you at all times, as well as which direction they are looking at you from, if they are using clairvoyance you will know someone is looking at you but cannot pinpoint their direction.

trait.name: Scenic Wind
trait.description: The scenic wind favors you, making your clothes and hair flutter majestically, even in impossible weather conditions and indoors whenever it is opportune.

trait.name: Lactation
trait.description: You are capable of lactating; the quality of milk that you produce scales with your physical stats and has unique qualities depending on your traits. This trait can be rerolled for free.

trait.name: Calcium Cultivation
trait.description: Your bones crave milk, nay, they demand it. Every time you consume milk, your bones get a permanent boost to their durability and quality. The higher the quality of milk, the greater the boost to your bones you get. Consuming the same kind of milk decreases its effects exponentially after the first drink and the boost your bones get are relative to the quality of the milk to your bones.

trait.name: Perfect Skin
trait.description: Your skin is one any model would envy, always perfectly moist, supple and smooth, your skin also never scars or gets marred unless you want it to. Skin and superficial injuries also heal slightly faster and more seamlessly.

trait.name: Comfortable
trait.description: You should always be comfortable in your own skin, your physical features do not hamper your mobility or your comfort of life, whether you have distorted features or rather oversized assets.

trait.name: Form Fitting
trait.description: Whatever piece of clothing or equipment you try to wear or equip will automatically adjust to your size perfectly as long as the change is not too drastic. The changes revert if the clothing is unequipped.

trait.name: Endless Stomach
trait.description: Your stomach is 1000x larger on the inside than the outside, don't ask how it works. You can keep eating and you will digest the food inside of you on a need to basis without feeling discomfort, allowing you to eat months worth of food ahead of time and not worry for a month, same for water. Thankfully, the stomach is very efficient so you also only produce 1/1000th of the waste.

trait.name: Tanuki
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Tanuki, a racoon-dog(?) yokai, a semi spiritual being who excells in trickery. As a tanuki you can shift between your tanuki form and humanoid form and in between. You also posess increased energy reserves and increased affinity towards Stranger abilities and traits, allowing you to use and master them easier as well as use them more efficiently. You can naturally use the ability [Tanuki's Leaves(Rare)] without needing an ability slot.

trait.name: Throat
trait.description: You no longer have a gag reflex, and your throat is always perfectly moist... and lubricated? At least you won't get a sore throat?

trait.name: Hagmaxxing
trait.description: Your preferred partners at least twice your age are more attracted towards you, and it is easier to earn their favor. In addition, your romantic partners and your looks never age beyond their peak. Does not stop physical aging.

trait.name: Violence of Heaven
trait.description: You wield a body blessed by the Heavenly realm to carry out violence in their stead. All your physical abilities are augmented, and these boosts are further amplified in blessed grounds. You possess an increased resistance against curses, necromancy, and darkness-based attacks. Even a regular joe would be able to flip cars and break the bones of demons.

trait.name: Harphy
trait.description: Race Change - You are a half avian creature, possessing the characteristics of a hawk creature mixed with your own race. You have slightly enhanced physical abilities and senses, alongside heightened predatory instincts. In addition, you have retractable talons and wings either fused into your arms, shoulder blades, or back. With training, you can learn to suppress your more avian characteristics. You possess increased wind affinity but decreased water affinity.

trait.name: Roc
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Roc hybrid, a creature that possesses the characteristics of a Roc, mixed with your own race, a giant elephant-eating hawk. You possess increased strength and durability, incredible but sensitive eyesight, and hearing alongside fearsome predatory instincts. You possess large, powerful wings either fused to your arms or back, at least as strong as your arms, and allow you to fly and dive with great speed, as well as retractable talons that are tougher than steel. You possess increased wind affinity but decreased water affinity.

trait.name: Thunderbird
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Thunderbird hybrid, possessing the characteristics of the legendary change of the skies. As Thunderbird, you possess enhanced physical abilities with further enhanced agility and reflexes; your eyesight and hearing are also greatly enhanced. You possess wings that allow you to easily fly at great speeds and can flap to release electricity from, and incredibly tough and sharp talons that crackle with lightning. As a Thunderbird, you also naturally have the ability to change the weather, making it sunny, making it rain, making it hail etc but it will consume a lot of energy. You possess increased Wind and Lightning affinity, but are rendered vulnerable to Water and Earth.

trait.name: Grand Thunderbird
trait.description: Race Change - You are the descendant of a Grand Thunderbird, an ancient, legendary Thunderbird with power over weather and lightning. As a Grand Thunderbird, you possess a great physique with incredible enhanced agility and reflexes; your eyesight and hearing are unmatched. You possess wings that allow you to easily fly at supersonic speeds and incredibly tough and sharp talons. You can also cloak yourself in and discharge electricity from your body. As a Grand Thunderbird, you can naturally manipulate the weather of the area you are in, bringing rain, open sky, clouds, and can even rain down lightning. You possess increased Wind and Lightning affinity, but are rendered vulnerable to

trait.name: Ziz
trait.description: Race Change - You are a Child of Ziz, one of the Primordial beasts, rival to Behemoth and Leviathan, ruler of the skies. As a kin of Ziz, you possess greatly enhanced physical and magical abilities, as well as the ability to reveal and hide your true form at will, partially or fully transforming into a titanic avian beast. You naturally possess the ability to manipulate the weather, calling down storms, blizzards, rain, hurricanes, tornadoes, etc., at will, as well as raining down greater lightning. All Weather-based abilities and spells are greatly enhanced; you greatly resist all Wind, Ice, and Electricity-based abilities. Your energy and health recovery are enhanced when under the open skies. You possess decreased Water and Earth affinity.

trait.name: Allowance
trait.description: Whichever city you are currently living in, you get the equivalent of 2x the daily minimum wage for that city/country either deposited into your account or transported into your wallet every single day.

trait.name: Kyoi no Hado
trait.description: Street Fighter - You have awakened the Kyoi no Hado, the Surge of Mindless Intent, otherwise known as the Sacred Hado, allowing you to tap your own Ki reserves thanks to it. This Hado requires the practitioner to practice calmness, balance, resoluteness, and focus to properly tap into one's inner energy and soul to draw power from it. Skilled practitioners can reinforce their strikes with it, protect their body from foreign influences, and turn it into wave-like energy surges to use offensively and defensively. Skilled enough users may even be able to interact with souls. Practising the Hado increases one's mental and spiritual defences.

trait.name: Satsui no Hado
trait.description: Street Fighter - You have awakened the Satsui no Hado, the Surge of Killing Intent, otherwise known as the Dark Hado, allowing you to tap into your inner Ki reserves thanks to it. This Hado requires the pracitioner to tap into their inner animalistic bloodlust, rage, and murderous intent to physically manifest your killing intent and tap into your inner energy through it. Using the Hado will slightly transform the user, enhancing their physical strength, allowing them to imbue energy into their strikes, and turn their Ki into dark flame-like energy. Skilled enough users may even be able to use it to telekinetically control objects. The more someone practices the Hado, the stronger they will become, and so will their desire for conflict and conquest. If one cannot control their Hado properly, they may even transform into an Oni. But it is possible to tame this power no matter how difficult.

trait.name: Reptilian Rapport
trait.description: You have great affinity with lizards, reptiles, and creatures that are aligned with them. Making it easier to earn their affection and favor, and form relationships with them. Thanks to your affinity with Reptilians, regeneration-based effects, abilities, and spells applied to you are more potent.

trait.name: Canis Companion
trait.description: You have great affinity with dogs, canines, wolves, and creatures that are aligned with them. Making it easier to earn their affection and favor, and form relationships with them. Thanks to your affinity with the Canis, your sense-based abilities and traits are more potent, and it is easier to control your own senses.

trait.name: Arthropod Affiliate
trait.description: You have great affinity with insects, arachnids, crustations, and creatures that are aligned with them. Making it easier to earn their affection and favor, and form relationships with them. Thanks to your affinity with the Arthropods, you possess slightly increased durability and armor-based abilities, and effects cost slightly less energy to use.

trait.name: Warrior of Sunlight
trait.description: Dark Souls - You are a Warrior of Sunlight, a Warrior that praises the sun and devotes their faith in it, receiving powers in return. As a Warrior of Sunlight, you possess increased vitality. In addition, all Lightning and Fire-based abilities are slightly more potent and carry traces of sunlight within them, further increasing their potency against Undead and Dragons. Beings aligned with the Sun and Light may favor you more.

trait.name: Gravelord Servant
trait.description: Dark Souls - You are a Gravelord Servant, a servant of Nito, the first of the dead. As a Gravelord Servant, you possess increased energy reserves, and the power of your Necromancy and Soul-based abilities is increased. You possess a greater affinity towards undead, and wild undead without minds do not consider you enemies unless provoked.

trait.name: Darkwraith
trait.description: Dark Souls - You are a Darkwraith, one who seeks to wield the powers of darkness and end light. As Darkwraith, your physical abilities are slightly enhanced when in darkness. In addition, all Dark-based abilities and spells are more potent and inflict additional damage when used against Light-aligned beings.

trait.name: Path of Dragon
trait.description: Dark Souls - You are a follower of the Path of the Dragon, one who seeks to transcend life through the flesh of Dragons. As a follower, you can offer the flesh of Dragons to the Everlasting Dragons and imbue it into your very flesh, enhancing all of your physical stats relative to how strong the owner of the flesh was compared to you and gaining minor draconic aspects in the process. The more flesh you offer, the more draconic you get, potentially even becoming an Everlasting Dragon(Legendary) yourself at the end.

trait.name: Covenant Leader
trait.description: You are now capable of establishing your own covenant. Those who pledge themselves to your service and join your covenant can acquire boons from you, depending on how much they have contributed to your covenant. The boons you grant are based on your traits and abilities; the larger their contribution, the more karma you accumulate to bestow them a lesser copy of an ability or trait. The Rarity of the offshoot depends on the recipents contribution level, but it can never reach the same rarity as the original. If they break the laws of your covenant, their boons are instantly revoked.

trait.name: Pendragon
trait.description: You are the child of Pendragon, the destined, rightful King and Dragon. Sovereignty is in your blood; you are more resistant to negative mental conditions and are an incredible talent when it comes to anything related to ruling, such as litigation, management, military, economics, etc, as well as an increase to your natural charisma. In addition, as the child of the one recognized as a "Dragon", you have increased physical abilities as well as larger energy reserves and faster energy recovery. You also have incredible talent with blades due to carrying the blood of Excalibur's wielder, especially with magical swords.

trait.name: Dullahan's Deception
trait.description: "Don't lose your head!" No, but seriously, don't. Your head is now capable of freely detaching from your neck/torso but still remaining connected in a higher dimension, meaning you can still eat, speak, and breathe. This also has the effect of making decapitation useless against you.

trait.name: Chaos Duplication
trait.description: Allows you to grant copies of your own abilities and traits to others by burning a ticket that is equal in value to the ability or trait you are granting. A bronze ticket allows you to duplicate a common trait, a silver allows uncommon, a gold allows rare, etc. Higher tickets can be burnt to grant double the replicants of a previous rarity: Silver = 2x Common, Gold = 4 Common, etc.

trait.name: Fair Use
trait.description: No cheating, anything you create, people cannot use without your permission, acting as a Blacklist and Whitelist. Even if you were to leave your spaceship with the keys in, no one would be able to pilot it. If you leave potions you created, they will act like water if someone else uses them.

trait.name: Crushing Daunt
trait.description: "Fear grips your heart." The more fear someone feels towards you, the weaker they become and the lower their energy output. If someone feels completely helpless towards you and their will to fight is completely crushed, their abilities are decreased to negligible levels. .Garlic Infused Blood,0.2 The next Vampire that bites you is really going to regret it.

trait.name: Blood Fuel
trait.description: "Hell is not full." Your blood functions as fuel, high-quality fuel that can be substituted for basically any kind of fuel that any machine would otherwise take, such as gasoline, diesel, electricity, etc.

trait.name: Literary Devouring
trait.description: You are able to eat books and written text, which will imprint all knowledge contained within that text into your mind, making you perfectly memorize the information inside.

trait.name: Made of Fire
trait.description: "Not to be confused by a maid of fire." You are able to use flames to temper your body, increasing your physical abilities proportional to the intensity and potency of the flames you are burned by. To temper your body properly, you must be exposed to the flame for extended periods of time. This trait does not give resistance to fire or immunity to it, and the higher your flame resistance, the less effective this trait is.

trait.name: Vessel
trait.description: Your body and soul are incredible vessels, perfectly suited for sealing things inside and containing them. Whatever is sealed inside you or is absorbed into you will find it far harder to rebel and break out. In addition, you can fit much more into your vessel.

trait.name: Prime Soul
trait.description: Ultrakill - Your soul has ascended to the level of a Prime Soul, a soul that has grown so powerful that it does not need a body to keep existing. Your soul affinity is massively enhanced, and you possess massive resistance towards all soul, mind, and "existence" targeting abilities. In addition, if you die, you will be able to shed your Husk and continue existing in Prime Soul form.

trait.name: Mythril Fist
trait.description: Your fists are like Mythril, considerably augmenting the power behind all unarmed strikes you use and enhancing the power of all fist-based abilities.

trait.name: Adamantine Fist
trait.description: Your fists are like Adamantine, unbreakable and incredibly powerful. Your fists are incredibly durable, and the power behind all unarmed strikes is greatly enhanced. All fist-based abilities are easier to use and are more powerful.

trait.name: Regenerator
trait.description: Hellsing - You are a Regenerator, a race of Advanced Human that is a Bioengineering marvel, granting you superhuman physical performance and incredible natural regenerative abilities enough to heal from bullet wounds in seconds without changing anything fundamentally from humanity.

trait.name: The Santa Clause
trait.description: You are under the same Clause as Santa himself, meaning that people do not mind you entering places you shouldn't be, or lingering in places you are not meant to. But they can still get offended and angry if you cause a disturbance or do something that would offend them.

trait.name: Sexercise
trait.description: (Nsfw)Sexual activity now works as a full body workout for you, a very efficient and comprehensive effect. The effects of this workout will only apply after the sexual activity has ended and scales with the effectiveness of your sexual activity.

trait.name: Blessing of Atlas
trait.description: "The weight of the world on your shoulders." You are blessed by Atlas, the one who holds the world on his shoulders. You are extremely resilient towards all hardships, even when under extreme agony, even when poisoned, even when bleeding out, even when tired beyond comprehension, you can still perform at your maximum.

trait.name: Sadist
trait.description: "Pain in their eyes" You are a sadist, you enjoy pain and the suffering of others. Whenever you inflict damage on a target, your Health and Energy recovery speeds are increased for a short amount of time.

trait.name: Starman
trait.description: "There is a Starman waiting in the sky." Your hope fuels you, literally, the more hope and determination you have, the faster your energy and vitality regenerate, and in addition, as long as you hold out hope, you cannot be killed. Whenever someone places their hopes into you, that hope is converted into energy and vitality to fuel you.

skill.name: Water Stream Crushing Rock
skill.description: One Punch Man - You are an apprentice in the legendary martial art created by the S-Rank Hero Silverfang, this martial art focuses on defence and redirection of the enemy's attacks by flowing like water and striking like a raging river. With enough training, you can completely counter an enemy's blow with double their power.

skill.name: Intermediate Cooking
skill.description: You are as skilled as a seasoned chef, your cooking is better than most people with you being able to make complex dishes without much problem and most of the food you cook tastes pretty good.

skill.name: Iaijutsu
skill.description: A refined blade art that takes advantage of the motion of drawing the blade from its sheath to unleashing blitzingly fast, precise slashes. With experience, the user can imbue their scabbard with energy to propel the sword even faster and increase the potency of their attacks.

skill.name: Intermediate Acting
skill.description: You are a skilled actor, being able to properly portray yourself in the way you want to be seen and concealing your real emotions. But people familiar with you or people who have good intuition like detectives can probably see through your acting.

skill.name: Intermediate Shooting
skill.description: You are a pretty decent shot, you can handle most firearms and projectiles with familiarity but you aren't going to be nailing headshot after headshot.

skill.name: Intermediate Hand-to-Hand Combat
skill.description: You are a seasoned fighter, you know how to move your body to hurt people and can pick up most martial arts far faster than other people. You would completely thrash the average man in a fight.

skill.name: Intermediate Programming
skill.description: You are an experienced programmer in all languages, you code considerably faster than the average programmer and can do so in any programming language you encounter.

skill.name: Intermediate Mechanics
skill.description: You are a decent mechanic, you can fix most mundane appliances when given the right tools and have a good knowledge base of how most machines work and how to build basic machines.

skill.name: Intermediate Biology
skill.description: you are learned enough in the field of Biology to be a professor, and you have good knowledge of how most organs and organisms function, you know how most things interact with biology and how to affect biology yourself.

skill.name: Intermediate Physics
skill.description: you are learned enough in the field of Physics to be a professor, you know how physics works and how they interact with objects. You can spot and understand how most phenomena interact with the laws of the universe.

skill.name: Intermediate Chemistry
skill.description: you are learned enough in the field of Chemistry to be a professor, enough to be a professor, you understand how most common compounds are formed and remember the interactions of chemicals and reactions well.

skill.name: Intermediate Math
skill.description: You are very good at math, enough to be considered somewhat of a savant. You can rapidly calculate numbers in your head very accurately, faster than most people. You can also keep track of numbers and variables especially well.

skill.name: Intermediate Blacksmithing
skill.description: You are experienced enough in blacksmithing to be called a real blacksmith. You know how to forge weapons, armour and various tools that are of decent quality, enough that a warrior would use them without apprehension.

skill.name: Intermediate Teaching
skill.description: You are a good teacher, you know how to effectively impart your knowledge and skills to people well enough and can get them to take your lessons to heart most of the time.

skill.name: Intermediate Blade Weapon Mastery
skill.description: You are fairly skilled in handling bladed instruments and weapons such as swords and daggers. You know how to effectively move your body and weapon to make good use of it, being able to match most practitioners in skill and finesse.

skill.name: Intermediate Blunt Weapon Mastery
skill.description: You are fairly skilled in handling blunt instruments and weapons such as hammers, mauls and clubs. You know how to effectively move your body and weapon to make good use of it, being able to match most practitioners in skill and finesse.

skill.name: Intermediate Polearm Mastery
skill.description: You are fairly skilled in handling bladed instruments and weapons such as spears, halbers and sickles. You know how to effectively move your body and weapon to make good use of it, being able to match most practitioners in skill and finesse.

skill.name: Intermediate Item Construction
skill.description: You know how to make decent magical and enchanted items, if you know fire magic, you can turn a regular sword into a sword that can light itself on fire on command. If you have the ability Invisibility, you can probably make a cloak that suppresses your presence.

skill.name: Polar Channel flow - Celluar Overdrive
skill.description: You have mastered the Pugilist skill of pushing every single cell in your body to their absolute limits drawing up every ounce of energy they have to augment all of your stats to their limits.Using this skill places immense strain on the body and repeated use may cause permanent damage.

skill.name: All Life Eradication Fist
skill.description: One punch Man - The pinnacle of all martial arts, the fusion of the mastery of dozens of supernatural martial arts and the knowledge granted by god, you are able to manipulate the flow of cosmic and all forms of energy with your martial arts and are able to replicate almost any known phenomenon. You must be sufficiently physically strong to be able to utilize this skill in any meaningful capacity.

skill.name: Spear of Untraceable Trajectory
skill.description: Everyone Else is a Returnee - Your mastery of the spear is to such a degree you that disobey even physics. When you attack with the spear you can hit multiple locations at once, the greater your mastery the higher the number of locations. Similar to Tsubame Gaeshi from Fate.

skill.name: Nanaya Assasination Arts
skill.description: Tsukihime - You are trained in the unique assassination arts of the Nanaya Family, a clan of selectively bred demon hunters. This art focuses on extremely quick movements and mobility rather than stealth, also having the user move unpredictably even using ceilings and walls as footholds. This art is especially strong against non-humans.

skill.name: Whirlwind Iron Cutting Fist
skill.description: One Punch Man - You are an apprentice in the supernatural martial developed by the legendary martial artist Bomb after decades of self-training. This style resembles kung fu and focuses on moving the body in such ways that it produces razor-sharp currents of wind that the user sends like whirlwinds, decimating any target.

skill.name: Backflipping
skill.description: You know how to perform a gnarly backflip, frontflips may be a bit challenging though.

skill.name: Water Breathing
skill.description: Demon Slayer - Water Breathing is a specialized swordsmanship style and breathing technique that mimics water, specifically the flow, flexibility and adaptability of the liquid and replicates it with the user's movements, techniques and abilities. Most, if not all, known techniques involve the user bending their body, arm and weapon in a fluid motion to match the movements of rushing or flowing water. With magical power, water can be manifested to further augment the power of the style.

skill.name: Fire Breathing
skill.description: Demon Slayer - Fire Breathing is a specialized swordsmanship style and breathing technique that mimics flames and replicates them with the user's movements, techniques and abilities. Most, if not all, known techniques and forms involve extremely powerful singular strikes which 'burn' their opponents, with most attacks being initiated from a high stance. With magical power, fire can be manifested to further augment the power of the style.

skill.name: Wind breathing
skill.description: Demon Slayer - Wind Breathing is a specialized swordsmanship style and breathing technique that mimics wind, specifically powerful torrents of air and whirlwinds, and replicates it with the user's movements, techniques and abilities. Most, if not all, known techniques and forms involve purely offensive attacks, most of which utilise fast rotating movements to generate swift whirlwind-like slashes that greatly increase the wielder's striking range as well as utilizing the air around them to deliver sharp sickle-shaped flying slash attacks and gale force winds.

skill.name: Thunder breathing
skill.description: Demon Slayer - Thunder Breathing is a specialized swordsmanship style and breathing technique that mimics lightning, specifically swift strikes and movements akin to lightning ripping through the sky, and replicates it with the user's movements, techniques and abilities. Most, if not all, known techniques and forms involve utilizing blinding speeds and immensely fast attacks to overwhelm the enemy in an instant. With magical power, thunder can be manifested to further augment the power of the style.

skill.name: Sun breathing
skill.description: Demon Slayer - Sun Breathing is a specialized swordsmanship style and breathing technique created by the legendary swordsman Yoriichi Tsugikuni that mimics the sun and replicates it with the user's movements, techniques, and abilities. All techniques and forms are extremely varied and have no set pattern, making them the most versatile and effective against enemies. With magical power, solar flames that are effective against unholy can be manifested.

skill.name: Intermediate Kama Sutra
skill.description: (Nsfw)You are experienced in the sexual arts, being skilled at pleasuring your partner and being a pleasant recipient. You know how to spot arousal and what your partner responds to.

skill.name: Intermediate Taming
skill.description: You are good at taming and training wild creatures, making them submit to you, making them obedient, submissive and loyal to you. Also being good at learning how to tame specific creatures. This can also be applied to people to an extent.

skill.name: Intermediate Pressure Points
skill.description: You are experienced at spotting and using pressure points on the body, human or animal. Allowing you to press on pressure points to paralyse people or other points to cause them pleasure etc. Using it in combat, while not easy is possible.

skill.name: Intermediate Massage
skill.description: You are as skilled as an experienced masseuse, being able to relieve pressure, cause pleasure and relax the muscles of people you are massaging.

skill.name: Divine Gaming
skill.description: You are godlike at all kinds of games, chess, video games, gambling, bottle tosss anything of the sort. You are nigh unbeatable at any game unless it is against another godlike being of a similar domain.

skill.name: Intermediate Driving
skill.description: You are a seasoned driver, you are capable of handling a variety of vehicles ranging from bikes and cars to aircraft with familiarity.

skill.name: Intermediate Leadership
skill.description: You are a leader, you know how to motivate, take charge of and lead people with decent effectiveness, instilling confidence into them and making them do what you want them to do. You are an effective leader.

skill.name: Intermediate Charisma
skill.description: You have an aura of charisma around you, it is less of a skill and more of something that is just around you. People of note feel themselves more attracted to your presence, it's subtle things like people paying more attention to you, taking you more seriously etc.

skill.name: Throwing
skill.description: You are fairly skilled at throwing a variety of objects with speed and accuracy, being able to land a stone on the head of a target from across the street without trouble.

skill.name: Intermediate Medicine
skill.description: You are as skilled as a doctor, possessing a variety of medical knowledge and skills in treating injuries, illnesses and problems as well as familiarity with the body and medicine as well as its applications.

skill.name: Kung Fu
skill.description: You are an apprentice in Kung Fu, a Chinese martial art that refines the body,  that emphasizes discipline, efficiency, and adaptability. It encompasses various techniques, including strikes, guards, footwork, and grappling. With sufficient mastery over Kung Fu, you can enhance your strikes with your internal energy

skill.name: Bajiquan
skill.description: You are an apprentice in Bajiquan, a Chinese martial art specializing in explosive short-range attacks and aggressive forward momentum to break through enemy defences. With sufficient mastery over Bajiquan, you can enhance your strikes with your internal energy

skill.name: Taekwondo
skill.description: You are an apprentice in Taekwondo, a dynamic Korean martial art specializing in speed, agility, and powerful kicking techniques. It combines high, spinning, and jumping kicks with fast footwork and precise strikes to deliver devastating blows. With sufficient mastery, you can enhance your strikes with your internal energy

skill.name: Renewal Taekwondo
skill.description: God of Highschool - A specialized form of Taekwondo specializing in strong linear kicks like regular Taekwondo, it initially resembles simply a more refined and powerful Taekwondo style. The true power is only revealed when the user achieves Recoilless by mastering it, allowing them to focus all of their energy on their perfected strikes to unleash devastating effects.

skill.name: Karate
skill.description: You are an apprentice in Karate, A Japanese martial art specializing in powerful strikes, strong stances, and precise technique. With direct, forceful movements using punches, kicks, knee strikes, and blocks to generate maximum impact. Practitioners develop explosive power, speed, and efficiency, making Karate a well-rounded combat skill for both offence and defence. With sufficient mastery, you can enhance your strikes with your internal energy

skill.name: Suppression
skill.description: You are a master of suppressing yourself, getting rid of your presence, lowering it to that of an ordinary presence or fully concealing all of your energy. You can make a presence that shakes gods into one that doesn't seem out of place with foliage.

skill.name: Krav Maga
skill.description: You are an apprentice of Krav Maga, a brutally efficient martial art made for military use, it emphasizes instinctive movements, rapid strikes, and efficient takedowns to neutralize threats as quickly as possible. Krav Maga incorporates techniques from boxing, wrestling, judo, and street fighting. With sufficient mastery, you can enhance your strikes with your internal energy

skill.name: Muay Thai
skill.description: You are an apprentice of Muay Thai, a powerful Thai martial art known as the "Art of Eight Limbs," utilizing punches, kicks, elbows, and knee strikes for devastating close and mid-range combat. It emphasizes powerful strikes, clinch fighting, and relentless conditioning to build endurance and toughness. With sufficient mastery, you can enhance your strikes with your internal energy.

skill.name: Intimidation
skill.description: You are skilled at intimidating people, making them feel fear and shake in their boots with your mere presence, you instinctively know how to present yourself in ways that invoke terror.

skill.name: Novice Cooking
skill.description: You are a novice in the culinary arts, you can cook most basic meals and they will taste good. But don't expect to get a job as a chef. You will however improve much faster than other people if you choose to train yourself.

skill.name: Wilderness Survival
skill.description: You are very skilled at surviving in the wilderness, whether that is making temporary shelter out of materials you can find, identifying safe sources of food, knowing how to track animals, how to secure your stuff, and generally everything needed to know to survive in the wilderness effectively.

skill.name: Novice Acting
skill.description: You are a novice actor, you know how to portray yourself in the ways you want to be seen and hide your real emotions but it is not difficult for experienced people to see through your acting. You will however improve much faster than other people if you choose to train yourself.

skill.name: Novice Shooting
skill.description: You know how to handle firearms, you are no marksman but you are as good as the average soldier at aiming and shooting projectiles. You will however improve much faster than other people if you choose to train yourself.

skill.name: Novice Hand-to-Hand Combat
skill.description: You are reasonably talented in hand-to-hand combat. You know how to punch and where to punch and that's enough for most people. You won't be winning against professionals but you can confidently beat up the average person. You will however improve much faster than other people if you choose to train yourself.

skill.name: Novice Programming
skill.description: You know how to code on the level of a novice, you can create simple programs and know how to read, understand and spot mistakes in codes. And you can do so in every single coding language you have encountered.

skill.name: Novice Mechanics
skill.description: You are as skilled as a mechanic apprentice, you know how to fix basic appliances and maybe even a car when provided with the right tools. You will however improve much faster than other people if you choose to train yourself.

skill.name: Novice Biology
skill.description: You have the skills and knowledge of a Biology Major. You have a decent repertoire of knowledge regarding biology, bodies and organs as well as how things interact with biology.

skill.name: Novice Physics
skill.description: You have the skills and knowledge of a Physics Major. You have a decent repertoire of knowledge regarding physics and the laws of the universe. You know why and how things fall down, why magnets repel each other and how to build a nuclear bomb.

skill.name: Novice Chemistry
skill.description: You have the skills and knowledge of a Chemistry Major. You have a decent repertoire of knowledge regarding chemistry and compounds. You know how to make most regular chemicals and know not to drink bleach.

skill.name: Novice Math
skill.description: You are good at calculating things in your head and doing calculations on the spot. You can solve most math problems you would be able to solve, rather easily in your head instead of writing things down like a human calculator.

skill.name: Novice Blacksmithing
skill.description: You are about as skilled as a Blacksmith's apprentice. You can make basic weapons and tools, but you can't guarantee their quality, at least you can accurately gauge the quality of metalwork you are given.

skill.name: Novice Teaching
skill.description: You are as skilled as a fresh teacher, you know how to impart your knowledge and skills to people well enough but you can't guarantee they will listen or take your lesson to heart.

skill.name: Novice Blade Weapon Mastery
skill.description: You are reasonably talented in handling bladed weapons such as swords and knives. You know how to hold the sword and keep the sharp pointed toward the enemy as well as being able to align the edge of your cuts and poke the stabby end into people.

skill.name: Novice Blunt Weapon Mastery
skill.description: You are reasonably talented in handling blunt weapons such as hammers or clubs. You know how to move your body to do damage with the instrument you are holding, but there is only so much finesse to handling a large stick.

skill.name: Novice Polearm Mastery
skill.description: You are reasonably talented in handling polearms such as spears, halberds or scythes. You know how to smack with the long stick, how to cut with the blade at the end of the long stick, you know how to tab people with the pointy end of the long stick, and that is enough for most people.

skill.name: Novice Item Construction
skill.description: You know how to create minor enchanted and special items, not anything that can be called a proper item but things like a plate that heats itself up or a mask that purifies air are possible as long as you have the proper knowledge base.

skill.name: Novice Kama Sutra
skill.description: (Nsfw)You are reasonably talented in the carnal arts, you know what goes where and how to pleasure your partner as well as what not to do during coitus.

skill.name: Novice Taming
skill.description: You know how to tame wild creatures, but not very precisely. With trial and error, you can probably tame a creature but it won't be easy, though you can easily tame and train mundane animals.

skill.name: Novice Massage
skill.description: You are as skilled as an apprentice masseuse, you know how to give someone a massage that feels good and can relieve pressure but not much beyond that.

skill.name: Novice Driving
skill.description: You know how to drive most vehicles, you are no expert but you won't fall off your bike or start driving into pedestrians.

skill.name: Novice Leadership
skill.description: You know a bit about leading and motivating people, you won't be leading armies anytime soon but the team you lead will probably find you an agreeable leader and you are decent at resolving conflict among members and motivating your team.

skill.name: Novice Charisma
skill.description: You have an aura of charisma around you, it is less of a skill and more of something that is just about you, a change in your demeanour and how you hold yourself perhaps. People of note feel themselves more attracted to your presence, it's subtle things like people paying more attention to you, taking you more seriously etc. Though at this level it is not too noticeable

skill.name: Novice Medicine
skill.description: You are about as skilled as a doctor in training, you know how to perform first aid, how to apply medicine, what most medicines do, and in a pinch improvise medical tools to perform basic surgery.

skill.name: Adept Cooking
skill.description: You are great at cooking, at the level of a veteran chef, you can cook most meals with great flavour, there aren't many who would be disappointed with your cooking. You could easily get a job as a private chef.

skill.name: Literacy
skill.description: You know how to read effectively, you'd be shocked at how little people possess this skill. You know all common languages and mundane languages of the world you are in, and are very skilled at reading books and grimoires, allowing you to read them much faster and digest the information inside of them better.

skill.name: Adept Acting
skill.description: You are as skilled as a veteran actor, being able to effectively present yourself in the ways you want to be seen to invoke the emotions you want to invoke while hiding your real thoughts and feelings. It would take a seasoned detective to suss you out.

skill.name: Adept Shooting
skill.description: You are a natural crack shot, being able to wield most projectile-based weaponry with great familiarity and accuracy, rarely missing your shots unless you are against an opponent of similar skill.

skill.name: Adept Hand-to-Hand Combat
skill.description: You are very talented in unarmed combat, on the level of a veteran martial artist. You know how to move your body to unleash powerful blows, at this level your arms and legs are lethal weapons.

skill.name: Adept Programming
skill.description: You are as skilled as a veteran programmer, being able to write and design complex programs and algorithms while being able to quickly spot mistakes and problems in the codes you write. In addition, you write code far faster than you should be able to without sacrificing quality.

skill.name: Adept Mechanics
skill.description: You are as skilled as a veteran engineer, if given the tools you can repair almost any mundane machine and you could even design a car from scratch and build it yourself. In addition, you tinker and design faster than you should be able to without sacrificing quality.

skill.name: Adept Biology
skill.description: Your experience and knowledge in the field of Biology is on par with a Senior Scientist. You are very knowledgeable in the study of life, such as how living organisms function, how they are formed and what they are made of.

skill.name: Adept Physics
skill.description: Your experience and knowledge in the field of Physics is on par with a Senior Scientist. You are very knowledgeable in the study of the laws of the universe, such as how things are affected by gravity, how electromagnetism works and its effects, how nuclear fission and fusion work etc.

skill.name: Adept Chemistry
skill.description: Your experience and knowledge in the field of Chemistry is on par with a Senior Scientist. You are very knowledgeable in the study of matter, such as what most substances are formed of, how most substances interact with each other, how to form chemical compounds and how to influence matter in the ways you want.

skill.name: Adept Math
skill.description: You are a savant in terms of mathematical and calculative ability, you will never need a calculator since your head crunches calculations faster than you can type them into a calculator, while you aren't competing with computers just yet, you are far faster than you should be.

skill.name: Adept Blacksmithing
skill.description: You are as skilled as a veteran blacksmith. You can create fine weapons and armour without problem, with practice you can even make rare weapons that are sought after. In addition, your understanding of metallurgy and forging are far beyond the average person.

skill.name: Adept Teaching
skill.description: You are a great teacher, you could even call yourself GTO if your name starts with O. You are skilled at imparting your knowledge and skills to others, even if they are a poor student. You can also teach anyone any one of your skills as long as they are physically capable and the skill is below rare rank.

skill.name: Adept Blade Weapon Mastery
skill.description: You are very talented at wielding bladed weapons, on the level of a veteran swordsman. You are able to effectively wield any bladed weapon such as swords and daggers with great efficiency and finesse.

skill.name: Adept Blunt Weapon Mastery
skill.description: You are very talented at wielding blunt weapons such as hammers and clubs. When you are holding any blunt weapon you can exert almost supernatural levels of strength with them.

skill.name: Adept Polearm Mastery
skill.description: You are very talented at wielding polearms, on the level of a veteran spearsman. You are able to effectively wield any polearm such as spears, sickles and halberds with great efficiency and finesse.

skill.name: Adept Item Construction
skill.description: You know how to create enchanted and special items depending on your capabilities, if you know fire magic, you could turn a regular ring into one that deploys a fire barrier in an emergency, or if you have the ability of teleportation you could create a ring that teleports people to a set location etc.

skill.name: Adept Kama Sutra
skill.description: (Nsfw)You are very talented in the carnal art, being able to spot signs of arousal and attraction, in addition, you instinctively know how to pleasure your partner in bed and be a very pleasant recipient, enhancing pleasure for both of you.

skill.name: Adept Taming
skill.description: You are great at taming, making beings submit to your ownership or superiority. You know how to gain the obedience and loyalty of eligible families and people to a lesser extent. You are also good at training them too.

skill.name: Adept Massage
skill.description: You are as skilled as a seasoned masseuse, being able to give a variety of massages that help get rid of exhaustion, recover stamina, revitalize the body and mind and even invoke sexual pleasure. Few would leave the massage bed unsatisfied.

skill.name: Adept Driving
skill.description: You are as skilled as a veteran driver, being able to handle any vehicle with familiarity and ease. If you participate in a race, chances are you will embarrass the competition.

skill.name: Adept Leadership
skill.description: You are a skilled leader, whether that is about small teams or even companies. You know how to get people's loyalty, give them morale, manage and lead them. You would be known as a great commander if you led a military into war.

skill.name: Adept Charisma
