skill.description: You have an aura of charisma around you, it is less of a skill and more of something that is just around you. People of note feel themselves more attracted to your presence, you are more intimidating when you want to be, you are more persuasive when you try to be,

skill.name: Adept Medicine
skill.description: You are very skilled in all areas of medicine, you can do surgery, diagnose conditions, create medicine etc. You are fully qualified as a veteran in all areas of medicine. You can also make your own medicine given the ingredients, even magical ones such as potions depending on the world you are in.

skill.name: Expert Cooking
skill.description: You are an expert in the culinary arts, you are better than most chefs will ever be. You can cook almost any meal if given ingredients and it will almost certainly taste great. At the very least, no one leaves your dining table unsatisfied. Still not quite at foodgasm levels but you are close.

skill.name: Grooming
skill.description: NOT THAT KIND- You are very skilled at grooming, taking care of your hair, your hygiene, your cleanliness, etc., basically, you are skilled at making yourself and others look presentable.

skill.name: Expert Acting
skill.description: You are an expert actor, being able to skillfully portray yourself in the way you want to be perceived in order to invoke the emotions you want to invoke and hide the emotions you want to hide. It would take a real expert to see through your mask.

skill.name: Expert Shooting
skill.description: You are an expert marksman, you handle all firearms and projectiles with great skill and finesse to the point where people might wonder if you have special power. You can even curve your shots and utilize ricochets. You can also better predict the trajectory of enemy projectiles.

skill.name: Expert Hand-to-Hand Combat
skill.description: You are an expert martial artist, you move your body like it is a lethal weapon, knowing where to strike and how to move your body to deal damage with expert skill. You learn and master other types of unarmed martial arts much faster.

skill.name: Expert Programming
skill.description: You are an expert programmer, your skill with coding is comparable to a low-level Tinker ability. You can craft and code complex algorithms and programs with ease, you can even make basic artificial intelligences.

skill.name: Expert Mechanics
skill.description: You are an expert mechanic, your skill at designing, fixing and building machinery is comparable to a low-level Tinker ability. You can fix and build any mundane machine without a problem and even design your improved versions. With enough time and practice you can even build low-level tinkertech.

skill.name: Expert Biology
skill.description: You are an expert in the field of Biology, the study of life. You are intimately familiar with the biology of most organisms, ranging from mammals to cellular life. If you were to be given magic, you could probably figure out Biomancy rather quickly.

skill.name: Expert Physics
skill.description: You are an expert in the field of Physics, the study of the laws of the universe. You are intimately familiar with how the laws of the universe interact with most objects and forces as well as how they work. If you were to be given magic, you could probably figure out Gravity and Electricity magic rather quickly.

skill.name: Expert Chemistry
skill.description: You are an expert in the field of Chemistry, the study of matter. You are intimately familiar with how most chemical compounds and materials are formed as well as how they react to each other and stimuli. If you were to be given magic, you could probably become an alchemist rather quickly.

skill.name: Expert Math
skill.description: You are a true savant when it comes to mathematics and calculations. You can solve most problems relating to numbers with ease and the speed at which you crunch numbers and do calculations in your head

skill.name: Expert Blacksmithing
skill.description: You are an expert blacksmith, the kind that would shack up in the mountains as a hermit, visited by a knight on their quest to slay a dragon. You are intimately familiar with building all kinds of cold weapons and the weapons you create are of supernatural quality, you could forge an iron sword that can cut an iron block in half. You can also grant your weapons special traits depending on the materials you forge them out of.

skill.name: Expert Teaching
skill.description: You are an expert teacher, the kind a protagonist would encounter mid-way through their journey to learn an essential skill from you before leaving and forgetting about you. You are incredibly skilled at imparting your knowledge and skills to your pupils, you could pick any old farmboy and turn him into a fine warrior.

skill.name: Expert Blade Weapon Mastery
skill.description: You are an expert of the bladed weapons such as daggers and swords, not quite in the realm of legends but in the old ages people would sing songs about how you could slay 100 men with a single blade. Your expertise and finesse with blades are the stuff of rumours.

skill.name: Expert Blunt Weapon Mastery
skill.description: You are an expert of blunt weapons like hammers and clubs, the might with which you swing these weapons can brown the pants of any common man. If these were the old ages, there would be folklore about how you splattered a man across the battlefield with a simple mace.

skill.name: Expert Polearm Mastery
skill.description: You are an expert at wielding polearms like spears, halberds and scythes, while not quite on the level of heroes like Cu Chulainn you are ferocious with the spear in your own right. You wield the spear as if it were an extension of your own body.

skill.name: Expert Item Construction
skill.description: You know how to create great enchanted and special items depending on your capabilities, if you know fire magic, you could turn a regular ring into one that deploys fireballs, walls of fire and makes the user resistant to fire, or if you have the ability of teleportation you could create a ring that teleports people to a set location etc.

skill.name: Expert Kama Sutra
skill.description: (Nsfw)You are an expert in the carnal, being intimately familiar with picking up signs of arousal and pleasuring your partners in bed. Unless your partner is completely frigid, no one will leave your bed unsatisfied, your skill in bed is unmatched by most. If you were given magic you could probably create Eromancy.

skill.name: Expert Taming
skill.description: You are an expert in taming and domestication. You know how to turn a ferocious beast into your best buddy, and you know how to skillfully train creatures to gain their obedience and their loyalty. This can also be applied to people to a lesser extent.

skill.name: Expert Massage
skill.description: You are an expert masseuse on the level of a grandpa who spent his life refining his craft. You can give massages that melt away exhaustion, help revitalize the body, ones that give unmatched sexual pleasure, relieve tension etc.

skill.name: Expert Driving
skill.description: You are an expert driver for all kinds of vehicles ranging from scooters to spaceships, you can probably outrace a motorcycle while riding a tricycle. If it has controls to steer it, you can make that baby purr for you in a way others can only hope to imitate.

skill.name: Expert Leadership
skill.description: You are an expert leader, on par with famous leaders throughout history like Iskandar or King Arthur. You know how to motivate, lead and manage the people you are responsible for with finesse and efficiency. You could probably run your own country if you put in some elbow grease.

skill.name: Expert Charisma
skill.description: You have an aura of charisma around you, it is less of a skill and more of something about your presence. People of note feel themselves more attracted to your presence, you are more intimidating when you want to be, you are more persuasive when you try to be,

skill.name: Expert Medicine
skill.description: You are an expert in all fields of medicine that regular humans can seldom match. You know how to perform surgery, make your own supernatural medicine, and diagnose ailments with ease and finesse.

skill.name: Master Cooking
skill.description: You are a real master of cooking, you can cook almost any dish to incredible levels of taste to the point where they might even gain supernatural traits depending on the ingredients you used. You can induce actual foodgasms with your cooking.

skill.name: Makeup
skill.description: You are very skilled at applying makeup and enhancing natural beauty with products.

skill.name: Master Acting
skill.description: You are a master actor, maybe at this point, you can't even tell where the mask is and where you are. You are able to present yourself in any way you would want to be seen and perfectly mask your emotions when you need to. It would take nothing less than the eyes of a truth seer to see beyond your mask.

skill.name: Master Shooting
skill.description: Your marksmanship is on the level of legends like Orion or Arash, or it might be if you train enough. Few mortals can dodge your projectiles, in the old times you would have been hailed as a legendary archer.

skill.name: Master Hand-to-Hand Combat
skill.description: Your skills and talent in martial arts are on the level of legends, you are a true prodigy. You can quickly master most forms of martial arts and your basic comprehension of unarmed combat is incredible, your hands and feet are actual weapons that wouldn't lose out to swords and spears.

skill.name: Master Programming
skill.description: You are a master programmer, your skills are to the point where they may as well be tinker abilities except this is all raw skill. You can easily code complex algorithms and programs as well creating your own Artificial Intelligence. Sci-fi worlds fear you.

skill.name: Master Mechanics
skill.description: You are a master mechanic, your skill at designing, fixing and building machinery can be called a Tinker ability itself if it weren't pure skill. You can easily design, repair, build and improve all mundane appliances. And with enough time and effort, you can create and design your own brand of  Tinkertech.

skill.name: Master Biology
skill.description: You are a master in the field of Biology, the study of life. You are perfectly familiar with the biology of most organisms, ranging from mammals to cellular life to the point where you can guess and estimate the biology of a completely unfamiliar creature. If given time and effort you can also create your own godforsaken biological hybrids and homunculus and even improve the physiology of beings through surgery. But you will need to study to digest all of this knowledge and make use of it due to the immense quantity.

skill.name: Master Physics
skill.description: You are a master in the field of Physics, the study of the laws of the universe. You know how the laws of the universe work and how they interact with the world at large, if given enough time and effort you could probably invent anti-gravity, railgun tech, cold fusion etc. But you will need to study to digest all of this knowledge and make use of it due to the immense quantity.

skill.name: Master Chemistry
skill.description: You are a master in the field of Chemistry, the study of matter. You are perfectly familiar with how most compounds and objects are formed and what reactions cause with what. With your level of mastery, you can probably make your own brand of supersoldier serum if given enough time. But you will need to study to digest all of this knowledge and make use of it due to the immense quantity.

skill.name: Master Math
skill.description: You can't be described as a basic savant anymore, you are truly superhuman when it comes to the matter of numbers, mathematics and calculations to the point where someone might question if you have a computer inside of your head.

skill.name: Master Blacksmithing
skill.description: You are a master blacksmith, and while not quite on the level of someone like Muramasa, describing your works as anything below works of art is an insult. You make weapons, not for simple men but for mighty warriors and heroes of legend. With time and effort, you can create weapons on the level of noble phantasms.

skill.name: Master Teaching
skill.description: You are a master master, does that make sense? You can masterfully impart your knowledge and skills onto your pupil, and while you aren't quite on the level of the Kingmaker like Merlin you can train heroes yourself, if this were the old times, people from across the country would journey to gain your teachings.

skill.name: Master Blade Weapon Mastery
skill.description: You are a true master of the blades, the kind only spoken in legends, you are spoken in the same vein as people like King Arthur and Lancelot, you are on the cusp of the sword saint realm but you aren't quite there yet.

skill.name: Master Blunt Weapon Mastery
skill.description: You are a true master of the blunt weapon, the kind only spoken of in legends. You are one with your hammer, and the strength you can exert while wielding a blunt weapon is far beyond what you would normally be able to. You can shatter the walls of a castle with a branch from a tree.

skill.name: Master Polearm Mastery
skill.description: You are a true master of polearms, the kind only spoken in legends, your skills are spoken in the same vein as people like Cu Chulainn and Lu Bu. You can handle and all polearms such as spears, glaives and scythes with mastery.

skill.name: Master Item Construction
skill.description: You know how to create epic enchanted and special items depending on your capabilities, if you know fire magic, you could turn a regular ring into one that allows the user to use fire magic themselves at a lower level.  If you had an ability like superhuman, you could create a ring that turns the average Joe into a super soldier. Stronger enchantments demand stronger base materials.

skill.name: Master Kama Sutra
skill.description: (Nsfw)You are a true master of lovemaking and passion, no mortal man can match your mastery over the carnal arts, and the bodies of your partners may as well be putty in your hands, even gods would be rendered to helpless messes with your lovemaking skills.

skill.name: Master Taming
skill.description: You are a true master tamer. You can turn even the most ferocious bloodthirsty manic beast into a living room pet. You are a master at also training familiars to gain their obedience and loyalty. This can also apply to people to a lesser extent.

skill.name: Master Massage
skill.description: You are a master masseuse, better than any mortal can be. Your massages can even heal injuries and ailments, your massages are therapeutic and cause immense pleasure and comfort. Even the bodies gods are like putty in your hands.

skill.name: Master Driving
skill.description: You are a true master at driving any kind of vehicle, if it has steering, you can ride any vehicle or mount as if they were your extensions of your body. Ranging from rollerblades to star-sized spacecrafts.

skill.name: Master Leadership
skill.description: You are a master leader, making you excellent at managing, leading, motivating and earning the loyalty of anyone under your leadership. You could easily run your own country, and if these were the old times, you would be hailed as a legendary general.

skill.name: Master Charisma
skill.description: You have an aura of charisma around you, it is less of a skill and more of something about your presence. People of note feel themselves more attracted to your presence, when you want to appear intimidating your presence strikes fear, when you want to calm someone down your aura appears serene etc.

skill.name: Master Medicine
skill.description: You are a true master in all fields of medicine that regular humans can seldom match. You can perform surgery, make your own medicine, and diagnose ailments with extreme efficiency and precision. You could create and design your own medicines, with practice, you could even create superhuman medicines.

skill.name: Grandmaster Cooking
skill.description: You are Grandmaster of Cooking, better than any mortal has any right to be. You can cook any meal ranging from Elder Dragon Steaks, to Leviathan Sushi, your foods, in addition to being incredible in taste are also bestowed with special wonderous effects depending on what you are cooking.

skill.name: Grandmaster Shooting
skill.description: You are a Grandmaster Marksman, you are better than any mortal has any right to be in the same vein as Bullseyet. Your accuracy is almost absolute with any ranged weapon and projectile, and the lethality of any projectile in your hands is unmatched. You could kill a man two streets away by flicking a toothpick through the gap in their eyesocket into their brain.

skill.name: Grandmaster Hand-to-Hand Combat
skill.description: Your skill level in martial arts has reached the level of a Saint. Even without any abilities or energy, your mastery has reached a point where your arms and legs can strike the intangible, you can kick people so hard you literally shatter their soul or slap the magic out of their hands.

skill.name: Grandmaster Programming
skill.description: You are a Grandmaster Programmer, you would be the scourge of any advanced civilization and artificial intelligences, you can casually code incredibly complex programs, and even create your powerful intelligences. If given enough time you could probably code your own Ultron.

skill.name: Grandmaster Mechanics
skill.description: You are on the level of a Saint in terms of mechanics, even in the Stone Age you could probably still create an automated factory. At this point, your skill is on the level of a Tinker Ability. You can easily build, design, fix, and innovate most forms of technology, even ones that are beyond the technology of your current world. You can even create generalized Tinker Tech.

skill.name: Grandmaster Biology
skill.description: Your comprehension in the field of Biology, the study of life is beyond any mortal should have. You instinctively understand the biology of organisms to the point where with a simple scan you can point out their genetic blueprint and know how to alter biology, DNA and genetics to your own ends. You will need time and study to properly digest the sheer amount of information this skill provides, at this level, the amount of knowledge stops becoming knowledge and simply comprehension and instinct toward the world around you instead.

skill.name: Grandmaster Physics
skill.description: Your comprehension in the field of Physics, the study of the laws of the universe is beyond any mortal should have. You know how the laws of the universe work and how they interact with the world at large and how to manipulate those forces to your ends. You will need time and study to properly digest the sheer amount of information this skill provides, at this level, the amount of knowledge stops becoming knowledge and simply comprehension and instinct toward the world around you instead.

skill.name: Grandmaster Chemistry
skill.description: Your comprehension in the field of Chemistry, the study of matter is beyond any mortal should have. You know how matters and materials are formed, how they form more matter with each other and how matters interact with each other to the point where you could easily come up with never-before-seen miracle alloys and materials never thought of. You will need time and study to properly digest the sheer amount of information this skill provides, at this level, the amount of knowledge stops becoming knowledge and simply comprehension and instinct toward the world around you instead.

skill.name: Grandmaster Math
skill.description: Your comprehension and understanding of numbers, mathematics and calculations is at a concerning level. You could go to NASA and outcalculate their computers. The speed at which your brain and mind can crunch numbers and calculations is beyond the level of what most computers can achieve. If you forgot your computer at home your mind is a better alternative anyway.

skill.name: Grandmaster Blacksmithing
skill.description: You are a grandmaster Blacksmith, you are what heroes and legends go to, to get their legendary armaments forged. You could give Muramasa a run for his money and with enough resources, you could probably make your own Durandal, Gram, Gae Bolg etc.

skill.name: Grandmaster Teaching
skill.description: You are a grandmaster at teaching, on par with people such as the King Maker Merlin, just without the decades of experience and repertoire of skills to teach. But if you have the skills yourself, you could pick up a random country girl and train her into a hero of legends.

skill.name: Grandmaster Blade Weapon Mastery
skill.description: You are a swordmaster on the level of a Saint, like mythical legends such as Musashi and Sasaki Kojiro. Even without abilities or energy your skill is at a level where you can even the intangible, you can cut souls, energy, and magic with nothing but your bare body and a blade of any kind.

skill.name: Grandmaster Blunt Weapon Mastery
skill.description: You have reached saint level with Blunt weapons... somehow, you have reached a level of skill where you can handle a club with such skill that you can smash and shatter the intangible, as in, you can hit someone with your club so hard their body, mind and soul shatters. You can also bat away magic like it is a softball.

skill.name: Grandmaster Polearm Mastery
skill.description: You have reached saint level with Polearms, your skill with the spear allows you to pierce and cut the intangible without needing to use any abilities or energy. You can stab someone's soul with your spear, cut their ability in half, bat away magic with the shaft of your spear etc.

skill.name: Grandmaster Item Construction
skill.description: You know how to create legendary enchanted and special items depending on your capabilities such as knowledge, abilities and skills. The artefacts you create are rated on the level of national treasures and items of legend. You can craft a ring that allows its user to use the ability teleportation or a ring that lets you use fire magic, maybe an armor that can resist the heat of the sun, the limits are only on your abilities.

skill.name: Grandmaster Leadership
skill.description: Your skill in leadership and ruling is at the peak of what a person could achieve. You could manage a kingdom and an army in your sleep, for you the act is as easy as playing a game simulating it. People under your rule and command are naturally more loyal and obedient to your rule, the chance of people rebelling against you is nill unless you are just that bad.

skill.name: Grandmaster Medicine
skill.description: You have reached beyond human but not quite god in terms of all fields of medicine and healing. You can perform surgery, modify bodies, and create legendary medicines as well as identify and know how to cure almost all illnesses and ailments. If you were in a cultivation world you would be titled the medicine king.

skill.name: Divine Cooking
skill.description: Your cooking talent is on the level of the gods, the food you cook can give someone an epiphany and change their lives. You can get gods to form a queue outside of your restaurant to taste your cooking.

skill.name: Divine Shooting
skill.description: Your skill and talent with the bow and arrow are on the level of the gods. With training, you could take Artemis, Apollo and Arjuna's lunch money.

skill.name: Divine Hand-to-Hand Combat
skill.description: Your skill and talent with martial arts is something that can only be described as godly. You can learn someone's martial art just by exchanging blows with them, you can make up your martial arts on the spot that would normally take masters tens of years to come up with.

skill.name: Divine Programming
skill.description: Your programming is on the level of the gods. Is this even coding anymore? No? You can translate your code into an actual magic formula to execute in the world. In addition, with your coding abilities, you could bring galactical empires to their knees and make any robot weep. You could probably outcode Ultron.

skill.name: Divine Mechanics
skill.description: Your ability to create, design, fix and improve machinery is on the level of Gods. You can outbuild Tony Stark, it doesn't matter the world you are in, with some time you could probably build a spaceship in the Stone Age. You can practically build any machine as long as you have the proper knowledge and abilities.

skill.name: Principle of Life
skill.description: You possess the knowledge of the creator when it comes to the field of Life and Biology. You know how to create, modify, and understand life. But this knowledge is too much for a mortal vessel, so the knowledge manifests as instinctive comprehension when it comes to all matters of life, the stronger you get the more access you will get to the principle.

skill.name: Principle of Law
skill.description: You possess the knowledge of the creator when it comes to the fundamental forces of the universe. You know perfectly how the laws that make up the world work and how to manipulate them to your desires. But this knowledge is too much for a mortal vessel, so the knowledge manifests as instinctive comprehension when it comes to all matters of life, the stronger you get the more access you will get to the principle.

skill.name: Principle of Matter
skill.description: You possess the knowledge of the creator when it comes to the field of matter and creation. You know how to construct, transmute, and understand matter, even create matter that doesn't exist. But this knowledge is too much for a mortal vessel, so the knowledge manifests as instinctive comprehension when it comes to all matters of life, the stronger you get the more access you will get to the principle.

skill.name: Divine Formula
skill.description: Your internal calculator is beyond that of a calculator, you can effortlessly solve all mathematical problems and perform calculations faster than the fastest supercomputers. You could probably replicate the Kankara formula from DxD. But if your vessel is too weak it might be wise to not use all of your computational power to not melt your brain.

skill.name: Divine Blacksmithing
skill.description: Your blacksmithing skill is qualified to be on the level of a god, with enough training you could Hephaestus a run for their money. With enough resources and time, you can forge your own Excalibur, Gugnir, Longinus, Mjolnir etc.

skill.name: Divine Teaching
skill.description: Your ability to impart your skills and knowledge to others is on a divine level. You could train the average farmboy into a demigod with enough effort. There is no one you cannot teach.

skill.name: Divine Blade Weapon Mastery
skill.description: Your level of mastery with swords is divine, with training, there is nothing you cannot cut. Space, Time, Heat, Mind, Souls, the only limit is the effort you are willing to put in. If you are not strong enough you may need training to properly digest this skill.

skill.name: Divine Polearm Mastery
skill.description: Your level of mastery with polearms is divine, with training, there is nothing you cannot stab, cut or strike. Space, Time, Heat, Mind, Souls, the only limit is the effort you are willing to put in. If you are not strong enough you may need training to properly digest this skill.

skill.name: Divine Blunt Weapon Mastery
skill.description: Your level of mastery with blunt instruments is divine, with training, there is nothing you cannot crush and shatter. Space, Time, Heat, Mind, Souls, the only limit is the effort you are willing to put in. If you are not strong enough you may need training to properly digest this skill.

skill.name: Divine Item Construction
skill.description: Your knowledge of creating artefacts and wonderous items is on the level of gods. The items you could create can be hailed as holy grails, if you have the skills, resources, time and abilities you could even make your own divine artefacts like a tesseract, a holy grail or even a Longinus.

skill.name: Divine Leadership
skill.description: Your leadership and ruling skills are on a divine level, you could maintain a galaxy-spanning empire and still be able to handle all bureaucracy yourself. Any army you lead will be soldiers with unstoppable morale and might, any empire you lead will prosper.

skill.name: Divine Charisma
skill.description: You have the presence and aura of a god. Your sheer charisma can bring people to their knees, attract people of note to you, calm down a raging beast, or inspire awe from the masses. You will be the most popular being alive.

skill.name: Divine Medicine
skill.description: You are as skilled as a god of health and medicine. You can modify and heal bodies to your liking as long as you have the tools, you know how to cure any ailment, not only that but you can create divine medicines like Panaceas and Elixirs of Immortality. But this knowledge is too much for a mortal vessel, so the knowledge manifests as instinctive comprehension when it comes to all matters of life, the stronger you get the more access you will get to the Divine Knowledge.

skill.name: Novice Interfacing
skill.description: You are nimble I can give you that, you know how to pick basic locks, pick pockets, find your way around mechanisms and move with decent grace.

skill.name: Intermediate Interfacing
skill.description: You are a tricky one, you know how to pick locks, pick pockets, figure out the kinks in mechanics and have a feeling for knowing your way around things. Your fingers may get a little restless.

skill.name: Adept Interfacing
skill.description: You are one dextrous fellow with slippery fingers. You can easily pick the most mundane locks, empty people's pockets without them noticing, perform magic tricks(performance, not actual magic), feel your way around the kinks in mechanics, and all around have some very dextrous fingers best at knowing their way around things, few barriers can keep you out, good luck keeping you in jail.

skill.name: Expert Interfacing
skill.description: Your skill in interfacing is at the level where there are few locks and mechanisms that can keep you out. You can probably steal someone's clothes off of their body without them noticing. Your ability to feel around and exploit the weaknesses fo mechanisms such as locks, machines, terminals etc. is on an incredible level.

skill.name: Master Interfacing
skill.description: You are a master of interfacing, your fingers are so nimble that any lock or barrier may as well not exist in front of you. You could probably pick your way into Area 53 with a single hairpin. You can steal someone's underwear off their body without them noticing. You can interface with and exploit the weakness of any lock or mechanism like it's your own body.

skill.name: Novice Savoir Faire
skill.description: You know how to move with some relative grace and finesse. You are light on your feet, you know how to dance and how to place your feet so that you don't trip and fall. And if you do fall, you can do so with some semblance of grace.

skill.name: Intermediate Savoir Faire
skill.description: You know how to move with grace and finesse. You are light on your feet and you can definitely tear up the dance floor. You rarely lose your balance and can perform parkour. You can also perform flips and manoeuvres with decent grace.

skill.name: Adept Savoir Faire
skill.description: You are one smooth bastard. Grace and Finesse are natural to you. Allowing you to move with flair and smoothness. You are skilled at acrobatics, dancing, parkour and anything that requires finesse or agility

skill.name: Expert Savoir Faire
skill.description: You are one stylish and cool bastard. Your finesse is unmatched. You can perform acrobatics, dancing, parkour and anything that requires finesse or agility at the level of an expert. You move like the wind and water, you are truly one stylish bastard.

skill.name: Master Savoir Faire
skill.description: You are the master of grace, cool and finesse. You perform feats of acrobatics, dancing, parkour and nimbleness that would baffle the minds of any as natural as you breathe. Even as a baseline human, you could probably dance around bullets.

skill.name: Novice Stealth
skill.description: You are a novice in the way of stealth, you know how to mask your footsteps, how to sneak up on people, how to check for traps, and how to gather information more effectively. But anyone actually involved in the field is better than you.

skill.name: Intermediate Stealth
skill.description: You are experienced in the way of stealth, you know how to move silently, how to sneak up on people, how to check for traps, and how to gather information more effectively. You would be a qualified ninja grunt.

skill.name: Adept Stealth
skill.description: You are skilled in the way of stealth, you know how to move silently, how to sneak up on people, how to check for traps, you can blend into your surroundings and sneak up on people who know you are coming. You would make Solid Snake proud.

skill.name: Expert Stealth
skill.description: You are an expert in the way of stealth, you know how to move like a ghost, silently, blend into your surroundings and swim with the shadows. You could sneak into a military base and no soul would know you were there. You could stalk an owl through a forest while wearing a high-visibility jacket. You are up there with the greatest assassins.

skill.name: Master Stealth
skill.description: You have mastered the art of stealth, you blend in with the shadows and move without a single sound, you can also suppress your presence so much that even someone looking directly at you would struggle to distinguish between you and the world around you. You are in league with even the greatest of the Hassasin.

skill.name: Jack of All Trades
skill.description: You have novice-level expertise in all basic trades (Novice Blacksmithing, Medicine, Mechanics, Cooking, Interfacing) with competence of an apprentice and are fairly talented in those fields. Does not extend to combat skills.

skill.name: Queen of All Trades
skill.description: You have intermediate-level expertise in all basic trades (Intermediate Blacksmithing, Medicine, Mechanics, Cooking, Interfacing) with fair competence comparable to actual performers of the trade and are talented in those fields.

skill.name: King of All Trades
skill.description: You have Adept-level expertise in all basic trades (Adept Blacksmithing, Medicine, Mechanics, Cooking, Interfacing) with competence comparable to an actual veteran of the trade and are greatly talented in those fields.

skill.name: Ace of All Trades
skill.description: You have Expert-level expertise in all basic trade skills(Expert Blacksmithing, Medicine, Mechanics, Cooking, Interfacing), granting you expertise comparable to the real masters of the trades. And if you choose to train them further, you are also far more talented in any Trade field.

skill.name: Firebending
skill.description: Avatar - You are an apprentice Firebender, being able to convert your internal energy into fire you can manipulate with your own form of movements and martial arts. The more experienced and trained you are the stronger your bending.

skill.name: Waterbending
skill.description: Avatar - You are an apprentice Waterbender, being able to use your internal energy to interact with the water in the world around you, using movements to bend to your will. The more experienced and trained you are the stronger your bending.

skill.name: Airbending
skill.description: Avatar - You are an apprentice Airbender, being able to use your internal energy to interact with the air in the world around you, using movements to bend to your will. The more experienced and trained you are the stronger your bending.

skill.name: Earthbending
skill.description: Avatar - You are an apprentice Earthbender, being able to use your internal energy to interact with the earth in the world around you, using movements to bend to your will. The more experienced and trained you are the stronger your bending.

skill.name: Novice Performance
skill.description: You know how to put in a performance. You are able to play all musical instruments enough to play basic songs, you can also sing decently, you can dance without tripping. You would fit right in with a high school band.

skill.name: Intermediate Performance
skill.description: You are a qualified performer. Being able to play all basic musical instruments enough to play most songs on them, and you can sing most songs well enough that people may just like them. If you get on the dance floor you won't be an eyesore to anyone. You can assemble your own semi-successful band.

skill.name: Adept Performance
skill.description: You are a great performer. You can play all musical instruments well enough to impress most people, and you are great at singing too, enough to capture people's attention with your tunes and have a flair for impressing crowds. You certainly know how to put on a show. You would have a very successful entertainer career.

skill.name: Expert Performance
skill.description: You have the skills of an expert performer. You can play any instrument about as well as anyone can, and sing with a voice that impresses just about anyone. You can captivate large crowds with your performance, and imbue your emotions into your songs, you know how to sway crowds like an expert. You would be hailed as one of the classics and counted among the greats.

skill.name: Master Performance
skill.description: You have mastered the art of putting on a performance. You can play any instrument well enough to impress the world, your voice when singing is nothing short of captivating. You can sway entire crowds, put on performances that make crowds weep or cheer, you know how to capture and sway crowds instinctively. Without a doubt, you would be hailed as one of the greatest artists and idols of all time.

skill.name: Novice Management
skill.description: You are a novice at managing things. You know how to schedule your day, distribute your tasks, and attention to spend your time better. You would make a decent secretary.

skill.name: Intermediate Management
skill.description: You are fairly skilled at management tasks, you can split your attention adequately between tasks, distribute tasks, structure things, manage groups, etc. You would make a fine secretary or a small business owner.

skill.name: Adept Management
skill.description: You are skilled at management tasks, you know how to distribute tasks, handle them efficiently, handle employees or minions, multitask efficiently and deal with financial problems efficiently. You could easily run your own company or be an excelling financial advisor.

skill.name: Expert Management
skill.description: You have become an expert in the art of management. Whether it is managing finances, people, assets, distributing tasks or managing your own attention and problems you can do so with brutal efficiency and expertise. You can easily run a multi-national company or a nation.

skill.name: Master Management
skill.description: You are a master of management. You can easily manage tasks, people, assets, finances, distribution of tasks, and just about anything needed to manage a large group such as a company or even a country. You can also freely split your attention between tasks seamlessly, almost like parallel processing. You can increase your mastery even further by training and experience.

skill.name: Novice Discipline
skill.description: You have basic discipline. You are able to endure slight hardship, able to force yourself to eat things you don't want to eat and study when you don't want to but your discipline is not that much greater than the average person.

skill.name: Intermediate Discipline
skill.description: Your discipline is remarkable. You are fairly disciplined, being able to endure hardship such as discomfort and pain without audible complaints. You can force yourself to train even when you don't want to and get out of bed even when it's very comfortable, you are pretty good at maintaining focus. People would say you have an excellent work ethic.

skill.name: Adept Discipline
skill.description: Your dedication and focus are admirable. You are very disciplined, being able to focus on tasks without falling to distractions, you are able to grit your teeth and get it done, even when in pain you can push on. You are able to push through discomfort, annoyance, and pain to get whatever job you need to get done. It is hard to use mental abilities on you.

skill.name: Expert Discipline
skill.description: You have a mind made of iron. Your focus is sharp as a blade, if you do not want to be interrupted you won't be, if you know you need to keep going, you will. You can endure the toughest of training, even if your body starts breaking down you can force it to keep going for longer. You are very resistant to mental influences and effects.

skill.name: Master Discipline
skill.description: You are the master of your own mind, the god of your own ship. Pain has no effect on your abilities, you can endure the toughest of punishments even if you think you can't. Your focus cannot be shaken, your discipline is unmatched. Your mind cannot be shaken by those weaker than yourself, and even then they will not have a good time. You are as disciplined as Batman himself.

skill.name: Rokushiki
skill.description: One Piece - A special superhuman martial arts developed for only the most expert and skilled of the Marines and Cipher Pol agents. Rokushiki consists of 6 different special superhuman techniques and a secret 7th one they have achieved mastery over the others. You start with knowledge of all techniques but have to train to use them.

skill.name: Caryll Runecraft
skill.description: The Outer Ones beyond the stars whisper to you, and allow you to catch glimpses of their knowledge in the form of runes. You can memorize the runes of the Outer Gods to acquire some boons. But you will have to study to memorize the runes given to you. You can only have three runes active at a time  List of Runes: https://bloodborne.wiki.fextralife.com/Caryll+Runes

skill.name: Novice Conceptualization
skill.description: Conceptualization is your ability to understand what shouldn't be, in essence, it is your ability to comprehend the mystical, magical and eldrich. You have an easier time comprehending, understanding and learning mystical and exotic effects but so much above the average person.

skill.name: Intermediate Conceptualization
skill.description: Conceptualization is your ability to understand what is beyond the mundane. You are an intermediate at comprehending the Mystical and Esoteric. You learn and master magic faster, and you are better at understanding the composition of abilities and esoteric effects.

skill.name: Adept Conceptualization
skill.description: Conceptualization is your ability to understand what is beyond the mundane and inexplicable. With this level, your mind probably won't be shattered by hearing the old ones whisper. Magic and Esoteric make more sense to you when you see them, you understand, learn, and develop magic more easily and have a better time understanding the mystical side of reality.

skill.name: Expert Conceptualization
skill.description: Conceptualization is your ability to understand what is beyond mundane reality into the realm of esoterics and mystical. Your mind is more easily able to comprehend arcane mysteries and esoterics. Allowing you to learn and develop things like magic far more easily and possess a great intuition towards the esoteric side of reality.

skill.name: Master Conceptualization
skill.description: Conceptualization is your ability to understand what is below the veil of base reality. You are able to comprehend and understand arcane mysteries and Outer concepts like it is second nature. You are able to understand, dissect, learn and develop magic and mystery to a level that far outstrips most mages. You could hold a conversation with the old ones and even translate their words into runes with training if you were to ever hear them or use their words to break the minds of others.

skill.name: Divine Conceptualization
skill.description: You have achieved true conceptualization, your mind is wired differently from those of mortals and immortals. Understanding magic and mystery is not any harder than regular math or reading words on a paper. You could instinctively use magic and due to your natural understanding of the stars, you can call upon the powers of the Outer Gods, and use their words to bend reality around with enough practice. It would not be wrong to consider you an infant Outer God.

skill.name: Somas Winemaking
skill.description: Danmachi - You are as great at making wine and other alcoholic products as the god Soma. But you still need experimentation to figure out the wines you can make with the resources. Even god does not succeed every time.

skill.name: Quickening
skill.description: Bloodborne - You have mastered the Quickening Technique of the Old Hunters, allowing you to briefly dash forward with incredible speed while shrouding your form in arcane fog to obscure your movements. This can put quite a strain on the stamina and energy.

skill.name: Edna Mode
skill.description: Incredibles - You are not a simple fashionista baby, you are THE fashionista. You are a master of designing clothes and costumes; if someone needs a costume, they come to YOU. Your skill in creating costumes can be compared to a Tinker even because you are just THAT good.

skill.name: Salt Distillation
skill.description: You are skilled at extracting salt from sources of water or tears.

skill.name: Prana Bindu
skill.description: Dune - You are learned in the ways of Prana Bindu, allowing you to train in controlling your body beyond human levels. From controlling how your individual muscles move, to controlling individual strands and eventually, with enough training, controlling your very own nerves and bioelectrical signals.

skill.name: Novice Communication
skill.description: Communication is the ability to better understand what others mean and how fo convey your thoughts effectively. At a novice level, you may not be that much better than the regular person, but at least you know how to properly communicate with people, which is a strangely rare skill these days.

skill.name: Intermediate Communication
skill.description: You are skilled at understanding others and conveying your own intent through words and actions. Allowing you to better discern the emotions behind their words and make yourself understood to people who otherwise have a hard time understanding you.

skill.name: Adept Communication
skill.description: You are greatly skilled at communicating, understanding others and conveying your intentions. You can make yourself understood to basically anyone; you could even communicate through exclusively body language and still be understood. You are able to pick up on the intents and emotions of people easily through their body language, tone of voice, slight shakes as they speak, etc. it is difficult to hide their intention in front of you unless they are something like a trained spy.

skill.name: Expert Communication
skill.description: You are an expert in communication. You can always convey what you mean to anyone, be it the stupidest human or the lowliest beast; you can even live your life through gestures and not be misunderstood. You can tell when people lie and understand their true intentions by cold reading them; they don't even have to talk, you can understand what they want and what they feel just by extreme cold reading.

skill.name: Master Communication
skill.description: You are the absolute master in communication, to the point where it borders magic. You may not understand what language they speak, but you can read their intent and emotions from a simple glance enough to basically mind-read them. And you always know how to perfectly convey what you mean, you can convey a hundred words with a single nod, talk to animals and make them understand you, or perfectly convey just how badly you will hurt or love someone.

skill.name: Novice Persuasion
skill.description: Persuasion is your skill in convincing people. At novice rank you are slightly better than the average person at appealing your case and trying to convince people with words.

skill.name: Intermediate Persuasion
skill.description: You are skilled in convincing people, with your words or actions, like a used car salesman or a lawyer. You have a decent feel for what words would resonate with the type of person you're speaking with.

skill.name: Adept Persuasion
skill.description: You are a skilled talker for sure, you are well-trained in the art of convincing people with your words and actions. Being able to present yourself in ways that make you easier to believe and knowing to make people better believe what you are what you are saying to them. You would make a damn fine politician.

skill.name: Expert Persuasion
skill.description: You are an expert in the art of Persuasion, having a great feel for what words are more effective on what types of people, being able to far more easily sway them with your words and actions. You are skilled enough to persuade people to do things they would otherwise not be willing to do.

skill.name: Master Persuasion
skill.description: You have mastered the art of Persuasion, the ability to convince people and make them see what you see. You are among the best talkers in history, you have an almost supernatural awareness of what words and actions work best on which people. But beware, no matter how skilled you are, some people just cannot be made to listen.

skill.name: Novice Ninjutsu
skill.description: You have passed very basic Ninja Training, although you cannot be considered an actual ninja by any means, you have the basic training. You know how to handle most knives and swords enough to not cut yourself, have a basic grasp on acrobatics, moving around sneakily and using tools in battle.

skill.name: Intermediate Ninjutsu
skill.description: You are a Ninja, although more around the rank of a Ninja grunt. You are able to handle throwing weapons, knives and swords with relative skill. And you are also decent at sneaking around and performing feats of acrobatics and espionage. Your training allows you to use tools in combat with more finesse.

skill.name: Adept Ninjutsu
skill.description: You are a real ninja, not just a footman, but a fully fledged Ninja. You are able to skillfully handle thrown weapons, bladed weapons and engage in hand-to-hand combat. You are also a skilled acrobat and can mask your sounds and presence fairly effectively. You have great proficiency in using tools in the midst of combat. Although not a match against another Adept in any one of those fields, your skills make you a formidable Ninja.

skill.name: Expert Ninjutsu
skill.description: You are a true Expert Ninja, with skills that have been polished to a honed edge. You can handle thrown weapons, bladed weapons with great efficiency and engage in unarmed combat with the same level of skill, focusing on quick and brutal decisive strikes. Your real skill in combat shines when using tools to supplement your fighting style. Your Agility and Acrobatics are incredible, being able to aim dodge bullets even with base human stats and parkour as naturally as if you were walking, and your stealth makes you a shadow in the night, suppressing your presence, blending into the background and leaving no tracks are like second nature to you. Most would be hard-pressed to spot you. Although not a match against another Expert in any one of those fields, your skills make you a formidable Ninja. The influx of skills may take some time and training to digest.

skill.name: Master Ninjutsu
skill.description: You are a Master Ninja, having achieved mastery over several crafts to have honed your skills to incredible levels. You are able to expertly utilise Thrown Weapons, Tools, Bladed Weapons, and Unarmed Combat to achieve a very lethal style of combat that only other masters can match. You are an expert at acrobatics and stealth, being able to hide your presence from all but the most vigilant eyes and blend in with your environment. You move with utmost efficiency and grace. Although not a match against another Master in any one of those fields, your skills make you a formidable Ninja. The influx of skills may take some time and training to digest.

skill.name: Mixology
skill.description: You have the skills of a well-trained mixologist and bartender. You know how to mix most drinks and come up with your own alcohol combinations that taste great, as well as managing a bar and dealing with drunk people.

skill.name: Begging
skill.description: You are very skilled at throwing your dignity away and begging people for things. Get on the ground on all fours and start crying, and you could get most people to think you are pitiful enough to grant your request. Who needs dignity when you can beg people for free things? People are more receptive to your begging, and it is easier to get people to accept your requests this way. Warning: Effects are heavily dependent on the type of individual; works especially well against soft-hearted people.

skill.name: Architecture
skill.description: You are very skilled at the craft of Architecture, designing buildings and structures that both look good and hold up well. You could design entire cities, well, minus the infrastructure. But you could still easily get a job as an architect.

skill.name: Litigation
skill.description: You have the skills of an experienced lawyer, having a great grasp on the laws of the world, country and city you are in, to the point where you can easily defend yourself or a client in their local court of law. If someone has a problem, they'd better call you.

skill.name: Gooning
skill.description: You are skilled at the art of gooning, that is, being a low-rank thug for a boss. You know how to shake people down for money, intimidate someone for their wallet, and have novice-level skill in wielding knives, pistols and fighting unarmed. You can also use a Brooklyn accent at will. You could easily score a low-ranking job in any organised crime organisation.

skill.name: Cosplayer
skill.description: You are very skilled in cosplaying and dressing up. You can also sew well enough to create convincing cosplay outfits and outfits in general, but you are better at making clothes you have seen before. People may even mistake you for someone else if you cosplay as a real person.

skill.name: Servitude
skill.description: You are one hell of a Maid/Butler, having great skill in housekeeping, manners and many manners of servitude. You can clean, keep track of schedules, remember people's preferences, you know how to present yourself in a professional yet approachable manner and overall are experienced in all skills that would be needed by someone in the profession.

skill.name: Aura Farming
skill.description: You are skilled at presenting yourself in ways that are ""cool"" and ""badass"". You have a unique for spotting instances and timings to ""farm aura"", interjecting at just the perfect moment, making a dramatic entrance, standing on top of a ledge with your back turned as your cape flutters majestically, producing a crisp dap. You are also skilled at not seeming ""uncool"" such as avoiding tripping, stuttering, if you mess up you will have a better time at recovering to not lose your ""Aura"".

skill.name: Fishman Karate
skill.description: One Piece - You have the knowledge of Fishman Karate, the unique martial art invented by Fishmen that allows them to manipulate water offensively alongside martial arts. You can use preexisting water to enhance the power of your blows, disrupt the fluids inside your opponent with your hits or transmit the power of your fists through the moisture in the air. You begin as a White Belt in the air and can train yourself to reach higher mastery.

skill.name: Clowning Around
skill.description: You are a graduate from Clown College, you know how to tell lame jokes, entertain kids, make balloon animals, fit in comically small cars, apply humorous makeup, and other such skills needed by a professional clown.

skill.name: Novice Spycraft
skill.description: You are trained to be a Spy, not good enough to be considered a proper one, but enough to benefit from the training. You know how to better eavesdrop on people, how to mask your feelings better, deceive people, use disguises and deduce what people are thinking. You can also use guns and knives without killing yourself. You are no match for anyone actually trained in those fields, but the experience makes you better than the average man.

skill.name: Intermediate Spycraft
skill.description: You are properly trained to be a fully fledged spy, not the best among them or even great, but enough to qualify. You can eavesdrop on conversations better, know how to snoop for information far better, how to interrogate someone, how to deceive people, how to use a disguise and how to engage in combat if the need arises using Knives and Guns. You are not a match for a fellow intermediate in any one of those skills, but they make you a decent spy nonetheless.

skill.name: Adept Spycraft
skill.description: You are a real spy, the kind that would infiltrate other countries and make Bonds James proud. You are skilled at gathering information, infiltrating places, acting, masking your real emotions, effectively using disguises, reading people, and if need be, you can handle yourself well in combat using Knives, Guns and Hand-to-Hand Combat. While not a match for a fellow adepts in any one of those skills, but they make you an effective spy.

skill.name: Expert Spycraft
skill.description: You are an Expert Spy, the kind that would make Loid Forger proud. You are greatly skilled at gathering information, infiltration, acting, maintaining your calm, enduring stress, disguising, cold reading people and if the need arises, you are plenty skilled in combat using Unarmed, Knives and Guns. While not a match for a fellow adept in any one of those skills, they make you a great spy nonetheless.

skill.name: Master Spycraft
skill.description: You are a Master Spy, among the best there is. You are an expert in gathering information,  infiltration, deception, acting, maintaining your cool, disguising, acting, cold reading people, and in the need for it, you are an expert combatant in using Unarmed, Knives and Guns. While not a match for a fellow master in any single one of those skills, they make you a master spy nonetheless.

skill.name: Stylist
skill.description: You have the skill of a skilled hair stylist, enough to get employed by celebrities and nobles, you know how to style hair and make it look good like it's second nature to you.

skill.name: Cheer
skill.description: You have a natural knack for giving motivation and cheering people up. You have a feel for what words someone wants to hear right now and what to do to cheer them up or get them out of a slump. You'd also be one hell of a cheerleader.

skill.name: Novice Fine Arts
skill.description: You are a novice artist, someone who pursues fine arts, having a beginner level of skill in most arts such as Painting, Engraving, Sketching, Sculpting, etc., and in general have some skill in making things more aesthetically pleasing. But it would be a stretch to call you a real artist.

skill.name: Intermediate Fine Arts
skill.description: You have the skills of a professional Fine Artist, having a good level of skill in most fine arts such as Drawing, Painting, Sketching, Sculpting, Engraving, etc., and in general the art of making things more aesthetically pleasing. You could probably get a job like a painter, illustrator, sculptor without much hassle, but you wouldn't exactly stand out.

skill.name: Adept Fine Arts
skill.description: You have the skills of an experienced Senior Artist, having a great deal of skill in most fine arts such as Drawing, Painting, Sketching, Sculpting, Engraving, etc., and in general, the art of making things more aesthetically pleasing comes naturally to you. You could easily get a job in the arts; if these were the medieval times, most nobles would hire your services.

skill.name: Expert Fine Arts
skill.description: You have the skills of an Expert Renowned Artist, having impressive skill in most fine arts such as Drawing, Painting, Sketching, Sculpting, Engraving, etc., and in general, the art of making things more aesthetically pleasing comes naturally to you. Your works of art would be put in a museum and sell for great amounts of money at auctions, you have the skills to make paintings that evoke great emotion and sculptures that almost look alive. If these were the medieval times, Nobles would line up for your services, and your name would go down in history.

skill.name: Master Fine Arts
skill.description: You have the skills of a true Master Artist. Having incredible, almost supernatural skill in most fine arts, Drawing, Painting, Sketching, Sculpting, Engraving, etc., and in general, the art of making things more aesthetically pleasing comes naturally to you. Given some time and inspiration, you can produce masterpieces; you instinctively know what kind of aesthetics appeals to what kinds of people, how to pour your thoughts and emotions into your works, and create art that can shake the hearts of even the sternest art critics. You would most likely be renowned as one of the greatest in art history. And you are the exact kind of person they speak in legends of gods being pissy about mortals beating them in a game of skill and cursing them.

skill.name: Farming
skill.description: You have extensive farming knowledge and skills that can compete with the most experienced of farmers, including how to maintain a farm, care for livestock, know how to maintain soil, etc.

skill.name: Sign Language
skill.description: You know how to use the basic sign language of this world as well as you can speak your native language.

skill.name: Mental Image Blocking
skill.description: Batman - You have learned a technique to block out mind readers and telepaths by masking your real thoughts with conjured mental images, taught to you by the ever-elusive Tibetan Monks

skill.name: Mind Control Resistance
skill.description: Batman - Thanks to the teachings of the Tibetan Monks you have learned how to resist Mind Control and Mind Reading. The amount of resistance you can put up is proportional to your mental strength and overall power level.

skill.name: Army Breaker
skill.description: Strike it Rich - Rikudou: Army Breaker is a specialized martial art that has its basis in Karate movements. Emphasizing the weight of the arms, shifting of one's center of balance, and relaxation to deliver blows fast as whips yet heavy as hammers, a skilled enough human can even cut down to bone with a single blow. With enough practice, the user can control their own joints to elongate their arm further and increase the power behind the attacks called "Dawn".

skill.name: Kaiwan Style
skill.description: Kengan Ashura - You are an apprentice in the Kaiwan Style, an assassination Martial art that has roots in multiple martial arts, mainly in Karate. Practice of it requires knowledge of the nervous system, pressure points, and Qigong. Although simplistic from the outside, this martial art focuses on direct strikes perfected with timing as well as great control over the body. The main move is Devil Lance, which is a direct spear-like strike that possesses great power but requires superhuman conditioning to use properly. Skilled enough users can use "Motionless" to predict the next moves of their opponents and strike their open spots.

skill.name: The Niko Style
skill.description: Kengan Ashura - You are an apprentice in the Niko Style. A compilation of various "Kata's" that require great control of one's body and a lot of skill and practice. The Adamantine Kata focuses on tightening and bracing one's muscles to deliver powerful blows and withstand attacks. The Flame Kata focuses on dodging, footwork, and agility. The Redirection Kata focuses on shifting and parrying the blows of other opponents. The Water Kata focuses on binds and holds. One can combine all 4 Kata's principles into Demonsbane, a devastating strike, but it requires immense skill to use properly. The secret techniques of Possessing Spirit allow one to speed up their heartbeat to extreme levels to improve their physical performance, while Fallen Demon allows one to forcefully slow down perception of time, but both of these techniques can damage the user.

skill.name: Possessing Spirit
skill.description: Kengan Ashura - Otherwise referred to as "Advance" allows one to speed up their heartbeat and blood flow to massively increase their performance, but can cause difficulty in controlling one's Bloodlust, which can be trained. First Gear increases one's physical performance and makes it harder to control themselves. Second Gear further increases physical performance, but induces bloodlust in the user and lowers their self-control. Third Gear increases their heartbeat and blood flow to inhuman levels, making one appear to be almost possessed by a demon, massively amplifying their physical performance and their bloodlust while suppressing their sense of pain, but it is likely to cause permanent damage without intervention. The drawbacks of this technique are that it can damage the user's heart, veins, and other organs due to the immense strain placed on them and the inhuman blood flow.

skill.name: Kaolan Style
skill.description: Kengan Ashura - You are an apprentice in the Kaolan Style. An all-rounder striking technique that combines aspects of both Muay Thai and Boxing, invented by the genius boxer Kaolan Wongsavat. This style focuses on adaptability, power, and speed to overpower opponents and overwhelm them with quick strikes while being able to respond to most moves. The standout move of this style is 'Flash' which focuses on throwing a hail of flicker jabs at great speeds in a single breath to overwhelm opponents. And its most powerful move is "God Blow", a straight punch thrown at incredible speeds with similar principle that is so fast it can hurt the users arm if thrown improperly.

skill.name: Lingshu Chin Na
skill.description: Kengan Ashura - You are a practitioner of the Lingsu Chin Na, a special Chinese martial arts style based around striking the acupoints of the opponent to deliver debilitating blows without the need for greater strength. Using knowledge of the human body, the user lands quick and precise finger jabs towards the acupoints to debilitate the target with each strike, making it incredibly effective and deadly when used properly. But the further a target's biology deviates from human biology, the harder the martial art will be to use without studying.

skill.name: Kujin Style
skill.description: Kengan Ashura - The Kujin style is a martial arts style developed in Japan to counter heavily armored or lumbering large opponents. The main technique of this style is based around throws, sweeps, and trips to get the opponent to the ground and then finish them off while they are on the ground with powerful blows. But may struggle against more traditional martial arts.

skill.name: Martial Foresight
skill.description: Kengan Ashura - The Foresight is a technique developed by skilled fighters. It is a skill that allows one to predict a target's moves to dodge and counter them through quick analysis and instinct. Your Foresight is quite basic, and will require actual fights to train and develop.

skill.name: Novice Arms Mastery
skill.description: You are able to handle all conventional weapons, ranging from knives to swords to axes to polearms to guns to bows to even chained weapons and clubs with basic proficiency, enough to have some familiarity and know how it's used.

skill.name: Intermediate Arms Mastery
skill.description: You are able to handle all conventional weapons, ranging from knives to swords to axes to polearms to guns to bows to even chained weapons and clubs with notable proficiency, enough to match a general practitioner of the weapon and wield them effectively.

skill.name: Adept Arms Mastery
skill.description: You are able to handle all conventional weapons, ranging from knives to swords to axes to polearms to guns to bows to even chained weapons and clubs with great skill, enough to match most dedicated practitioners in skill.

skill.name: Expert Arms Mastery
skill.description: You are able to handle all conventional weapons, ranging from knives to swords to axes to polearms to guns to bows to even chained weapons and clubs with incredible skill enough to match real experts who have specialize in those weapons.

skill.name: Master Arms Mastery
skill.description: You have mastery over all conventional and non-conventional weapons, ranging from knives, billhooks, boomerangs, swords, whips, etc. Any weapon you lay your hands on, you can use as if you have been using it all your life, and you can easily recognize and dissect other Weapon Arts you may witness. Mastery over Weapons in general gives you incredible martial prowess.

skill.name: Novice Total Concentration Breathing
skill.description: Demon Slayer - You are a novice of the Total Concentration Breathing technique, a specialized breathing technique that allows you to increase the concentration of oxygen in your blood and activate your muscles better, giving you a superhuman physique as long as you maintain the breathing. As a novice, you only have the know-how to perform the very basics of the technique. But it can be improved with practice.

skill.name: Intermediate Total Concentration Breathing
skill.description: Demon Slayer - You are learned in the way of the Total Concentration Breathing technique, a specialized breathing technique that allows you to increase the concentration of oxygen in your blood and activate your muscles better, giving you a superhuman physique as long as you maintain the breathing. As an intermediate, you can perform the technique well enough to actively maintain it during combat. But it can be improved with practice.

skill.name: Adept Total Concentration Breathing
skill.description: Demon Slayer - You are an adept in the way of the Total Concentration Breathing technique, a specialized breathing technique that allows you to increase the concentration of oxygen in your blood and activate your muscles better, giving you a superhuman physique as long as you maintain the breathing. As an adept, you can easily maintain the breathing technique during a fight without additional strain and even use maintain it during daily life as long as you are not exhausted or excessively distracted. You can also use this technique to stop your own bleeding and increase your recovery speed.

skill.name: Expert Total Concentration Breathing
skill.description: Demon Slayer - You are an expert in the way of the Total Concentration Breathing technique, a specialized breathing technique that allows you to increase the concentration of oxygen in your blood and activate your muscles better, allowing the user to exert superhuman physical performance. As an Expert on par with a Hashira, you have achieved Total Concentration Breathing - Constant, making it so that you maintain this breathing technique even when sleeping. In addition, you can use this breathing technique to forcefully close wounds, expel poison, and speed up your recovery.

skill.name: Pre-Initiative
skill.description: Kengan Ashura - Pre-Initiative is a more advanced version of a regular fighter's foresight; it is the ability to know an enemy's move before they even use it and counter it before they even throw it. This is achieved through extensive familiarity with martial arts and analyzing the opponent's fighting style. Although it requires quite a lot of training and sparring to master, as well as familiarity with a lot of different fighting styles, a master of Pre-Initiative can seem almost Omniscient during a fight against a lesser opponent after exchanging only a few moves.

skill.name: Reduced Earth
skill.description: Fate - Reduced earth is a special movement technique that allows the user to cover a short distance with a single extremely fast movement through a mix of practiced breathing, footwork, and exertion. But this technique is quite exhausting to use.

skill.name: Ryu's Shotokan
skill.description: Street Fighter - You are a practitioner of the Shotokan, a school of special Karate created by Ryu. This school of martial arts focuses on direct, powerful strikes with a mix of kicks and punches, mixing aggression and defense. With enough practice, one may be able to tap into the [Kyoi no Hado] and harness Ki to enhance the power of their blows, perform special techniques, and use the Hadoken.

skill.name: Akuma's Shotokan
skill.description: Street Fighter - You are a practitioner of the Shotokan, a school of special Karate created by Akuma. This school of martial arts focuses on direct, powerful strikes with a mix of kicks and punches, focusing on brutal aggression and offense. With enough practice, one may be able to tap into the [Satsui no Hado] and harness raw killing as Ki to enhance their body, imbue Ki into their strikes, transform their inner energy into dark flame like Ki, use the Gohadoken and take on a more demonic form to further increase their powers, but overuse without control can lead to the user losing control of themselves and turning into a demon. One needs to practice great skill and control to not lose themselves and master it.

skill.name: The Shotokan
skill.description: Street Fighter - You are a practitioner of the Shotokan, a school of special Karate created by Goutetsu. This school of martial arts focuses on direct, powerful strikes with a mix of kicks and punches, but the real heart of the martial arts is the Satsui and the Kyoi no Hado, symbolizing Dark and Light. As one practices this martial art, they may be able to awaken and practice one of the Hado to tap into the full power of this martial art and be able to reinforce their strikes with Ki and release energy waves to supplement their fighting style.

skill.name: Master Total Concentration Breathing
skill.description: Demon Slayer - You have completely mastered Total Concentration Breathing technique, a specialized breathing technique that allows you to increase the concentration of oxygen in your blood and activate your muscles better, giving you exceptional physical performance and allowing you to use your body to its utmost potential. Having mastered the Technique, you can maintain this style as easily as regular breathing. In addition, your mastery means that as long as you maintain the breathing, your recovery speeds are sped up.

skill.name: Dapping
skill.description: You are a master at dapping up people effectively, whether it's judging dap up distance, or producing a satisfying crispy dap regardless of the other parties skill or constition.

skill.name: Boggarts Boiling Brilliance
skill.description: Elden Ring - You have learned the art of boiling some mean crab, prawn, and crustations in general with great skill on the level of the great Big Boggart. While your crab might be the magical ones from the Lands Between, it will taste spectacular nonetheless.

skill.name: Hacking
skill.description: You are skilled at leveraging your skills to get into networks and get past digitized and cyber defenses.

familiar.name: ORT
familiar.description: Fate - "Giant Enemy Spider" the Ultimate of the Oort Cloud, as a TYPE ORT is completely foreign to the concept of death and cannot be killed in any way, it is capable of rewriting reality with its own to transform anything to crystals with its crystal valley and subsume it.

familiar.name: Blair
familiar.description: Soul Eater - A magical black cat witch who can transform herself into a human form, Blair is very skilled in magic and specializes in conjuring pumpkin-shaped attacks and explosives. In addition, as a monster cat, she possesses nine lives, being able to survive death 8 times before finally perishing.

familiar.name: Overgrown Rover
familiar.description: One Punch Man - Overgrown Rover is a Cadre of the Monster Association with incredible physical abilities, night impenetrable defense and most importantly, an energy blast it can unleash from its mouth that dwarfs even the strongest nuclear bombs.

familiar.name: Black Sperm
familiar.description: One Punch Man - "You looking down on me?" Black Sperm is a little man-like creature that can infinitely multiply itself and its strength by proxy over time by consuming protein. All of Black Sperm's cells share his consciousness, and he can create infinite clones of himself as long as he has enough cells or combine all of them to gather all of their strength into one body. He starts with only enough cells to form a small body. To create more cells, he needs to consume sufficient amounts of protein.

familiar.name: A rat
familiar.description: An ordinary rat picked up from the New York subway system.

familiar.name: Trash Eater
familiar.description: A grey 1-meter-tall slime that can consume and digest objects endlessly like an infinite trashcan and obey simple orders. It can only consume beings that aren't alive.

familiar.name: Samson
familiar.description: Skullgirls - A parasite that fuses itself to their host's hair and manifests as a maw filled with sharp teeth and yellow eyes. Samson is capable of growing, strengthening and manipulating his host's hair, forming, tentacles, whips, blades etc. he can also use it to manifest himself and fight. He is rather foul-mouthed and gruff.

familiar.name: Parasite Leviathan
familiar.description: Skullgirls - A parasite that enters its host's body and bonds with them, Leviathan is capable of growing in size and length and using its long bone-like serpentine body as a weapon, he can also breathe purple flames that are incredibly hot, and he can also use full power to manifest as a full muscular upper torso and breathe even hotter flames. He usually acts like a Victorian-era refined gentleman unless provoked.

familiar.name: Death Claws
familiar.description: Fallout - A bioengineered creature made to be the optimal melee combatant with sharp and durable horns, claws and fangs. A single death claw can tear apart even a tank and get stronger by absorbing radiation. You get an Alpha Male Deathclaw and a Deathclaw Female that can breed with each other.

familiar.name: Fafnir - Fate
familiar.description: Fate - The Ultimate Dragon, as the strongest dragon in the world of Fate, Fafnir has exceptional physical abilities and extreme levels of magical power in addition to being able to draw power from the atmosphere to power his attacks. His breath is strong enough to annihilate entire cities with ease.

familiar.name: Moonless
familiar.description: Fear and Hunger - A normal cave wolf that was transformed by the influence of the god of the depths, after tens of years of brutal survival this wolf towers over even tanks and can swallow a fully grown man in one gulp.

familiar.name: A big rat
