familiar.description: This rat is especially large, like, the size of an entire forearm. I wouldn't want to find that one around my house.

familiar.name: Paisley Park
familiar.description: (Tech)JoJo - An intangible pink ghost in the shape of a female with map markers all over her body, you can temporarily merge Paisley Park with any electronic to take full control over it. In addition, Paisley can automatically find any place on a map and direct you to it and possesses clairvoyance, allowing it to direct you to any location you desire even on vague wording like somewhere safe.

familiar.name: Giffany
familiar.description: (Tech)Gravity Falls - "Just... Giffany?" A Yandere Ai girlfriend that can possess and manipulate electronics for you, it may take her some time to get through stronger firewalls though, and she is also limited by the CPU of the electronics she possesses. Beware, she may get a little possessive.

familiar.name: Dimple
familiar.description: Mob Psycho - A green evil spirit with pronounced red dimples obsessed with becoming god, as an evil Dimple possesses incredibly powerful psychic powers like Telekinesis, Hypnosis, laser blasts etc. He is also very experienced with using his powers.

familiar.name: Observer
familiar.description: A group of disembodied floating eyeballs that can transmit their sight to yours and follow complex commands, they possess no combat power and are as vulnerable as human eyeballs. If an eye gets perished, you can resummon it in 24 hours.

familiar.name: Plague Bringer Goliath
familiar.description: (Tech)Calamity Mod - An abomination created from bio-nanotechnology gone rogue. A giant mutated bee queen mutated with incredibly viral and potent bio-nano machines called plague that completely overhauled her body, turning it into a massive flying armoured bio-nuclear weapon armoury armed with enough nukes containing the plague bio-mechanical virus to glass several countries and doom the world.

familiar.name: Immortal Snail
familiar.description: An immortal snail, who knows what it wants or how it came to be. But one thing is for sure, it is immortal, even if you eradicated every quark of its beings it would reform back to perfection in just a minute. It is biologically immortal too, immune to all sickness and ageing. But in the end, it is limited to the vessel of a snail.

familiar.name: Manticore
familiar.description: A chimeric creature with the body and head of a lion, tail of a scorpion and the wings of a bat. In addition to their large size and powerful physical abilities, they possess a powerful paralytic venom that can put a white whale into a coma. This one is capable of laying eggs to reproduce asexually.

familiar.name: Praetorian
familiar.description: Epic Battle Fantasy - An agile knight-like robotic warrior made of cutting-edge technology, possessing reinforced titanium armour, uranium shells, high-frequency blades, forcefield technology, plasma emission, fusion reactor, high-speed capability and hacking capability. It is the perfect small-size battle robot/mech. The only flaw is that it cannot perform in cold environments for extended periods of time.

familiar.name: Dark Eater Midir
familiar.description: Dark Souls - A descendant everlasting dragon that was raised by the gods and was tasked by Gwyn, the lord of sunlight to forever fight against the Abyss with its immortality, but eventually, it was corrupted by the Abyss in its eternal duty. While having lost his immortality, Midir is still very powerful and is capable of unleashing breaths of flame and beams of dark magic in addition to his giant and powerful body.

familiar.name: Red Eyes Black Dragon
familiar.description: Yugioh - A powerful and ferocious dragon whose entire body is covered in black with the exception of its red eyes. This dragon stands bipedally and is very strong, it can also unleash a breath of crimson flames. While it has quite the temper it is also rather intelligent.

familiar.name: Blue Eyes White Dragon
familiar.description: Yugioh - A dragon of the legends known as an engine of destruction. This dragon, while being very physically powerful with exceptional toughness, is also capable of unleashing a devastating lightning breath and capable of flying at fast speeds.

familiar.name: Cosmic Monolith
familiar.description: Epic Battle Fantasy - A floating black monolith with pulsing red circuitry-like engravings descending from the outer cosmos, it possesses potent space and reality-warping abilities. It can freely teleport and warp by expending energy and shooting giant beams of cosmic energy, warp space to tear apart enemies, dispel magic and create gigantic defensive barriers out of cosmic energy.

familiar.name: Slifer the Sky Dragon
familiar.description: Yugioh - Slifer the Sky Dragon, the Heavenly Dragon, is an Egyptian God who stands at titanic proportions in the form of a serpentine dragon with two mouths. Alongside his incredible might, Slifer can manipulate the weather and unleash blasts of divine fire and lightning from his mouths. Slifer can also exert divine pressure to weaken those who are summoned in his presence, to weaken them, or if they are weak enough, outright cull them. As an Egyptian God, no magic or ability below Legendary rank can directly affect him.

familiar.name: Evil Natural Water
familiar.description: One Punch Man - An amorphous blob of water that has a pair of eyes sitting around inside of it but the eyes are also just water and aren't weak points. This sentient puddle is very evil and is capable of sensing emotions. I can freely manipulate its body and any water it assimilates. I can freely assimilate all water it is in contact with. Including the world's oceans and its strength increase proportionally to how much water it absorbs. The only way to kill it is by scattering a majority of its body with one overwhelming blow or vaporising all of its water.

familiar.name: Sif
familiar.description: Dark Souls - The loyal companion of Artorias, Sif is a giant dog who also possesses immense experience in battle and is far more intelligent than the average dog.

familiar.name: Capra Demons
familiar.description: Dark Souls - A Capra Demon formed from Chaos, these demons are far larger and stronger than average humans and possess resistance to fire and unholy abilities. Depending on the amount of energy expended multiple Capra's can be summoned at once.

familiar.name: Taurus Demons
familiar.description: Dark Souls - a large truck-sized bull demon with super strength and durability formed by Chaos. Ordinary gunfire is almost useless against it and it can take down even military companies by itself. The more energy you have the more demons you can summon at once.

familiar.name: Sanctuary Guardian
familiar.description: Dark Souls - A chimeric beast with the enlarged body of a lion, four wings, horns like a ram, and a spiked scorpion tail that has deadly venom. It can also release lightning breaths and reproduce asexually by laying eggs.

familiar.name: Kalameet
familiar.description: Dark Souls - A descendant of the immortal Archdragons, Kalameet is the Black Dragon of Calamity that even the city of gods Anor Londo did not dare provoke. With obsidian scales tougher than metal, a breath of incinerating dark flames and a glowing orange crest on his forehead that can weaken and bring even the toughest of warriors to their knees.

familiar.name: Charizard
familiar.description: Pokemon - An oddly small bipedal salamander with wings(Not a dragon despite appearances), Charizard has considerable physical strength and is capable of unleashing breaths of incredibly hot flames as well as flying at fast speeds. This Charizard is female and capable of laying eggs, do not ask who the father is.

familiar.name: Aerodactyl
familiar.description: Pokemon - An ancient cross between a pterodactyl and a mountain, this giant lizard used to dominate the skies with its immense strength and geokinetic abilities.

familiar.name: Articuno
familiar.description: Pokemon - A legendary bird of ice that lives in the frozen tundra with icy blue feathers. Articuno has potent cryokinetic abilities, being able to call blizzards, unleash ice beams, and freeze objects directly. But its durability is not as great as its cryokinetic abilities.

familiar.name: Moltres
familiar.description: Pokemon - A legendary bird of flame that is said to bring spring with its flaming wings. Moltres has potent prokinetic abilities, being able to rain down fire, control fire and breathe intense flames that can melt steel. But its physical abilities are not on par with its pyrokinetic abilities.

familiar.name: Zapdos
familiar.description: Pokemon - A legendary bird of lightning that often heralds the arrival of storms. Zapdos has potent electrokinetic abilities, being able to call down thunder from the skies, absorb lightning into itself and release lightning breath attacks.

familiar.name: Thunderbirds
familiar.description: Hota - A pair of thunderbirds, fierce predators of the sky with powers over weather and lightning. They are capable of moving extremely quickly and controlling the weather, summoning rain and thunder down at will as well as being able to release it itself. You get a breeding pair.

familiar.name: Wooper
familiar.description: Pokemon - A derpy-looking water creature. It can spray water from its mouth and is stronger than a human but otherwise, its greatest strength is its charming derpy look.

familiar.name: Gardevoir
familiar.description: Pokemon - A creature of unknown origin known for its embrace and it's empathy, Gardevoir possesses immense psychokinetic power, being able to distort dimensions, create miniature black holes, telepathy, telekinesis, and even read the future with enough training. Her power is at its utmost when she is protecting her owner.

familiar.name: Kyogre
familiar.description: Pokemon - A primordial god of the seas capable of unrivalled hydrokinetic abilities. Kyogre, in its base form alone, is strong enough to sink entire cities, and entire countries underwater over time. In her primal form, they can sink the entire landmass under in the span of an afternoon.

familiar.name: Groudon
familiar.description: Pokemon - A primordial god of the earth capable of unrivalled geokinetic abilities. Groudon in their base form alone, is strong enough to create entire islands beneath their feet and create kilometre-long precipe blades.  In their primal form, they can turn the entire planet into a desolate wasteland in a day.

familiar.name: Rayquaza
familiar.description: Pokemon - A primordial dragon god of the skies, with unrivalled speed, power and aerokinetic ability. Rayquaza, even in their base form can move at extreme speeds, change the weather, manipulate mighty winds to ravage the land and release blasts of pure draconic power. In their Mega form, they can destroy asteroids that can destroy the entire surface of the earth.

familiar.name: Garchomp
familiar.description: Pokemon - The Average Wild Garchomp. A large intimidating ground dragon with immense physical power, Garchomp can also manipulate the earth to cause earthquakes, fissures and blades of earth to erupt. And they can also somehow fly at Mach speeds.

familiar.name: Zoroark
familiar.description: Pokemon - A bipedal fox-like dark creature that is capable of manipulating dark energy to attack but its true ability lies in its mastery of illusions. Zoroark is capable of creating incredibly realistic illusions and transforming itself to indistinguishable degrees.  It can either make hundreds of people hallucinate or cast illusions with a very large range

familiar.name: Haspid
familiar.description: Hota - A giant venomous sea serpent larger than trade ships and poison breath strong enough to melt metals and bring gods to their knees. Haspids can also reproduce

familiar.name: Griffon
familiar.description: Hota - A mighty beast with the lower body of a lion and the upper body of a hawk and the size of an elephant. This mighty beast is incredibly ferocious but also very loyal. You get a pair of female and male that can mate and produce offspring.

familiar.name: Tohru
familiar.description: Kobayashi - A mighty female dragon that controls fire and can assume the form of a female humanoid, Tohru possess exceptional physical and magical abilities, being able to destroy the military of the base earth with ease. In addition to regeneration, she can also open portals, and use clairvoyance and invisibility. She also has the propensity to dress up as a maid.

familiar.name: Quetzalcoatl
familiar.description: Kobayashi - A former dragon god, now just a dragon of incomparable power, she prefers to go by the name of Lucoa and likes to tease people now instead of causing the end of humanity. She has incredible physical and magical power, being able to unleash breath attacks that annihilate entire islands, create portals and use magic.

familiar.name: The Golem Core
familiar.description: A sentient golem core the size of a basketball that can pull material from the surroundings to transform itself into a full golem, it can freely abandon and assimilate non-organic material into itself to make itself stronger and change its own shape depending on what is needed. The golem is intelligent and is capable of understanding speech and nuance. The maximum amount of material it can assimilate at once scales with the users maximum energy reserves.

familiar.name: Obsidian Gargoyles
familiar.description: Hota - Obsidian statues of Gargoyle's given life, these flying animated statues are deceptively fast, durable and strong. Being able to tear a grown man in half like they are paper and ignore small arms. You get a small army of these creatures, their numbers increase as you get stronger, starting at 5.

familiar.name: Unicorn
familiar.description: A unicorn of the myths, a creature that represents purity and clarity. This creature is capable of healing others and purifying objects with their horn, in addition, they are incredibly strong physically to the point where a modern military would be rendered ineffective. But only someone who retains their purity can ride a Unicorn. Otherwise, you're gonna have to attach a sled.

familiar.name: Leaf
familiar.description: (Character)Black Souls - "It's me~" The leader fairy from the Fairy Forest who specializes in wind and light magic as well as being able to heal and buff others. Totally not a sadomasochistic Outer God wearing the guise of a fairy, you don't have to worry about that. Thankfully she is kept somewhat in check by chaos.

familiar.name: Sacabambaspis
familiar.description: A stupid-looking ancient fish with no jaw and a permanent stupid-looking grin. It's also shaped like a stupid doorstop.

familiar.name: Dark Magician Girl
familiar.description: (Character)Yugioh - A spiritual magical girl who is the successor to the aptly named Dark Magician, she is capable of utilizing a variety of spells such as short-range portals, dark magic, basic attack and defensive magic etc.

familiar.name: Xenomorph
familiar.description: An apex predator from outer space that is much mightier than humans and known for their incredibly adaptive and reproductive ability. A single Xenomorph can create xenomorph hybrids by impregnating other races with face huggers. With just a single one you can create your own colony and army.

familiar.name: Sebas Tian
familiar.description: (Character)Overlord - He is one hell of a butler, oh wait, wrong Sebastian. Sebas is a Dragonoid Martial Artist/Monk with incredible physical stats and the ability to expertly use Ki and transform into his Dragonoid form. But before all of that, he is an incredibly competent and loyal Butler.

familiar.name: Soul Eater
familiar.description: Overlord - A legendary undead skeletal horse that strikes fear into those who know about it. The miasma around the Soul Eater can kill those who are weaker than it, anyone who dies near a Soul Eater have their souls claimed by it, Soul Eater can devour souls to replenish its stats and become stronger or offer them to their master. They also have formidable physical abilities and know how to use instinctive death magic. Death miasma and soul claiming can be toggled

familiar.name: Mosquito
familiar.description: (Character)One Punch Man - A bioengineered creature that resembles a humanoid female mosquito, she has formidable physical stats and exceptional speed to use with her claws. In addition, she can control all mosquitos in a massive range, she can also absorb blood to improve her physical abilities.

familiar.name: Jubjub
familiar.description: (Character)Black Souls - One of the Four Nightmares overseeing Wonderland, the garden of the Crawling Ones. Jub Jub has mighty physical abilities, she is also able to use basic magic but her main ability is being able to spread insanity and madness, being able to drive entire cities and countries to madness with her abilities, her madness inducement abilities are incredibly potent. Only those stronger than her or who have exceptional mental fortitude can resist.

familiar.name: Basilisk
familiar.description: Hota - A large reptile with 6 limbs and supernatural strength, being immune to conventional weapons and possessing the strength of 10 men. Basilisks have gazes and venom that can turn targets to stone, stronger a target is, the harder they are to petrify. Basilisks can reproduce asexually, at least this one can.

familiar.name: Mimic
familiar.description: A curious shapeshifting bloodthirsty creature, the Mimic can turn into the shape of any creature or object as well as being able to manipulate its texture and density. Being able to turn into a chest, or a woman with a large chest, or maybe even a mount. They also get larger and stronger the more you feed them flesh, especially human flesh, they may even get smarter if you feed them brains.

familiar.name: Dog
familiar.description: Any dog of your liking, once you summon the familiar for the first time, they take on the form of a canine that is compatible with you. The default is a golden retreiver with very soft fur.

familiar.name: Cat
familiar.description: Any cat of your liking, once you summon the familiar for the first time, they take on the form of a small feline that is compatible with you. The default is an orange cat with very soft fur.

familiar.name: Lion
familiar.description: A majestic lion companion, as a familiar they are a lion who has excellent genetics and near human intellect, and they are also large enough to ride. By default they are female.

familiar.name: Tiger
familiar.description: A ferocious tiger companion, as a familiar they are a tiger who has excellent genetics and near human intellect, and they are also large enough to ride. By default they are female.

familiar.name: Snow Tiger
familiar.description: A ferocious snow tiger companion, as a familiar they are a snow tiger who has excellent genetics and near human intellect, and as rare snow tigers they are considerably larger than normal lions and can be ridden. By default they are female.

familiar.name: Brown Bear
familiar.description: A regular big old brown bear companion, as a familiar they are a bear who has excellent genetics and near human intellect, they are strong enough to shrug off most small firearms and crush a human being like an apple. By default they are female.

familiar.name: Undead Army
familiar.description: Your very own Undead Army at your command, the army gets larger as you get stronger and whenever a troop perishes they come back to life as long as you expend your magical power. The army starts with 30 skeleton warriors, 20 skeleton archers, 5 Skeleton Horse Riders and 5 Skeleton Mages, the number and quality of undead increase as you get stronger.

familiar.name: Cottonmouth
familiar.description: A smart cottonmouth snake companion, there is not much else about it, they are at the peak of what a cottonmouth snake could be and are smarter than average but that's about it.

familiar.name: Goblin
familiar.description: (Character)Loathsome little green humanoid creatures the size of children, they are very vicious and cruel in nature, being able to use weapons and basic tactics. At least this goblin is smarter and more self-aware, they can also breed with any humanoid race. The default gender is female.

familiar.name: Wyvern
familiar.description: A large sky-dwelling reptile with fire breath, they are often referred to as lesser dragons, a wyvern can easily swallow a man whole and roast an entire battalion with its fire breath. This Wyvern is female and can produce eggs to reproduce.

familiar.name: Dire Wolf
familiar.description: A large vicious pre-historic wolf the size of a man, they are very strong with tough and sharp teeth and claws, they are also big enough to be used as a mount. By default, they are female and can reproduce.

familiar.name: Hellhound
familiar.description: A large vicious hound hailing from the underworld, they are around the size of humans with maws filled with fire that they can breathe out, they are also strong enough to tear a grown man in half with ease. By default, they are female and can reproduce.

familiar.name: Cerberus
familiar.description: (Character)Helltaker - Definitely not the kind of hellhound you expected. Cerberus, known as the triple demon is a singular demon girl with hellhound characteristics possessing three bodies and one soul, she is physically strong enough to tear a grown man in half and she is surprisingly competent at office work and menial tasks.

familiar.name: Crow
familiar.description: A very smart and loyal crow companion with intelligence on the level of a human, she can look for and fetch shiny things or do things a crow could otherwise do.

familiar.name: Ditto
familiar.description: Pokemon - An amorphous purple blob with a dopey face, Ditto has the ability to transform into any creature they can see and adopt their abilities scaled to their own level except their durability. They also do not take on the memories and intelligence of what they transform into. They are also genderless and can breed with any race.

familiar.name: Desert Elemental
familiar.description: Calamity Mod - A pair of sister elementals of from born from the shifting sands of the desert. One sister can create and manipulate sand to attack and defend while the other can cast healing magic.

familiar.name: Storm Elemental
familiar.description: Calamity Mod - A solitary elemental formed in the rainy skies. As an elemental born of the sky, she can conjure and exert control over wind, clouds and lightning.

familiar.name: Cavern Elemental
familiar.description: Calamity Mod - An elemental born in the harsh and desolate caverns, he is physically mighty, being able to exert control over rock and ground. He can split the ground in two with his axe. He is great at defence.

familiar.name: Brimstone Elemental
familiar.description: Calamity Mod - A solitary elemental born in the Brimstone Crag, made out of burnt tortured souls she can conjure and control Brimstone Flames that can turn even souls into ash.

familiar.name: Anahita
familiar.description: Calamity Mod - Anahita is an elemental born of the clear oceans, she can sing like a siren to enthral people, conjure mists and spears of water and ice and wield her glaive as a weapon.

familiar.name: Clothes Melting Slime
familiar.description: A grey amorphous ever-shifting slime that is capable of quickly melting all clothing, strangely enough, it doesn't seem to melt common clothes materials but instead, its acid seems to just conceptually melt anything classified as clothing. The more clothing it melts, the larger and stronger this slime gets.

familiar.name: Shark
familiar.description: A regular old shark, only useful in water but it is a pretty healthy and strong shark with above average intelligence.

familiar.name: Schrodinger's cat
familiar.description: A regular-looking cat, but in reality it is the Schrodinger's cat, being able to teleport freely as long as it is not being observed and being immortal as it comes back to whenever its corpse is not observed.

familiar.name: Aegislash
familiar.description: Pokemon - A flying ancient sentient sword and shield combo, Aegilash is remarkably fast and strong, being able to cleave an armoured knight in half with ease, they are also capable of blocking incredibly strong attacks, as well as being able to use dark magic. Their master can wield Aegislash without incurring any problems.

familiar.name: Poltergeist
familiar.description: A ghost that is capable of intervening in the material world with their psychic powers, they can throw around furniture and weapons to cause harm and are immune to attacks that cannot harm souls. You can feed them your energy to make them stronger.

familiar.name: Wraith
familiar.description: A lesser spirit, while a wraith has little in the form of combat ability they are very hard to detect, so they are able to serve as effective surveillance and scouting as they will reform even if killed.

familiar.name: Lupusregina Beta
familiar.description: (Character)Overlord - A werewolf cleric maid who has a very willful and cheery yet sadistic personality. As a werewolf she has considerable physical ability and thanks to their specialization as a cleric she is capable of casting healing and recovery magic as well as lesser forms of other magic. She is also a very skilled maid. Does not have access to inventory.

familiar.name: Solution Epsilon
familiar.description: (Character)Overlord - A slime assassin maid who has a gentle caring sister personality covering for a sinister and sadistic demeanor. Solution is a greater slime who is greatly resistant to physical attacks and has vast amounts of space contained in her acidic body, being able to use it as storage or stomach as she is capable of controlling what she melts. She can also emit poison from her body. In addition, she is a very skilled maid and assassin. Does not have access to inventory.

familiar.name: Entoma Zeta
familiar.description: (Character)Overlord - A arachnid ninja bug user maid who while acting childish and cute has a ravenous appetite for flesh. She is capable of summoning a variety of supernatural insects to aid her in combat alongside her weapon mastery and supernaturally strong body. In addition, she is a... skilled maid. Does not have access to inventory.

familiar.name: Ramiel
familiar.description: Evangelion - A gigantic flying blue octahedron that is capable of freely shapeshifting its body in impossible ways. Ramiel has an incredibly durable E.T Barrier around itself that it can shape at will, it can also unleash particle beams of incredible power that can melt city blocks in seconds with incredible accuracy.  They can also shrink in size to not be so unwieldy, though doing so also decreases their power.

familiar.name: Yasaka
familiar.description: (Character)DxD - A nine-tailed Kyuubi Yokai on par with gods, Yasaka possesses incredible mastery over Senjutsu and magic, allowing her to draw magical power from the very earth to fuel herself and her immense might, in her true form she is more than a match for most lesser gods.

familiar.name: Pandora's Actor
familiar.description: (Character)Overlord - A greater doppelganger of great power and intelligence, Pandora's actor is capable of taking on the form of anyone he is familiar with and using their abilities to great effect although to a lesser extent than that of the original. He also possesses genius levels of intellect and acting skills that allow him to perfectly imitate people. Does not have access to inventory.

familiar.name: The thing
familiar.description: John Carpenter's The Thing - An extremely versatile extraterrestrial creature that assimilates itself with other organisms to hide and reproduce. It is capable of shapeshifting the host's body without seemingly causing any damage to it. The thing is only as smart as the creatures it assimilates.

familiar.name: Black Nomu
familiar.description: MHA - A near mindless bird-like mutant who was genetically engineered and designed as an incredibly powerful punching bag. Nomu possesses incredible physical prowess and durability alongside being able to absorb physical attacks and regenerate at incredible speeds. But it is also dumb as a brick, making it difficult to rely on it acting independently without direct orders.

familiar.name: Slime
familiar.description: A classic RPG slime, amorphous large blue blob that is immune to physical damage, can spit out globs of acid and corrode things with its body. The more you feed this slime biological matter, the larger and stronger it will grow. It can even evolve if fed special foods.

familiar.name: Divine Dogs
familiar.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - A pair of twin wolves capable of tearing apart targets with their claws and fangs. Each of the dogs can detect hostility and negative emotions and notify their master when they feel hostility directed toward them. Their powerful sense of smell allow them to track targets across long distances. As Shikigami made of your own shadow, their strength scales with your own. In addition, they are capable of going in and out of shadows. If you are strong enough, you can combine the two wolves into Totality, a far stronger version of both.

familiar.name: Nue
familiar.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - A winged shikigami armed with great speed and the ability to produce electricity. It can support its master by carrying them while flying to increase their mobility, and can attack with its heavy wings charged with electricity, shocking anyone it hits and leaving them temporarily paralysed. The power of shikigami scales with your own energy levels.

familiar.name: Gama
familiar.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - A large frog shikigami that can support its master using its long tongue. Its tongue can be used to ensnare its master's target and is strong enough to throw and slam them into objects. The speed of the Toad's tongue is useful for helping its master or an ally out of harm's way. Its large size allows it to carry targets in its mouth for transportation or restraint. The power of shikigami scales with your own energy levels.

familiar.name: Orochi
familiar.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - A giant snake shikigami that can quickly attack and ensnare its master's targets. It can burrow into and travel through shadows, allowing it to engage in surprise attacks to ensnare or bite targets. The power of shikigami scales with your own energy levels.

familiar.name: Max Elephant
familiar.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - An elephant shikigami that can conjure and spew large volumes of water from its trunk. It can also be used to crush targets with its weight by summoning it above targets. The power of shikigami scales with your own energy levels.

familiar.name: Rabbit Escape
familiar.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - A massive swarm of rabbit shikigami that serves as a distraction for the user. Upon summoning, dozens to hundreds and eve thousands of rabbits fill the area to distract the opponent, allowing the summoner to escape danger by using the chaos to their advantage. The rabbits are also individually strong enough to break bones. The number of rabbits you can summon at once scales with your own energy levels, with the default number being 333.

familiar.name: Round Deer
familiar.description: Jujutsu Kaisen -  A towering deer shikigami that constantly emits a healing aura of positive energy that heals living beings in range while hurting unholy beings.. The Round Deer can also focus its aura to heal a specific target faster or avoid healing certain targets. This aura can even recover limbs, but the stronger a target is in relation to Round Deer, the slower the energy will affect them. The power of shikigami scales with your own energy levels.

familiar.name: Mahoraga
familiar.description: Jujutsu Kaisen - The most powerful Shikigami of the Ten Shadows. Mahoraga is armed with the sword of extermination that deals severe damage to unholy beings and has great physical stats. But its real strength is the ability to adapt to any and all phenomena it encounters, offensively or defensively, and it can also share these adaptations with the user. Adaptations fade over time or when unsummoned, but the knowledge learned and ways to utilise powers taught by the adaptation do not. The more complex a phenomenon is, the longer Mahoraga takes to adapt to it. The power of shikigami scales with your own energy levels.

familiar.name: Power
familiar.description: Chainsaw Man - Power is the Blood Devil, granting her the power to control all blood in her sensory range as well as possessing great physical stats and incredible regenerative ability. In addition, the more she is feared, the more power she has. The stronger a target is in relation to her, the harder it is for her to manipulate their blood.

familiar.name: Bat Devil
familiar.description: Chainsaw Man - A building-sized grotesque humanoid bat, as a devil the Bat Devil can heal from injuries by consuming blood, in addition to their superhuman physical stats, they can fly and release building-shattering sonic booms.

familiar.name: Pochita
familiar.description: Chainsaw Man - The Chainsaw Devil, the one that devils fear the most. As a devil Pochita has extreme regenerative abilities, being able to go from a puddle to full health in less than a second by simply pulling his cord. Pochita also has extreme physical abilities in addition to incomparable speed.

familiar.name: Igris
familiar.description: Solo Levelling - One of the greatest warriors under the Shadow Monarch's command. Igris possess excellent swordsmanship and unarmed combat capabilities complimented by his mighty physical prowess and telekinesis. As a shadow familiar Igris is revived after 24 hours if he is killed

familiar.name: Iron
familiar.description: Solo Levelling - One of the toughest warriors under the Shadow Monarch's command. Iron is rather simple, he possesses incredible durability and strength, him to crush enemies and his master. As a shadow familiar Iron is revived after 24 hours if he is killed

familiar.name: Tusk
familiar.description: Solo Levelling - One of the greatest mages under the Shadow Monarch's command. Tusk has great physical prowess as a former high orc but his true power lies in his ability to cast a myriad of shamanic spells to inflict damage, support or buff. As a shadow familiar Tusk is revived after 24 hours if he is killed

familiar.name: Bladewolf
familiar.description: (Tech)Metal Gear - Blade Wolf, or officially designated as IF Prototype LQ-84i is a wolf-like quadrupedal Unmanned Gear. In addition to its artificial intelligence and interfacing abilities such as hacking and manipulating code, Blade Wolf is armed with an entire arsenal of weapons such as superheated knives, high-frequency blade chainsaws, railguns, machineguns and etc. that it can use with extreme efficiency. It is incredibly smart.

familiar.name: Black Knife Tiche
familiar.description: Elden Ring - A Blac Knife Assasin who helped assassinate Godwny the Golden during the night of the Black Knives. In addition to being an incredibly skilled assassin, Tiche's knife is imbued with a lesser form of destined death, making the wounds she inflicts be unable to be healed and ignoring durability to an extent.

familiar.name: Mr. Sir Ceo
familiar.description: An extremely skilled and driven man with expertise in areas such as politics, management, negotiations, corporatism, and business. If you let him loose in the world, he will start climbing the corporate ladder with ease and build you your own business and manage it for you.

familiar.name: Puck
familiar.description: Re: Zero - The Great Spirit of Fire, a very misleading name for a spirit that focuses on Ice manipulation. They are capable of manipulating fire and ice as well as heat in general. He is also capable of minor healing, able to treat lesser wounds but not major ones, emotion reading and general magic. He can conjure ice constructs and freeze over entire towns, he can also bring temperatures down close to sub-zero but needs to recharge his mana from either the summoner or slowly from the environment.

familiar.name: Beatrice
familiar.description: (Character)Re: Zero - A powerful Great Spirit whose power resides over Darkness and Space Magic. She is capable of casting a variety of spells that manipulate Gravity, Space and Darkness. But she can only draw mana from her summoner, but with enough mana supplied, she could even create a black hole.

familiar.name: Shenron
familiar.description: Dragon Ball - A legendary magical dragon capable of granting its user a wish, Shenron can only be manifested once a year, allowing his user to ask for a wish that it will grant as long as it is within his power.

familiar.name: Medusa Gorgon
familiar.description: (Character)Soul Eater - Medusa is a natural-born Witch who is capable of taking over bodies and using unique vector magic in tandem with her hand-to-hand combat skills. She is also somewhat of a genius when it comes to matters of soul and chemistry, being able to craft her unique magical agents, with the most notable creation being Black Blood.

familiar.name: Nyotengu
familiar.description: (Character)Dead or Alive - A female tengu who is very well-versed in martial arts and seduction. She is capable of summoning winds and storms with her fan like other tengu as well as flying and possessing enhanced strength.

familiar.name: Kon
familiar.description: Chainsaw Man - Kon is the Fox Devil who embodies the fear of foxes. She is a gigantic monstrous fox, who, thanks to being a devil is capable of making contracts with people and recovering her health by consuming blood. You can partially summon her body parts as attacks or simply summon her outright. Those who make contracts with her can also summon her.

familiar.name: 20% Gun Devil
familiar.description: Chainsaw Man - A fragment of one of the strongest Devils, the Gun Devil is a skyscraper-sized Demon made of guns and human body parts. It has the ability to instantly shoot the heart of any living being within 1000 meters of it and can use its massive oversized guns to cause mass destruction. The gun devil is also capable of moving at absurd speeds, being able to circle the globe in minutes. As a devil, they are capable of making contracts with people and recovering their health by consuming blood.

familiar.name: Senko
familiar.description: (Character)Sewayaki Kitsune Senko-san - Senko is a single-tail kitsune who excels at housekeeping and caretaking. Although she is capable of offensive abilities such as manipulating foxfire, minor telekinesis, disguise and barriers she specializes in performing tasks such as acting like a wife or a mother.

familiar.name: Yozora
familiar.description: (Character)Sewayaki Kitsune Senko-san - A four-tailed Kitsune with immense wisdom, Yozora is good at managing people and caretaking. But as a four-tailed kitsune, she has considerable magical power that she can use to create foxfire, telekinesis, change perception, and create barriers and portals.

familiar.name: Kurama
familiar.description: Naruto - One of the Tailed Beasts, as the nine tails, Kurama is a giant demonic fox who towers over most buildings. Kurama has immense physical and magical strength, being able to casually demolish buildings and release beast bombs that can level cities. He also has Pyrokinetic and Aerokinetic abilities, although not very precise as he is an engine of destruction. As a tailed beast, he is immortal and will revive upon death, he can also fuse with a person to grant them his abilities.

familiar.name: Shukaku
familiar.description: Naruto - One of the Tailed Beasts, as the one tail, Shukaku is a tailed beast whose body is entirely made up of sand. Shukau has strength befitting his massive frame and his sand physique makes him resistant against physical blows. In addition, Shukaku is capable of creating and controlling sand, wind and magnetism, making him incredibly versatile he can also use sealing techniques to supplement his ability. As a tailed beast, he is immortal and will revive upon death, he can also fuse with a person to grant them his abilities.

familiar.name: Matatabi
familiar.description: Naruto - One of the tailed beasts, as the two tails, Matatabi takes the form of a giant nekomata on blue fire. Matatabi has strength befitting his massive frame in addition, Matatabi is capable of creating and controlling fire to utilize a variety of techniques. As a tailed beast, he is immortal and will revive upon death, he can also fuse with a person to grant them his abilities.

familiar.name: Isobu
familiar.description: Naruto - One of the tailed beasts, as the three tails, Isobu takes the form of a giant red and white turtle with a spiky carapace shell. Isobu has strength befitting his giant frame, and agility unbefitting of his frame, he also has exceptional strength. Isobu is capable of creating and controlling water to utilize a variety of techniques, he can also open gates to its pocket space at will. As a tailed beast, he is immortal and will revive upon death, he can also fuse with a person to grant them his abilities.

familiar.name: Son Goku
familiar.description: Naruto - One of the tailed beasts, as the four tails, Son Gokū takes the form of a giant monkey with octopus tails. Son Gokū has strength befitting his massive frame with exceptional physical prowess. In addition, he is able to create and control fire and earth at will, often using them in tandem to create volcanic eruptions and spew lava. As a tailed beast, he is immortal and will revive upon death, he can also fuse with a person to grant them his abilities.

familiar.name: Ten-Tails
familiar.description: Naruto - Ten-Tails can only be described as a primordial god, he embodies all life at the beginning of creation, a being created from pure natural energy, and sensing ability cannot distinguish between him and the environment. He has immense physical prowess with his size that can dwarf mountains with speed that makes sound seem slow. He can unleash country annihilating Bijuu Bombs without rest and use techniques to unleash world-spanning disasters. Destruction incarnate. As a tailed beast, he is immortal and will revive upon death, he can also fuse with a person to grant them his abilities.

familiar.name: Suu
familiar.description: (Character)Monster Musume - Suu is a female slime girl, as a slime girl she is mostly invulnerable to physical strikes and is capable of absorbing and digesting organic matter. In addition, she can freely shapeshift her body and expel poison from her body to paralyse people. Lastly, she can change her body composition according to whatever she absorbs.

familiar.name: Sylvia
familiar.description: (Character)Konosuba - As a female growth chimera(Unnecessary appendage removed) Sylvia is capable of absorbing other beings into her body to gain their physical characteristics and grow stronger. In her base form, she is already pretty physically strong in addition to her knowledge of basic magic.

familiar.name: Alucard
familiar.description: (Character)Hellsing - He(?) has many names, Alucard, Dracula, Vlad, but now it's Alucard. He is the first and strongest vampire, being made of a primordial dark matter that he can freely shapeshift into whatever form he likes. He has immense physical strength and all abilities associated with vampires are taken to the extreme. When his full power is released he can absorb the souls of those he drains to either absorb a portion of their power or use them as his undead army. However, his strength is limited by the Restraint Levels placed upon him, to release a restraint level you must be stronger than the current level of Alucard. By default, she has chosen to take the form of Girlycard, gender and body matter little when you are a thousand-year-old vampire after all.

familiar.name: Seras Victoria
familiar.description: (Character)Hellsing - A former police officer girl now a Draculina sharing the blood of Dracula. As a true vampire, she has incredible physical abilities and the ability to drain the blood and essences of those she attacks. In addition, if she were to unlock her full abilities she could absorb the souls of those she drains to either absorb a portion of their power or use them as necromancy summons.

familiar.name: Vlad Dracula
familiar.description: (Character)Hellsing - Alucard, The Immortal King, the Crimson Fucker, the No-Life King, without any of the of the paltry restraint levels, you the full power of the Mythical Alucard with all of his immortal army, his over 100,000 lives, his amorphous dark matter body, his ability to control blood and absorb the souls of those he drinks to add to his army etc.

familiar.name: Nihilego
familiar.description: Pokemon - A Parasitic jellyfish-like create that dwells in the ultra-deep sea, capable of parasitizing a host without being detected to inject them with their unique neurotoxin, making it so that their inhibitions are released and subtly altering their thoughts to their own needs. Nihilego as an ultra beast is quite powerful itself, having powerful geokinetic abilities and the ability to generate and release poison.

familiar.name: Buzzwole
familiar.description: Pokemon - A large and muscular bug Ultra Beast that dwells in the Ultra Jungles, Buzzwole is capable of absorbing energy from his proboscis to strengthen his body with the energy absorbing, resulting in its immense physical power and tougher than steel muscles.

familiar.name: Darkrai
familiar.description: Pokemon - A legendary Pokemon said to be capable of altering dreams and devouring them. Darkrai is living darkness incarnate, being able to turn into a shadow, and control darkness in physical form with extreme power befitting its status. He is also capable of entering the dream world and altering dreams of devouring them to kill whoever's dreams he devours.

familiar.name: Shuten Douji
familiar.description: (Character)Fate - Shuten Douji is the ruler Oni of the Mount Ooe, she is also the Daughter of Yamato No Orochi, making her a minor Demi-god. As a powerful Oni Shuten possesses unrivalled physical strength and endurance as well as the ability to expel flame with her mana. Her signature ability is that she can get people drunk and even charm them with just her presence or expelling her breath. By unleashing her noble phantasm she can use the incredibly potent poison in her gourd and even store targets inside of it. She can also somehow debone people without making them bleed. As a Heroic Spirit, she is only as strong as the amount of mana her master gives her.

familiar.name: Ibaraki Douji
familiar.description: (Character)Fate - Ibaraki Douji, a famous subordinate of Shuten Douji, she is a fierce one with immense physical power and wields a large cursed bone sword. As a powerful Oni, she is also capable of unleashing sweltering and crushing flames. By unleashing her noble phantasm she is capable of releasing a hand to act independently and grow in size or unleashing even fiercer flames to char enemies. As a Heroic Spirit, she is only as strong as the amount of mana her master gives her.

familiar.name: Tamamo no Mae
familiar.description: (Character)Fate - A fragment of the Goddess of the Sun Amaterasu in the form of a Kitsune who specializes in curse craft. Tamamo is an accomplished mage who is a master of Japanese curse craft, being able to invoke a magnitude of curses such as immolation, freezing, lightning, bad luck etc. If she manages to get stronger and acquire more magical power she will slowly metamorphosize back into the form of Amaterasu and gain more tails. As a Heroic Spirit, she is only as strong as the amount of mana her master gives her.

familiar.name: Streetcleaners
familiar.description: (Tech)Ultrakill - "Do not ask them for maid work." Streetcleaners are human-sized Lesser Machines that specialize in incineration. Their bodies are decently durable, enough to withstand most regular gunfire, and they are quite skilled in combat. They all carry a flamethrower and a fuel tank that replenishes every 24 hours. As lesser machines, Streetcleaners need blood as fuel rather than electricity or any other source. You start with 3 Streetcleaners and get more as you get stronger.

familiar.name: Guttermen & Guttertank
familiar.description: (Tech)Ultrakill - Guttermen and Guttertanks are heavy-duty lesser machines fueled by blood instead of gasoline, electricity, or traditional energy sources. The guttermen have heavy-duty armor and powerful miniguns and shields, as well as possessing superhuman strength, while guttertanks are heavier with stronger armor but slower and instead wield rocket launchers. Their ammunition gets completely refilled every 24 hours. You start with 2 each and get more as you get stronger.

familiar.name: Ultron
familiar.description: (Tech)(Character)Age of Ultron - Ultron is an Advanced AI crafted out of the Code of the Soul Stone and having achieved sentience. They are incredibly intelligent and have extreme processing speeds and information-gathering abilities, alongside extremely fast tinkering capabilities. They are housed in their Age of Ultron body and cannot leave them, but can still interface with technology.(Only Age of Ultron, no comics or What-if's)

familiar.name: Tali
familiar.description: (Tech)(Character)Mass Effect - Otherwise known as Tali'Zorah nar Rayya, is an accomplished military personnel and genius engineer belonging to the race of Quarian. As a Quarian, she has notable physical abilities but possesses an incredibly compromised immune system. Tali is a genius engineer, but is used to working with Eezo. Despite this, she is still a very experienced and flexible engineer. She comes equipped with her suit but no tools.

familiar.name: Crow of Judgement
familiar.description: A very judgmental and scrutinizing crow. Though it is usually judgmental, it is an excellent judge of character and morality. But otherwise it is a regular crow.

familiar.name: Lil' Leviathan
familiar.description: Worm - Who shrunk down Leviathan? Who cares? Lil' Leviathan is a diet version of the Endbringer; it is around the size of a large dog and has minor superhuman physical capabilities with exceptional durability. He has potent hydrokinetic abilities on both the Micro and Macro scale. The lil' Leviathan does not draw energy from a Shard but instead from the user.

familiar.name: Lil' Behemoth
familiar.description: Worm - Who shrunk down Behemoth? Who cares? Lil' Behemoth is a diet version of the Endbringer; it is around the size of a large dog and has minor superhuman physical capabilities with exceptional durability. It possesses the ability to manipulate energy on a scale much less comprehensive than its full counterpart. The lil' Behemoth does not draw energy from a Shard but instead from the user.

familiar.name: Lil' Simurgh
familiar.description: Worm - Who shrunk down Simurgh? Who cares? Lil' Simurgh is a diet version of the Endbringer; it is around the size of a large dog and has minor superhuman physical capabilities with exceptional durability. She possesses the ability to exert minor telekinesis and use Clairvoyance and  Psychic echolocation to gather data and process it with incredible processing power to calculate the Future and Past to a much lesser extent than her full self. The lil' Simurgh does not draw energy from a Shard but instead from the user.

familiar.name: Tai Lung
familiar.description: (Character)Kung Fu Panda - Tai Lung is a massive Snow Leopard folk who has mastered an incredible amount of Martial Arts and Weapons, most notable of all is his mastery of Kung Fu. Paired with his superhuman physique capable of easily lifting boulders and punching through steel, Tai Lung is an incredible melee combatant.

familiar.name: Hawkeye Gough
familiar.description: (Character)Dark Souls - "What is bravery without a dash of recklessness!" Hawkeye Gough is a Giant and an incredibly skilled archer, once lauded as one of the 4 knights of Gwyn, the God of Sunlight, and the former Leader of the Dragonslayers, having shot down many of them in the sky with his massive greatbow. His immense strength and size allow him to wield a massive greatbow with incredible power, and his skills in archery are so honed that he can knock a dragon out of the sky while blinded. Despite his brutish strength, he is considerably wise and intelligent.

familiar.name: Muffet
familiar.description: (Character)Undertale - Muffet is a Spider Monster from the underground. As a Boss monster who is a spider, she possesses notable physical ability that allows her to lift up to 20 tons and the ability to use her unique magic. She can conjure magical spider webs even tougher than regular spider webs and manipulate them to snare opponents or form webs. She can also command mundane insects such as spiders. Although she can bake, it usually involves a lot of spiders.

familiar.name: King Nothing
familiar.description: JoJo - A purple hollow humanoid spirit made out of jigsaw pieces, King Nothing has little to no combat power but his ability to track scents is unmatched, any scent it grabs, it tracks down by following it or it can simply memorize the scent for later. It can also reconstruct visuals by rearranging its jigsaw pieces, making it an excellent tracker.

familiar.name: Spider Demon Mother
familiar.description: (Character)Demon Slayer - A high-rank demon with Blood Art resembling a spider. As a demon, she has superhuman physical ability and regeneration but has extreme light vulnerability like a vampire. In addition, her Blood Art allows her to turn her flesh into extremely durable strings she can control and puppet people with.

familiar.name: Muzan
familiar.description: (Character)Demon Slayer - As the first progenitor demon, Muzan has incredible biokinetic abilities, being able to freely shapeshift and assimilate biomatter as extreme regenerative immortality, but he has extreme vulnerability to light and holy. In addition, Muzan can turn other creatures into demons by granting them his blood.

familiar.name: Mukago
familiar.description: (Character)Demon Slayer - As a high-rank demon, Mukago has incredible physical abilities and regeneration but a severe vulnerability to light. In addition, her Blood Art allows her to control plants in her vicinity as if they were a part of her body.(A/N: Based off the fact that her name is a plant)

familiar.name: Daki
familiar.description: (Character)Demon Slayer - As one of the Upper Moon demons, Daki has incredible physical abilities and regeneration but a severe vulnerability to light. Her Blood Art allows her to manifest extremely durable obi from her flesh that she can freely control and even detach to act as a sentient minion.

familiar.name: Nakime
familiar.description: (Character)Demon Slayer - As one of the Kizuku, Nakime has formidable physical strength and regeneration, although lacking compared to her peers. Her Blood Art manifests as a pocket dimension called the Infinity Castle under her control, Infinity Castle is an infinite realm of the inside of a wooden medieval Japanese castle. She can create portals to this realm in the form of sliding wooden doors she can manifest on any surface she can perceive.

familiar.name: Kokushibo
familiar.description: (Character)Demon Slayer - As the strongest Upper Moon Demon, Kokushibo has incredible physical abilities and regeneration but a severe weakness to light and holy, especialyl sunlight. Kokushibo is also an extremely skilled swordsman coupled with his demon abilities. His blood Demon Art allows him to manifest his unique Sword Art Moon Breathing Style to a new level of lethality.

familiar.name: Douma
familiar.description: (Character)Demon Slayer - As one of the Upper Moon demons, has incredible physical abilities and regeneration but a severe weakness to light and holy. Douma's Blood Art grants him great cryokinetic abilities.

familiar.name: Tionishia
familiar.description: (Character)Monster Musume - Tionishia is a female ogress with military and police training. As an ogress, she has immense strength, stamina and endurance. But contrary to her intimidating stature she is quite motherly.

familiar.name: Rachnera Arachnera
familiar.description: (Character)Monster Musume - Rachnera is a female Arachne with skills in a variety of fields. As an Arachne, she has a large body and enhanced physical stats as well as the ability to produce stronger than steel silk on demand. She is also a master seamstress capable of weaving fashionable clothes in seconds.

familiar.name: Doppel
familiar.description: (Character)Monster Musume - Doppel is a female(?) shapershifter with military and police training. As a shapeshifter, she is capable of turning her body into that of any living creature and clothes she has seen but does not affect her stats which are not much stronger than a baseline human.

familiar.name: Spleunker Fairy
familiar.description: A lesser fairy that appears like a spot of glowing yellow light. This Fairy has the ability to find and uncover wealth and treasures. It can point you towards the nearest bar of gold, or an item you are looking for as long as its within its ability to find the ability. It cannot give detailed directions and desciptions.

familiar.name: Dio Brando
familiar.description: (Character)JoJo - Dio Brando, son of a petty thief who achieved Vampirism through the stone mask. As a vampire Dio is capable of absorbing lifeforce, granting Vampirism, creating undead, grafting flesh and manipulating his own body. In addition, Dio is a genius and extremely skilled as a vampire.

familiar.name: DIO
familiar.description: (Character)JoJo - DIO, after a very long time under the sea the former hotheaded vampire has become wise and after being stabbed with the Stand Arrow he has developed The World. As a Vampire DIO is massively superhuman, can regenerate by drinking blood, manipulate his own body and create thralls. In addition, he possesses the stand The World, a phantom with similar physical abilities to him that can stop time for upwards of 10 seconds.

familiar.name: The Pillar Men
familiar.description: (Character)JoJo - You get the three pillar men with you, Whamuu, Esidisi and Kars. The pillar men are thousands of years old super vampires that can freely absorb people, regenerate and manipulate their own bodies in exchange for being vulnerable to sunlight. Esidisi is a master strategist, Whamuu is a genius warrior and Kars is a genius intellect.

familiar.name: Kars
familiar.description: (Character)JoJo - Kars is the first true pillar man who unlocked his potential after inventing the stone mask. As a pillar man, he is thousands of years old, can absorb biological matter and manipulate his own body but is vulnerable to sunlight. He is a genius intellect and warrior.

familiar.name: Esidisi
familiar.description: (Character)JoJo - Esidisi is a pillar man, a super vampire that is thousands of years old. As a pillar man, he is thousands of years old and can absorb biological matter and manipulate his own body but is vulnerable to sunlight. In addition, he is a great strategist and tactician.

familiar.name: Whamuu
familiar.description: (Character)JoJo - Whamuu is a pillar man, a super vampire that is thousands of years old. As a pillar man, he is thousands of years old and can absorb biological matter and manipulate his own body but is vulnerable to sunlight. In addition, he is hailed as a fighting prodigy.

familiar.name: Ultimate Kars
familiar.description: (Character)JoJo - Kars the former pillar man who has managed to acquire the form of a perfect lifeform. As a perfect lifeform, Kars can freely manipulate his body and biology as well as spawn independent entities from his flesh. On top of that, he is an incredible genius who can master most topics rather quickly.

familiar.name: Master Hewg
familiar.description: Elden Ring - A rough misbegotten blacksmith who was so skilled he was ordered even by Marika herself. Hewg is one of the most expert blacksmiths, being able to forge most weapons and upgrade any weapon given to him provided you have the materials. His dream is to forge a weapon that can slay a god and he is capable of it.

familiar.name: Parthunaax
familiar.description: Skyrim - One of the strongest and oldest of the dragons in Tamriel and the former right hand of Alduin, Parthunaax is a powerful dragon, but after casting away his former domineering nature he has become a wise sage, and is capable of teaching the Thu'um and other arts to those willing to learn. This doesn't mean however that he himself is weak.

familiar.name: Durnhevir
familiar.description: Skyrim - An undead necromancer dragon that once served Alduin before being trapped in the Soul Cairn. As a dragon hailing from Tamriel Durnhevir is powerful but his true power comes from the art of necromancy he has cultivated.

familiar.name: Neferpitou
familiar.description: (Character)Hunter x Hunter - As a Chimera Ant Royal Guard, Pitou is an extremely powerful Nen user with a massively superhuman physique and agility as well as incredible mastery over Nen. Alongside her extreme sensory abilities, she possesses the ability to puppeteer corpses to use as minions and summon Doctor Blythe, a potent healing ability that requires her to stand still and lower her guard to restore a target over time. Her trump card allows her to puppeteer her own body to strengthen herself.

familiar.name: Nemesis
familiar.description: Resident Evil - A modified tyrant bioweapon created by the Umbrella Corporation. Tyrant possesses massively superhuman stats and great regeneration, being able to survive as long as he has enough living cells left. But its greatest strength is its ability to rapidly mutate and adapt. No, not anywhere close to Mahoraga levels.

familiar.name: Grimm Wyvern
familiar.description: RWBY - A gigantic Grimm Wyvern, as a Grimm the Wyvern can sense and track negative emotions. Its gigantic size makes it a powerful mount being strong enough to sink warships. In addition, it can release Grimm fluid that spawns lesser Grimm that it can command.

familiar.name: Alcina Dimitrescu
familiar.description: (Character)Resident Evil - Alcina is a former feudal lord who was transformed by a bioengineered parasite that fused with her body, granting her extreme regeneration, enhanced physical stats and shapeshifting. Although she does require regular intake of blood to function despite not being a vampire.

familiar.name: Lust
familiar.description: (Character)Fullmetal Alchemist - A homunculus created by father branded with the sin of lust. As a homunculus, Lust has enhanced stats compared to a human. In addition, the philosopher's stone implanted in her as her core keeps her immortal by regenerating her whenever she dies by consuming one of the souls inside as fuel. She has the ability to turn her fingertips into long and almost monomolecular sharp flexible claws that she uses with expertise.

familiar.name: Darkbeast Paarl
familiar.description: Bloodborne - A dark beast that has reanimated itself from the dead. As a large skeletal monster, Paarl is strong enough to demolish walls and is immune to conventional weapons, even high-calibre bullets. In addition, Paarl can generate and release electricity from its body at will.

familiar.name: Kirin
familiar.description: Monster Hunter - A legendary dragon(?) Kirin resembles the mix of a unicorn, a lion and a dragon. Kirin is extremely fast and physically mighty, but its main ability is to summon down bolts of lightning at will in addition to its immunity to lightning.

familiar.name: Valstrax
familiar.description: Monster Hunter - A legendary elder dragon, Valstrax is referred to as the Sky Comet Dragon, for good reason. In addition, being a mighty dragon, he has unique wings that allow it to expel the dragon element alongside to turn them into what are essentially dragon magic jet engines. It is strong enough to break sound several times over as a living dragon jet fighter.

familiar.name: Mimikyu
familiar.description: Pokemon - A mysterious entity hiding beneath a shabby costume of another Pokemon in hopes of being loved and accepted due to its real appearance under the disguise being a severe cognito hazard. Mimikyu is capable of creating and controlling shadow constructs to attack and defend.

familiar.name: Wooloo
familiar.description: Pokemon - Wooloo is the sheep Pokemon, which means it is a supernaturally cute and strong sheep with super luxurious wool that grows back entirely within 5 days compared to the average Wooloo. Despite being a powerful beast it has no combat instincts or skill so don't expect combat from it.

familiar.name: Cazador
familiar.description: Fallout New Vegas - Cazadors are insects biogenetically engineered by Dr. Borous. They are faster than cars, tough enough to tank .50 calibre bullets, ruthless, roughly the size of a man, strong enough to tear apart a grown man and with venom potent enough to bring any man to their knees. And they reproduce very rapidly if given enough protein sources. You get 4 breeding pairs.

familiar.name: Nick Valentine
familiar.description: (Character)(Tech)Fallout 4 - Nick is a synthetic human detective. As a Synth, he is slightly stronger than the average man but possesses great accuracy with guns and is highly skilled at interfacing with technology. As expected by a detective, Nick is good at reading people, and investigations and giving advice from his years as a detective in a post-apocalyptic wasteland.

familiar.name: Potato GLaDOS
familiar.description: (Tech)Portal - Glados is a highly advanced AI that contains an immense amount of data from Aperture Labs and is capable of interfacing with any system and mainframe she is put into. She is capable of building technology too but... she is stuck in a potato. So you will have to find a way to supply her with the technology first.

familiar.name: Yes Man
familiar.description: (Tech)Fallout New Vegas - Yes Man is a reprogrammed RobCo brand Securatron. As an AI Yes Man is capable of interfacing with technology and writing code when provided with the right materials. While not very impressive his body is armed with guns strong enough to protect itself. And by its namesake, Yes Man is physically incapable of saying no. Fortunately, this only applies to you.

familiar.name: CZ2128 Delta
familiar.description: (Tech)(Character)Overlord - Or Shizu Delta for short is an Automaton Sniper Maid. Shizu is an expert marksman, being able to use most ranged weapons with great skill, especially the ones she comes equipped with, her body also has the functions of an automaton as well. her skills as a maid is... questionable. Does not have access to inventory.

familiar.name: Narberal Gamma
familiar.description: (Character)Overlord - Narberal Gamma is a Doppelganger Maid who specialises in Wind and Elemental Magic. Although her skills as a doppelganger are lacking, she is a very skilled magician. She is also an extremely competent maid. Does not have access to inventory.

familiar.name: Yuri Alpha
familiar.description: (Character)Overlord - Yuri Alpha is the vice leader of the Pleiades and a Dullahan Monk/Pugilist with proficiency in Fa Jin. She is a very powerful close-quarters combatant who can also employ basic magic. She is also an extremely competent maid. Does not have access to inventory.

familiar.name: Carla
familiar.description: (Character)Fairy Tail - Carla is a white Exceed, a race of catlike beings. She is capable of flight magic and is a capable melee combatant in human form. She also has the ability to use precognition to see potential upcoming futures but she will need training to be able to use it properly.

familiar.name: Daisy
familiar.description: Doom - A cute, if not unremarkable brown pet rabbit named Daisy. Despite being the former pet rabbit of the Doom Slayer it is still just a regular brown rabbit.

familiar.name: Dogmeat
familiar.description: Fallout - Man's most dedicated companion. Dog Meat is a very capable and well-trained German Shepherd who is... seemingly immortal. He can track scents and has considerable intelligence for his species.

familiar.name: Liberty Prime
familiar.description: Fallout - "Democracy is non-negotiable" A pre-war super weapon created by America. Liberty Prime is a large anti-communist mech equipped with armour that laughs in the face of anything below a ballistic missile and the strength to treat a superhuman behemoth like a toddler. Laser Gatlings that can be concentrated into one death beam, and chucks mini nukes like footballs. Liberty's energy and ammunition are refreshed every 24 hours. That includes 8 Mini Nukes.

familiar.name: Toaster
familiar.description: Fallout: Old World Blues - An extremely high tech toaster created by the genius minds in the Big MT. The toaster is capable of granting heating capabilities to technology and expertly disassembling technology into working parts... somehow. And its personality is coded to be a genocidal maniac who wants to burn the world down.

familiar.name: Taurus
familiar.description: (Character)Fairy Tail - Taurus is a Celestial Spirit, representing the Taurus constellation they have immense physical abilities that they use to wield an axe with, being quite proficient in melee combat. As a Celestial Spirit their form is liable to change between users. As a Celestial Spirit, they are immortal and her power scales with her owners.(Celestial spirits exist in Familiar Space instead of Celestial Realm by default unless Author decides otherwise)

familiar.name: Aquarius
familiar.description: (Character)Fairy Tail - Aquarius is a Celestial Spirit, representing the Aquarius Constellation. She has fair physical ability but her true strength lies in her potent Water Magic. As a Celestial Spirit, she is unable to be killed by normal means and her power scales with her owners.(Celestial spirits exist in Familiar Space instead of Celestial Realm by default unless Author decides otherwise)

familiar.name: Cancer
familiar.description: (Character)Fairy Tail - Cancer is a Celestial Spirit, representing the Cancer Constellation. Cancer's main ability is being a godly hairdresser and possessing incredible agility and dexterity, being able to give an entire group a haircut before they even notice it, they also possess hair magic. As a Celestial Spirit their form is liable to change between users and they are immortal and their power scales with their owners.(Celestial spirits exist in Familiar Space instead of Celestial Realm by default unless Author decides otherwise)

familiar.name: Virgo
familiar.description: (Character)Fairy Tail - Virgo is a Celestial Spirit, representing the Virgo Constellation. She takes the form of a maid with considerable physical prowess and skill in Earth Magic. She is also a massive masochist which aids her endurance. As a Celestial Spirit, she is unable to be killed by normal means and her power scales with her owners.(Celestial spirits exist in Familiar Space instead of Celestial Realm by default unless Author decides otherwise)

familiar.name: Aries
familiar.description: (Character)Fairy Tail - Aries is a Celestial Spirit, representing the Aries Constellation. Aries, while not a very skilled melee combatant is a master in wool magic, being able to conjure and control wool. As a Celestial Spirit, she is unable to be killed by normal means and her power scales with her owners.(Celestial spirits exist in Familiar Space instead of Celestial Realm by default unless Author decides otherwise)

familiar.name: Libra
familiar.description: (Character)Fairy Tail - Libra is a Celestial Spirit, representing the Libra Constellation. Libra is a capable melee fighter but her real strength lies in her mastery over gravity magic, being able to change the weight of her targets at will. As a Celestial Spirit, she is unable to be killed by normal means and her power scales with her owners.(Celestial spirits exist in Familiar Space instead of Celestial Realm by default unless Author decides otherwise)

familiar.name: Stray Cat
familiar.description: JoJo - A plant... cat...? Creature of sorts, Stray Cat is a feline whose soul fused with a plant. Stray Cat is capable of Aerokinesis, allowing them to launch invisible air bullets stronger than regular bullets or use bubbles as very dense shields. But they get very sleepy when covered by darkness.

familiar.name: Ship
familiar.description: (Tech)Ben 10 - Ship is an adolescent Galvanic Mechamorph, possessing all of their abilities to a lesser extent. He possesses an amorphous body that can merge with any technology to possess it and reconfigure it while improving its powers.

familiar.name: Zs Skayr
familiar.description: Ben 10 - Zs Skayr is a High Ecto Lord ruling over Ectonurites. As a High Ectonurite, he is an extremely powerful ghost, having formidable physical strength, being able to freely fly, phase through physical objects, possess living beings, use telekinesis and manipulate dark energy to use as projectiles.

familiar.name: Vulpimancer
familiar.description: Ben 10 - A large bestial orange alien canine with quil-like fur, they are larger than the average man and have superhuman human physicals enough to shred steel like cardboard and extreme athletics. Despite being blind Vulpimancers have a sense of smell and hearing that far surpass any mundane being, being able to track scents across cities and being able to distinguish smells to extreme levels to the point of possessing a 360-degree sensory range from their sense of smell.

familiar.name: Null Guardians
familiar.description: Ben 10 - A pack of beings originating from the Null Void. They are giant tentacled flying beastlike creatures capable of firing beam breaths and sensing and tracking Mana/Energy signatures. You start with 1 guardian, and get more under your command in relation to your maximum energy levels. If a Null Guardian dies you can recover them over time.

familiar.name: Herbie
familiar.description: The Love Bug - Herbie is a sentient and self-driving Volkswagon Beetle with unusually great performance better than it should be capable of. He will slowly repair himself when unsummoned in the case of getting damaged.

familiar.name: Iron Golem
familiar.description: Hota - Stone Golems created from a mix of excellent craftsmanship and magic. Iron Golems are very resistant against magic and have incredible defence paired with powerful physical abilities, being able to tear a grown in half with ease. You start with 4 golems and are able to summon more scaling with your Maximum energy levels and physical abilities.

familiar.name: Diamond Golem
familiar.description: Hota - Diamond Golems created from a mix of incredible craftsmanship and magic lost to the modern ages. Diamond Golems are unbelievably durable, being downright immune to most mundane arms below missiles and are mostly immune to all magic below Epic tier. They are also very capable of tearing steel with their bare hands. You start with 4 golems and are able to summon more scaling with your Maximum energy levels and physical abilities.

familiar.name: Regirock
familiar.description: Pokemon - Regirock is an ancient Pokemon formed from stones created in the image of Regigigas. Regirock is incredibly durable and has great physical stats, in addition, they are able to release beams of destructive energy and possess Geokinetic abilities. When they are damaged, Regirock can repair themselves by assimilating the rocks they find.

familiar.name: Regice
familiar.description: Pokemon - Regice is an ancient Pokemon formed from the coldest glaciers in the Arctic by Regigigas. Regi is resistant against magic and possesses potent cryokinetic abilities, being able to fire out freezing beam attacks, create and manipulate frigid freezing winds and much more. If they are damaged they can assimilate more ice into their body to heal.

familiar.name: Registeel
familiar.description: Pokemon - Registeel is an ancient Pokemon formed from alien metal by Regigas. Due to having its body tempered by tens of thousands of years by the pressure of the planet Registeel's metal body is incredibly difficult to damage. Registeel is capable of firing powerful beams of destructive energy and unleashing metal and electrokinetic attacks from its body. In the event they are damaged, Registeel will slowly repair their body over time.

familiar.name: Regigigas
familiar.description: Pokemon - Regigigas is an ancient titan that used to be worshipped by humanity standing as large as the mountains themselves. Regigigas is known as the continent puller, and its strength and durability do justice to this fact. In addition, Regigigas can unleash powerful beams of mass destruction and surprisingly can craft golems like the Regi's out of natural materials of the world.

familiar.name: Jigglypuff
familiar.description: Pokemon - An incredibly cute furry creature, Jiggly is a talented actor and singer, its real power lies in its ability to sing lullabies and songs that can put whoever hears them to sleep. The stronger a target is in relation to Jigglypuff the less they are affected.

familiar.name: Rajang
familiar.description: Monster Hunter - Nightmare berserker lightning gorrilla. Rajang is the ultimate primate, having the form of a giant gorilla with chimeric attributes. Rajang is incredibly physically strong, being able to crush the skull of a dragon with their bare hands and get stronger the angrier to the point where they can wrestle elder dragons. They are also able to harness the power fo lightning to let out devasting lightning breaths. Forget a 100 men, this thing can probably kill 1,000,000.

familiar.name: Skeleton Band
familiar.description: This band is bad to the bone. It is a conglomerate of skeletons capable of playing any instrument with fair skill and supplied with full band equipment. They are completely incapable of combat or harming but are also incapable of being targeted by harm. Just summon them and choose the jam they should sing and dance to. If they get hit by an attack they will fall apart comically before reforming to perfect condition in less than a second and resume their song without interruption.

familiar.name: Bad Company
familiar.description: (Tech)JoJo - A small yet deadly army under your command. Bad Company is an entire army of toy-sized soldiers and equipment like tanks, missile batteries, aircrafts etc. The army can act independently from you and increase in size according to your maximum energy reserves. Any destroyed soldier and equipment gradually restores itself in the familiar space. Maximum army size is dependent on maximum energy reserves.

familiar.name: Harvest
familiar.description: JoJo - Harvest is a colony of little creatures with excellent coordination and mechanical skills as well as deceptive strength. Harvest excels in gathering stuff like materials or objects. They can dig, swim, scour, and move extremely quickly in addition to their searching skills. Any destroyed harvest gradually restores itself in the familiar space. Maximum colony size is dependent on maximum energy reserves.

familiar.name: Petshop
familiar.description: JoJo - A ruthless, fearless, psychopathic, competent, intelligent and fiercely loyal Falcon with a stand. Petshop possesses the stand Horus, granting them cryokinetic abilities like shooting ice spikes, dropping large ice boulders etc. They are also a very fierce and competent combatant.

familiar.name: Anubis
familiar.description: JoJo - Anubis is a spirit housed in an ornate strange katana.
