Anubis has the ability to make the blade of its sword pass through physical barriers and cut what is beneath, rendering traditional defences useless. In addition, Anubis is capable of adapting and learning incredibly quickly to counter opponents and become stronger. Anubis is capable of taking control of anyone who unsheathes the blade but is also capable of guiding their wielder if they wish to.

familiar.name: Monstra
familiar.description: RWBY - The apex grimm, more akin to a moving small city than an actual creature. Monstra is a titanic sperm whale like Grimm 900 meters tall and 7000 meters long with mostly hollow insides that can fit castles and entire towns inside with some refurbishing. Monstra is capable of floating due to the gravity of dust in its body and is capable of withstanding its own mass, making it impervious to anything below nuclear arsenals. In addition, it can freely spew out Grimm liquid to spawn Grimm also under the user's command.

familiar.name: Mizutsune
familiar.description: Monster Hunter - A fierce leviathan monster that is also capable of living and fighting on land. As a leviathan Mizutzune has formidable physical abilities being able to shred any metal with ease with their claws. In addition, Mizutsune are capable of breathing a soap-like substance from their mouths that can immobilize opponents.

familiar.name: Shalltear Bloodfallen
familiar.description: (Character)Overlord - Shalltear was one of the Floor Guardians of Nazarick and a True Vampire Valkyrie created with the blood of a vampire god. She is exceptional as both a physical and magical fighter, thanks to her plethora of abilities as a vampire and Valkyrie. She can use hemokinesis, elemental magic, charms, holy magic, and much more. She can also turn others into vampires as a True Vampire herself. Comes equipped with her only basic clothes, does not have access to inventory. (A/N:No time stop)

familiar.name: Albedo
familiar.description: (Character)Overlord - Albedo was one of the Floor Guardians of Nazarick and a... virgin succubus dark knight? Albedo is the true example of a tank, she has exceptional physical abilities, being able to destroy the walls of a fortress with one blow and incredible defence to the point that anything that can't level a street would it find to hurt her thanks to her multitude fo defensive abilities and skills. In addition, she can use basic magic and has exceptional intelligence as well as competence in most skills a wife would need to have. Comes only with her basic dress and without access to an inventory

familiar.name: Cure Elim Los Malvar
familiar.description: Overlord - Cure Elim is the Elder Coffin Dragon Lord, Cure Elim is close to the pinnacle of Necromancy. As a Dragon Lord, they already have incredible stats but CureCure Elim's necromancy is their true power. Elim is capable of using unique wild magic to absorb the souls of others to use to fuel his wild magic. They are capable of absorbing the souls of entire cities and turning every single inhabitant into undead. Poses near perfect control over their undead regardless of number, use a variety of powerful wild magic, and unleash a breath attack that can annihilate anything in its path including souls. Cure Elim is truly near the pinnacle of undeath.

familiar.name: Kenjaku
familiar.description: (Character)Jujutsu Kaisen - Kenjaku is a several century-old Cursed Sorcerer whose ability allows himself to exist as a brain that can take over corpses to make them his new body and allow him to use their powers with his own expertise. He is a master of JuJutsu, making him a formidable ally and eve a master. But he is just a brain right now, you will need to find him a suitable body first.

familiar.name: Mahito
familiar.description: (Character)Jujutsu Kaisen - Mahito is the Cursed Spirit born of the hatred of humans between themselves. Mahito is a cursed spirit capable of using jujutsu and his technique Idle Transfiguration to manipulate any soul he can touch and by proxy their bodies using it. This also renders him immune to any non-soul-based attack as long as he still has energy.

familiar.name: Hanami
familiar.description: (Character)Jujutsu Kaisen - Hanami is the Cursed Spirit born from the concept of nature. As a Special Grade Cursed spirit, Hanami is incredibly skilled in Jujutsu and has considerable power. Hanami's cursed technique allows them to create and control cursed plant life and nature, even their more esoteric properties.

familiar.name: Jogo
familiar.description: (Character)Jujutsu Kaisen - Jogo is the Cursed Spirit born from the concept of wildfires and volcanoes. As a Special Grade Cursed Spirit Jogo is incredibly skilled in Jujutsu and has considerable power. His power allows him to create and control fire and lava as well as other flame-based constructs.

familiar.name: Dagon
familiar.description: (Character)Jujutsu Kaisen - Dagon is the Cursed Spirit born from the concept of the ocean and seas. As a Special Grade Cursed Spirit Dagon is incredibly skilled in Jujutsu and has considerable power. His cursed technique allows him to summon and control water as well as manifest the domain Horizon of the Endless Skanda which can either be used for leisure or an offensive domain.

familiar.name: Nrvnqsr Chaos
familiar.description: (Character)Tsukihime - Nrvnqsr Chaos is a dead apostle ancestor whose unique biology is made up of 666 beasts formed from the formless mud of life. He is the beasts themselves and shares his existence with all of them, making him immortal unless all beasts are dead. In addition, he can replace his beasts by absorbing other living beings, adding their abilities into himself and being able to release them as a beast too. Any beast of his that dies can be recovered after being absorbed into him.

familiar.name: Pepsi Man
familiar.description: Pepsi - Pepsi Man, gives Pepsi whenever he can! When summoned Pepsi arrives at your location through any means before delivering everyone in the location a fresh can of Pepsi before disappearing. 8-hour cooldown. Note: This familiar is not sponsored by the Pespi Corporation.

familiar.name: Nashrah
familiar.description: (Character)Fear and Hunger - Nashrah, once known as the Doom and Terror of the modern man left as a floating disembodied immortal head. Nashrah is an extremely powerful wizard specializing in Blood Magic and Pyromancy as well as rituals. Despite his incredibly foul behaviour, he has considerable wisdom and knowledge. Luckily his loyalty is enforced by the gacha even if his vulgarity remains. Regardless, you get to reroll the ticket you rolled him on for free to not have to deal with him.

familiar.name: Leviathan
familiar.description: Worm - A Shard Superweapon reformed by Chaos, Leviathan is an incredibly powerful Hydrokinetic, capable of manipulating water that is not part of a biological entity across a massive or a really small scale with incredible precision, being able to sink entire cities alongside his formidable physical abilities paired with the freakish durability of an Endbringer(A/N: Scaled down to country level).

familiar.name: Simurgh
familiar.description: Worm - A Shard Superweapon reformed by Chaos, the Simurgh is a floating angel-like entity with extreme physic powers. Simurgh has negligible albeit extremely precise offensive powers for her tier with her telekinesis but her real ability lies in her absurd clairvoyance that she can use to scan an entire planet and precisely predict the past and future using her hypercomputer brain as well as manipulate the actions of others. She also has a standard Enbringer physique with superhuman physical abilities and freakish durability(A/N: Scaled down to country level). Her Tinker Database has been wiped clean but she can still scan and rebuild technology.

familiar.name: Behemoth
familiar.description: Worm - A Shard Superweapon reformed by Chaos, and the toughest among the three siblings. Behemoth is a giant capable of manipulating energy, allowing it to shoot powerful lightning bolts, create flames and release shockwaves. He can also redirect projectiles, and manipulate and absorb existing energy to a limit. He can also unleash extreme amounts of radiation from his body. As an Enbringer and the physically strongest one he has incredible strength and durability(A/N: Scaled down to multi-country level)

familiar.name: Dragon
familiar.description: (Character)(Tech)Worm - Not an actual dragon. Instead, Dragon, or Theresa is a hyper-advanced tinker-made AI who is capable of copying, imitating and iterating on existing existing technology to design her own. As an advanced, she is capable of directing hundreds of mechs with ease as long proper servers are supplied to her. But due to limitations on her code she is incapable of creating more AI.

familiar.name: Light and Nightfury
familiar.description: How to Train Your Dragon - A breeding pair of a Nightfury and Lightfury, they are semi-aquatic agile lithe dragons who can release unique plasma breaths in contrast to the regular dragon fire breath. They are very fast and intelligent and possess great stealth abilities despite being dragons.

familiar.name: Blue Diamond
familiar.description: (Character)Steven Universe - Blue Diamond is a former intergalactic with her own gem empire. As a Diamond gem, she has great physical abilities and durability with her gem, her core being insanely durable for her tier. She is capable of using energy-based attacks and unleashing emotion-manipulating aura. As well as possessing all of the abilities of the average gem such as shapeshifting, storage space, fusion, and restoring her physical form as long as her core is intact.

familiar.name: Lapis Lazuli
familiar.description: (Character)Steven Universe - Lapis Lazuli is an unusually powerful Laips Lazuli. As a Lapis, a caste made for terraforming, she has powerful and precise hydrokinetic abilities being able to control vast amounts of water with enough precision to make water minions. As a Gem, she also has considerable physical abilities as well as the standard abilities they have such as shapeshifting, fusion and regeneration as long as her gem stays intact. Her maximum energy output and hydrokinetic ability scales with your maximum energy reserves.

familiar.name: Tiamat
familiar.description: (Character)Fate - Tiamat is the Beast II of humanity, the Mother of All Life. As a Beast Tiamat has unmatched physical abilities and magical power. She is able to create and control the Sea of Life, a black mud-like conceptual substance that remakes any organism it consumes into one of her children, as long as the Sea of Life exists Tiamat lacks the concept of Death and has virtually unlimited magical power, and as long as Tiamat she can recreate the Sea of Life. She also possesses the ability to rewrite local reality with Nega-Genesis to deny all forms of anything that has evolved from base humanity like mythical abilities and gods.

familiar.name: Goetia
familiar.description: (Character)Fate - Goetia is the King of Demons, a hivemind of 72 demon gods and a supreme magic system. He is capable of nullifying all magic with Solomon's 9 rings and is immortal as long any one of the 72 pillars is alive, and due to his temple of time, unless it is breached any of the pillars will revive there. He also possesses nigh omniscience with his Clairvoyance being able to see the past, present and future. He is an absolute master of magic and can rip out souls with a simple gaze.

familiar.name: Kirby
familiar.description: Kirby - "Poyo!" One cannot begin to imagine or describe the powers this creature possesses.

familiar.name: Chicken
familiar.description: Minecraft - Whatever this chicken is, it does not obey any known laws of physics. It lays an egg every 6 - 12 hours in perfect condition and this this egg can thrown at the ground to have a chance of spawning a baby chicken that will grow to adulthood in 24 hours, they can also breed without eggs too in order to produce children together. The eggs are not fertilized unless thrown and taste great, so does the chicken's meat. No biology explains this, you get a pair. It still needs to eat so don't let the poor things starve.

familiar.name: Golden Goose
familiar.description: Yes, it really did lay some golden eggs. This otherwise regular-looking goose lays a golden egg every 24 hours, the egg is solid gold unless the Goose is fertilized.

familiar.name: Untitled Goose
familiar.description: Unntitled Goose Game - The biggest asshole goose on planet Earth, and that is a hard title to contend with. This feathered menace is an expert at annoying and inconveniencing people. As if that were not enough, the Goose is immortal and will respawn in the familiar space 1 hour after its death.

familiar.name: Peridot
familiar.description: (Tech)(Character)Steven Universe - A second era Peridot, a gem cast built specifically as engineers and maintenance workers for gem tech. She has incredible knowledge about engineering and creating technology from the Gem Empire, such as droids and warp pads, provided with enough resources and time that is. She also possesses formidable ferrokinetic abilities despite her meagre physical stats. As a second era gem, her natural gem abilities are impaired, thus she cannot shapeshift. The level of tinkertech she can build is relative to the user's power level.

familiar.name: Sapphire
familiar.description: (Character)Steven Universe - A second era Sapphire, a gem cast built to be able to see the future and provide advantages to their ruler. Sapphire has the ability to look into the likely future, but her future vision can be thrown off by unexpected variables. She has beyond human physical abilities and an uncommon rank cryokinesis to aid her in combat.

familiar.name: Pearl
familiar.description: (Character)Steven Universe - Pearl is a first era gem created to be the perfect attendant. In addition to her superhuman stats, she has intermediate Cooking, Management, Weapon Mastery, Performance, Drawing, Discipline, Acting, Savoir Faire and Teaching. Making her the perfect attendant in almost all situations. She also possesses the standard gem abilities like storage, shapeshifting etc. You get to pick which pearl you get.

familiar.name: Eliza & Sekhmet
familiar.description: (Character)Skullgirls - Eliza was once an Egyptian empress who fused with the Parasite skeleton Sekhmet. Sekhmet allows Eliza to control blood, and replace her own body with blood that she controls, allowing her to shapeshift as she wills. Sekhmet also gives her superhuman physical stats. Eliza can store blood inside herself that she sustains herself on. She is also an excellent performer and combatant.

familiar.name: Koro Sensei
familiar.description: (Character)Assassination Classroom - Koro Sensei, formerly one of the best assassins in the world and a polymath genius now an Antimatter creature. Koro's sensei's body is extremely strong and malleable; in addition, he has extreme speed and perception, moving so fast that it looks like he clones himself to the naked eye. He has numerous other abilities due to his Antimatter, such as flight, regeneration, releasing mucus etc. He is also an excellent teacher by all metrics, whether it is combat or any science.

familiar.name: Dreadon
familiar.description: (Character)(Tech)Calamity Mod - A true marvel of engineering, a being of pure absolute amoral devotion to science. The mind of Dreadon is uploaded into a decoy body. Dreadon is an engineer capable of creating machines that can rival and surpass even gods themselves, being able to harness the power of souls, cosmos, void, and even the most exotic energies of the multiverse in his crafts. With enough resources and time, what he is capable of building can only be speculated.

familiar.name: S-Snake
familiar.description: (Character)One Piece - a Seraphim clone of Boa Hancock, the pirate empress, spliced with Lunarian DNA and Vegapunk's augments. S-Snake possesses incredible physical abilities as well as advanced weaponry such as laser canons and her own Lunarion. She also has the ability to turn anyone charmed by her into stone. She also possesses the ability to utilise Observation and Armament haki.

familiar.name: Meruem
familiar.description: Hunter x Hunter - Meruem is the Chimaera Ant King. Meruem is a true monster, possessing tremendous physical abilities and an IQ beyond even most geniuses. His most powerful ability is the ability to consume the flesh of others to gain their abilities and increase his own stats(Does not work on Gacha wielder or Gacha Familiars), but he is limited by the number of ability slots you have; if you have 2 ability slots, so does he. Lastly, he has immense mastery over his own nen.

familiar.name: Godzilla
familiar.description: Monsterverse - Godzilla is a titanic beast from the ancient ages with a tremendous body, with an almost impregnable defence and physical strength matching their size. Godzilla is also capable of absorbing radiation and converting it to energy to fuel itself and its devastating atomic breath.

familiar.name: Ghidorah
familiar.description: Monsterverse - Ghidora is a titanic flying beast from the ancient ages. It has strength befitting its size and durability, such that it almost seems invulnerable. Ghidorah is capable of calling thunderstorms and absorbing energy from energy sources to unleash lightning or concentrated energy beams capable of massive devastation. As if that were not enough, as long as Ghidorah has enough energy, it is capable of nigh instantenous regeneration, coupled with its seemingly endless stamina, this creature an apex predator.

familiar.name: Mothra
familiar.description: Monsterverse - Mothra is a flying Titan from the Hollow Earth. Mothra has extreme physical stats befitting her size, and incredible flying speeds. In addition, she is capable of sensing the weather and shape of the planet and create hyper-durable silk that can restrict even titans. Mothra also has the ability to cheat death; whenever she is killed, she will return to her familiar space as an egg that will hatch in around a week.

familiar.name: Shimo
familiar.description: Monsterverse - Shimo is the Titan who started the Ice Age. She has strength and durability that are basically incomparable, being able to withstand the strongest weapons humanity can create with ease and overpower even Godzilla. Just from her presence, the surroundings are plunged below freezing temperatures, and her directed frost breath is strong enough to freeze even titans in mere seconds. If aimed towards the sky, it can create monolithic blizzards. If given enough time, Shimo can create another Ice Age.

familiar.name: Parasite
familiar.description: Parasyte the Maxim - A parasite is a tiny parasitic organism that burrows into flesh and merges with it. The Parasite has potent biokinetic abilities on the parts of flesh they are merged into, being able to control even cellular structures, and they are fiercely intelligent. If they burrow into the brain, they can take over a person's body, but that is quite unreliable.

familiar.name: Excalibur
familiar.description: (Character)Soul Eater - "From the United King~ I am looking for him~" Excalibur is a Great Old One from a foreign world that takes on the form of the ultimate weapon Excalibur. In his sword form, he grants the user extreme power, the ability to cut space, make portals and teleport freely, and as a Great Old One, he is capable of using Madness Wavelength of Rage to bring rage to the minds of anyone. He has no conditions to wield him technically; anyone can utilise his blade. He is just so intolerably annoying that almost no mortal can withstand him. To the point where he was ranked down from Mythical rarity.

familiar.name: Chauffeur
familiar.description: This familiar, when called, summons a very luxurious limousine driven by a golem driver that will drive you to anywhere you specify that it can successfully drive to before driving off and vanishing the moment it goes out of sight. If the car and/or the driver is destroyed, this familiar will go into a 24-hour cooldown.

familiar.name: Goons
familiar.description: (Character) 50 roughly 30-year-old Italian men who look mob-affiliated and share eerily similar appearances. They are not the brightest, but they can individually rough up the average man pretty good. They are useful for menial or somewhat complex tasks like serving as guards, manning a shop and other such activities.

familiar.name: Ddraig Y Goch
familiar.description: (Character)Highschool DxD - Ddraig is the Heavenly Dragon Emperor of Domination. As one of the Heavenly Dragons, Ddraig's strength surpasses all but the strongest of gods with his extreme physical and magical abilities. His signature ability is Boost, which increases his power each time it is used(NOT DOUBLE), as well as the ability to use Boost to transfer his power to others. He also possesses the ability to penetrate to ignore all magic defences and his strongest ability, Blazing Inferno of Scorching Flames, is a fire breath strong enough to burn anything, even the strongest of gods.

familiar.name: Albion
familiar.description: (Character)Highschool DxD - Albion is the Heavenly Dragon Emperor of Supremacy. As one of the Heavenly Dragons, Albion's strength surpasses all but the strongest of gods with his extreme physical and magical abilities. He possesses the ability to Divide that allows him to reduce the power of his enemies and use it to bring himself to peak condition(NOT HALVED), he can also use this ability to divide even space and objects. He is also capable of reflecting attacks with his ability, but his moment potent ability is the ability Reduce, his own venom that reduces the existence of whoever it affects until they vanish from existence.

familiar.name: Mewtwo
familiar.description: (Character)Pokemon - An artificial Pokemon sharing DNA with Mew. Mewtwo is a tremendously powerful and capable Esper. He is capable of reading minds, controlling minds, creating barriers, projecting energy blasts, using telekinesis, projecting elemental abilities and much, much more.

familiar.name: Remy
familiar.description: Ratatouille - Remy is an unusually smart rat who is a very proficient chef.

familiar.name: Dialga
familiar.description: Pokemon - Dialga is the Pokémon God of Time, having been created at the eve of the creation of the universe by Arceus. Altough, Dialga's physical abilities are lacking comparatively, its power over time is undeniable. Being able to distort, stop, speed up, reverse, loop, and travel time, but powerful opponents can resist the effects to a degree. They can also unleash powerful attacks with their energy.

familiar.name: Palkia
familiar.description: Pokemon - Palkia is the Pokémon God of Space, having been involved in the creation of its universe. Although Palkia's physical abilities are lacking comparatively, its power over space is undeniable. Being able to warp space, teleport, create portals, destroy objects in space, travel through dimensions, and even create pocket dimensions. They can also use their energy to create powerful attacks.

familiar.name: Giratina
familiar.description: Pokemon - Giratina is the Pokémon God of Antimatter, the balance between time and space when creating the universe. While their physical stats are comparatively lacking, Giratina can manipulate dark energy and the Reverse world; they can retreat into and manipulate the Reverse anytime and affect the material dimension from there, as damage there reflects to the real world. They can also use their energy to create powerful attacks.

familiar.name: Khorne
familiar.description: Warhammer 40k - It is Khone, not figuratively, rhetorically or any other kind of Prose, straight up Khorne, the Blood God. Their true form exists in your familiar space now, but cannot be fully taken out. Khorne allows you to receive their blessings, teachings and lend you their power. The extent at which you can benefit from Khorne is dependent on your affinity with them, which you can increase by committing actions of violence, rage and sacrifices for the Skull Throne. The higher the affinity, the greater blessings you receive and the stronger Avatar Khorne can manifest themselves as in order to be by your side as an actual familiar.

familiar.name: Slaneesh
familiar.description: Warhammer 40k - It is Slaneesh, not figuratively, rhetorically or any other kind of Prose, straight up Slaneesh, the Prince of Debauchery. Her true form exists in your familiar space now, but cannot be fully taken out. Slaneesh allows you to receive their blessings, teachings and lend you their power. The extent to which you can benefit from Slanessh is dependent on your affinity with them, which you can increase by committing actions of debauchery, lust, obsession, suffering, etc. The higher the affinity, the greater blessings you receive and the stronger Avatar Slaneesh can manifest herself as in order to be by your side as an actual familiar.

familiar.name: Tzeentch
familiar.description: Warhammer 40k - It is Tzeentch, not figuratively, rhetorically or any other kind of Prose, straight up Tzeentch, the Changer of Ways. Their true form exists in your familiar space now, but cannot be fully taken out. Tzeentch allows you to receive their blessings, teachings and lend you their power. The extent to which you can benefit from Tzeentch is dependent on your affinity with them, which you can increase by committing actions of planning, outwitting, deception, etc. The higher the affinity, the greater blessings you receive and the stronger Avatar Tzeentch can manifest themselves as in order to be by your side as an actual familiar.

familiar.name: Nurgle
familiar.description: Warhammer 40k - It is Nurgle, not figuratively, rhetorically or any other kind of Prose, straight up Nurgle, the Plague Father. Their true form exists in your familiar space now, but cannot be fully taken out. Nurgle allows you to receive their blessings, teachings and lend you their power. The extent to which you can benefit from Nurgle is dependent on your affinity with them, which you can increase by committing actions of decay, poisoning, desperation, death, etc. The higher the affinity, the greater blessings you receive and the stronger Avatar Nurgle can manifest themselves as in order to be by your side as an actual familiar.

familiar.name: Puar
familiar.description: (Character)Dragon Ball - Puar is a weird floating cat creature. Although she has little to no real combat ability, she graduated from Transformation Academy, allowing her to change her physical form to anything, ranging from objects to people, without changing her stats. She is also capable of teaching transformation to others as long as they have the talent and time.

familiar.name: Acnologia
familiar.description: (Character)Fairy Tail - After bathing in the blood of countless dragons as a Dragon Slayer, Acnologia became a Dragon himself, and the mightiest Dragon King among them. Acnologica is the arcane dragon slayer, allowing him to eat all elements to empower himself or recover his energy and health, and is completely immune to all forms of magic until you overwhelm his absorption. In addition to his overwhelming magical and physical ability, he can unleash overpowering beams of destruction and use a variety of magic, including even time manipulation.

familiar.name: THWOMP
familiar.description: Mario - "URNGH" Giant sentient(?) angry boulder creature. You can summon the THWOMP above your targets for him to slam down with strength, or summon him in front of you to act as a wall. If the THWOMP suffers damage, it will be mended over time inside of the gacha.

familiar.name: Kaguya Otsutsuki
familiar.description: (Character)Naruto - The Rabbit Goddess and the Progenitor of Chakra. As an Otsutsuki who ate the Chakra Fruit, she possesses truly godlike powers, with the most notable ones being able to manipulate all chakra natures, create Truth-seeking Balls, absorb energy, even including those of living beings, the All-Killing Ashbones that disintegrate targets, and the Rinne Sharingan. She also has the ability to warp space to create pocket dimensions and travel through dimensions herself.

familiar.name: Renamon
familiar.description: Digimon - Renamon is a strong beastman like Fox digimon with formidable physical abilities, with a focus on speed and agility. Renamon is skilled in Ninjutsu, whether that is using it in tandem with unarmed strikes using her claws cloaked in flame or performing basic ninja spells with it. (evolution does not exist)

familiar.name: Taomon
familiar.description: Digimon - Tamon is a fox-like wizard Digimon with formidable physical stats and a speciality in Omnyudo, being able to create a variety of magical talismans to invoke special effects such as barriers, elemental attacks. She is also capable of creating and utilising constructs by drawing in the air using her paintbrush. (evolution does not exist)

familiar.name: Skullgreymon
familiar.description: (Character)Digimon - A monstrous, undead Digimon that has devolved from a creature to a being of pure combat. In addition to its combat instinct and formidable physique thanks to its size, Skullgreymon is a living biomissile silo, being able to launch a variety of missiles from its back, ranging from normal, toxic, tracking, to ones that are even stronger. He can also breathe paralysing, toxic breath. But he does not possess a higher intellect, making him unable to execute complex orders or act independently effectively without supervision.

familiar.name: Golem Worker
familiar.description: This is a crew of iron golem workers with skill in Intermediate Mechanics, and a knack for labour. The workers are tireless and can work on projects without break, but cannot engage in combat. The number of workers you can summon is dependent on your maximum energy, but the minimum is 10.

familiar.name: Lilithmon
familiar.description: (Character)Digimon - Lilithmon was once revered as a Goddess of Darkness, but is now reduced to level 1. She has considerable physical ability paired with her skill in darkness magic. She is capable of unleashing potent corroding darkness and using charming magic to charm targets. To recover and increase her power, she can devour the mana of fresh corpses.

familiar.name: Shademon
familiar.description: Digimon - Shademon is a sentient living shadow; it may have a distinct lack of combat ability, but it is capable of tormenting targets with illusions and possessing targets, enhancing their stats and granting the ability to manipulate its shadow-like form to attack. They also get stronger by devouring the mana of fresh corpses.

familiar.name: Eyesmon
familiar.description: Digimon - A shadow demon dragon digimon, Eyesmon has tremendous physical strength and can burrow into shadows at will, his eyes grant him incredible sensory abilities and the ability to shoot cursed beams from his multitude of eyes. It is capable of splitting up its body into scatter mode to use for scouting and spying, as well as binding shadows. They also get stronger by devouring the mana of fresh corpses.

familiar.name: Hydramon
familiar.description: Digimon - A gigantic plantlike Digimon monster, Hydramon, has great physical prowess befitting its size and physiology. In addition, it constantly secretes toxic acid that it can utilise offensively and spew out of its maws, and it can also fire beam-like attacks from its three heads. Its tentacles can stretch and grow to attack or dig into the earth and cause earthquakes.

familiar.name: Angewomon
familiar.description: (Character)Digimon - Angewomon is an Angel Digimon with formidable physical abilities paired with her skill in Holy and Light magic, making her a formidable combatant. She can also unleash holy lightning and tornadoes and recover the health and status of her allies. She also receives a small boost according to how evil her opponent is.

familiar.name: Ladydevimon
familiar.description: (Character)Digimon - Ladydevimon is a Demon Digimon with formidable physical might, paired with her ability to manipulate corrosive darkness, making her a formidable combatant. She can create and shape darkness into familiars to attack, unleash waves of noxious darkness or use darkness to enhance her physical abilities to attack. Her poison is stronger the more energy the opponent has, but starts falling off after a tier.

familiar.name: Ariemon
familiar.description: (Character)Digimon - Ariemon is an Ocean Spirit who specialises in Hydrokinesis, healing and support. She is capable of healing and curing creatures using seawater to shape it into attacks like spears, but prefers to avoid causing harm and instead can trap creatures in conjured seashells. In addition, she can sometimes predict and foretell upcoming disasters about to appear in the world.

familiar.name: Lamiamon
familiar.description: (Character)Digimon - Lamiamon is a draconic snake-like Digimon who specialises in the use and mastery of poison. While she lacks proper ability in a direct confrontation. She can synthesise a variety of poisons, such as poison, melting, paralysis, vitality sapping etc. The more potent the poison, the more energy it consumes and the effects of the poison is reduced the stronger the target is. Her mastery over poison allows her to cure some ailments with specialised poisons too.

familiar.name: Medusamon
familiar.description: (Character)Digimon - Medusamon is a draconic Digimon who takes after the mythical gorgon. Alongside her formidable physical abilities, her hair is made up of powerful serpent dragons that can extend and chase down enemies independently. She is also capable of turning enemies into stone with her eye, the speed at which they turn to stone is dependent on the amount of energy she expends and the power difference between her and the target, strong enough targets can ignore the effect.

familiar.name: The Lich
familiar.description: Adventure Time - "Before there was nothing... there were monsters." Lich, the last scholar of Golb, is a primordial undead force of existence who has existed before nothing that embodies entropy and death He is an absolute master of Death magic and a variety of magic, such as Pyro, Mind, Necromancy, etc. Wherever he goes, death follows. He is able to impose death on the living and dominate the minds of those around him. He is nigh impossible to kill for good. He possesses incredible intelligence and insight due to the nature of his existence.

familiar.name: Lil' Khorne
familiar.description: (Character)Warhammer 40k - What if you took one of the all-powerful Chaos Gods and sent them back down to Level 1? You get Lil' Khorne! This Chaos God shrunk down is an incredible warrior with immense physical power and proficiency in all weapons and warfare. Lil' Khorne also boasts greater magic resistance in exchange for being unable to use magic due to their disdain. They start off weak for an Epic familiar(Roughly Rare in power), but as long as they perform actions that align with their existence, they can slowly level back up. Just don't expect them to reach their original power anytime soon.

familiar.name: Lil' Slaneesh
familiar.description: (Character)Warhammer 40k - What if you took one of the all-powerful Chaos Gods and sent them back down to Level 1? You get Lil' Slaneesh! This Chaos God shrunk down is a mistress of debauchery and corruption, specialising in charms, manipulating sensations and minds. Lil' Slaneesh is also very skilled at understanding and corrupting people. She starts off weak for an Epic familiar(Roughly Rare in power), but as long as they perform actions that align with their existence, they can slowly level back up. Just don't expect them to reach their original power anytime soon.

familiar.name: Lil' Tzeentch
familiar.description: (Character)Warhammer 40k - What if you took one of the all-powerful Chaos Gods and sent them back down to Level 1? You get Lil' Tzeentch! This Chaos God shrunk down is an incredible magician/sorcerer, being able to study and learn all kinds of magic at an incredible pace. Lil' Tzeentch is also an excellent mind for all purposes of planning, whether it's starting a business, ruling a country, leading an army or committing espionage. They start off weak for an Epic familiar(Roughly Rare in power), but as long as they perform actions that align with their existence, they can slowly level back up. Just don't expect them to reach their original power anytime soon.

familiar.name: Lil' Nurgle
familiar.description: (Character)Warhammer 40k - What if you took one of the all-powerful Chaos Gods and sent them back down to Level 1? You get Lil' Nurgle! This Chaos God shrunk down is a master of poisons, decay and toxicity, being able to concoct the most foul of cocktails. Lil' Nurgle is also a bringer of new life, however, being able to use their speciality in unique creative ways of also curing and creating life. They start off weak for an Epic familiar(Roughly Rare in power), but as long as they perform actions that align with their existence, they can slowly level back up. Just don't expect them to reach their original power anytime soon.

familiar.name: Scion
familiar.description: (Character)Worm - Scion is the Avatar of the Warrior Entity, containing the most essential abilities it has. By default, Scion is physically strong, but that is nothing compared to its variety of abilities, the most distinct ones being able to tell the future, travel through dimensions, shoot powerful beams and its signature ability, Stilling, which allows them to cancel wavelengths through golden light and a massive variety of other abilities. If they were to(Somehow) perish they would eventually reform in the familar space.

familiar.name: Grand Guignol
familiar.description: Black Souls - The Theatre of Darkness and the Mechanical God woven from the "Ability to Change" owned by Mary Sue. Grand Guignol is an artificial Outer God; as a God, Grand Guignol is capable of creating her own garden(Reality), but her most potent ability other than creation is the ability to change. With the power to change, the Grand Guignol can turn even simple iron bars into ones even other Outer Gods cannot break out of.

familiar.name: Majin Buu
familiar.description: Dragon Ball - A demon from time immemorial, the entire universe feared. Majin Buu is a being of unbeliable, being able to vanquish entire solar systems with ease, his screams themselves can tear apart dimensions, his unique malleable physiology makes it all but impossible to kill him. He can also absorb the bodies, powers and energy of anything he can get his hands on. A true horror of any universe.

familiar.name: Anti Spiral
familiar.description: Gurren Lagann - Anti-Spiral is the physical manifestation of the Anti-Spiral itself. His power over reality is unmatched. Nothing beyond the Outer Gods or the Spiral can match it.

familiar.name: Obelisk the Tormentor
familiar.description: Yugioh - Obelisk, the Tormentor, the Divine Soldier, is an Egyptian God who stands imposingly with overwhelming physical might. As an Egyptian God, no magic or ability below Legendary rank can directly affect him. Obelisk can also unleash blasts of destructive dark energy. His power can be further temporarily enhanced by giving him sacrifices.

familiar.name: Winged Dragon of Ra
familiar.description: Yugioh - Winged Dragon of Ra, the Sun Dragon, is an Egyptian God who stands in the form of an imposing golden Phoenix. As a Phoenix embodying the sun Ra, along with his powerful body, can unleash divine flames like that of the sun, incinerating anything, especially demonic and dark beings. Ra can also enter his Phoenix Form, turning into a being of pure flame to gain immense resistance and regeneration. Ra can be further powered up with sacrifices offered to him. As an Egyptian God, no magic or ability below Legendary rank can directly affect him.

familiar.name: Dusknoir
familiar.description: Pokemon - Dusknoir is a ghost Pokémon with a hollow body, it possesses great physical strength and extremely strong durability both physical and magical. In addition to being able to release attacks using shadow and darkness, Dusknoir can sense souls, and it can also grab the souls of living and dead creatures to store inside its body.

familiar.name: Lucario
familiar.description: Pokemon - Lucario is the Aura Pokemon, possessing mighty physical abilities and a penchant for martial arts. Lucario is capable of harnessing aura, allowing it to release blasts of aura, use it to reinforce its body or sense the aura of other living creatures to sense their mood and intent as well as uncover their locations.(You cannot be taught Aura by Lucario)

familiar.name: Yvetal
familiar.description: Pokemon - Yveltal is the Legendary Pokémon of Destruction. In addition to its overwhelmingly powerful magical abilities and darkness manipulation, Yveltal is capable of unleashing pure destruction beams and unleashing waves of destruction that absorb life and turn living beings into stone. If given the opportunity, it can drain the life of an entire planet.

familiar.name: Xerneas
familiar.description: Pokemon  - Xerneas is the Legendary Pokémon of Life. In addition to its overwhelmingly powerful magical abilities and light/manipulation, Xerneas is capable of manipulating life, being able to sprout forests in deserts, it can heal even the gravest of injuries and restore the dead back to life with its power over life, although it is taxing. They can also grant immense power to whoever they want, imbuing them with immense energy.

familiar.name: Alcremie
familiar.description: Pokemon - Alcremie is the cream Pokémon, while she can use some fairy abilities, she is not a fighter, and instead is great at making and cooking sweets. She can also freely change her flavour and create delicious cream from her body.

familiar.name: Hoopa
familiar.description: Pokemon - Hoopa is the Djinn Pokémon. In addition to its ability to use dark and psychic attribute attacks and its great physical might, Hoopa is capable of using its rings as incredibly versatile portals capable of penetrating even dimensional boundaries between universes.

familiar.name: Frost Legion
familiar.description: Terraria - Allows you to summon the Frost Legion, a horde of sentient murder-happy gangster snowmen wielding weapons like hardened ice knives, tommy guns, ice grenades, etc. The number of snowmen you can summon at once depends on your maximum energy. The minimum amount is 50. If a snowman gets killed, you recover 1 snowman every 1 hour. If you have frost/Ice affinity, the snowmen get stronger.

familiar.name: Salt Golem
familiar.description: A little 5cm tall salt golem made of condensed and distilled salty tears from wasted tickets.

familiar.name: D'vorah
familiar.description: (Character)Mortal Kombat - D'vorah is a Kytinn who also is also very skilled in combat. Her biology gives her basic superhuman stats and natural weapons as well as venom. She is capable of producing and controlling insects to act for a variety of purposes, such as combat, poisoning, espionage, etc.(Cannot reproduce to create more Kytinn larva/maggots)

familiar.name: Triborg
familiar.description: (Tech)Mortal Kombat - Triborg is a highly advanced cyborg fused with the skills and data of several master martial artists and assassins, as well as its predecessors. It's Robotic Physique grants it superhuman stats and allows it to reconfigure its body into several forms that allow it to utilise numerous different types of weaponry. Such as Smoke Form granting it close-range teleportation, Sub-Zero form granting cryo weaponry, etc. It can only use one form at a time. He may be upgraded with Tinker abilities.

familiar.name: Azmuth
familiar.description: Ben 10 - Azuth, the First Thinker and the smartest being across immumberable galaxies. Although he possesses no combat ability, Azuth is among the smart inventors in all of existence, being able to create inventions that warp reality itself, such as the Fabled Ascalon and the Omnitrix. As long as he is given enough time and resources, it is practically impossible to know what he cannot create.

familiar.name: Mipha
familiar.description: (Character)Legend of Zelda - Mipha is the princess of the Zora. She has superhuman physical abilities and considerable skill in wielding polearms. She is also capable of utilising water magic to aid her in combat and has potent healing abilities she can use on herself or others.

familiar.name: Factory Core
familiar.description: (Tech)"Time to industrialise" A modified golem core that instead builds itself into a factory by assimilating resources into itself. The more information about mechanics and technology the user feeds into it, the more assembly lines it can produce to create more items. The growing speed and maximum size of the Factory depend on the user's abilities.

familiar.name: Mech Core
familiar.description: (Tech) A modified Golem core that assimilates materials and electronics into itself to build itself into a mech. The power, size and durability of your mech depend on the materials you can provide to it; it naturally repurposes materials fed into it into creating Mech technology for itself on the level of an Epic tinker ability. Golem core shares the knowledge base of the user; the more the user knows and the more Tinker specialities they get, the better they will be able to improve. The mech can only act at half power if the user is not piloting it.

familiar.name: Connor
familiar.description: (Tech)(Character) Detroit Become Human - He is an android sent by Cyberlife, except not. He is an android made to closely mimic humans; he possesses peak human physicals and notable skill in combat. He is capable of scanning objects and humans to gather more data about them, albeit it is limited in function.

familiar.name: HK 47
familiar.description: (Character)Star Wars - "Defiant Statement, there is nothing you can do to me." HK is an incredibly experienced and advanced Assassin Droid, being extremely skilled in all forms of combat and sorts of weapons, as well as in combating and assassinating enemies thanks to his brilliant computational mind and engineering. He is also a very skilled mechanic. He comes equipped with standard droid gear, such as a blaster.

familiar.name: Magnaguard
familiar.description: (Tech)Star Wars - An Elite Cast of Droids made specifically to battle Jedi. The Magnaguards have superhuman physical capabilities and advanced polearm skills in wielding their electrical staves. You start with 4 guards and get more as time goes on according to your maximum stats.

familiar.name: B-1 Battle Droid
familiar.description: (Tech)Star Wars - One, singular B-1 Battle Droid equipped with a blaster. His skills and effectiveness are... questionable. Good luck with him.

familiar.name: B-2 Battle Droids
familiar.description: (Tech)Star Wars - Tough heavy-duty Battle Droids with built-in blasters. They are not adept at quick combat but are very effective as walking walls with blasters. You start with 4 Droids and get more as time goes on according to your maximum stats.

familiar.name: KX Executor Droids
familiar.description: (Tech)Star Wars - Tough, athletic, skilled, efficient and powerful. These high-tech droids are very capable fighters and combatants, being able to wield most weaponry and possess superhuman physical stats strong enough to tear grown men in half. You start with 5 Droids and get more as time goes on according to your maximum stats.

familiar.name: IG-88
familiar.description: (Tech)Star Wars - IG-88 is an incredibly advanced combat droid with the skills of an expert marksman and advanced sensory capabilities. It also possesses superhuman stats due to its advanced droid constitution. This model also comes equipped with a veritable variety of deadly weapons.

familiar.name: 2-1B surgical droid
familiar.description: (Tech)Star Wars - An advanced medical droid who is equipped with a vast database and extreme precision due to its droid body. This droid is a better surgeon than any human alive and is equipped with a variety of implants for surgeries.

familiar.name: Imp Midna
familiar.description: (Character)Legend of Zelda - Midna is the Twilight Princess, whose powers have been suppressed and forced into the shape of an Imp. Even in her Imp form, she still has potent magical abilities. Being able to use basic telekinesis, shapeshifting, turning into cloud form and creating Twilight Portals with some time and effort that she can teleport between, she can also merge into shadows. With a potent enough curse-breaking ability(Legendary), you could break her curse and unleash her full form, drastically enhancing her abilities.

familiar.name: Midna
familiar.description: (Character)Legend of Zelda - Midna is the Twilight Princess, possessing potent magical powers, ruling over Twilight and Darkness magic. She has the ability to exert telekinesis, create portals, shapeshift, summon twilight creatures and generally use her potent magic.

familiar.name: Seth
familiar.description: (Character)Street Fighter - Seth is a biogenetically engineered and cybernetically enhanced artificial being equipped with a Tandem Engine and the ability to shapeshift. Seth has the knowledge of numerous Martial Arts Masters downloaded into her body, granting her mastery over an incredible amount of martial arts. Her tandem engine supplies her body with an immense amount of Artificial Ki, which she is very skilled at utilising. She is also able to use her Tandem Engine to copy the martial arts and moves of her enemies. Truly the perfect Martial Arts fighter.

familiar.name: Horus
familiar.description: JoJo - Horus is an autonomous stand connected to you by the soul. It manifests as a bird-like creature of ice if it chooses to. Horus has the ability of Cryokinesis, being able to expend your energy to launch icicles, freeze targets, drop ice boulders, and create a variety of ice constructs and can act even without your input. The power of Horus scales with yours due to their natures as a stand.

familiar.name: The Fool
familiar.description: JoJo - The Fool is a... dog machine native american...? Looking stand that is actually formed out of sand, it can manipulate and shape at will, even being able to change its texture and colour. It can form as a barrier that automatically protects you, imitate people well enough to fool people familiar with them, and much more. The power of The Fool scales with yours due to their natures as a stand.

familiar.name: Cream
familiar.description: JoJo - Cream, despite its rather unassuming name, is a large, imposing stand that is capable of vanishing anything it eats into a dimension of endless darkness alongside its considerable strength. Cream can also eat the user to hide them without damaging them, and it can also eat itself to become a wrecking ball of nothingness that vanishes anything it comes into contact with in exchange for not being able to see. Due to their nature as a stand, Cream cannot leave more than a 5-meter range of the user and expends their energy to use their ability.

familiar.name: Hanged Man
familiar.description: JoJo - Despite not being named as such, he is, in fact, a man in a mirror. Hanged Man is a stand in the form of sentient light, being able to dwell in reflective surfaces and damage the physical world without being hurt back. But it is limited to the force of an athletic human. And is forced to escape if the reflective space is covered, leaving as a ray of light. As a stand, Hanged Man requires your energy to remain active.

familiar.name: High Priestess
familiar.description: JoJo - High Priestess takes the form of an amorphous, tribal like creature that can merge and control minerals, transforming the ground into cars, guns, giant faces, etc. The range of control and the power it can assert depend on your power level, and the damage of what it is merged into reflects back to you.

familiar.name: Radiance
familiar.description: Hollow Knight - Radiance is a lesser moth deity of Light and Dreams. She is able to project beams of light, swords of light and orbs of searing light as well as teleport using essence. Her origin also allows her to exert power over the dreams of others, manipulating them to bend their will to hers, but those of comparable strength or particularly strong minds can resist her infection.

familiar.name: The Knight
familiar.description: Hollow Knight - They are very hollow. The Knight is the perfect vessel, being able to contain anything inside of itself thanks to the void. They can also absorb soul by injuring living beings to use to either heal themselves or use in Shaman spells. They can also use their strength and nail to fight opponents while phasing through them with their Shade Cloak.(Pre-Radiance Fight Knight). Height: 1.3 Meters

familiar.name: Tentacle Cleaner
familiar.description: A large ball of tentacles covered in a slimy substance, which is actually an incredible cleaning agent that has no smell or leaves any residue. The tentacle creature is very dexterous and skilled, being able to clean even the most complex of machinery without disturbing its mechanisms due to its morphing tentacles. No combat ability but they are very dedicated to their job.

familiar.name: Troupe Master Grimm
familiar.description: (Character)Hollow Knight - Master of the Grimm Troupe, freed from the shackles of the Nightmare heart. As a fully matured Nightmare being, they are capable of shapeshifting, manipulating nightmare flames and performing short-range teleportation. As a nightmare, Grimm is also capable of invading the dreams of others. 335Tinker Bell,1.4 (Character)Peter Pan - Tinker Bell is a fairy from Neverland. Due to her size, she is quite weak and unable to meaningfully participate in combat. But she can fly and allow others to fly temporarily by sprinkling fairy dust on them; she can produce a decent amount of fairy dust regularly.

familiar.name: V1
familiar.description: (Tech)Ultrakill - V1 is a blood-fueled death machine, capable of moving incredibly fast and posessing incredible strength, unbefitting of its frame. Although their durability does not match up to their strength, they can repair themselves, but need blood and only blood as fuel to function. V1, alongside its scary expertise, also brings its entire arsenal along with it(no spawner arm). It is a one-robot army thirsty for blood, and nothing will stop it from drinking.

familiar.name: Isabelle
familiar.description: (Character)Anima Crossing - Isabelle is an anthropomorphic Shi Tzu. While she does not have any combat abilities beyond what is expected of the average grown woman, she is quite a skilled secretary and manager, being able to deal with the law and manage assets.

familiar.name: Lucifer the Ceo of Hell
familiar.description: (Character)Helltaker - Lucifer is one hell of a Ceo. As actual Lucifer herself, she is a powerful demon, possessing strength strong enough to rip steel in half like paper and being able to enslave people with a kiss, melting away their flesh and turning them into bone demons, possessing the abilities of a Fiend(Elite Trait) and being capable of using basic demonic magic. Having ruled hell for thousands of years and being a CEO, she is an incredible manager beyond human standards. She can manage hundreds of businesses and still be minimally inconvenienced compared to running Hell itself.

familiar.name: Radioactive Spider
familiar.description: Spider-Man - A gamma-mutated spider that has the ability to grant those it injects its venom into the powers of a Spider. Its venom refills around 18 - 3 days, depending on how well it is fed. (No spider totems, they get the basic Tobey Maguire movie spider-man ability set)

familiar.name: Big Gete Star
familiar.description: Dragon Ball - A giant planet-sized intelligent computer. The Big Gete Star is capable of absorbing energy and assimilating anything into itself to improve its abilities. Anything the Big Gete Star has assimilated, it can reproduce and replicate, including cybernetic clones of living beings and functionally any technology. But it does need very powerful energy sources to power some of its functions. It is also very capable of interplanetary travel and shapeshifting. Does not include the Meta Cooler Core.

familiar.name: Ridley
familiar.description: Metroid - One of the most fearsome pirates in the known universe, Ridley is equal parts cunning and powerful despite portraying himself otherwise. He has incredible physical might that allows him to tear apart metal with ease and a flamebreath that can melt open spaceship hulls. Not only that, he is deceptively fast, being able to outpace most planes in an atmosphere and being able to go fast enough to achieve interstellar travel outside the atmosphere by his lonesome.

familiar.name: Venom
familiar.description: Sony Venom Movies - "WE are Venom!" Venom is an alien symbiote called a Klyntar that can merge with a living host and enter a symbiotic relationship with them. By hosting Venom, the host receives various benefits, such as being able to repair the host, granting them superhuman physiology as long as it's attached and is capable of temporarily covering the user in a suit that can boost their strength even further and shapeshift. But Venom must sustain itself on human flesh to maintain its strength. After spending enough time and eating enough times, Venom can asexually reproduce to produce another Symbiote similar to itself. Venom is also incredibly vulnerable to loud noises and fire, a weakness which extends to the host.(A/N: CANNOT absorb abilities or replicate genetic material, strictly Sony Movies Venom)

familiar.name: Black Sabbath
familiar.description: JoJo - Black Sabbath is an automatic stand that can merge with shadows and can bind itself to inanimate objects. Black Sabbath can follow direct preset commands and will do its best to fulfil those conditions, such as attacking something under specific conditions, as long as it is aware that the conditions have been fulfilled. Otherwise, it can just be set on hunting an opponent or directly protecting you. Black Sabbath draws power from shadows. When inside shadow or darkness, it had enough strength to bend metal and pulp, but outside of it, it had baseline human strength. The stats of Black Sabbath scale with yours. When destroyed, Black Sabbath will instantly remerge in Familiar Space.

familiar.name: Silver Chariot
familiar.description: JoJo - Silver Chariot is a stand that is bound to your soul; it can only be a certain range from around you, and whatever damage it takes is inflicted back onto you. While it does not excel in brute force, Silver Chariot is an Expert Swordsmaster with insane agility and dexterity, capable of moving so fast that it can leave behind afterimages that look like clones. While Silver Chariot comes equipped with a simple rapier, it can use any weapon the user can use. As a stand, the power of Silver Chariot scales with your energy levels and consumes your energy to stay active and use its superspeed.

familiar.name: Mineral Weaver
familiar.description: A large 5-meter-tall spider that has the ability to consume and digest any mineral and produces silk at a supernatural rate. The Silk of the weaver takes on the properties of whatever she eats. If she eats iron, it will have the durability of iron while maintaining the flexibility and advantages fo silk. And they also have the combat ability befitting of a bus-sized spider.

familiar.name: Hornet
familiar.description: (Character)Hollow Knight - Hornet is the child born from the union of a Higher Being, the pale king, and Hera, the Beast, a Weaver. Raised as a warrior and having weathered both Hallownest and Pharloom, Hornet is an incredibly skilled fighter with both claw and blade. As a weaver of divine heritage, she naturally produces silk made from "Soul" inside her shell and can use it in a variety of ways, such as attacks, restraints, mobility and much more.(Does not have her tools)

familiar.name: Grand Mother Silk
familiar.description: (Character)Silksong - Silk is a Higher Being, a lesser divine with power over silk. Alongside her great physical abilities befitting her side, Silk can manipulate Silk on a massive scale with incredible fine control. She can control individuals by infesting them with silk(Success varying with target strength) and control thousands of them at a time, create living entities out of silk, use them for a variety of different attacks, bind targets, and much more. She is also capable of floating and exerting some amount of telekinetic force.

familiar.name: Death Angels
familiar.description: A Quiet Place - Not as grandiose as the name suggests, these aliens dubbed "Death Angels" are heavily armoured quadrupedal extraterrestrial creatures with incredible strength and agility alongside super hearing while being blind. A Death Angel is immune to conventional firearms, can lift cars and can run at over 100km/h, but their senses are rather lacklustre, needing someone to actively direct them to be able to operate efficiently. You start with 4, and get more as your maximum energy reserves expand.

familiar.name: Architect
familiar.description: A 3-meter-tall automaton with 6 arms made out of bronze and powered through nebulous means. The Architect has incredibly fine control over its movements and is an incredibly skilled builder and architect, to the point where, if given the materials, it can design and build a house within a day. But its combat abilities are incredibly lacking due to being a builder and not a combatant.

familiar.name: EVE
familiar.description: (Tech)Wall-E - EVE is an advanced and mass-produced probe robot designed for finding plantlife. She has the capacity to hover and move fairly quickly, although not designed for combat, she also has an energy rifle built in for defence.

familiar.name: Bell Gargoyles
familiar.description: Darksouls - A pair of powerful gargoyles that tower over the average man, wielding supernaturally sturdy weapons. One is capable of breathing out fire, and the other, lightning; they have superhuman physiques strong enough to shatter walls with their blows. As your energy levels increase, you can summon more gargoyles to serve under your command.

familiar.name: Black Knights
familiar.description: Darksouls - The Black Knights are the most elite knights of Gwynn, the Lord of Sunlight, their armours and weapons charred by the Kiln of the First Flame. All Black Knights possess superhuman physiques and great skill in combat, especially in hunting demons and those infernal. You start with 10 knights wielding the Black Knight weapons of your choice(Includes greatbow). As your power levels increase, so does the number of knights under your control.

familiar.name: Ravenous Crystal Lizard
familiar.description: Darksouls - The Ravenous Crystal Lizard is a man-eating, large lizard beast that can tear apart steel with ease. On the back of this beast grows titanite, a rare metal that can be used to enhance the properties of existing metal. Titanite on its back can be harvested and grown back as long as the beast is sufficiently fed.

familiar.name: Terraformar
familiar.description: Terraformars - A giant humanoid 2 meter tall 100kg+ cockroach with superhuman physique and the ability to fly, absolutely ruthless and deceptively smart, it can reproduce asexually, and all genetic memory is passed down to the next generation. It rapidly adapts each generation and possesses the incredible survival abilities of a cockroach. Just a single one is more than enough to start an entire civilisation of these monsters. Very few civilisations can survive a full-on Terraformar infestation.

familiar.name: Made in Heaven
familiar.description: JoJo - Made in Heaven is a stand bound to your soul that has the ability to accelerate time on a universal scale, although thanks to being bound to a more pilable soul, it can exert more control over its abilities. Allowing it to infinitely accelerate the speed of the user according to the amount of energy they expend or any target they choose to target, whether it is a planet, an apple, a person or the entire universe. It consumes you energy to activate its ability; the amount of energy consumed scales with the amount you accelerate time by, does not take the size of targets into account.

familiar.name: Amaterasu
familiar.description: (Character)Fate - Amaterasu, the Goddess of the Sun and a potential Beast Candidate. Although weakened due to no longer being able to hide in her pocket of Age of the Gods or being boosted by Fate Concepts, she is still an incredibly powerful Divine Spirit with Great Might and Immense Magical Power. Her divinity allows her to use incredibly powerful Light and Fire magic, as well as all of the abilities possessed by Tamamo no Mae, boosted to incredible levels.(Output reduced to Satellite Class)

familiar.name: Dwarf in the Flask
familiar.description: (Character)Fullmetal Alchemist - The Dwarf in the Flask, the first homunculus created by Hohenheim with a shard of the eye. It possesses a completely amorphous darkness physique that can shred tanks and great physical might, but that is not its main power. The homunculus possesses immense alchemy knowledge and transmutation, being able to create transmutation circles, create philosopher stones out of souls, creating homunculi, creating chimera and much more with its extensive knowledge, even being able to teach the art of Alchemy to others.(Note: Does not possess the power of Truth nor can it reach it due to it not existing in other worlds)

familiar.name: Vlov Arkangel
familiar.description: Tsukihime - Vlov is an Undead Apostle Ancestor, though in name only due to the nature of his being and his immaturity. He has immense physical and magical abilities as well as the Undead Apostle ability to convert others into ghouls and even fully fledged Undead Apostles. His greatest strength is his Idea Blood of "Freezin" allowing him to deprive things of heat, being able to plunge entire cities into freezing blizzards near instantly, create thousands of ice lances, drop tempratures to near absolute zero and not only that, as a byproduct of this, he can also create incredibly hot flames to use as he pleases, but due to not being a true Undead Apostle Ancestor it is difficult for him to use his Idea Blood easily and his power level is very lacking compared to his peers.

familiar.name: Full-Grown Fallingstar Beast
familiar.description: Elden Ring - A fully matured Fallingstar Beast, its body is incredibly tough, tougher than almost all mundane materials and possesses incredible physical strength. In addition, this beast is capable of manipulating gravity, using anti-gravity to launch creatures into the air, slinging heavy rocks with gravity magic, using gravity bolts, creating gravity crushing zones, and pairing it with its physical strength to perform powerful charges.

familiar.name: Hound of Tindalos
familiar.description: "It's a good boy!" A hound of tinadlos, a beast that has existed before the concept of time and space and will continue to forever more. It has decent physical abilities, but its true power is to emerge from any "sharp corner" in existence, regardless of where they are, or what reality they are in, being able to go from universe to universe is as simple as going from the corner of one house ot the other. The hound of Tindalos is unkillable, even if killed it will remerge from yet another sharp corner.

familiar.name: Gugulanna
familiar.description: Fate - The Bull of Heaven, a force of absolute physical might and mass devastation in the form of a giant divine bull creature. Its very presence brings with it almost country-sized storms, and it can control these storms at will; its physical strength is almost incomparable; even the strongest of gods could not tame its strength. It embodies physical might. The stomps of its hooves can match the strongest of meteors and wipe out entire countries. Truly, this bull is might itself embodied.

familiar.name: Brethren Moon
familiar.description: Dead Space - A moon-sized mass of necromorphs of almost godlike ability, this shapeshifting biological moon is capable of extending and attacking with country-sized tendrils, employing telepathy, mind reading, and mind control across interstellar distances on entire civilisations, manipulating and rewriting DNA, and reviving the dead into necromorphs. It can also achieve faster-than-light speeds while in outer space. But powerful beings are capable of resisting their influences.

familiar.name: Golem Keter Malkuth
familiar.description: Fate - A giant living golem made in the image of Adam, the first man. The golem itself is a living reality marble that passively terraforms the ground around it into "Eden", turning even dead arid ground into a lush paradise filled with vitality, and as long as it is in contact with the earth, it has nigh unlimited mana supply and regenerative immortality, coupled with its immense physical might, it makes it night impossible to defeat while grounded. While in its initial 15-meter state, it's not too powerful, as the owner grows in strength, so does the golem's size and its power. At its maximum size, it's strong enough to contend with the strongest of heroes. As long as it stays near ground, it will be counted as "Eden", all vegetation growing at incredible speeds with great health, and the ground itself is imbued with vitality, temporarily increasing the vitality and vigour of those nearby. But if it leaves, while it will no longer be "Eden," the lush vegetation and life will remain.

familiar.name: Zeus Homie
familiar.description: One Piece - A homie, a sentient living cloud made from a piece of the soul of Big Mom Charlotte Linlin. As an incredibly powerful Homie made of clouds, Zeus has the ability to generate and manipulate lightning at will, allowing him to unleash lightning bolts that can vaporize even castles or strike people across islands. He can also be ridden like a mount and increase his cloud density to harder than steel. His cloud physiology renders him immune to most conventional attacks but also makes him vulnerable to attacks that would otherwise affect clouds.

familiar.name: Prometheus Homie
familiar.description: One Piece - A homie, a sentient fireball in the shape of the sun made from a piece of the soul of Big Mom, Charlotte Linlin, granting him immense power. As an incredibly powerful homie made of flames, Prometheus has the ability to increase his temperature to incredible levels to the point where it can melt steel even from a distance and spit gigantic fireballs that can level multiple city blocks. His fire physiology renders him immune to most conventional attacks but also makes him vulnerable to attacks that would otherwise affect flames.

familiar.name: Terraprisma
familiar.description: Terraria - The Terraprisma are the Blades of the Empress of Light. An array of autonomous swords made of prismatic light. These blades can act with intelligence, even with sentience, flying to enemies in range and butchering with efficiency or striking attacks out of the air or attaching to targets other than you as long as you will it. The power of the prismatic blades and their numbers depend on your power level. You start with 1 blade.

familiar.name: Gathering Swarm
familiar.description: Hollow Knight - A swarm of bugs made of light that are incredible at gathering things, you simply need to think of what you need gathered and the Swarm will do it with great efficiency, picking up all loose change in a city block, picking up someone's wallet from their pocket, picking out all trash from an area, picking apart someone's corpse and much more. They individually do not have much strength, but are capable of lifting 5kg individually. The more energy you have, the more bugs you can have out at once.

familiar.name: Toriel
familiar.description: (Character)Undertale - Toriel is the former queen of the underground and a goat monster. As a boss monster, she posesses greatly superhuman physical abilities strong enough to lift dozens of tons and can utilize fire magic to create walls of flame, explosive fireballs, or to simply cook with in tandem with somewhat potent healing magic. But she is not a skilled combatant due to her kind disposition. And she is also an excellent cook.

familiar.name: Undyne
familiar.description: (Character)Undertale - Undyne is a fish monster and the leader of the underground royal guard. As a boss monster, she has notable physical abilities strong enough to suplex large boulders with ease, and her signature magic allow her to conjure magical spears that either burst out of the ground or manifest in the air and rain down and projectiles. She is also a very skilled combatant who can also function as a drill instructor in physical development and polearm mastery.

familiar.name: Junimo
familiar.description: Stardew Valley - Junimos are lesser forest spirits and are called the keepers of the forest. They are supernaturally good at maintaining forests, wildlands, and farms, as well as farming effectively, but lack any offensive abilities. You get 50 Junimos, and that number increases as you get stronger.

familiar.name: Evil and Intimidating Horse
familiar.description: An otherwise regular, incredibly healthy thoroughbred horse with great genetics but is very intimidating and evil.

familiar.name: Penny Polendina
familiar.description: (Character)(Tech)Rwby - "I'm combat ready!" Penny is an android, an artificial lifeform with a soul of her own, granting her the ability to use her own aura. In addition, thanks to her robotic physique, she has great physical abilities boosted by her aura, a flight module, as well as cores that prevent her from dying unless all of them are destroyed. She also has computational abilities expected from a machine. She also has multiple blades she can control remotely, called the Floating Array. Due to her artificial soul, she cannot unlock the Auras of others, and she also comes with some extra equipment to facilitate copulation.(Not Winter Maiden)

familiar.name: Beowolf Pack
familiar.description: Rwby - A pack of Beowolves, the basic type of Grimm made of black evil fluid, the size of a large bear with the characteristics of a wolf. A single Beowolf alone is strong enough to flip over cars and bisect a grown man, and as a Grimm, it is capable of using strong negative emotions as a compass. You start with 10 Beowolves and gain more of them as you become stronger.

familiar.name: Centorea Shianus
familiar.description: (Character)Monster Musume - Centorea is a Centaur who has been trained in the ways of knighthood. Thanks to her physiology and her skills, she is a rather powerful combatant, being able to practise swordsmanship, archery, and jousting with formidable skill. She is also quite skilled in housework and can run faster than most horses.

familiar.name: Yellow Chocobo
familiar.description: Final Fantasy - Chocobo's are fiercely intelligent birds who are excellent riders that serve as great mounts. They can run for quite a while without getting tired and are generally as fast as horses. If the need arises, they can also use their powerful legs to kick attackers. You get a breeding pair.

familiar.name: Holy Cow
familiar.description: "Holy Cow!" Is a Holy Cow, quite literally, a large, healthy female cow that always lactates and can be milked for 10 and up to 50 liters of milk per day, depending on how well fed she is. Thanks to her holy origins, the milk she produces is truly extraordinary, having great health benefits, nutrient-dense, and of incredible quality compared to mundane milk. It can also function as low-quality holy water against unholy. Any children she has will mostly inherit her incredible genes and holy blessing.

familiar.name: Cathyl
familiar.description: (Character)Monster Musume - Cathyl is a minotaur, a species of Liminals known for robust physiques and their milk. She towers over the average human and is 10x stronger than a grown man and has exceptional stamina, making her well-suited to labour, especially with her experience farming and ranching. In addition, she naturally lactates and produces very nutritious, rich, and tasty milk, a trait that Minotaurs are prized for.

familiar.name: Dragonslayer Armor
familiar.description: Dark Souls - A hulking, incredibly tough hulking suit of iron armor animated by magic, strong enough to withstand the onslaught of dragons and warriors alike, with strength strong enough to smash boulders with their swings and considerable agility for their stature. Their weapon is imbued with powerful lightning magic that releases bolts and arcs of lightning with their swings.

familiar.name: The Doll
familiar.description: (Character)Bloodborne - A simple doll animated through eldritch means, she possesses no powers or combat ability by herself. But her body is quite lifelike, and she possesses fairly competent skills in taking care of others.(No blood echoes or bloodborne mechanics carry over)

familiar.name: Lady of Ariandel
familiar.description: (Character)Dark Souls - A child born in the painted world of Ariandel with draconic features, she was taught the art of painting and the special art of creating "Painted Worlds". If given sufficiently powerful catalysts made into paint, she is capable of creating her very own Painted Worlds, self-contained pocket worlds that can only be entered through their paintings. The size and quality of the world depend on the potency of the paint given. Despite her lineage, she has little to no combat ability.(Note:She is not immortal)

familiar.name: Royal Sentinels
familiar.description: Dark Souls - Royal Sentinels are elite giant guards that serve as the guards to the gods of Anor Londo. They stand several times the height of the average human, possess strength relative to their size, and are equipped with armor, halberds, and shields akin to walls. In addition to their massive stature and relative strength, they possess the ability to heal themselves. You start with 2 sentinels and acquire more as you become stronger.

familiar.name: Miriel the Pastor of Vows
familiar.description: (Character)Elden Ring - "The best dog" Miriel is an ancient, aged, sentient, and intelligent turtle officially ordained as a pastor. While he may not have notable powers beyond his sturdy shell, he is an incredibly skilled and compassionate teacher, in both spiritual, emotional, and even magical matters, being able to provide guidance to many. While he may not come with any of his miracles and spells from his own world, he would be incredibly helpful if you choose to study with his help on the magic of your own world, or any Grimoires you might receive thanks to his great insight and teaching ability.

familiar.name: Bucky
familiar.description: (Character)Chainsaw Man - Bucky is the Chicken Devil, as a devil he can form devil contracts with others and heal himself through blood, but due to the lack of fear towards chickens, he is even weaker than a cat and without any special abilities beyond his Devil Physiology.

familiar.name: Earthmover
familiar.description: (Tech)Ultrakill - THR 1000 - Earthmover is a Supreme Machine of titanic size, it is a moving military base of immense destruction made to turn cities into ashes in its wake, with its Lightning Spear's power eclipsing most nuclear weapons, and its forcefield that can easily withstand its own spears. It is also equipped with other weapons like missile platforms, giant autocanons, and laser canons.
