Due to its sheer size, there is a small city on the Earthmover's back that is completely livable, and it contains drones to repair itself. The Earthmover requires sunlight and Blood to fuel itself; its ammunition and blood reserves are refueled every 24 hours.

familiar.name: Flesh Leviathan
familiar.description: Ultrakill - The Leviathan is a Supreme Demon from hell, fused from the flesh of the sullen from the bottom of the River Styx. Its body is incredibly large and durable to the point where most conventional weapons are useless against it unless aimed at its weak spot. As a supreme demon, the Leviathan can harness Hell energy to unleash explosive orbs and lasers from its mouth alongside its immense strength.

familiar.name: Swordsmachine
familiar.description: (Tech)Ultrakill - Swordsmachine is a greater machine that has built itself a new form over time from scrap and spare parts, even building itself its own sword. The Swordsmachine is renowned for its combat prowess, having fought denizens of hell for extended periods of time. Alongside it's ability to build basic tech out of scrap, the Swordsmachine has a durable body with a shotgun arm and a motorized sword that it wields with notable finesse. The swordsmachine is powered and fueled by blood and requires it to function.

familiar.name: Mindflayer
familiar.description: (Tech)Ultrakill - The Mindflayer is a Greater Machine that has adapted to the ecology of hell incredibly well, allowing it to expertly harness Hell Energy to create explosive orbs, laser beams, and even teleport short distances alongside its ability to levitate.

familiar.name: Geryon the Watcher of the Skies
familiar.description: Geryon, the Watcher of the Skies, is a Supreme Demon, an amalgamation of numerous demons, but instead of being a homogenous entity, the numerous consciousnesses within Geryon learned to act in tandem. That, along with its great physical abilities, its mastery over Hell Energy allowing it to unleash lasers and explosives, and its bow of flesh, make Geryon an incredibly efficient hunter and combatant.

familiar.name: Hell
familiar.description: Ultrakill - That's right, it's Hell itself, all of it, localized entirely within your Familiar Space. Hell is a supermassive, hyperintelligent, sentient dimension and organism created by the Heavenly God. Hell is made up of 9 layers, vast planes it can freely shape and control, filled with innumerable sinners, demons, machines, and husks. It can also create gates into the real world at will to drag beings into itself or let demons out. In addition, thanks to being an afterlife, Hell can drag souls that have died in the current dimension into itself.

familiar.name: Puss
familiar.description: (Character)Puss in Boots - Puss is an anthropomorphic cat clad in his signature boots, belt, hat, and rapier. Puss is quite agile and relatively strong for his size. Paired with his skill in bladed weapons and combat experience, he is a formidable combatant. In addition, Puss has 9 lives; whenever he experiences a mortal wound, he is restored to full condition and loses a life.

familiar.name: Noah's Menagerie
familiar.description: You obtain a copy of one male and one female copy of every animal that has roamed the Earth at the time of the Ark's construction. Even if the original animals die, if the number of the animal species ever drops to below 2, another pair will spawn.

familiar.name: Gore Magala
familiar.description: Monster Hunter - Gore Magala is a Demi Elder Dragon, one that has yet to reach full adulthood. It has six limbs with one pair of arms serving as arms for its massive body. The Gore Magala has considerable physical strength but is blind and relies on its scales to sense find its way around alongside heat. The Gore Magala constantly scatters minuscule pollen-like scales and pollutes the air with them to find its way around. In addition, these pollens contain the Frenzy Virus, an affliction that can infect more Bestial beings to induce a berserk-like state in them while causing Humanoid creatures to be unable to heal naturally for a time. If fed high-quality prey enough, after some time, Gore Magala can metamorphose into a Shagaru Magala.

familiar.name: Shagaru Magala
familiar.description: Monster Hunter - Shagaru Magala is an Elder Dragon and the Mature Species of the Gore Magala. It has immense physical strength contained in its large frame and 6 limbs. The Shagaru Magala has the ability to scatter its minuscule scales like pollen to more accurately perceive its surroundings and inflict the Frenzy Virus, which it can also do with its breath attacks. The Frenzy Virus can induce Berserk in beastial creatures and render humanoid ones unable to heal naturally. The range of Shagaru's scales is large enough to cover the mountain it roosts in. In addition, if the host is compatible enough, the scales of a Shagaru Magala can act like eggs and use the host as a hatchery to spawn infants of its kind.
